name: Jane Fonda
subject: This is what climate leadership looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | Hi Friend,
Jane Fonda here. There’s a lot of noise in politics these days — but when you find someone like Elizabeth Guzmán,_you pay attention._
**Elizabeth is exactly the kind of leader I had in mind when I launched the Jane Fonda Climate PAC: someone who listens to their community, stands up to powerful polluters, and puts people over profits.[That’s why I hope you’ll join me in contributing whatever amount makes sense for you today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtlD_sLtn7jElHJoP9AHBoiVoJ1gvvgDIeQFa3BP71OUwzK56PMl5s8qa2nvLanbZJYg2UHoukqbXNCcY9PcdWP7K5gS1cdOEr0PmfYI-M1HiCwrEXlpFx_XNAdliIfTCE5D-SQGhXP8fZZpGztHyhzU2XaClACWWs2L7P9VcGnmdbDpJTJWNCjrtjuQPnAJPIVB0rtY_q5Gc-xv1A4Yu8RfC0oWKODkPUErPYrBt6ucm7iA6wvLImZPDxhshVTLfyiz1xy36EBddikaUEulP9aGjXi1JBIYtitx_8F7i4e3h-Uopl4zhCgl66DJ77aBMdexpnJNSCt0Xtn8Bl66x9_mfxKLJLbFnJ9gmgwyES612V0aW_yrldUJXmuQHcFMCI/4hl/xq1CxyTRS3a2FXLO04TYqg/h0/h001.z7EKp8ygyduqZXQBfJwkAHkegBUkGfm3OF4gmEUsTCA)**
Elizabeth Guzmán is a mom, a social worker, a union member who immigrated from Peru with $300 to her name, worked three minimum wage jobs to support her family, and made history as one of the first Latinas elected to Virginia’s General Assembly.
And it’s no surprise why. Her platform is rooted in justice, equity, and real solutions to the climate crisis and she is fully committed to making sure Virginia’s future is powered by people, not corporate greed.
She’s fought to protect our waterways from toxic gold mining, pushed to hold polluters accountable and knows it’s well past time to declare climate change an emergency.
She knows that climate change hits frontline families first and hardest. That’s why she championed clean energy investments in working-class communities across the state.
**If we want to win the fight for our future and resist the dangerous agenda of Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans everywhere, we need to support candidates like Elizabeth, especially in critical down-ballot races like this.**
******[Will you chip in what you can to help power Elizabeth’s campaign?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtlD_sLtn7jElHJoP9AHBoiVoJ1gvvgDIeQFa3BP71OUwzK56PMl5s8qa2nvLanbZLO8IRfS8dDmSOZt5UX48eowd2gQmD3ZnV91Q_EZWZhW_4Kqdya-OVuJXA84yRaqulelErXvO9nOoyc90NFy3GXD03i5ozpW1HsteUDPE3BlcPjbea6s_SfapYO-sfPRgrO4g3qBk3Zxn39QDlxallsaNOl_nFKEZMKtwcdw1EiJpPPdgoJuqClq6PhUIK-qQLB6fyTnnjL9_RJ30VnZazbMcjBOfLNm1TwJTmjgBlL-LnXaYc79tjP7wDeHxFDk66PGyiHIsHpNhdLwPhw_nzi1ltu_W7m0j99rueYQl_yqDVaE4EyTopZ2FJFpFIaC6w/4hl/xq1CxyTRS3a2FXLO04TYqg/h1/h001.BVaLVs_p898XWqplMyQeyBzojUesJYvrhyl4iIpXQJw)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Don't be fooled by the name
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=0duHUBOw+JmGt5WrUb680XKYj4TsCKoYCauhu8T9EoJjIlXs+zaWtR1+71h8k+pLLQHZmnmsGC5ZFZnEvsy6xbg17t5W+xmNS9uqwEdVk0g=]
CBS: Experts warn the proposed SAVE Act could make it harder for some married women to vote. Here's who could be affected. [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=20.00&contactdata=0duHUBOw+JmGt5WrUb680XKYj4TsCKoYCauhu8T9EoJjIlXs+zaWtR1+71h8k+pLLQHZmnmsGC5ZFZnEvsy6xbg17t5W+xmNS9uqwEdVk0g=]
The SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights and passed the U.S. House of Representatives. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law, folks.
Don’t be fooled by the name. This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register -- something millions of eligible Americans don’t have on hand. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”

clean_body: Voter Action Project [=] CBS: Experts warn the proposed SAVE Act could make it harder for some married women to vote. Here's who could be affected. [=] The SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights and passed the U.S. House of Representatives. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law, folks. Don’t be fooled by the name. This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register -- something millions of eligible Americans don’t have on hand. And that’s the point. The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including: Registration by mail 3rd party voter registration drives Online voter registration in states that allow it Automatic voter registration Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities. “ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ” Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. name: MAGA attacks escalate! (via VPP)
subject: Will you stand with Gavin Newsom??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We’re just waiting on you...
| **⚠️ _TRUMP’S ATTACKS AGAINST GAVIN NEWSOM ARE ESCALATING_ ⚠️** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91217?t=6&akid=20278%2E878179%2EALWgIq) **But we’re STILL waiting for you to sign onto our letter to stand with Governor Gavin Newsom — _what gives!?_**

[**We’re hitting send tomorrow at 9AM, friend, and we’re waiting on just 12 signatures from your state. Don’t leave us hanging:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91217?t=7&akid=20278%2E878179%2EALWgIq) | [**SIGN MY NAME: STAND WITH GAVIN NEWSOM »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91217?t=8&akid=20278%2E878179%2EALWgIq)
---
TO: Governor Gavin Newsom
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Governor Newsom,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy and the will of the people against Donald Trump’s _extremist political theater_ in California.**

You are bravely risking everything — even arrest — to stand up for the American people, and we’re extremely grateful.

**As Trump resorts to POLITICAL THEATER to threaten and intimidate Americans,_your resilience is needed now more than ever._**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting Trump do whatever he pleases — so I’m doing everything in my power to protect Democrats like you who are brave enough to face Trump head-on and risk MAGA revenge.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91217?t=9&akid=20278%2E878179%2EALWgIq) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91217?t=10&akid=20278%2E878179%2EALWgIq)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91217?t=11&akid=20278%2E878179%2EALWgIq)
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20278%2E878179%2EALWgIq). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20278%2E878179%2EALWgIq).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20278%2E878179%2EALWgIq) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=20278%2E878179%2EALWgIq). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20278%2E878179%2EALWgIq)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20278%2E878179%2EALWgIq)

subject: Trump’s Orders: 700 Marines in Los Angeles. Now he wants Gavin Newsom arrested.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=062225_4 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=062225_4]
Peter, if you've been waiting for the moment to act - this is it.
Because Donald Trump just crossed another line.
🚨 He sent 700 Marines into Los Angeles to help the National Guard suppress peaceful protests against his inhumane ICE raids.
🚨 He’s using the military to intimidate civilians - on American soil.
🚨 And now, he’s calling for the ARREST of California Governor Gavin Newsom... simply for daring to stand up to him.
This is what fascism looks like in real time.
We cannot be passive. We cannot wait. We must respond with overwhelming resistance — right now.
We’re mobilizing emergency resources to support Democrats who are bravely fighting back against Trump’s authoritarian power grabs. But we’re falling short of what we need to scale up fast. Can you rush a donation immediately - $10, $25, whatever you can - to help fund this fight? Every moment we wait is a moment Trump gains more power. name: Eve Schiff
subject: Derek, will you sign Adam’s birthday card?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8707%2E5257348%2EyvIk75)
Hi Derek — it’s Eve, Adam’s wife.
As you can imagine, Adam is incredibly busy right now, standing up to Trump’s extreme agenda and defending our rights every day in the Senate. Day in and day out, he’s fighting for our democracy and for the people of California.
Even through all this hard work, Adam is still a committed husband and father to our kids. He’s always supportive of his family, and he keeps us laughing.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20250622-adambirthday.cpOS3o&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250622_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8707%2E5257348%2EyvIk75)
I’m so proud of his dedication and the sacrifices he makes every day. That’s why today, on his birthday, I want to make sure he feels the love and appreciation from all of us who stand with him.
So I’m organizing a special birthday surprise. Adam keeps going because he believes in helping Californians and our country — and you are a _huge part_ of that motivation. What better way to celebrate him than a birthday card signed by his grassroots supporters?
**[Can you take a minute to add your name to Adam’s birthday card today? It’s a small gesture, but it’ll mean the world to him.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20250622-adambirthday.cpOS3o&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250622_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8707%2E5257348%2EyvIk75)**

---
Thanks for helping me make Adam’s birthday special!
— Eve

name: Message from Trump
subject: I just tried to call you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc

name: Team Bonta
subject: SURVEY: What matters most to you right now?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250622&t=1001&akid=1839%2E1088799%2EybckkK ]Rob Bonta

There’s a lot going on right now, so it’s more important than ever that
Rob is focused on the issues that matter most to the people he represents
— including you.

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250622-survey/?t=1002&akid=1839%2E1088799%2EybckkK ]We’re asking supporters across California to fill out a quick
end-of-quarter survey. It’ll take just a minute, and your responses will
help shape the fights we prioritize in the months ahead:

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250622-survey/?t=1003&akid=1839%2E1088799%2EybckkK ]TAKE THE SURVEY

Rob has sued the Trump administration 26 times in 22 weeks — and he’ll
keep suing every single time Trump breaks the law or violates the
Constitution.

But his work goes beyond just holding the President accountable to the
law. This year, he’s taken on powerful special interests, stood up for
communities hit hardest by disaster, prosecuted corporate landlords for
violating housing law, secured felony convictions against fentanyl
traffickers putting lives at risk, and so much more.

Bottom line: Rob is using the full force of the law to protect
Californians.

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250622-survey/?t=1004&akid=1839%2E1088799%2EybckkK ]Tell us what matters most to you right now. It’s how we make sure this
office continues to be a force for good.

Thanks for being part of this work.

-Team Bonta

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1005&akid=1839%2E1088799%2EybckkK
Update Your Information: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/
Unsubscribe: https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=1839%2E1088799%2EybckkK

Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
info@robbonta.com

[PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]

body:
She has aggressively weaponized the Department of Homeland Security
#

**SIGN ON: Demand the Kristi Noem RESIGN immediately!** Since assuming her post in January, Kristi Noem has aggressively weaponized the Department of Homeland Security against immigrants, American citizens, and elected officials alike. _It’s an unprecedented + inhumane abuse of power._ **Now, we’re calling on her to RESIGN – immediately!** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250622?t=1&akid=9034%2E614464%2EeQZK-q)**

name: Jena for CO
subject: Did you have a chance to sign on, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Yesterday was the first day of summer, and now is the time to recommit to protecting Colorado’s environment. We know this fight takes resources, and that’s why we’re bumping our email from yesterday with a petition to show you stand with electing an Attorney General who will fight for clean air and water. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yq6QTHQ8I0SjEDuObrMfZA2]
Jena Griswold is ready to hold polluters accountable and stand up for a healthy future for every Coloradan — but she can’t do it alone.
Can you chip in $10 or more today to help power Jena’s campaign for Attorney General and keep the fight for our environment front and center? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250622-email&amount=10]
Thanks, team!
– Jena for CO
----- Original Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250622-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250622-email]
Peter,
Today is the first day of summer, a season that reminds us just how lucky we are to call Colorado home.
From mountain hikes to river floats to crisp mornings, summer in Colorado is something special. But climate change is threatening what makes our state so extraordinary. Wildfire seasons are getting longer. Air quality alerts are becoming routine.
That’s why we need leaders who will treat the climate crisis like the urgent threat it is.
Will you sign our petition calling on the next Attorney General to be a champion for clean air, clean water, and a healthy environment for all? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yq6QTHQ8I0SjEDuObrMfZA2]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yq6QTHQ8I0SjEDuObrMfZA2]As Colorado’s Attorney General, Jena Griswold will take on corporate polluters, fight for environmental justice, and defend our natural resources — not just for us, but for future generations.
Let’s send a clear message: Colorado’s environment is worth fighting for.
Add your name now to demand bold environmental leadership from our next AG. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yq6QTHQ8I0SjEDuObrMfZA2]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yq6QTHQ8I0SjEDuObrMfZA2]Thank you,
Team Jena

name: Team Padora
subject: Using ICE to terrorize our communities

Smoke from incense drifts in the air at the Cathedral of Our Lady of the Angels in Los Angeles, California, where the 2025 National Eucharistic Pilgrimage concluded on June 22, 2025, / Credit: Jeffrey Bruno/EWTN Los Angeles, Calif., Jun 22, 2025 / 23:23 pm (CNA). | Peter,
I wanted you to be one of the first to know -- I'm officially running for Congress in Ohio's 9th District.
In 2024, we came within One Precent of flipping this seat. We were up against millions of dollars in Democrat spending, but we had something stronger: you.
You stood with me. You knocked doors, made calls, talked to neighbors, and believed in our message. And because of that, we came closer than anyone thought possible.
Now I'm running again, and I'm running to finish the mission.
This campaign isn't about politics -- it's about the people of Northwest Ohio. It's about strengthening the border, cutting taxes, protecting our values, and sending fresh leadership to Washington.
But I can't do it without the grassroots energy that powered us before. That starts with you.
👉 [Will you volunteer again to help us flip OH-09?](https://a6x6czhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015pWUAW1iMCjwtfV5rr317iu6z-rvGv9souzasfnZij644meVf74brKw9Nl48MhfRAXcgdA_ViqlCaXn7mmigD2py9l38SZW21FI0Q5S0UfTOpXvMUcmINJT5HiABTUywq0nddQZHS1NQuqKRZ_hOFmUNjt8OwN_qwpGXP0yW6UbDAKCg4bVfRg==&c=g6-IVS4VkMXysGOTtShXA_-ewinQtFv8l_I7NJ0IeIzkq8K9rZH7BQ==&ch=nKW1QJKMG9AP7ZE5oDZeh1_W8UZsb8ijmCo27APEnY2EU5bBI85oWw==)

| | | The CARBON BLADE just released but __I under ordered them.__
Most people are grabbing 3 at a time, so stock is flying out.
[_Here 's what makes this knife so different_](https://app.americanarmsgear.com/campaigns/vw830saedrbf5/track-url/rf332597r6949/969227e282ff9a6b1dd6f847055e0608bc22d17a):
Its handle is built with light weight, practically indestructible carbon steel.
You see, I wanted a knife as strong and as brutal as a full tang hunting knife, but at the same time, lighter and faster than a switchblade.
At 2.4 ounces, with its hidden quick action 1 press deployment...
[_THIS IS THAT KNIFE._](https://app.americanarmsgear.com/campaigns/vw830saedrbf5/track-url/rf332597r6949/969227e282ff9a6b1dd6f847055e0608bc22d17a)

So, because of the wicked fast deployment make sure your hand is cleared from the ejection port.
Trust me...

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1868, Christopher Latham Sholes received a patent for the typewriter featuring the now-standard QWERTY keyboard. The unusual layout was designed to prevent jams by spacing out commonly paired letters on early mechanical models. See [the original model here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGy2yAQheGnkbr1rABhq1CRRt1Nm1KDxcpsDKwDxBq9fcZ5hdv_882Z8-tr_XIcOT9-ukRz22XNdNRIrVFZubh8j7I9q3As8reRPKMLklaFagS0oPTqHcdzNb2fdyJFuqd5uI5orxon7MNsb7v1A-lN045GaXdHf9084miMHm-u5_mjoVV6QDRmuux6dDfncNLWDvo-dgbJc5Ny-S2cW6A9nvKmctkk9XEOrb1qp390aunUchzHpSZuoUpml5N7fLJOLYFrk3J2ammB4M9BpZ3wpPMurng4OEbI9KYCngmOQIXAs4dPPIwIJ7kCEj14qvzIsEki2IskMNPNamWmTi19mf3rQ3G1187gIzmO_2e2b337ntW_AAAA___E_I8h). ## Iran Blocks Key Oil Route After U.S. Strikes
[Iran’s parliament voted to close the Strait of Hormuz](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3unDAQR09jOiPjL6BwsVGE0vzTpNgSefGwOGsYZA-LNqePyBXSjTTS0--9-9f45WOK2_OnX8HRjOMGZ0lABHmM2W-PhNOrYEwZDwJ8Jb_gOkohDReWSzUGH9Nn1FVwM4AEVYFrWiNsq0QvqsV1D6Mb3QsjdWe8sSEY1XXCilYZY0VfRXfRhJWqEULrvp6V8Z33olfWNuphmBYQImGuf2PcaIE5ffANuZ5wrZJbiPbC1I3JgcnhPM96Ldv1Y3KAjR-FyeGSYnLYMUWK03VebjzDjpkgpA9f8Q2FE_IpYQFeKPtIHGe-YF6PP9zPBJkfhXsiP70uhM_8dmt-TOWumRpwioGp79-ulnCWX5D3KruwnzGlWGzLtHiuPqZ_q-m_Ur-d_BsAAP__XnGTmQ) on Sunday, a key oil chokepoint handling 20% of global crude shipments, escalating the crisis after U.S. strikes on Iranian nuclear sites. That morning, [Iran fired about 30 missiles at Israel](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAUhE9jOiPjP3DhIg3dpk2JDH5eXtbgle1dRE4fkSukG2mkb_TN1226OYy43z_dBraGNO1wlAi1Qp4wu32OaXmUhDGnV4X0iG5N28QZV5RpysXkHcZzko23AYCDaMB2vWK6F8ywZrXdILlafDChN74Lehi0cp0IzMy9FEY1aC8a01x0jElp2iCUG5xjRmjdiVkRycBjTbn9TrjXFUI80xtyu6StiXat9VmI-CB8JHw8jqNd5nJZXD3h4xUJH7FkB5GWml_Lg84nvezQ7XTDUjBCoReTOurTD-x0feVK-Nhk658HxohF90Sy--Yw_g3Xf731tvw3AAD__zPrf6Y), wounding 21 people in Haifa, Tel Aviv, Be’er Yaakov, and Nes Ziona, with buildings reduced to rubble and some residents trapped. At a [Pentagon press conference](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtCAURp8GOyYIiFpQ_I3d_O2WBuUy3p2rGGBm4ttv2FfY7iYnOTfn-7rPd4eEx-O_28GWEOcDPpmgFEgzJncsFNdnjkgpvgrEJ7kt7rMUsuPCcKlm75CuWTfeBgAJqgHb9p0wvRKjaDbbdm71g1o6WMMwAPQ6tCNouYRFj8GNDdpqE0aqVgitx1tQnRucE6MyplVLx7QAjyWm23fEo2wQ6IpvSLc17g3ZrZQzM_WPyYnJ6bjOmEtFTE5VzOQkTL1bJqdPTOR5TWRyemWeS8InZF5LOeEb-Ov0rkDFTbL-_CARZtMzLR67Q_r9Wf401NvKnwAAAP__Tnh8Fw) Sunday, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Gen. Dan Caine, Chairman of the Joint Chiefs, said the operation delivered “extremely severe damage” to Iran’s nuclear facilities and emphasized the U.S. does not seek war. They outlined _Operation Midnight Hammer_ , a mission using seven B-2 bombers that [flew 37 hours round-trip](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO4yAQhJ8GdxuRBZOkcHGNu__aK621WWIumI2AxMrbn5xXuG40I32amT8_0w_FFPP9N208tCBT5r0mbo3LFAvlOcnyqBJTkVdjeSRaZZtQYw_aAZrJU0yfyXZ-CMzIpuPhfOm1uxh909066KA1MaK5Wu_CbAlxtjNf-6uzNwrcxeGgaYfmrLW1t1MwPV2J9M04dzZzr6xmH5uU01-Jua0c0kfeXE6LbF0a1taeVZlfCkeFY_48pbYjUjgeYIWjdodGheOrwrFP4TgDwizbzAWeMUmrsJKHJjFxgy0uRXZ6M1D2sIgkLhCkQM20PCpIBnOBVV5f18v-RcV8h0LRKxy7MvjnHlOK1V2U1feNYvr2bf918nvAfwEAAP__9dmQ0w) from Whiteman Air Force Base in Missouri. The stealth aircraft dropped 14 bunker-buster bombs on Fordow and Natanz, encountering no resistance from Iran’s air defenses.
## Texas Requires Ten Commandments in Schools
All public school classrooms in the state of Texas must display the [Ten Commandments](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb_G7ohgMMQpXGzj7m27pTWGccxmzERAnvX-fpX8wtZHOrr3_PlavjBxyvffeNDUNlkynZWpNSpLKphXlvCokrjIq5E8GHc5FtDglPYK7BIx8c8y9HHaiIBsT5O5Ou2vVt90v09u1C5E2MJoTUTAbbTeGAfO-TBicH2a3jbtwRqth-F22azDEVHfrPfGrq4bNMXUpFz-Ssptp41_5JvKJcjR87S39qyd_dXB3MF8nuflscvrDTuYsbQUmDqY3786mCm-ArYk-Q3XVVpTNd2zYjxVo6yCHAfmeFBuVT1fK6egathFWAXGWot8vDA6tSJaZyKqCOOoBu-iWs0WFZrrZj3q6Mj1ZYrPMzGn6q_doO8HJv4Mb_9V-3uCfwEAAP__ssyTbQ) beginning this fall, according to a bill signed into law by Gov. Greg Abbott on Sunday. The law indicates that the Ten Commandments must be displayed in a conspicuous place and be at least 16 inches wide and 20 inches tall, with schools required to accept privately donated copies but not purchase them out of district funds. The ACLU quickly vowed to file a lawsuit objecting to the new law, initiating what is expected to be a large [legal challenge](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OozAURp_GdEb-BwoX29Blm2i1JTL4EjwxNmPfhMnbjzKvMPUnfTrn_L9MFxdiSLe_bgeLa54SnDUCIpQpFJfmmJd7zSGW_EDI9-i2vE-CCU2ZoUJO3oX4mlTj7QogQDZgeaeZ6SQbWLNZbXqt5Dwop72fh87wXgFXMGjQM9dLE-z7jRkhOWNKDe0qteudY4M0hstZE8XAB8yl_cgh4QZrfOUnlHbJexPthnhUIv8QMRIxunl5G7S3_J6JGP9diRjPUOCKubyIGBOcFOHLVRrdSQt8PkIBipDokvfdJb9DwkqPXBE8PR5zDAvlQrKei940xfrjDDGGajqi2G13If6Q4K_yPa34DgAA__9VxYSF) from critics citing the separation of church and state. The U.S. Supreme Court struck down a similar Kentucky law in 1980, but supporters argue the new Texas requirement is for historical, rather than religious, purposes.
## Is It a Buyer’s or Seller’s Housing Market?
Zillow’s latest housing index shows a split market, with sellers dominating in upstate New York and the Midwest, while buyers hold sway in parts of the South and Sun Belt. [See your state on the map](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u2zAQhE8jdTTW_JGlgkUadS9tSmFFLq2NSVEgaQvO6QMHucHrppgZfPh-fS1fyJH3-09MZFvIy05njdQalYUL7mvM7lEzx5KfjfIj4pbTIkEaAYOQavHI8b3o3ttAJEn1ZK83A8NNwQT9ZtfhRtOoJ28AYPSByIwKnHOowroC9Gw_bzBIdQXQeroEZXBEhEkNw1WtptNAnlsul9-Z97ZRiO_8onJxOfXRbq0dtVM_Ojl3cj7P8xKwNpfTgfv70-nkPF2VMZNWnZy3_Ky830XC8qAmEh7iD8eYT_E8PDbyYsuJxFHYkQi5kMPaPkFoAOG4MdX_49oX64-TY-Q63DoN94Qc_2G1b7l8Wfk3AAD__wpJimU). The median home-sale price hit an all-time high of [$396,500](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtCAUhZ8GOwxeFLWg-Bu7-dstDSMXuTsoBnDMvP3GfYXtTnKSc_J9X4_5YSjQvv43G-ri4rzjlQOWgmmmZPZniMsrRwopngXjKxgftxkEdFwoDnK2hsJnbiurHSKgrFA3fSdUL8UoKq8BVTPAKBEHcGpxw7NfWhjvMHYATUX6XhMKZCNE2461k50ZjBGjVKqRz461Ai2VmOrvSHvx6MInvjHVS9yqoH0pR2byH4OJwXRdV53QOtrvmsF08zCYfDwz7SvfTHph4edhTUHu44Y8m4D8SLRg5p4KT7jEZLmn1TOYqqTtcVEIlFXPWrFuhsLvdfmTr7eGnwAAAP__cKqAew), yet homes are selling for about 6% below list, roughly equivalent to a full agent commission, as listing prices average $422,238. While only 28% of homes are closing above asking, some metros like Miami have nearly triple the number of sellers than buyers. Meanwhile, upstate New York remains red-hot, with [Rochester scoring 145](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3OozAUAE8DnZHxH6FwsQ1dtt0SGfwMLzF-ke0EsadfZa_w9aPRaP7c57vDiGn77Q6wNdCc4CwRaoU8Y3ZpibQ-C2HM9K5Az-h2OmbBhWbcMCFn7zBes2q9DQACZAu2HzQ3g-Qjb3er1MpHGJdgwDtj_E35weul74dV89WHFu3Xxo2QPedKjV2Q2t2c46M0ppeLbhQHj5Vy9yBMdYcQL_pA7lY62mj3Wl-lkb8aMTViOs-zC67UlY6XS9eXacQ09lLrUapGTDu9C6aNHS4_obK_GCOdLMHJsquYtsICZSY0Z4d7UGYrVoTClvcFmRWIEXKbrX-dGCMWMzSKb4fD-L-m_mjhx4p_AQAA__9xkIdR) on Zillow’s index—the nation’s highest. Redfin expects a 1% price dip by year’s end as over 500,000 surplus listings keep pressure on sellers and mortgage rates continue to hover near 7%.

clean_body: on Sunday, a key oil chokepoint handling 20% of global crude shipments, escalating the crisis after U.S. strikes on Iranian nuclear sites. | | | | | | Monday, June 23, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1868, Christopher Latham Sholes received a patent for the typewriter featuring the now-standard QWERTY keyboard. The unusual layout was designed to prevent jams by spacing out commonly paired letters on early mechanical models. See . in Huntington Beach, California, this weekend, competing in a surfing contest that had tails wagging and crowds cheering, as we report below. Do you have a pet? Reply to this email and tell us your favorite thing about them—we might feature yours next. Today’s sponsor is , a Flyover -endorsed product. We have team members who keep a stash at their desks, and the flavor wars are very real. Some swear by chocolate chip cookie dough, while others are loyal to blueberry pie. ! | Iran Blocks Key Oil Route After U.S. Strikes on Sunday, a key oil chokepoint handling 20% of global crude shipments, escalating the crisis after U.S. strikes on Iranian nuclear sites. That morning, , wounding 21 people in Haifa, Tel Aviv, Be’er Yaakov, and Nes Ziona, with buildings reduced to rubble and some residents trapped. At a Sunday, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Gen. Dan Caine, Chairman of the Joint Chiefs, said the operation delivered “extremely severe damage” to Iran’s nuclear facilities and emphasized the U.S. does not seek war. They outlined Operation Midnight Hammer , a mission using seven B-2 bombers that from Whiteman Air Force Base in Missouri. The stealth aircraft dropped 14 bunker-buster bombs on Fordow and Natanz, encountering no resistance from Iran’s air defenses. Texas Requires Ten Commandments in Schools All public school classrooms in the state of Texas must display the beginning this fall, according to a bill signed into law by Gov. Greg Abbott on Sunday. The law indicates that the Ten Commandments must be displayed in a conspicuous place and be at least 16 inches wide and 20 inches tall, with schools required to accept privately donated copies but not purchase them out of district funds. The ACLU quickly vowed to file a lawsuit objecting to the new law, initiating what is expected to be a large from critics citing the separation of church and state. The U.S. Supreme Court struck down a similar Kentucky law in 1980, but supporters argue the new Texas requirement is for historical, rather than religious, purposes. Is It a Buyer’s or Seller’s Housing Market? Zillow’s latest housing index shows a split market, with sellers dominating in upstate New York and the Midwest, while buyers hold sway in parts of the South and Sun Belt. . The median home-sale price hit an all-time high of , yet homes are selling for about 6% below list, roughly equivalent to a full agent commission, as listing prices average $422,238. While only 28% of homes are closing above asking, some metros like Miami have nearly triple the number of sellers than buyers. Meanwhile, upstate New York remains red-hot, with on Zillow’s index—the nation’s highest. Redfin expects a 1% price dip by year’s end as over 500,000 surplus listings keep pressure on sellers and mortgage rates continue to hover near 7%. name: Mini Solar Generator
subject: Never Fear Blackouts Again: Discover the 8-Pound Solar Generator that Defies Blackouts
body:
Supplies vanish in your city...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21587/6374453/a7adc750833b8d42bff22587e61b91cab571af4e/ca71b8c06238b6c40471f89062c9d0d59a0d3699)
---
| | |
---
_June 23rd, 2025_
---
| | |
---
| | _**The Future of Solar Energy Is Here**_ **Breakthrough 8-Pound Solar Generator Is The Ultimate Protection Against Dangerous Blackouts And Toxic Fumes**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21587/6374453/a7adc750833b8d42bff22587e61b91cab571af4e/ca71b8c06238b6c40471f89062c9d0d59a0d3699)
---
A dangerous storm strikes...
And in a flash...
Supplies vanish in your city.
Grocery stores... EMPTY.
Water... SOLD OUT.
Batteries... SOLD OUT.
Gas stations... SOLD OUT.
And without gas, that means no gas generators to keep your lights on, and no way to protect yourself and your family during a dangerous black out.
Entire neighborhoods in darkness...
**But picture this...**
Instead of panicking and fumbling around in the dark, fearful and without supplies like everyone else...
Imagine you and your family sitting back, relaxing and enjoying your evening...
Riding out the storm and the power outage in total safety and with total peace of mind.
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21587/6374453/a7adc750833b8d42bff22587e61b91cab571af4e/ca71b8c06238b6c40471f89062c9d0d59a0d3699)
---
All because you have the [**Patriot Power Sidekick**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21587/6374453/74503b2b4e908f610eade8858d4fbc0af9343490/ca71b8c06238b6c40471f89062c9d0d59a0d3699), a revolutionary, mini solar generator that powers all your important devices, keeps lights on, **never needs gas, and costs less than an iPhone!** Well you can! For the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get this breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **safe to use inside** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about... **The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21587/6374453/a7adc750833b8d42bff22587e61b91cab571af4e/ca71b8c06238b6c40471f89062c9d0d59a0d3699)
---
[**Order Today and Get $243 of FREE Gifts!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21587/6374453/74503b2b4e908f610eade8858d4fbc0af9343490/ca71b8c06238b6c40471f89062c9d0d59a0d3699) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes.
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included

**and more!** That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you:

**[The Patriot Power SidekickIs An Essential Part ofYour Preparedness Plan!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21587/6374453/74503b2b4e908f610eade8858d4fbc0af9343490/ca71b8c06238b6c40471f89062c9d0d59a0d3699)**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21587/6374453/a7adc750833b8d42bff22587e61b91cab571af4e/ca71b8c06238b6c40471f89062c9d0d59a0d3699)
---
_"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere – very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21587/6374453/74503b2b4e908f610eade8858d4fbc0af9343490/ca71b8c06238b6c40471f89062c9d0d59a0d3699) **More Raving Reviews From Customers** **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price. **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable. **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning. **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it. **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip! **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most! **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks! **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product. [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21587/6374453/74503b2b4e908f610eade8858d4fbc0af9343490/ca71b8c06238b6c40471f89062c9d0d59a0d3699)
---
|
---

body:

## Texas Politicians On Iran Bombing
Texas politicians [have weighed in](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDvO4yAUhVeDOyxexuOCYhp3mXZK6xqwcxUCEdzEye5_OVv4uyMd6TuP_5flApgw7__gHh29t7LkeLQUiWJdYC2VsGSq8Ippe-aAeV9T8YsSauDCcqWXAJg-i-mCW0WYZBedHAdhR2tG012dnpSEYQIZQcc_Xk4GbBik1YOf1uC3Dt0JE1ZpKYWUsjdaw7AZAUOQFibDjIgBqdSerpHiG9qWPuUVa-_LvUvuSvRoTP9lamZqPo6jvzWg02RqPtcwNafiITE1n1FMzcKeWjE1f3n8URISeoTceI3giVPhz8YbVbxh3rnmWCEjZJ6fPkWovCHFk9xVFx4HpoTNjsyI_Q6Yvs3od3--nPoJAAD__w-Qido) on President Trump’s decision to hit Iranian nuclear sites with cruise missiles and bunker-busting bombs over the weekend, with Republicans generally in favor and Democrats opposed to the strike. “ _I stand with Donald Trump and the United States of America_ ,” [said Gov. Greg Abbott](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DluwzAQQNHTUJ2N4SqxYOFGqZwqQNIJQ3MkE6BFgxpvtw-cK6T9xSv-93E6Yi55XT7xQoGfc51WemyFmKlNGGvjXFdueKcy39aU1yWWepoUKLsDt1N6SpjLazJdChGSlx0F2VtwvTO96c7Bwwm1l5QwUnRSz3ZQ4NVMZoA0gO9yeGPglJYSpJR7ozXa2QDaJB16IwxQylzbns_E9MRtLq96p7Y_1UtXwpn5ugl9EGoUany-q1DjR6PlEGNlnr5-hBo3Rr5tQo3Sa2e9McrC0Jvee2-7FtL1kUvJm-uFgeWCufzp_L8n96B-AwAA__-u2XLU) on social media. ## Court Blocks Funding for Abortion Travel
A Texas appeals court [temporarily blocked](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGunDAQRb_GdF7Zxpi3BUUady9tSjTgYXfyjI3sAd7-fcRG-YJ0I410r865vz7HT6BI6fETVhz4e8ljwrNGZMYywpQLU05c4MC47ClQekwxz6NRppPKSdOOASi-RtuEYVLhrhscdN8p1zvb2-Y56LafVOtU7xRaddc69B_dvLjOfEx3a6eGhitMOdNqrbTWN9u20C1WQRe0g7sVVmEgzuXGT2T8hrrEVz6w3Oa8NnF4Mm9VtD-E8cL48zxvXxX4egrjLxphfMwzRGH8VSWMV-59C-Nh2xBilXPeC8uL7avKCklC4pwoy6XkVQaqXGjamdJDbvBaMXGVSy7ynyL515HcU8AiC24lh31mOlD-3ivTjPLyJ4xvyhC2k2Kk6nph1WMFim8U_r8BjsH8CQAA___OOJyD) the implementation of a San Antonio program to provide taxpayer funds to organizations that pay the travel expenses for women seeking out-of-state abortions. Attorney General Ken Paxton [sued San Antonio in April](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCngQ7ktRebFC6uocu1V6IFr4MlAzmzCcnb_0pe4e-_mZHm33W8Usppu_2llb284j5ufB6ZRbiMNO1F0r5JoSfn-NhC2m5T3udRK901yjbajIFSfo9YBz-pcIGaPbhOWWfRYb343qnYk5ocEFEHTkdG04cJNES2PNfJf8qU1QZAAUCLxlAXUVEXwNIFK1QckuyllYWFX3TE_N6fXNp5X-vsF5H7UZk_lR4qPZzn-XEzb8Ll-P-gwh9X6eEbrfRARdKceZzdBWZyprEumgZNT03PaBrsrEF0oGyM7SJrrosP9zPlnA7rKlS3lVL-jsvvLnt6_RMAAP__IVF-fg) after the city council allocated $100,000 to its Reproductive Justice Fund for “downstream services.” Paxton argued distribution of the funding would violate the state constitution’s prohibition on public gifts. A district court dismissed the case because no funds had been distributed, but the Fifteenth Court of Appeals disagreed, saying in its ruling that “the threat of harm is more than conjectural, hypothetical, or remote.” The order will [remain in effect](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQhZ_GdEb-w4jCRRp0m9x2SzTGA7HW2Mh2QvL2K7K7T7DdSKNzdL7v4zpdwQcf1_-woanPJU0RjxKwVswT2JSrT7FmeGBY7tH5uNqQ5kkw0VGmqZCTAx9ek2qcscwNvEHD-47pXqteNTej514NbFGDlUJxBMtQd9IhKGU5omq8OcuYFpJzxjlvlZTQLYpB57iGQRHF0PmacltvWPEJZQmv9MDczmlrgrnVuhciL0SMRIzHcbRbieePiBEjvRcixhOKiPF9w74jhELndM-VnjifhRaIFGJN0Se65LTRH1r664B-SzjzmV4u_F9vV9lk4_bDh-CL7oli6wY-vGfVv8l8GPEVAAD__7vcio0) until the case is resolved. “ _Under absolutely no circumstances should any Texas city be funding out-of-state abortion travel, and I will continue to work tirelessly to end this cruel, unlawful, and morally bankrupt program_ ,” [Paxton said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L_O2yAUBfCnwRsRXP7ZA0MXb1_XjtY1viQoBCJM4_jtq7TqE3zzkY7O7_z6Wr4w5VSuP_FBvr9jXQode6beqS241tZTLb3hi3L8XbZUrmuuYQEBhgvLQS0bpnwuetj8KrZJDuSlM8I6q50ebt4pQ6OZQkSU0k5KSKdwmmwkWI2awpD8p0xYUFIKKeVFK4UmaoFmkxYnzbSgLfXaLv1Gnd64x3zWF7VLqI8h-1vvz52pHwxmBvNxHJc7ld18UgYztp5CJgbzB8ZgzjVgZjDfqfAnvnstfMfCsfRaUuX_zfwfmnd8P_Gkxh-10MlgBqe4MmM0xgXu0AHXwhKftHJcinUcowkgxTg0vz2PlHParWNaXB-Y8t_J_XtHvzz8CQAA__8hRpAH) in a news release.
## Twins Find Lost Class Rings in Lake Travis
An Aggie and a Longhorn were recently reunited with their lost class rings thanks to the efforts of twins Zane and Ella Gates, who found them [at the bottom of Lake Travis](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OqzAURlcDnZH_wEnh4jV0ee2U6IIv5mqMHdkOJLsfMVuY_tPRd87XY3oABYr-P-xo63tNU8SzBKwV8wRzypVSrBkODOsrOop-DmmZJJc94wOTanJA4TPp1tmZu7to0QrT88EM2uh2s4LfcFFKm5u6oZydWQXMTqNR90WuA7ZkLxgfpBKCCyE6rRT0q-bQOzHAXTeao6Oaclc3rPiGsoZPOjB3S9rbYLdan6VR_xo5NnI8z7Nb09vAq1SK16SR4-XUyLGeFJmjA1lF2FnG5cIUtlMpFD0LKfot5cjAe0K2BCiFZYq-sADfyK4OVNps3fOkEKgMptHc70Dh90v9W8HDyp8AAAD__wPUiNw) during a certified scuba dive. Ella, who attends Texas A&M, found the Aggie ring while Zane, a student at UT, found the Longhorn ring. Through a little detective work, the twins tracked down the rings’ owners, David Valdez and Mia Fuentes. Valdez lost his Texas A&M ring during a [party barge trip](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFqwzAQxvGnkbcYSXey40FDoQQ6pFBK6WjO1jlWUaxgX-z47Uv6Cl2_D37D__vcnimmOF3e6cpeHkNuJ96WxCI8t9TlWWKeZKaV03CfQpwuXcp9a7V1B10dLLSBYtpbLILvdGhMwd7UTld1hTUWo4dh6Gp0ATqHNXHDCGz7cLQBmobtsYj-ienKgjHaGFMiALkBNblgKmpQoeYQJc-ljCz8oGVIe155Lvt8LZIfRW6LghdlT8qetm0r93yXe8fP_7mQ9KOC06rg1cH-8_H1WD7xrZh9uG0xpbhUtUJ9uVJMf6T8L8Tq7W8AAAD__xw3ce0) in 2023, and Fuentes lost her Texas ring during one in 2024. _“This is absolutely insane,"_ said Mia. Robert Weiss, the owner of Lake Travis Scuba, has recovered a bucket of lost items from the lake, including 32 Apple Watches. _"The party barges that come out, we call them vending machines,"_ he said.

Julián Castro (D-San Antonio) said the president “stupidly, needlessly and dangerously bombed Iran under false pretenses.” Court Blocks Funding for Abortion Travel A Texas appeals court the implementation of a San Antonio program to provide taxpayer funds to organizations that pay the travel expenses for women seeking out-of-state abortions. Attorney General Ken Paxton after the city council allocated $100,000 to its Reproductive Justice Fund for “downstream services.” Paxton argued distribution of the funding would violate the state constitution’s prohibition on public gifts. A district court dismissed the case because no funds had been distributed, but the Fifteenth Court of Appeals disagreed, saying in its ruling that “the threat of harm is more than conjectural, hypothetical, or remote.” The order will until the case is resolved. “ Under absolutely no circumstances should any Texas city be funding out-of-state abortion travel, and I will continue to work tirelessly to end this cruel, unlawful, and morally bankrupt program ,” in a news release. Twins Find Lost Class Rings in Lake Travis An Aggie and a Longhorn were recently reunited with their lost class rings thanks to the efforts of twins Zane and Ella Gates, who found them during a certified scuba dive. Ella, who attends Texas A&M, found the Aggie ring while Zane, a student at UT, found the Longhorn ring. Through a little detective work, the twins tracked down the rings’ owners, David Valdez and Mia Fuentes. Valdez lost his Texas A&M ring during a in 2023, and Fuentes lost her Texas ring during one in 2024. “This is absolutely insane," said Mia. Robert Weiss, the owner of Lake Travis Scuba, has recovered a bucket of lost items from the lake, including 32 Apple Watches. () ➤ Leon County: A deputy is recovering after being shot during a standoff Saturday evening with a gunman who allegedly killed his parents before taking his own life. Authorities did not notify the public about the incident for more than six hours. () ➤ San Antonio: An 8-year-old orca named Kamea died at SeaWorld last week. Four killer whales remain in the park’s care. () ➤ Hudson: The city council voted to dissolve the town’s police department last week, citing leadership turnover, personnel matters, and budget constraints. The Angelina County Sheriff’s Office will provide additional officer coverage for the city going forward. () ➤ Austin: The Texas Funeral Service Commission fired Executive Director Scott Bingaman last week after alleging the agency is impaired by “rot” and conflicts of interest. () ➤ Midland: Gov. possible that I’ll never go along with their agenda; I refuse to
take their money._

They don’t care about main street USA, they want to line their

They see the American people as a piggy bank to fund their foreign

to war with the Mexican Drug Cartels who have actually harmed American
people.

_They are cowards who would rather fire missiles across the ocean
rather than face the true threats at our Southern Border._

AND NOW THEY ARE COMING AFTER ME BECAUSE I HAVE THE COURAGE TO STAND
UP TO THEM.

Friend, I’m asking you to stand with me at this moment as I face the

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Democrats Accuse Republicans of Being Democrats
body:
Every Accusation Is a Confession—and They’re Screaming

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=9aaa66a879)
---
|

| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “Accuse the other side of that which you are guilty.”— Joseph Goebbels, The Third Reich
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
# Democrats Accuse Republicans
# of Being Democrats
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
# Confessions of a Guilty Mind:
# _Why Liberals Keep Screaming Their Sins at Republicans_
---
| _By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator_
It’s becoming hard to tell if the modern Democratic Party is running a political platform or **just broadcasting live therapy sessions**. Every time they accuse Republicans of some horrendous act—racism, authoritarianism, grooming, election denial—it starts sounding less like criticism and more like projection. Call it **Freudian politics:** deep guilt mixed with the exhaustion of being wrong for two decades straight.Let’s look at the current situation. The Democrats are underwater in the polls, clinging to the smoldering remains of “The Message” (whatever it was), and held together by duct tape, delusion, and the collective rage of people still angry that brunch is ruined forever. Their strategy now? **Accuse the other side of exactly what they’ve been doing, but louder and with more hashtags.**
Take the “No Kings” protests—a group of aging hippies and **freshly-minted gender studies majors** protesting checks notes the enforcement of federal immigration law. The irony? These same folks stood silently (or worse, cheered) while their own party played monarch during COVID, decreeing who could work, which kids could go to school, and whether you were allowed to visit dying relatives.**Authoritarianism? Democrats wrote the playbook.**
Remember when they tried to force tens of millions of Americans to get vaccinated or be fired, denied healthcare access, or banned from public spaces? OSHA’s “vax or test” order was so overreaching it got slapped down by the Supreme Court. California and New York doubled down and kept the mandates anyway—because **nothing says “democracy” like rule-by-bureaucrat.**
Speaking of kings: Biden, Newsom, and their coastal court jesters have no problem overriding local governments when it suits them. Want to keep your town from being bulldozed into a prefab “equity village”? Tough. **Connecticut just told every municipality how much “fair share” housing they must zone for.** If you thought zoning was boring, congratulations—you now live in a state-run SimCity.
But hey, at least they’re consistent. If you’re a 15-year-old girl in Illinois, you don’t need parental consent to get an abortion. But God forbid you try to sell lemonade without a state license or use the wrong pronoun in a New York City bodega—civil fines await. Welcome to **Progressive FreedomTM, where everything is legal except personal responsibility.**
And while Democrats hyperventilate over ICE raids and “militarization,” they conveniently forget the facts: **85% of those arrested by ICE under Trump had criminal records or pending charges.** These weren’t nannies and dishwashers. They were convicted felons. The response? Protest. Because clearly, the real danger to our republic is enforcing existing law.
Meanwhile, Trump’s administration was so “king-like” that the courts have consistently upheld its actions—like using the National Guard to prevent cities from descending into third-world chaos. The horror! Imagine a president enforcing the law while blue-state governors sip lattes and pretend Antifa is just a myth.
Here’s the truth: Democrats are tired. Not from governing, mind you—but from **defending the indefensible.** They can’t explain what they stand for anymore, so they shout about what they’re against: parents, borders, fossil fuels, nuclear families, meritocracy, and any cartoon villain they can Photoshop into a MAGA hat.What’s left? They’re for criminals, non-citizens, drug dens, groomer curricula, and press releases about pronouns.
**The Republican Party, on the other hand, is attracting more young voters than ever—** especially young men and women sick of being told their faith, families, and futures are “problematic.” **Conservatives are now the party of law and order, of economic sanity, and—let’s face it—of basic reality.**
So next time you hear a liberal accuse a Republican of tyranny, racism, or extremism, remember: they’re **just confessing**. Out loud. To everyone. Because deep down, they know who’s really behaving like a king.
**And it ain’t us.**
**dominic@dominicforct.us**

It was deeply saddening to see the shootings of Minnesota state lawmakers last week. Melissa Hortman and her husband were killed at home and John Hoffman and his wife are in the hospital hoping to pull through. I didn't know them, but I've met hundreds of state legislators over the past number of years.
It was in some ways only a matter of time. Political polarization has gotten worse in this country. The assault on Paul Pelosi, Jan. 6th, the assassination attempts on Donald Trump, the killing of Jewish embassy workers, and the murder of the UnitedHealth CEO have all contributed to an environment where violence seems more normalized. People who monitor this say the online threat environment is orders of magnitude worse than it has ever been. After the January 6th attack on the Capitol, friends tell me that the atmosphere in the halls of Congress changed from an open environment where members and staffers might exchange words in common areas to security, closed doors and scuffling to your destination silently.
I had death threats when I was a candidate. Each time, my team took me aside and said that there was a credible threat, and law enforcement was investigating. In one case, they included info about a location. In that situation, I said, "Okay, let's proceed as planned and keep an eye out." You have to live your life, and there's always a level of risk. My family bought me a bulletproof vest during this time, but it felt like wearing a barrel and looked ridiculous.
The environment has gotten much worse in the last few years.
Here's something that some might not want to hear, but most elected officials are pretty easy to get to. State reps are often part-time, unpaid or lightly paid and out and about. The same is true even for many members of Congress; they attend events regularly at county fairs and whatnot.
Security is very expensive. Having a person follow you around also is a major hassle. I generally opted to not have security because it actually calls attention to you; people are like, "Who's the person with a bodyguard?" Security personnel are very conspicuous.
Imagining that you could somehow secure elected officials against attacks is unrealistic, particularly when you are talking about state officials, of which there are thousands. A motivated shooter who is willing to kill and die is extraordinarily difficult to guard against, especially in a land where guns are commonplace.
The political scientist Brian Klaas [observed](https://substack.com/redirect/ce7352d9-5347-41d0-9571-bd09b970ff16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that there are a few conditions for political violence: polarization, rhetoric from leaders, and access to weapons. There are over 300 million firearms in the United States; we are the most heavily armed society in the history of the world. We are at an unprecedented level of [polarization](https://substack.com/redirect/63e1f123-0c42-4f8a-8864-e61ecda23003?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And leaders on both sides regularly use the language of enemies and combat when describing politics and policy. Trump is one of the worst offenders, but he has a lot of company.
I'm a data guy; I interviewed [Barbara Walter](https://substack.com/redirect/dd086c8e-7527-4d5c-b557-1b0a82870044?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ("How Civil Wars Start"), [Stephen Marche](https://substack.com/redirect/1ef61dbf-475c-4694-8ebc-5ef85b03e7b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ("The Next Civil War) and [Peter Turchin](https://substack.com/redirect/63e1f123-0c42-4f8a-8864-e61ecda23003?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ("End Times"), two of whom are professors of social science. They found patterns of how democracies decline and trace America's progression on this track. They each expect political violence and attacks to increase until the fever breaks, which could take years.
What would break the fever? Typically something so heinous and terrible that everyone takes a step back and says, "Okay, enough is enough." There is a period of exhaustion on both sides with the violence. You can see this playing out in other environments, for example in Northern Ireland. Here in the 60's, another time of polarization, you had the assassinations of JFK while President, RFK while running for President, MLK Jr. and Malcolm X. Some think Jan. 6th would have done the trick had Mike Pence been killed.
Will the home shooting of Melissa Hortman be the final straw?
Probably not.
One reason I started Forward was that I believed that a third force in American politics that opened primaries and implemented ranked choice voting would reduce polarization. The mechanics and incentives are clear; if you get rewarded for being inflammatory on social media or during a closed primary then that's what you'll do.
The incentives remain in place. Two things are true; individual shooters often act alone, but the environment matters.
I hope that we can evolve without an era of violence. But the data and history are not promising. It's already too late for Melissa Hortman and her family. What will it take for us to turn the page?
To see what Forward is doing in your area, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/8c8da8ac-874a-48a1-8c08-0193f782f514?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For something uplifting, I interview rockstar Adam Met about his new book _[Amplify](https://substack.com/redirect/aea8b065-426a-4239-a4d6-b49a202cff44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) : How to Use the Power of Connection to Engage, Take Action, and Build a Better World_ [here](https://substack.com/redirect/076cb5e1-6b39-4ea8-aa32-0a14b9d2836d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Feel free to put down your phone and take a beat if the news is getting to you.

clean_body: It was deeply saddening to see the shootings of Minnesota state lawmakers last week. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more | | ---|---|--- * | | | Jun 23 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- It was deeply saddening to see the shootings of Minnesota state lawmakers last week. Melissa Hortman and her husband were killed at home and John Hoffman and his wife are in the hospital hoping to pull through. I didn't know them, but I've met hundreds of state legislators over the past number of years. It was in some ways only a matter of time. Political polarization has gotten worse in this country. The assault on Paul Pelosi, Jan. 6th, the assassination attempts on Donald Trump, the killing of Jewish embassy workers, and the murder of the UnitedHealth CEO have all contributed to an environment where violence seems more normalized. People who monitor this say the online threat environment is orders of magnitude worse than it has ever been. After the January 6th attack on the Capitol, friends tell me that the atmosphere in the halls of Congress changed from an open environment where members and staffers might exchange words in common areas to security, closed doors and scuffling to your destination silently. I had death threats when I was a candidate. Each time, my team took me aside and said that there was a credible threat, and law enforcement was investigating. In one case, they included info about a location. In that situation, I said, "Okay, let's proceed as planned and keep an eye out." You have to live your life, and there's always a level of risk. My family bought me a bulletproof vest during this time, but it felt like wearing a barrel and looked ridiculous. The environment has gotten much worse in the last few years. Here's something that some might not want to hear, but most elected officials are pretty easy to get to. State reps are often part-time, unpaid or lightly paid and out and about. The same is true even for many members of Congress; they attend events regularly at county fairs and whatnot. Security is very expensive. Having a person follow you around also is a major hassle. I generally opted to not have security because it actually calls attention to you; people are like, "Who's the person with a bodyguard?" Security personnel are very conspicuous. Imagining that you could somehow secure elected officials against attacks is unrealistic, particularly when you are talking about state officials, of which there are thousands. A motivated shooter who is willing to kill and die is extraordinarily difficult to guard against, especially in a land where guns are commonplace. The political scientist Brian Klaas that there are a few conditions for political violence: polarization, rhetoric from leaders, and access to weapons. There are over 300 million firearms in the United States; we are the most heavily armed society in the history of the world. We are at an unprecedented level of . And leaders on both sides regularly use the language of enemies and combat when describing politics and policy. Trump is one of the worst offenders, but he has a lot of company. I'm a data guy; I interviewed ("How Civil Wars Start"), ("The Next Civil War) and ("End Times"), two of whom are professors of social science. They found patterns of how democracies decline and trace America's progression on this track. They each expect political violence and attacks to increase until the fever breaks, which could take years. What would break the fever? Typically something so heinous and terrible that everyone takes a step back and says, "Okay, enough is enough." There is a period of exhaustion on both sides with the violence. You can see this playing out in other environments, for example in Northern Ireland. Here in the 60's, another time of polarization, you had the assassinations of JFK while President, RFK while running for President, MLK Jr. and Malcolm X. Some think Jan. 6th would have done the trick had Mike Pence been killed. Will the home shooting of Melissa Hortman be the final straw? Probably not. One reason I started Forward was that I believed that a third force in American politics that opened primaries and implemented ranked choice voting would reduce polarization. The mechanics and incentives are clear; if you get rewarded for being inflammatory on social media or during a closed primary then that's what you'll do. The incentives remain in place. Two things are true; individual shooters often act alone, but the environment matters. I hope that we can evolve without an era of violence. But the data and history are not promising. It's already too late for Melissa Hortman and her family. What will it take for us to turn the page? To see what Forward is doing in your area, click . For something uplifting, I interview rockstar Adam Met about his new book : How to Use the Power of Connection to Engage, Take Action, and Build a Better World . Feel free to put down your phone and take a beat if the news is getting to you. | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Andrew Yang 111 Sutter Street, 7th Floor, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

body:
we’ve reopened our letter for one more hour!
| | **_TIME-SENSITIVE FOLLOW UP FOR: YOU_** Hi there, you were personally chosen as a top Democrat to represent your state in our letter to Rep. Hakeem Jeffries!

Unfortunately, our records indicate you’re the only supporter left who hasn’t responded – we’re hoping this is a mistake!

**We’ve reopened the letter for ONE MORE HOUR to ensure you have a chance to sign.** [**Add your name ASAP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91219?t=6&akid=20279%2E878179%2Ewsby0T) | [**LAST CHANCE TO SIGN THE LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91219?t=7&akid=20279%2E878179%2Ewsby0T)
---
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
**_Hakeem Jeffries Launches Day of Action:_
“Push Back Against the Diabolical Republican Scheme to Enact the _Largest_ Medicaid Cut in History!”**
Leader Jeffries is calling EVERY Democrat to action — but we’re still missing critical support in your state.

**So we’re giving you an exclusive chance to join the fight:** [**Sign our letter thanking Hakeem Jeffries for his hard work and answer his urgent call to action NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91219?t=8&akid=20279%2E878179%2Ewsby0T)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91219?t=9&akid=20279%2E878179%2Ewsby0T)
[**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91219?t=10&akid=20279%2E878179%2Ewsby0T)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

House Republicans have been nothing more than puppets for Donald Trump: GUTTING Medicaid, THREATENING Social Security, and making Trump a KING!!

I’m so grateful to have you leading the charge to defend our democracy, and for never backing down in the face of MAGA attacks.

**So today, I’m answering your call to action to make sure we flip the House in the midterms and STOP Trump in his tracks!**

[**I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to join your critical fight and to help Democrats flip the 3 seats we need to take back control! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91219?t=11&akid=20279%2E878179%2Ewsby0T) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91219?t=12&akid=20279%2E878179%2Ewsby0T) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91219?t=13&akid=20279%2E878179%2Ewsby0T)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
Thanks so much for signing!

\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20279%2E878179%2Ewsby0T). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20279%2E878179%2Ewsby0T).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20279%2E878179%2Ewsby0T) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=20279%2E878179%2Ewsby0T). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20279%2E878179%2Ewsby0T)
---

name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: Tough times.
body:
No doubt about it.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=657%2E2563979%2EZ4aQXb)

Times are tough.
No doubt about it.
Every day on the news we see more chaos, confusion, and corruption from the Trump administration. It can be overwhelming.
That is, of course, the point. The Trump administration wants you overwhelmed. They want you jumping from outrage to fear and eventually complacency and hopelessness.
That is what will allow them to cut benefits for lifesaving programs, deploy the military to the streets of America, and transfer massive amounts of wealth from the working class to the billionaire class of the country.
We can't let that happen.
While we understand most people don’t have a full-time job organizing to push back against the Trump administration ... that is what the Democratic National Committee does. All day, every day.
It has never been more important that we have a strong Democratic Party.
It has never been more important that everybody who cares does something to fight back.
Do one thing. Today. To move this country forward. To help build a strong Democratic Party for these fights and for the future. Please:
[**Can you make a $5 contribution to the Democratic National Committee before their FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close in 10 days? We need a strong and united Democratic Party more than ever.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250622-1A&refcode2=657_2563979_Z4aQXb&akid=657%2E2563979%2EZ4aQXb)

clean_body: No doubt about it. Times are tough. No doubt about it. Every day on the news we see more chaos, confusion, and corruption from the Trump administration. It can be overwhelming. That is, of course, the point. The Trump administration wants you overwhelmed. They want you jumping from outrage to fear and eventually complacency and hopelessness. That is what will allow them to cut benefits for lifesaving programs, deploy the military to the streets of America, and transfer massive amounts of wealth from the working class to the billionaire class of the country. We can't let that happen. While we understand most people don’t have a full-time job organizing to push back against the Trump administration ... that is what the Democratic National Committee does. All day, every day. It has never been more important that we have a strong Democratic Party. It has never been more important that everybody who cares does something to fight back. Do one thing. Today. To move this country forward. To help build a strong Democratic Party for these fights and for the future. Please: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | Thank you, Team Kamala Paid for by Harris Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Harris for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY.

name: Diane Sare
subject: Stop the British War Drive! Circulate 500k copies by July 4
body:
All hands on deck!

| | | [ ](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HM6Vx3bJFWn0kHCKwY0V20z&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250623_mobe&n=1)
---
Friend, With the American strikes on Iran's nuclear enrichment sites, the world has entered a dangerous phase in the battle to secure a new economic and security architecture. President Trump's actions have shattered whatever small hope there may have been that the United States could be a trustworthy negotiator for peace and put us one large step closer to thermonuclear war. Do not panic and rush into the "No Kings," "Hands off NATO" countergang operations that are funded by billionaires to further destabilize the United States and say nothing about the Israeli genocide in Gaza. We must remain independent and educate our fellow citizens on how to secure the future for generations to come. We must flood the Congress demanding implementation of the War Powers Resolution to stop further escalation. The British game is "divide and conquer," and they would like nothing better than to see the United States collapse into chaos on the eve of the 250th anniversary of our Declaration of Independence. To that end, Dennis Speed drafted the leaflet below, which we intend to distribute in hundreds of thousands of copies by July 4. Here's what we're asking you to do: **1.[ Print the mass leaflet ](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HNFwdJMrXR2G1R3l2fQ2L0on1Y2nn_kga30Y7skBdzuNv1b1S8A6WzKTBw0bemdHjFJO2ZMQFJSIJqmWzUFtQsaNLVIN0qDZIIOGX0zhhNRhw&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250623_mobe&n=2)**and hand it out at your church, civic association, grocery store, baseball game, etc. [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HNFwdJMrXR2G1R3l2fQ2L0on1Y2nn_kga30Y7skBdzuNv1b1S8A6WzKTBw0bemdHjFJO2ZMQFJSIJqmWzUFtQsaNLVIN0qDZIIOGX0zhhNRhw&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250623_mobe&n=3) **2.** Email us at info@laroucheorganization.com with a report telling us how many copies you got out and where you got them out. If you include photos and video, you may be a feature of the weekly action report. **3.** Join the LaRouche Activists call tonight at 8:30 pm to discuss the mobilization. Zoom link: [https://us06web.zoom.us/j/85348918186](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=8a3HEiGiCMB8o5sVZh7dtwfFf8Gx0CLsT9bbzgFd5TwJfi75FRpvsOAKCdlW3CRg67aPk24W_96KTyizYaC__uXTu2Bu0_qyzNDkOxSRPhRkc9IOzLjoPYFF9ZIJ_yFb4soMedSMsO8J_oYuP1ysWRpYiNcLBqr0VSb9H7SoQwF3bNUuEprjBuHt_xM5BrfjckMYyOSQMUFm3s7JEG3wRz-9tqdAzbt6Xlyo-GikAWRXjrtcluRcAV5QIXUOQ8ptXYA2TdzBLFC5d1Qfqb_MK8oAFk1u7FBQJIN0pZqhv6gZkqh0xaW9E3hB4WpWeUXD4uJugWmg7a8r9DcitJnrjoCC4hQs4NhTrZSwj7cnKEOTJ34Ktzp2cViCFXjEmIRo9HUHuOOIVfVfdVyWw9Gf_RU5CMY-DmzwxMmLhqAm1wRu53smSWytAF_X4Dx-TkPaqGFFc2pqUNNa69ftW78B03ZYKgu86FNAAhhcMY43T7xo76DzDAPQ5pc5jR2BT1A4&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250623_mobe&n=4)

Meeting ID: 853 4891 8186
One tap mobile
+13092053325,[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=k4ZxACF1ydInc4NkPrZ0a-uGBgmuI__o4R0zP6lXkGXMZBd2BqO7xJPmUuuj07HMHKBMjr8d-kryrea9NU-MVA&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250623_mobe&n=5 "Call +1 309-205-3325 via Google Voice"),85348918186# US
+13126266799,,85348918186# US (Chicago) **4.** Tell your peace-loving friends to do the same.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The “pardon-proof” witch hunt to jail me for life.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
I’m counting on YOU to add your name to save me.

I’m counting on YOU to add your name to save me.
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z65ugfp8f04v768vjjondcr8gqhn3e6hub7m7kqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cdie1p76clh2bs)
---
My God, Friend...
---
_Has it really come to this?_
---
I always knew the price I could one day pay for standing by the truth and the side of my good friend, our 45th and 47th President.
---
But what the radical Democrats and the Deep State are trying to do to those of us who’ve _REFUSED_ to surrender to tyranny will destroy our once free Republic forever.
---
**Today, all due to bogus state-level charges schemed up by a Democrat Attorney General in Arizona, I'm staring down the possibility of spending the rest of my years in PRISON!**
---
My crime? Helping to defend Donald J. Trump from one of the most vile witch hunts in American history.
---
_And on top of it all, because the Democrats concocted these sham criminal charges at the _state level_ , President Trump won’t even be able to issue a federal pardon to save me. _
---
But rest assured, while things may look bleak, I will **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER**!
---
My whole life, I’ve always been known as a fighter. And at 80 years old, I’m _still_ fighting back against these Deep State goons!
---
**And while the President cannot save me from the Democrats’ vindictive scheme, there is _ONE_ thing that still can... **
---
**_...The collective voice of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU._**
---
That’s why today, I’m asking you to ADD YOUR NAME to the [**“Rudy Giuliani Freedom Petition: DROP ALL CHARGES!”**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7thfb2560g85neqrvnuru6rfvdtbr44qliv892g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cdie1p76clh2bs)
---

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0d9op9f3o0svdu71qp5krmnhbpsc1073upqhvi8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cdie1p76clh2bs)
__
---

Friend, the leftist thugs who had me unjustly booked in one of the most violent jails in America filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757**.
---
_So, how fitting would it be to collect**2,313,757** petition signatures from true America patriots like you demanding they DROP ALL CHARGES? _
---
[**Please help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to the “Rudy Giuliani Freedom Petition: DROP ALL CHARGES!”**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7ktsi96vhbditus29b5139a2cusscjk7r9a04p0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cdie1p76clh2bs)
---

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zm7u758cubajv6ui9pbjoiijrc08t2gqfdr5og9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cdie1p76clh2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---

body:

name: Ro Khanna
subject: TONIGHT 🗓️: Join me on Zoom for the “Benefits Over Billionaires” Virtual Town Hall

body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
I've been hosting live town halls in red districts all over the country, listening to voters and answering their questions. Now, I'd like to hear from you .
From Trump's unconstitutional strike on Iran to the Republicans’ disastrous budget bill, Americans are rightfully angry. They want answers. I’m here to listen and discuss how we can meet this moment and where we go from here.
Will you join me tonight for a special virtual town hall? [https://www.mobilize.us/rokhanna/event/797664/?utm_source=email] It’s free to attend, but you have to RSVP.
https://www.mobilize.us/rokhanna/event/797664/?utm_source=email [https://www.mobilize.us/rokhanna/event/797664/?utm_source=email]
Virtual “Benefits Over Billionaires” Town Hall
with Rep. Ro Khanna and Protect Our Care
Monday, June 23
5pm PT / 8pm ET
RSVP HERE [https://www.mobilize.us/rokhanna/event/797664/?utm_source=email]
I look forward to seeing you tonight and hearing your questions.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!
