name: Nancy Northup
subject: 3 years after Dobbs—we're still fighting
body:
The stories we're lifting up & the fight ahead | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110085011/553219492/1126318745?sourceid=1150765&utm_campaign=25emius-0606aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmNkNjVmZC0zNzUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70MFtptOptr3WCG0UuiSaJg61GDZjRSjslbkNgTPp4k=&emci=1abbb22a-014e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9bcd65fd-3750-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)
---
Peter—

Tomorrow marks three years since the U.S. Supreme Court issued its decision in _Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization_ , overturning _Roe v. Wade_ and ending the constitutional right to abortion in the United States.

[**The fallout has been devastating: patients turned away from emergency rooms, providers forced to close their doors, and extreme abortion bans passed in state after state.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110085012/553219493/1126318745?sourceid=1150765&utm_campaign=25emius-0606aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmNkNjVmZC0zNzUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70MFtptOptr3WCG0UuiSaJg61GDZjRSjslbkNgTPp4k=&emci=1abbb22a-014e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9bcd65fd-3750-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

This year to mark the _Dobbs_ anniversary, the Center is partnering with Free & Just to bring abortion providers, patients, and others directly impacted by these bans to Capitol Hill to share their stories with lawmakers. Over the past month, we’ve shared some of those stories with you—many painful, all powerful—[**and proof that when we fight together, we win.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110085013/553219494/1126318745?sourceid=1150765&utm_campaign=25emius-0606aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmNkNjVmZC0zNzUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70MFtptOptr3WCG0UuiSaJg61GDZjRSjslbkNgTPp4k=&emci=1abbb22a-014e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9bcd65fd-3750-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) | [**FUEL THE FIGHT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110085014/553219495/1126318745?sourceid=1150765&utm_campaign=25emius-0606aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmNkNjVmZC0zNzUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70MFtptOptr3WCG0UuiSaJg61GDZjRSjslbkNgTPp4k=&emci=1abbb22a-014e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9bcd65fd-3750-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237 "FUEL THE FIGHT")
---
Stories like Dr. Paul Isaacson's in Arizona who turned to the Center when a Civil War-era abortion ban threatened to limit care for his patients. Then came a 15-week ban that put his patients' health and rights at risk. [**We took the case—and won.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110085015/553219496/1126318745?sourceid=1150765&utm_campaign=25emius-0606aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmNkNjVmZC0zNzUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70MFtptOptr3WCG0UuiSaJg61GDZjRSjslbkNgTPp4k=&emci=1abbb22a-014e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9bcd65fd-3750-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

Or in Tennessee, where CHOICES Center for Reproductive Health responded to the fall of _Roe_ by expanding into Illinois. [**With our legal support, they've continued to provide essential care to patients across state lines.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110085016/553219497/1126318745?sourceid=1150765&utm_campaign=25emius-0606aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmNkNjVmZC0zNzUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70MFtptOptr3WCG0UuiSaJg61GDZjRSjslbkNgTPp4k=&emci=1abbb22a-014e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9bcd65fd-3750-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

[**These victories are possible because of supporters like you.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110085017/553219498/1126318745?sourceid=1150765&utm_campaign=25emius-0606aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmNkNjVmZC0zNzUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70MFtptOptr3WCG0UuiSaJg61GDZjRSjslbkNgTPp4k=&emci=1abbb22a-014e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9bcd65fd-3750-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)
[**PROTECT ABORTION ACCESS**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110085018/553219499/1126318745?sourceid=1150765&utm_campaign=25emius-0606aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmNkNjVmZC0zNzUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70MFtptOptr3WCG0UuiSaJg61GDZjRSjslbkNgTPp4k=&emci=1abbb22a-014e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9bcd65fd-3750-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237 "PROTECT ABORTION ACCESS")
---
In a post-_Dobbs_ United States, independent abortion providers and clinics are the last bastion of essential reproductive care for millions of women. clean_body: The stories we're lifting up & the fight ahead | Peter— Tomorrow marks three years since the U.S. Supreme Court issued its decision in Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization , overturning Roe v. Wade and ending the constitutional right to abortion in the United States. This year to mark the Dobbs anniversary, the Center is partnering with Free & Just to bring abortion providers, patients, and others directly impacted by these bans to Capitol Hill to share their stories with lawmakers. Over the past month, we’ve shared some of those stories with you—many painful, all powerful— | "FUEL THE FIGHT" Stories like Dr. Paul Isaacson's in Arizona who turned to the Center when a Civil War-era abortion ban threatened to limit care for his patients. Then came a 15-week ban that put his patients' health and rights at risk. Or in Tennessee, where CHOICES Center for Reproductive Health responded to the fall of Roe by expanding into Illinois. "PROTECT ABORTION ACCESS" In a post-Dobbs United States, independent abortion providers and clinics are the last bastion of essential reproductive care for millions of women. Every dollar helps protect providers, preserve access, and fight back against anti-rights extremists. Onward, Nancy Northup President & CEO "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

He has been richly rewarded for prosecuting President Trump. His without a doubt the “darling” of the radical Left and a “folk hero” amongst the establishment media who are all too happy to wipe Bragg’s fingerprints off every story related to crime and squalor in New York City. You want to know the worst part about the decay happening here on Alvin Bragg’s watch? It is all by design. His actions are intentionally driving this violent crime streak:

Every single New Yorker knows that Bragg’s disastrous “criminal justice reforms” are only adding fuel to the fire...every single New Yorker is being forced to live with the dangerous repercussions of these policies...and every single New Yorker is right to be pissed off about it. This includes me. My name is Maud Maron. I don’t just live and work here, I’m raising my family here in Manhattan. And, **_as the mom of four public school kids_** , I am deeply troubled by what Alvin Bragg is doing to our once-great city. With over 20 years as a public defender in Manhattan and the Bronx, I understand the justice system and I will prosecute _all_ criminals regardless of their background. **_And as someone who spent 20 years as a litigator, I can unequivocally condemn Alvin Bragg’s politicized prosecution of President Trump. Bragg’s use of a “novel legal theory” to elevate a misdemeanor to a felony in President Trump’s business records case sets a very dangerous precedent and should have been laughed out of court._** What’s more, the hardworking men and women of New York City would rather see their district attorney prosecuting violent criminals, _not_ __ engaging in this sort of weaponization. clean_body: He weaponized his office and infamously fabricated a “novel legal theory” to charge President Trump with 34 felonies. | | | | | My Dear Friend, He is the poster child of a Soros-backed district attorney. Make no mistake, Bragg and his fellow leftists would export this vision to your hometown in a ‘ New York minute’ if given the chance. I’ll stop right there. If you find yourself thinking: Say no more, Maud! I agree Alvin Bragg is not only a threat to New York City but to all Americans, and must be defeated... But if you’d like to hear the litany of reasons to defeat Alvin Bragg or hear some more about my own background and why I am such a clear contrast and a clear threat to Bragg, then read on. It’ll come as no surprise to you that I’m asking for your financial support today to overcome Alvin Bragg and his Soros network of billionaire backers. And as someone who spent 20 years as a litigator, I can unequivocally condemn Alvin Bragg’s politicized prosecution of President Trump. Bragg’s use of a “novel legal theory” to elevate a misdemeanor to a felony in President Trump’s business records case sets a very dangerous precedent and should have been laughed out of court. I’m hearing and seeing confirmation of this everywhere I go out on the campaign trail. name: Christian Alerts
subject: Mike Huckabee’s Message from Israel is DEVASTATING.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANTI-WOKE FUND
body:
Something extraordinary just happened.

| | | |

---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgepheqrkeufcmvk16l8frals096o35pcl8oetf0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg60pr1c1h2bs)

Something **extraordinary** just happened.
From the frontlines of Israel, U.S. Ambassador **Mike Huckabee** sent a personal message to **President Donald J. Trump** — a message so powerful, so prophetic, that it’s now been shared with the entire world.
And let us be clear: **This is not just a political message.** It is a message rooted in **divine calling, spiritual warfare, and prophetic truth.**
**_Here is what Ambassador Huckabee told President Trump:_**
“Mr. President, God spared you in Butler, PA to be the most consequential President in a century—maybe ever. The decisions on your shoulders I would not want to be made by anyone else.”
“You have many voices speaking to you, Sir, but there is only ONE voice that matters. **HIS voice.** ”
“No President in my lifetime has been in a position like yours. Not since **Truman in 1945.** ”
“You did not seek this moment. **This moment sought YOU.** ”
“I will not abandon this post. Our flag will NOT come down.”
This is the kind of leadership America needs—**a calling, not a campaign.** A President **chosen** , not selected.
Mike Huckabee’s message was a thunderclap across a broken world—a reminder that **God is still at work** , and **America still has a leader strong enough to hear His voice.** While the Left mocks and the media distorts...
While AOC and Ilhan Omar **cheer terror in the streets** and call for Israel to be erased...
While Democrats kneel to radical mobs and turn their backs on God’s people...
**President Trump listens. He leads. He stands.**
And today, we’re asking YOU to stand with him—and with Ambassador Huckabee—at one of the most pivotal moments in modern history.
This is not just about politics.
**This is about the soul of America.**

[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6l0lap227glbu0kubshrclrrhed4b5lvqlnc538_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg60pr1c1h2bs)

**Will you answer the call?**

[YES — I STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP AND MIKE HUCKABEE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z18f1h9e1pdfrpk65583b6o985bgfsn9e8ugm3v0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg60pr1c1h2bs)

.

PAID FOR BY ANTI-WOKE FUND

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

We want to turn your attention to two unsettling graphics. | | |

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110086562/553224170/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250624Dobbs_N_CD_90DO_8_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmZGFkYjVjLTNhNTAtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vp1-2lnf49yDoXWi5K7bsAODjS7f_BRA2WFk_re1_eE=)

Hi Peter,

Tomorrow marks the three-year anniversary of the day millions of Americans were stripped of a hard-fought right – the only time that has ever happened in U.S. history: The fall of _Roe v. Wade_.

We’ve seen the tragic consequences of this Supreme Court decision play out over the last three years, so we wanted to take a moment to remind you of how we got here – and how we can defend our rights for the future.

As you can see below, there is a clear correlation between harmful policy about women and a lack of women’s representation in government. **Of the 10 states with the _least amount of women_ in state government, 8 passed complete abortion bans in the immediate moments after _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned. That means the abortion bans we’ve seen sweeping across the country have actually been written by rooms full of men.**

[**We know that having more women in the rooms where decisions about _our_ bodies are being made will be our best defense against future sexist policies. Help chip away at the male supermajorities in states with abortion bans by rushing $20.25 or more today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250624Dobbs_N_CD_90DO_8_G_N_L1&amount=20.25)

---
**These aren't the only states with abortion bans, of course – but it's no coincidence that the states with the very lowest representation numbers for women in government almost all have abortion bans.** We don’t understand where these male policymakers found the audacity to pass dangerous laws about women’s bodies – especially with so few women in the rooms to weigh in on these decisions. But we DO know that each and every one of them should be voted out of public office. _The work we do at Her Bold Move is helping to make that happen._

We also want to turn your attention to the middle column in the graphic above. As you can see, there are millions of women in the states with the lowest representation numbers for women in government – millions of women living under extreme restrictions to their bodily autonomy. **_The women in these states are being left behind._** That’s why, at Her Bold Move, we are doubling down on our support for pro-choice women candidates running for office in **red states**. We have the power to enact real change, but we need your help.

[**As we reflect on the last three years, and the sad wake up call we all experienced that day in 2022, our resolve is greater than ever. Women in America deserve better. That’s why we are dedicated to electing fiercely pro-choice women who will advocate for us in the halls of power.

Help us continue to elect qualified women up and down the ballot who will protect and defend our right to abortion access by donating $20.25 TODAY.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250624Dobbs_N_CD_90DO_8_G_N_L2&amount=20.25)

For ALL women,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move

subject: Mike Huckabee’s Message from Israel is DEVASTATING.

body:
Something extraordinary just happened.

| | | |

---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zod6k797r8f5jdh4814vsgsvl137pi0ifk3l3ap8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg68or4chh2bs)

Something **extraordinary** just happened.
From the frontlines of Israel, U.S. Ambassador **Mike Huckabee** sent a personal message to **President Donald J. Trump** — a message so powerful, so prophetic, that it’s now been shared with the entire world.
And let us be clear: **This is not just a political message.** It is a message rooted in **divine calling, spiritual warfare, and prophetic truth.**
**_Here is what Ambassador Huckabee told President Trump:_**
“Mr. President, God spared you in Butler, PA to be the most consequential President in a century—maybe ever. The decisions on your shoulders I would not want to be made by anyone else.”
“You have many voices speaking to you, Sir, but there is only ONE voice that matters. **HIS voice.** ”
“No President in my lifetime has been in a position like yours. Not since **Truman in 1945.** ”
“You did not seek this moment. **This moment sought YOU.** ”
“I will not abandon this post. Our flag will NOT come down.”
This is the kind of leadership America needs—**a calling, not a campaign.** A President **chosen** , not selected.
Mike Huckabee’s message was a thunderclap across a broken world—a reminder that **God is still at work** , and **America still has a leader strong enough to hear His voice.** While the Left mocks and the media distorts...
While AOC and Ilhan Omar **cheer terror in the streets** and call for Israel to be erased...
While Democrats kneel to radical mobs and turn their backs on God’s people...
**President Trump listens. He leads. He stands.**
And today, we’re asking YOU to stand with him—and with Ambassador Huckabee—at one of the most pivotal moments in modern history.
This is not just about politics.
**This is about the soul of America.**

[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za77umad4pbdcdnsa3rr36mhphoonhvjop59cqso_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg68or4chh2bs)

**Will you answer the call?**

[YES — I STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP AND MIKE HUCKABEE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbqkp9re25q0db81ubfukjl8goi03qrn0ll49in8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg68or4chh2bs)

.

# Is this just the beginning? Iran warns Trump of a longer conflict
Ebrahim Zolfaqari, a spokesman for Iran's military headquarters,**[threatened in a video statement](https://substack.com/redirect/31b0add6-2f6d-427c-8ea4-07f4e55d4801?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that "Mr. Trump, the gambler, you may start this war, but we will be the ones to end it," following the weekend U.S. airstrikes on Iranian nuclear facilities.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/31b0add6-2f6d-427c-8ea4-07f4e55d4801?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump hinted at regime change while his administration officially denied that goal** \- The president posted on Truth Social questioning why there wouldn't be regime change if Iran's current leadership can't "MAKE IRAN GREAT AGAIN," though Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth stressed the mission was "not about regime change" but solely destroying Iran's nuclear program.
* **The U.S. strikes caused "monumental damage" to Iranian nuclear facilities** \- Trump ordered 75 precision-guided munitions including bunker-busters and Tomahawk missiles against three nuclear sites, with experts saying satellite imagery shows the Fordow nuclear plant and its uranium-enriching centrifuges were severely damaged or destroyed.
* **Diplomatic efforts collapsed when Iran's Supreme Leader went into hiding** \- Trump authorized the strikes after Turkey-proposed peace talks failed when Ayatollah Ali Khamenei went "radio silent" amid assassination fears from Israel, leaving no way to reach a nuclear deal, while Iran retaliated with missile strikes on Tel Aviv and Israel responded with airstrikes on Iranian military targets.

* * *
# Marco Rubio DESTROYS CBS host for challenging justification for Trump Iran strike
[](https://substack.com/redirect/577ea580-8be3-45d1-99f5-b02819698e03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Rubio clashed with Margaret Brennan over whether Iran had officially ordered nuclear weaponization** \- When the "Face the Nation" host questioned his use of "weaponization ambitions" and asked about intelligence on Iran's Supreme Leader ordering weapons development, Rubio dismissed it as "irrelevant" and said "it doesn't matter if the order was given."
* **The Secretary of State argued Iran already has all the components needed for nuclear weapons** \- Rubio pointed to Iran's 60% enriched uranium (noting only nuclear weapons countries have that level), underground facilities buried 300 feet in mountains, space program, and thousands of missiles as evidence they're preparing for weaponization regardless of any formal order.
* **Rubio rejected intelligence assessments that contradicted the administration's position** \- When Brennan referenced a March intelligence assessment from DNI Tulsi Gabbard, Rubio cut her off saying it was "an inaccurate representation" and claimed "that's not how intelligence is read" or used.
* **The strikes faced bipartisan criticism from some lawmakers** \- Democratic Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez called for Trump's impeachment over the operation, while Republican Rep. Thomas Massie called the bombing "not Constitutional," showing opposition from both parties to the unilateral military action.

Iran warns Trump of a longer conflict Ebrahim Zolfaqari, a spokesman for Iran's military headquarters, that "Mr. Trump, the gambler, you may start this war, but we will be the ones to end it," following the weekend U.S. airstrikes on Iranian nuclear facilities. | | ---|---|--- Trump hinted at regime change while his administration officially denied that goal \- The president posted on Truth Social questioning why there wouldn't be regime change if Iran's current leadership can't "MAKE IRAN GREAT AGAIN," though Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth stressed the mission was "not about regime change" but solely destroying Iran's nuclear program. The U.S. strikes caused "monumental damage" to Iranian nuclear facilities \- Trump ordered 75 precision-guided munitions including bunker-busters and Tomahawk missiles against three nuclear sites, with experts saying satellite imagery shows the Fordow nuclear plant and its uranium-enriching centrifuges were severely damaged or destroyed. Diplomatic efforts collapsed when Iran's Supreme Leader went into hiding \- Trump authorized the strikes after Turkey-proposed peace talks failed when Ayatollah Ali Khamenei went "radio silent" amid assassination fears from Israel, leaving no way to reach a nuclear deal, while Iran retaliated with missile strikes on Tel Aviv and Israel responded with airstrikes on Iranian military targets. Marco Rubio DESTROYS CBS host for challenging justification for Trump Iran strike Rubio clashed with Margaret Brennan over whether Iran had officially ordered nuclear weaponization \- When the "Face the Nation" host questioned his use of "weaponization ambitions" and asked about intelligence on Iran's Supreme Leader ordering weapons development, Rubio dismissed it as "irrelevant" and said "it doesn't matter if the order was given." The Secretary of State argued Iran already has all the components needed for nuclear weapons \- Rubio pointed to Iran's 60% enriched uranium (noting only nuclear weapons countries have that level), underground facilities buried 300 feet in mountains, space program, and thousands of missiles as evidence they're preparing for weaponization regardless of any formal order. Rubio rejected intelligence assessments that contradicted the administration's position \- When Brennan referenced a March intelligence assessment from DNI Tulsi Gabbard, Rubio cut her off saying it was "an inaccurate representation" and claimed "that's not how intelligence is read" or used. The strikes faced bipartisan criticism from some lawmakers \- Democratic Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez called for Trump's impeachment over the operation, while Republican Rep. Thomas Massie called the bombing "not Constitutional," showing opposition from both parties to the unilateral military action. | | POLL Do you support Trump's Saturday strike on Iran? | ? ? ? name: Team WFP
subject: Throwing 16 million people to the wolves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Can you join a phonebank this week? | | | Peter, Last week, the Senate released its version of the reconciliation budget — the budget bill that will harm millions of working families in order to enrich billionaires. **And it’s even worse than the version that was already approved by the House.** ****The Senate bill would steal health care and food assistance away from millions of Americans, in order to give away handouts to the wealthiest Americans. But we still have time to stop this devastating bill. [**Working Families Power, MoveOn, Indivisible, and Community Change Action are hosting a series of phonebanks this week in order to have one-on-one conversations with Medicaid recipients and urge them to contact their own Senators directly. Sign up here and help make calls today, Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday at 6pm ET/3pm PT!**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJuplBE8nUpvXhdUbWUJpQhWISJ-zuNdSO_iroX67V-d3OTxEg3yPGmN1n8EbmNIeoEMZVqUbSFQUfBWWvb12ljkTOS6w17WfdHQ1QsThKsdZQUvAR8ZxDDnoijyRnGCFqpT6UoLFaf0D6cr7-TAXVgHApX0LbAUpy0luuRis8nW8qlWI2TS6A5NndPDmRSR4mQwazZFdb6K7er7OPokzFKIXLaMn7U5_m7GKtlQm7Pmc6ZGrqUqrMXZpBkTIzspJE/4hl/zApQaaR-TbuvNVhLMYxAWA/h0/h001.HEGbaO43H_P0V47751C5GqSG6CuZb1EQjh2Ti5HTyKE) **[Sign up to phonebank »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJuplBE8nUpvXhdUbWUJpQhWISJ-zuNdSO_iroX67V-d3OTxEg3yPGmN1n8EbmNIeohC9JoHr5pVBoXTA3iXX-gVAwkJLaPwkqZ-QDpGPw1P7I61ClgudYID4AM7839s1pxULea_hdjP_hoa2_5L6KHK9IjsYEPLE9XQsov2Klqi1rMM15XhkWjP9xd7nUo36Y6zvpBNDBj6_BWk6BGF8F_KFoB9dYvvxtS3i8CdkTP3JbPoJs1we2c1GXl_fVKMPg/4hl/zApQaaR-TbuvNVhLMYxAWA/h1/h001.aLxkzzSKDLtcDT3HpYuFtXrna561gouOfxPEkyWQg1U)** The House bill would rip away lifesaving health care from 16 million people. **The Senate’s proposed cuts are even harsher.**
* The bill would impose damaging work requirements on Medicaid recipients that will take health care away from parents, people with disabilities, and patients with chronic illnesses.
* It will make it harder for people to enroll in Medicaid or maintain their coverage, and eliminate coverage for people who have been granted humanitarian protection in the U.S. including refugees and asylum seekers.
* And it will make it even harder for states to finance their Medicaid programs, causing further harm to the program and increasing the number of people who will lose health care access.

Peter, working families are already struggling. _Millions_ can barely afford to cover their basic necessities — food, water, and shelter — without going into debt. **Republicans in Congress want to make life even harder for working families in order to give their campaign donors a larger slice of the pie.** [**Enough is enough. We must say NO to these disastrous cuts. Please RSVP to join a phonebank this week to keep the pressure on the Senate to block this terrible bill from becoming clean_body: Can you join a phonebank this week? | | | Peter, Last week, the Senate released its version of the reconciliation budget — the budget bill that will harm millions of working families in order to enrich billionaires. And it’s even worse than the version that was already approved by the House. **The Senate bill would steal health care and food assistance away from millions of Americans, in order to give away handouts to the wealthiest Americans. But we still have time to stop this devastating bill. The House bill would rip away lifesaving health care from 16 million people. The Senate’s proposed cuts are even harsher. The bill would impose damaging work requirements on Medicaid recipients that will take health care away from parents, people with disabilities, and patients with chronic illnesses. It will make it harder for people to enroll in Medicaid or maintain their coverage, and eliminate coverage for people who have been granted humanitarian protection in the U.S. including refugees and asylum seekers. And it will make it even harder for states to finance their Medicaid programs, causing further harm to the program and increasing the number of people who will lose health care access. Peter, working families are already struggling. Millions can barely afford to cover their basic necessities — food, water, and shelter — without going into debt. Republicans in Congress want to make life even harder for working families in order to give their campaign donors a larger slice of the pie. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families Party and Working Families Power, please .

clean_body: This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester | Fellow American, TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents... No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL... This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester. I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana. Winning this race wasn’t a “gimme.” We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. That’s because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000. He threw money at anybody and everybody who’d smear my good name. It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life. Despite all the obstacles , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of one man : Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana. As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority. Steve is up for re-election in 2026. Chuck Schumer and every Democrat in the nation would love nothing more than to see Steve Daines – the Republican Senate Majority Maker! – booted from Congress. 2026 is right around the corner. Steve’s radical opponent has already told the media that every minute since 2024, she’s been building a plan to win in 2026. That means Democrats are already funneling money and resources into this race. The fight to keep this Senate seat in Republican hands will be another knock-down, drag-out fight. For America's Future, Senator Tim Sheehy (R-MT) Former Navy SEAL Purple Heart Recipient P.S. We all have Steve to thank for booting Chuck Schumer out of the Majority Leader’s chair! The radicals in the Democrat party are FUMING. They’d love nothing more than to send Steve packing for his role in producing the 2024 Republican Trifecta. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23151%2E4449941%2ERntDhV) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23151%2E4449941%2ERntDhV) [**BREAKING FROM _NEWSWEEK_ : “Social Security Update: Lawmakers' New Plan Would Expand Benefits by $2,400”](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62702?t=3&akid=23151%2E4449941%2ERntDhV)**

---
* * *
It’s so critical that we stand up and save Social Security...it’s Donald Trump's NUMBER 1 PRIORITY to cut!!

That’s why Elizabeth Warren is standing up for our seniors:
This bill would EXPAND Social Security’s solvency so millions of Americans can retire in dignity for years to come!

AND it would show Donald Trump that his attacks on Social Security are DISGUSTING and that we’ll always fight to save Social Security!

[**If you’re with us and on board with Elizabeth Warren’s STUNNING plan, please join 24,999 other good Democrats in signing our petition to give us the momentum we need to support this plan! >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62702?t=5&akid=23151%2E4449941%2ERntDhV)**

Van Orden loves to talk about being raised by a single mom on food stamps. He says that experience shaped his values. But in Congress, his record tells a different story.

He just voted for a Republican budget plan that would slash nearly **$300 billion** from the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), the program formerly known as food stamps. This budget would rip food assistance away from over 114,000 veterans, seniors, and other people in Wisconsin who, _just like Derrick Van Orden's own mom_ , couldn't make ends meet without it.

This is the worst kind of politics: Say one thing back home, vote the other way in D.C., and leave the people who elected you behind. Van Orden is siding with billionaires over Wisconsinites — and we're calling it out.

**Rebecca Cooke is the real deal.** Raised on a dairy farm in Eau Claire, she knows what rural communities are up against, because she comes from one. She's running to fight for families just like hers, and she's ready to win.

If we flip WI-03, we're one step closer to taking back the House. And that starts with all of us showing up right now.

clean_body: Van Orden is serving billionaires and party bosses — not the people who sent him to Congress. | = Peter, Rebecca Cooke (WI-03) is ready to flip Wisconsin's 3rd Congressional District, and hold Rep. Derrick Van Orden accountable for his broken promises. This is one of the most competitive House seats in the country, and it's going to be essential to taking back the Democratic majority in 2026. That's why we're all in — and why we're asking: **= | = Van Orden loves to talk about being raised by a single mom on food stamps. He says that experience shaped his values. But in Congress, his record tells a different story. He just voted for a Republican budget plan that would slash nearly $300 billion from the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), the program formerly known as food stamps. This budget would rip food assistance away from over 114,000 veterans, seniors, and other people in Wisconsin who, just like Derrick Van Orden's own mom , couldn't make ends meet without it. This is the worst kind of politics: Say one thing back home, vote the other way in D.C., and leave the people who elected you behind. Van Orden is siding with billionaires over Wisconsinites — and we're calling it out. Rebecca Cooke is the real deal. Raised on a dairy farm in Eau Claire, she knows what rural communities are up against, because she comes from one. She's running to fight for families just like hers, and she's ready to win. If we flip WI-03, we're one step closer to taking back the House. And that starts with all of us showing up right now. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? ---
Derek — In a minute, we’re going to ask if you can pitch in to support the DNC ahead of our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. **And when you do, you'll be entered for the chance to meet President Obama (travel and hotel expenses paid!) while supporting the DNC’s work to elect Democrats nationwide.** If that’s all you need to hear, click [**here.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025?refcode=em_20250623_3770_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3770_22930333_4PgY2E&akid=3770%2E22930333%2E4PgY2E) If not, we hope you’ll give us a chance to earn your first contribution of 2025: As Trump and his Republican allies harm our economy and attack our fundamental freedoms, it’s more important than ever that Democrats not only cut through the noise — but build the long-term infrastructure we’ll need to elect more leaders who can check Trump’s power in their states, cities, and districts. **That’s exactly what we’re doing.** So far this year, we’ve focused on organizing everywhere and investing in state parties. In fact, the DNC is investing _$1 million_ every month in state parties across the country — an investment unlike anything Democrats have done in modern times. We’re already seeing the results from investing nationwide: Since the year began, Democrats organized across Wisconsin and kept Elon Musk from buying a seat on the Supreme Court, overperformed in states like Florida, and had huge wins in cities like Omaha and San Antonio. On top of that, we’ve launched multiple programs to meet voters where they are and fight back against the lies of the Trump administration: the People’s Cabinet, the War Room, and People’s Town Halls. **To fund all of this work, we’re counting on your support. Here’s what we have on record for you so far this year:** _**Democratic National Committee 2025 Supporter Record**_ **Name:** Derek
**Supporter ID:** 22930333
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Jane Fonda
subject: If I were lost today, who would find me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Trump is laying off park rangers and gutting protections for our public lands.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110093045/553244558/1328794144?refcode=ea.7e00d0d4-4450-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.7e00d0d4-4450-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlMDBkMGQ0LTQ0NTAtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gOQO1L9y_Mew98lrnUKmpvEsRgEarPleVn_DfIJphok=&emci=2005cd72-7e4c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7e00d0d4-4450-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
I know what it’s like to be lost in the wilderness. In 1989, I was hiking deep in Sequoia National Park when I got separated from my companion and lost above the timberline. Night fell. The temperature dropped. I had no choice but to hunker down in the snow until morning. If it weren’t for the Forest Service sending a helicopter to search for me the next morning, I might not be here today. I’ve had many occasions to witness the courage and essential work performed by park employees. With Donald Trump’s administration gutting our National Park Service, I can’t help but wonder: If I got lost today, who would be left to find me? Over 1,000 National Park Service staff have been laid off, and twice that amount have been let go from the U.S. Forest Service. The cuts have caused a severe worker shortage in national parks across the country during their peak visitor season. Earlier this month, the Crater Lake National Park superintendent resigned after just five months, because he felt he couldn’t protect the health and safety of the park’s staff or visitors in the wake of Trump’s staffing cuts. At the same time, Trump is planning to sell out our public lands to mining, and Republicans in Congress are plotting to put more than 250 million acres of public lands on sale to the highest bidder. **In the U.S., people are already too cut off from nature. National parks are some of the last remaining spaces where people can step away from the pressures of daily life and experience nature firsthand.** They also protect endangered species, fragile ecosystems, and cultural history. But instead of safeguarding these sacred spaces, this administration is stripping protections and offering them up as yet another resource for extraction and exploitation. We’re not letting that happen without a fight. **I want to make sure every decision-maker in Washington knows just how much our national parks mean to us.[Will you add your name to our petition to protect our parks and the people who care for them? And if national parks hold a special place in your heart, we’d love to hear your story about what they mean to you.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110093046/553244559/1099905901?refcode=ea.7e00d0d4-4450-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.7e00d0d4-4450-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlMDBkMGQ0LTQ0NTAtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gOQO1L9y_Mew98lrnUKmpvEsRgEarPleVn_DfIJphok=&emci=2005cd72-7e4c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7e00d0d4-4450-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN THE PETITION & SHARE YOUR STORY**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110093047/553244560/1099905901?refcode=ea.7e00d0d4-4450-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.7e00d0d4-4450-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlMDBkMGQ0LTQ0NTAtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gOQO1L9y_Mew98lrnUKmpvEsRgEarPleVn_DfIJphok=&emci=2005cd72-7e4c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7e00d0d4-4450-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
We’re collecting these stories and delivering them straight to Congress and the White House so they know what the American people expect from their leaders.
Thank you for fighting for the places we love,
Jane Fonda

clean_body: Trump is laying off park rangers and gutting protections for our public lands. | I know what it’s like to be lost in the wilderness. In 1989, I was hiking deep in Sequoia National Park when I got separated from my companion and lost above the timberline. Night fell. The temperature dropped. I had no choice but to hunker down in the snow until morning. If it weren’t for the Forest Service sending a helicopter to search for me the next morning, I might not be here today. I’ve had many occasions to witness the courage and essential work performed by park employees. With Donald Trump’s administration gutting our National Park Service, I can’t help but wonder: If I got lost today, who would be left to find me? Over 1,000 National Park Service staff have been laid off, and twice that amount have been let go from the U.S. Forest Service. The cuts have caused a severe worker shortage in national parks across the country during their peak visitor season. Earlier this month, the Crater Lake National Park superintendent resigned after just five months, because he felt he couldn’t protect the health and safety of the park’s staff or visitors in the wake of Trump’s staffing cuts. At the same time, Trump is planning to sell out our public lands to mining, and Republicans in Congress are plotting to put more than 250 million acres of public lands on sale to the highest bidder. In the U.S., people are already too cut off from nature. National parks are some of the last remaining spaces where people can step away from the pressures of daily life and experience nature firsthand. They also protect endangered species, fragile ecosystems, and cultural history. But instead of safeguarding these sacred spaces, this administration is stripping protections and offering them up as yet another resource for extraction and exploitation. We’re not letting that happen without a fight. I want to make sure every decision-maker in Washington knows just how much our national parks mean to us. | We’re collecting these stories and delivering them straight to Congress and the White House so they know what the American people expect from their leaders. Thank you for fighting for the places we love, Jane Fonda | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Hi Friend,
It's Congresswoman Kristen McDonald Rivet, Democrat representing MI-08.
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to chip in $5 between my campaign and Elissa Slotkin, but first I want to explain why your support is so important – especially right now.
**Republicans are spending over half a million dollars on ads that say by voting _against_ the extreme GOP budget — the one that would take health insurance from 13 million people — I voted to cut healthcare..._really!?_**
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-eb-kmr-split.POprBY&refcode=em250623-1&refcode2=2294.135344.tMkVYW&t=2&akid=2294%2E135344%2EtMkVYW)
They’re doing this because I represent one of the most competitive seats in the country – a Trump-won district that we carried by 7 points
If we want to retake the gavel and put a meaningful check on Trump, we cannot lose districts like MI-08. The future of Social Security, abortion rights, and our children’s educations could all come down to what happens right here – and that’s no exaggeration.
[**I’m not going to back down. But with this flood of dark money inundating our district, I need your support more than ever. Will you chip in a split $5 donation between my campaign and Elissa Slotkin to help me fight back?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-eb-kmr-split.POprBY&refcode=em250623-1&t=3&akid=2294%2E135344%2EtMkVYW)

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Should DJT shut down the Department of Education?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
The federal government is not the solution to fixing our nation's education system.
|
---
Peter,

**The federal government is not the solution to fixing our nation 's education system.**

Our children deserve an education system that sets them up for success. This starts and ends at the state and local levels. It's up to parents, students, and local administrators to work together to create a viable solution to improve our schools.

The federal government has NO business deciding what our children can and cannot learn.

**I stand with President Trump as he works to Make Our Government Efficient Again by eliminating government waste, including the Department of Education.**

As we work to return our government to the American people, I'm requesting your input:

[DO YOU SUPPORT PRESIDENT TRUMP SHUTTING DOWN THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION?](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=13176d5d5d3e4c8b84ac38f1aedc8247&_e=UeMbAW_eq4HnRt_WL5y0LSetukaf2WMOSS-1OVI4Bp9ol2f3eZssNeXUV9SIuWVhGBX3AN2tqpp75fPzKoqs9qgsPTiuS-wSMwbToM4FJv8LlpDcsuLti-7WUrlRw1FMvHiu9aKN-PvECSaF5vyOKEU1tuoV0kLJWoabOzvInbHFF578cH-nWXpHg499V2szgtwJ4UdKHfRo_a0tQfqoBOAi65qOFj5539DImrjvIvBOkuSPsVAntQKod0sxNG9UelncTFeNwobV1MrjfI65m4K6LAnby3Sr3oBQFaaMe9nxvQ2wysvfHLKHGYOf-lHoZxANBYPz2F6odJ2QeCa-JaQLmmV_q4VzUJd9CxxKHWP5cXIyyGnQd0kmmzodCrWWj3IxoF2YCb2abfFEJbQ1tOuQw_wXbDThnFdjSvkewpM7HgrmhxstHrqXe98Q-oAC9PxhUCOJlgf0LioCyfCUWoDd0XKdbYn8vc8xBOhRMIqSCMW9IJu5J0IrM_N40dKtXwBrHpjHtBWT7kYXBnJen6UB_TL8c3vRKKRP3ozXQh4%3D) Select your answer: YES NO UNSURE **[Finish the survey →](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=13176d5d5d3e4c8b84ac38f1aedc8247&_e=UeMbAW_eq4HnRt_WL5y0LSetukaf2WMOSS-1OVI4Bp9ol2f3eZssNeXUV9SIuWVhGBX3AN2tqpp75fPzKoqs9qgsPTiuS-wSMwbToM4FJv8LlpDcsuLti-7WUrlRw1FMvHiu9aKN-PvECSaF5vyOKEU1tuoV0kLJWoabOzvInbHFF578cH-nWXpHg499V2szLEj_EZGqveYo5yanB8bcL0OCxnfsOneRk81rT8ZJg0RcxiYLdLMfPx_bLpg3rZrhP6SAJTcrLYUjb6JiFu4mdtBtoGrgiC5GGHw_wdL59GsPztcR5dP0p2JlJHzN-hKkhuVUDNnzJBRi7Ni4T66iaYOr_0wdmsYllcD_kLEvVO2BUSiimPIMHTfvhSV0DICL_nEp_xrfmEmeudACB9EjOq-orlTDLgZOVeUuOJv6aXS0I2xIUnBQr5XlAGRG56HlNm7OJeTEQchnwnK2OhKtvpil_sgJ6srzZ4VDD8LeQgTwWRP0WeXHrjCFbDW1inPPaCQ0oigXQ4xFaW5X21Z_LoACsnDugmr9Z2dDRPwuNg4%3D)**

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=13176d5d5d3e4c8b84ac38f1aedc8247&_e=UeMbAW_eq4HnRt_WL5y0LSetukaf2WMOSS-1OVI4Bp9ol2f3eZssNeXUV9SIuWVhGBX3AN2tqpp75fPzKoqs9qgsPTiuS-wSMwbToM4FJv8LlpDcsuLti-7WUrlRw1FMvHiu9aKN-PvECSaF5vyOKFHOxmp-xKpfazssaecjSyCI_VD4umnlnpzkECcA2U3B_X4Flt_DU-PIIy6m76T11vkdBVW6K90Bw6AJn963I2O1CQeOw_YVoyT6P1YMWYYA5ZCpenlAWaM6RPvnJrwitCLtCqkAD668QkArjkPodeW46aSw2Jw7DtgNUarjJ3uzaL8TnCQyHkQ4iLZHULkjkGJdsk6QlJ7xHy031G5mGFO5aHXMS5F8163s4Jr0Rlcs1Yp6HM_mmhHp8MIBG6_5oeIv8v5HXi-eAdnSPvxIdJdMQsOWAPRCxXIKGnuxs0lGRJAQwbOOjfGUsOaEi6V_gPvpnFZRuS-byAJ38SY3GGziJbxENOgD8MSaWJDdH_Gv8RzBToXSx7vHBEI5ypaFPgG7lZn5vQ_Q8LL4T53AhI2WxcV0VI9d1SUtJ4iFns9v)

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Meet the Man the Elites Fear
body:
I’ve seen what they’re capable of. That FBI raid? They treated me like a terrorist, all to protect their own. The lawsuits? A flood meant to drown me. But I’m still standing because this matters—because you deserve to know how they’re gaming you.

| [****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z57nrkmfvf1bd5458kvtft8rcu06ekr52qrs84do_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg6eo36c3h2bs)
[****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z48kgfjnfr0vlvur2to6cugumjpgd39c7n0paiv0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg6eo36c3h2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I founded OMG (O'Keefe Media Group) to do what the mainstream won't: expose the powerful with raw, unfiltered truth. We caught IRS officials on hidden cameras, bragging about their AI overreach--how they're building a surveillance net to track your every dollar. _The Post Millennial_ called it "chilling," and X users said it's "the kind of journalism we've been starving for." That's OMG: no fluff, just facts, straight from the source.

But this work comes at a cost. I've been jailed on trumped-up charges, had my home raided by the FBI over Ashley Biden's diary, and faced endless lawsuits from the left. Why?

Because I won't stop. I don't have a personal life--just a relentless drive to uncover corruption. I've built OMG from the ground up to fight for people like you, [**and now we need**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zaop3m10lf5rlc8u43r5d0v7jqbukc8r8p8jifpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg6eo36c3h2bs)**[**$64,600 by June**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8gh8g1mb39mu0jpj6kh5ltijtsb39g4m59v04uo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg6eo36c3h2bs)**[**to keep going. Will you join us?**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znoc0ap4erbho4lb1s3j6guenjcnuc0cdc2vqp88_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg6eo36c3h2bs)

**People call OMG a "wrecking ball" against the establishment. **

When we dropped the IRS tapes, it wasn't just a story--it was a warning shot.

Supporters say we're "rewriting the rules of journalism," while critics whine we're "too aggressive." Good. **The truth isn 't polite**.

But fighting the system takes resources--cameras, lawyers, guts--and we're running low. [**Your support keeps us in the game, digging into the shadows the elites want hidden.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z075hsd1am2ps184ka19n7j2s3k54jpkgjalkibg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg6eo36c3h2bs)

I've seen what they're capable of. That FBI raid? They treated me like a terrorist, all to protect their own. The lawsuits? A flood meant to drown me. But I'm still standing because this matters--because you deserve to know how they're gaming you.

OMG's got more exposes ready to drop, [**but**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1tb788pgunh0qbdbsguufthj5vrg5qig5tbvusg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg6eo36c3h2bs)**[**$64,600 by June**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z56421mdenefkv27akn203ocs1041oklk6qiej4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg6eo36c3h2bs)**[**is our lifeline. Without it, we fade, and they win.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpsg25epb92rg700do6pcgvnvjg8j2aft5g0p3kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg6eo36c3h2bs)

If you're sick of the lies, the cover-ups, the smug insiders laughing at us, then this is your fight too. [**Your donation today --$20, $100, whatever you can--fuels work the mainstream's too scared to touch**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zb22k9gt448ck028goloqog6fp10f3saq8c32oe0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg6eo36c3h2bs).

I'm not here to play nice; I'm here to win. Thank you for considering this. **With you, we 're unstoppable.**

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Trump Put a Grocery Clerk in Charge of Terrorism Prevention. Demand someone new AND qualified
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Trump picked a 22 year old grocery clerk as the guy in charge of preventing terrorist attacks. Demand someone new -- and qualified -- NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf27c4ebc-e091-4e48-ab78-587148c76dd3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3925c9c0-6919-428f-8666-4805e24ec80f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Are you f***ing kidding me??? _" Amid the threats of retribution from Iran following the U.S. military strike on three Iranian nuclear sites, critics have ramped up their scrutiny of the [22-year-old who was assigned to a major terrorism-prevention post by President Donald Trump.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc394712-7b43-492e-b247-468d7138bf31/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ _In a Sunday morning post to X, Sen. Chris Murphy (D-CT) called out Trump for appointing 22-year-old Thomas Fugate to a role at the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) in which he oversees the Center for Prevention Programs and Partnerships (CP3) — a division of the agency which is tasked with terrorism prevention._ _" As our nation girds for possible Iranian terrorist attacks, this is the person Trump put in charge of terrorism prevention," Murphy wrote — referring to Fugate. "22 years old. Recent work experience: landscaping/grocery clerk. Never worked a day in counter-terrorism. But he's a BIG Trump fan. So he got the job."_ _A June 4 investigation from Pro Publica into Fugate's background turned up a stunningly thin resume. Fugate got the job in May after William Braniff — an Army veteran with over two decades of national security experience — resigned in protest of cuts to CP3. Per his Linkedin page, Fugate said he spent several months performing "lawn care work around my neighborhood," and also worked part time as a clerk at an H-E-B supermarket." ([source and full article](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a1d71c3-78ab-4642-9f98-98e77703aa3c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))_ [**Add your name, and join with us in demanding someone NEW and QUALIFIED for this critically important job.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ecddc18-4273-4765-af0f-3dbf597e7b7d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc902c106-89af-4adc-a2ec-62b8928165d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td765b389-829c-48a8-95de-ad87c935ff6e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf759b7a4-56fe-4347-b71c-887053d277b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Why Bernie came to Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Last night I was with Bernie Sanders in Fort Worth. I am going to share a full recap in the next few days but wanted to send a short note as soon as I could.
Bernie brought the Fighting Oligarchy tour to Texas because no matter where you live or who you voted for, you deserve to be heard.
While Republicans hide from their constituents and try to gut Medicaid, food assistance, and other vital services, we’re showing up, listening, and figuring out how we move forward together.
[**I am going to stay on the road, hosting town halls and connecting with Texans. So please, chip in today to help us host more town halls.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250623.yX3JRf&refcode=ema20250623-240179&t=1&akid=240179%2E444211%2EsttKD3)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250623.yX3JRf&refcode=ema20250623-240179&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=240179%2E444211%2EsttKD3)**
Thank you,
– Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20250623-240179-footer&t=21&refcode2=240179_444211_sttKD3&akid=240179%2E444211%2EsttKD3)**

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m asking for just a few moments of your time right now.

I’m well aware that if you’re reading this right now, you’re likely receiving many emails from countless would-be politicians introducing themselves and asking for your money.

I’m not one of them.

_**I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **_who has put his body through the ringer serving this great nation of ours, but has so much left to give for a country that has given me so much.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

A few months ago, I decided that the best way to do that would be by running for U.S. Senate against **Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** After living through this man’s governorship, his failed vice presidential campaign last fall, and having seen firsthand what his **looneytoon policies** have done to the state of Minnesota, I decided I couldn’t sit back and let another Democrat waltz into the Senate.

**Navy SEALs fight to win** , and that’s what I will do - for Minnesota and for you. I was recently asked why I would open my life up to the scrutiny of a federal campaign. While there are numerous reasons, **I want to tell you about one of the most important today: childhood education.**

Here in Minnesota and around the nation, our children are being indoctrinated. They’re being forced to learn topics beyond their years that are not in the ordinary curriculum.

Our kids deserve an education, not an agenda. Here in Minnesota, boards of education and radical left politicians, like my opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, regularly override the will of parents.

**Did you know that elementary schools around America are beginning to institute gender studies in K-5 classes? This type of curriculum should be reserved for college campuses, and only on an elective basis. Kids in first through 5th grade have no concept of this adult material and shouldn’t.
**
_**When did the government stop listening to parents and putting the will of crazed left-wing activists ahead of the concerns and beliefs of parents?**_

It’s time to put parents back in the driver's seat.

**[If you agree, please contribute a few dollars to my campaign today. I’m starting with absolutely nothing and would very much appreciate your support.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=97a47514b3f842249deea9883189357e&_e=I1TwoSWmu7KOJAcezpxdmwz2NAhc1tF2Wmo4yU6SEjQpLteo0BgT-EXKTQZMm647zQ44oWfzkdYqq_93ZI0ZYTaKdjTfsD1fAf9YPJMofLqHjPOT1Wjy2TdklSJa3RVu0vtwzOiG6GuZXqPr6LlPF6U1B4i250S6lF88bwdF3ufk6axuZU5EUYqpwD5M1r39WKVv2ixie_W0OPf0cEehIHKuFzB0dfxRd8RaVMomr0q-Yq46-Sro6aqGgaDcNuDg0yiCV37dA5s2W1no4S6SN2wq7xC54v91ne50V2DI7XmtJgkM5lwLN5B81ONrUiaH7emla3w78b3wVWZAUnFh6B0fbrUIAN_7RaDe1ZUzjxRvDXGwGoFHDPpX7xGppx4lYy_JYH5_5Kqd9aD9QhYjDfL0nST3bWyydoH0lqm1F9mxep3hSLRAmaw-8EZe7L0vEt00HzI1Nhkqo9HdzxfkyqH3eDvKOOb1iQWlg8Rr2Mkm9TKwYcREa28sWGiNmVH7o6PUesJVZH9AjZnMOlbR83zSQ36rQhb1BFQn5WXKLvAyb4PT3HF6DkyhP-TsgaRHcgfeDxQqvicwMC2a2AffaaUK06HnWjRkeKG1bnngdIDf5usfbSqcMS_eeMpesa7DgpNfXlMtOJlgf_5FlqbRW9UoNrj3AQbp0Kchc-eTvuJUW9YZj73p8unJH4si_lPqAblGJeoYRL0FlZ4s0hTL1LQWqkBAR4-mi_DxixOAefyIB9Mi3yOdyjkpG7TcFbOz)**

name: Debra (Ritchie's Mom)
subject: Can I brag for a second?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110094878/553249991/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250623_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzIwMWIwOS00OTUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ppOZDLBzSvQnW_yes27c4_TWBAGnUtNMVyiDyA_YeY=) Peter, I’m Debra — Ritchie’s mom.

There are three things I want you to know about my son, Ritchie:

1️⃣ **No one in Congress has more _lived_ experience with poverty and social safety nets than Ritchie:** He was raised by me – a single mother – in vermin and mold infested public housing in the Bronx. I kept our family afloat on minimum wage, which was _just over $4 an hour_ at the time.

2️⃣ **Ritchie’s common-sense, progressive agenda has put a target on his back.** There are a lot of people who hate him for what he stands for: he’s a tireless advocate for Social Security, affordable housing, marginalized communities, Democracy, and more.

3️⃣ **Ritchie doesn’t do a second of call-time — i.e. spending hours on the phone begging donors for big checks.** This movement is by and for the people, even if that means he has to work twice as hard as other campaigns.

[There is no one quite like Ritchie in Washington, and that’s exactly why I’m so proud of him. It’s also why it is absolutely critical that we fight for him with everything we’ve got. With that in mind, can I count on you to chip in $3 or $7 to keep Ritchie fighting in Congress? My son has a _massive_ mid-year fundraising goal coming up, and he can’t stay on track without our help. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110094879/553249992/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250623_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzIwMWIwOS00OTUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ppOZDLBzSvQnW_yes27c4_TWBAGnUtNMVyiDyA_YeY=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110094886/553250026/-935925420?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20250623_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzIwMWIwOS00OTUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ppOZDLBzSvQnW_yes27c4_TWBAGnUtNMVyiDyA_YeY=)**

name: Dan Goldman
subject: House Republicans have Biden Derangement Syndrome
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, At almost any point during the Biden administration, you could find a House Republican in front of a camera calling for investigations into President Biden’s alleged “corruption.” Even now, the House GOP is _still_ scapegoating President Biden while ignoring Donald Trump’s lawless and anti-democratic actions. Last I checked, Peter, Joe Biden hasn’t been president in months. Yet, House Republicans are obsessed with him and continue to hold hearings about the Biden administration. I sat on the House Oversight Committee during their sham impeachment inquiry of President Biden. We reviewed more than 12,000 pages of bank records, examined 2,000 pages of suspicious activity reports, and heard countless hours of testimony that was supposed to show that President Biden knowingly benefited from Hunter Biden’s private business dealings. As we all know, the investigation was a massive flop and never uncovered a shred of evidence of wrongdoing by President Biden. But they wasted tens of millions of taxpayer dollars on it anyway. **With Donald Trump back in the White House, Republicans _finally_ do have serious corruption to investigate. There’s only one problem, Peter: They won’t.** In just a few months, Donald Trump has accepted a $400 million plane as a “gift” from Qatar, entered into a $2 billion crypto business deal with the UAE, and sold a White House tour to the top 25 shareholders of his crypto company — including unvetted foreigners — which caused his numerous shares to increase by 50 percent. **You don’t even have to investigate his family to get to him — he’s brazenly engaging in widespread corruption out in the open.** But the Republican majority refuses to conduct any oversight of Trump’s corruption. **So if House Republicans won’t do something about it, then we must continue to raise the alarm.** **[Please rush a donation now to stand with me in championing policies that uphold our democratic values and reject corruption in all its forms. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs6tbn17cnrfeftc8lci9i2d9qu5b6jdkm1d5rqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg6ep74c5h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg155l4qf0q7mft3kq9t9enlin0nbua87jplv140_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg6ep74c5h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zaq0ab02t3e32kd9oi4641782l1fu4rgjknotadg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg6ep74c5h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvrqs8qfjgjns8e99i5hh2r0f2h7tnoa7jha265o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg6ep74c5h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zna29dkjh8142dm3ev96otkavjl4mdpuvrgige1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0ctg6ep74c5h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,

name: Team Warner
subject: A simple request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
$5, Derek. Not a penny more.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110095424/553252047/409585885?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_RepeatAsk_250623_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjIwOTBjMy00YTUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eTNmQBT2NLQhugbJz6SJ9xqnLZgkPp2PnzcKDnvESBE=) We have a simple request for you today, Derek:

With our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline in one week, [_**can you donate just $5 to reelect Mark Warner?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110095425/553252048/409585885?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_RepeatAsk_250623_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjIwOTBjMy00YTUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eTNmQBT2NLQhugbJz6SJ9xqnLZgkPp2PnzcKDnvESBE=)

You see, Senator Warner has been _the_ leading voice in Washington speaking out against the Trump administration’s corruption. Plus, he’s not afraid to call out his Republican colleagues who continue to stay silent while Trump’s actions hurt our freedoms, our safety, and our pocket books.

**But that means his seat could be a top Republican target in next year’s election – and we need to be prepared.**

$5 might not seem like much, but if everyone reading this email chipped in, we’d blow well past our fundraising targets for the quarter.

That’s $5 to help us take on the Republican dark money attacks coming our way.

# This reminds me of Nvidia in 2016
Dear Reader,

In early 2016 when most investors thought AI was a fringe idea, I made one of the most important calls of my career.

I recommended Nvidia.

At the time, it wasn't a household name. It wasn't even considered an AI company by most analysts. But I saw what others didn't... that Nvidia's chips would power the rise of AI and machine learning.

Since then, shares have climbed more than 22,000%.

A $1,000 stake would be worth over $222,000 today.

I bring that up for one reason - because I believe the next major AI breakout is already taking shape. And just like Nvidia, it's hiding in plain sight.

[**It’s a small, mostly unknown company supplying a critical piece of hardware to Elon Musk.**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/aloPtjNc-d2AL21iiLDPzWa5clqmzMPsT2yR_KgfH2jE66p_-84xzoXDSJO1wVyuPqDYae7bhHLqwVYYwS3m8b_oQ2jnZU5Dvi_L5u7YGFz8QxwEAuZmUk4uGZLF-W6xIw3_8VoJ3XWmR93wwVpkr9Gs2ZZ2TI-rEuV0Ys8MKwS_4TBqbmmTBtsdjeYUuNA86rbbQl_vmUcQ-c4kqYB7Mr-4_3grAnKVrPTJPGQTY2gHwnbAlgNgV9v9HJROd3BriDWodURC8mVoN_wnLYQCC4EWXq1DmAD-pOxgubBYmcPc2ohcV3bTFRBxMmS4o01xygsKDoLmBWZk7xmv8s5G0U_ItIlXdTsBOMCAUgnwYifX2s2nhyHkcwZoVJWT3IMrdX1QmK7kISBPmRIcdAfsUYd8HunfxIZGP3z4jCwYYz1aBfOkF2sDg0VVoXfFkaYU1o1a4kZyx3gmoEGxBAhNQm8pRcg4XN0msaT7yjTOWjxcgm2ViBxVyIHn9IL596U_zKvfg5IWts2UrWGZXeYsgrBHqIY-8t1sNnoslRyz3VhnfbMkqqL8VGyejQi15ly-2Gmk2mFjhI_V0jzqrQjfE81iCe-GcQNNTaBtw3d2OQeenQ0ankIAOJQOo8j5MA/ZZRFB4N9ADsnTaQNDIBmW2dyydqqidQ3/10)

Elon has projected his latest AI rollout could be worth $9 trillion... which is nearly ten times the combined value of Tesla, SpaceX, PayPal, Neuralink, and X.

And I believe this small supplier is positioned right at the heart of it.

That's why I believe this stock has serious upside.

And if Elon Musk reveals them publicly during his April 23rd meeting, it could take off quick.

[**Click here to see how to position yourself now**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/4o-YktwrLcu25OX_GNNMuhf1yKNZSvWtZinC8Ke04pTszYQVbLxCm2lYNGh0RWbXXg_tzDSDqan8ftnfzjkrD-3cs3g46hdq-t8qMHin-ZyeZ_ORa2YaIaTl8Z7gaYWZg_laiIjq8a7PHYqe2IT9pPMPFGrs9bniudexf4JLQUu1ZSjVA5O7vETayy9rg7PhPSLiCz9jUabu1-xKvozJb4Y_-iXtVsxH_9rub6Sewu4C5_6aICzyGG9dEWTZIXwuCOMFp-zuyHGPc6xtBxDoxk0_X7YHjY6Mf7vl7d47IErtsbiQRz-Y_MRGcdaElhKT6xJTQPZqsS2hlPnbycQYvh2ha7vjREwGoYOrfv992I1GOhRT9dxIg29AtNeaGgxf-VtEuoY3EyQsigmHHteDO_3ZRY6yHjKxQKl37oj4ryXn5Z2RPchqVOS2Jn_pjxpzHyOy427MbIJWQ0reQc73etZaR2Q0b7RoZq6-jO_8JJ-H4d5rUfqgKcdPbV0rYwroPtmJmu4Q_yDdZkE6GPrkJ5AydxZO98aFr8y-hwn1OYkw2Xwo5tchBOB5gOlCcL8GqLFNuRn28YhHpK5RQ2_HYFT4S6sIthlmG6cz8x089-oKpZIJRFjZvrz7OXNuXg/zULSPGk7tq7D3f1xInxqlqnP0UlyNv3E/10)
