One People's Protector.| | | Friend,

What do _missing migrant children,_ _gas-powered cars,_ and _GI Bill benefits_ have in common?
They were all under attack from the radical left’s federal overreach, and Jason Miyares stepped in and won.

**▶️ Protecting the Vulnerable:** When federal bureaucrats lost track of tens of thousands of missing migrant children, Jason sounded the alarm and demanded action to keep these kids safe.
**▶️ Defending Veterans:** When unelected Washington elites tried to deny post-9/11 veterans their hard-earned GI Bill benefits, Jason took the case to the Supreme Court and won.
**▶️ Fighting for Freedom of Choice:** When the radical-Left tried to ban gas-powered cars, Jason stood up for Virginia consumers and stopped their unconstitutional rule in court.

**The radical left overreaches. Jason stands up for what is right, pushes back, and wins.**

name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: June Means Pride
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/fletcherpridelogo.png]
It’s June! That means it’s Pride Month—a time to celebrate the LGBTQI+ community in Texas and across the country. It’s a time to recognize the progress we’ve made, reflected in the lives of people living authentically and proudly.
I am so proud to represent the diverse and dynamic LGBTQI+ community in TX-07—from its longtime heart in Houston’s Montrose area to every corner of the district.
As a Vice Chair of the Equality Caucus, I’m honored to help lead efforts in Congress to advance equality, fight discrimination, and improve opportunities for the LGBTQI+ community. As a Board Member of Equality PAC—the political arm of the Congressional Equality Caucus—I’m helping support LGBTQI+ candidates and allies committed to securing full legal and societal equality for LGBTQI+ Americans.
This Pride Month, we must recommit ourselves to the fight for dignity and rights for all people. Our work is especially critical now, as LGBTQI+ Americans face discrimination and dehumanization from the Trump administration. Its actions and efforts don’t reflect our values as Houstonians or Americans.
And we can do something about that: win elections. And to win, we need to work together—campaigns, organizations, allies, and friends—to elect leaders we can trust.
And that’s what Equality PAC does. So, this Pride Month, I’m asking you to consider making a contribution to the Equality PAC. Each contribution will go toward supporting candidates committed to ensuring full civil rights and protections for LGBTQI+ Americans. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250617_equalitypac?refcode=lpfe250617_equalitypac]
Each June, we are reminded of how important it is to live authentically with pride. And it’s important to elect people who will work to make that possible for all people.
Happy Pride!
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250617?refcode=lpfe250617]

3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098

name: CADEM.org
subject: U-n-h-i-n-g-e-d
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
We know it seems like the news cycle goes a mile a minute, but we WILL NOT forget how terrible it was for a U.S. Senator to be tackled to the ground and handcuffed.
And USA Today is reporting the truth : Democrats aren’t forgetting.
In fact, we are taking action and fighting to expand our organizing programs faster than ever before. Will you help fuel this movement by making a grassroots donation of $ or more today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?&refcode=&amount=]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?refcode=&amount=] CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?&refcode=&amount=]The evil genius of Donald Trump’s chaos strategy is that he and his team do SO MUCH outrageous stuff every single day, he wants us to lose track of the bigger picture. It’s called “flooding the zone” — but we aren’t falling for it. Here’s the recap:
* FIRST : Donald Trump threatened to arrest Governor Gavin Newsom for standing up to his unhinged executive actions.
* THEN : Kristi Noem promised to “liberate” California from its elected Governor.
* NEXT : Senator Alex Padilla tried to speak up and ask her a question, but instead, he was forced to the ground and put in handcuffs .
We cannot let this be forgotten. We cannot let this become normal. And we’re thrilled to see USA Today reporting that Democrats remain fired up — because we need to fight back. And that starts in the California swing districts that will decide control of the U.S. House next year.
We don’t agonize, we organize. That’s why we are asking you to pitch in $ or more before the banks open tomorrow at 9am. We are hoping to have the funds needed to greenlight massive organizing campaigns up and down the state. Will you help? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?&refcode=&amount=]

- CADEM

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: NEW: Trump's asinine tariffs could bankrupt Social Security
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't let Trump's moronic tariffs bankrupt Social Security](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta59bd4a9-0a5a-428d-b13a-c1f0e9908bbe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T46e745e0-6522-455d-8edc-5bcf5d6e317b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump's impressively moronic tariffs are already poised to do two practically contradictory things at once -- slow the economy AND drive up inflation. You have to be a special kind of stupid to do both concurrently. It's like causing a flood and a drought in the same place at the same time. **And now he's going for the trifecta -- by[bankrupting Social Security](https://default.salsalabs.org/T56a095c0-d112-495a-be25-095876b32a53/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9):** _" Many economists have expressed concern that the risk of higher unemployment and economic contraction has risen significantly because of the tariff chaos — possibly leading to a recession. Lower labor force participation and earnings would lead to lower Social Security revenues, reducing trust fund solvency." ([source](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71d30865-4b05-4c11-b2c7-df20ef45fb6b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))_ Social Security reserves are already projected to be [depleted in 2034](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b393b7e-0b7c-40c8-af53-fe31a6d26e0d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) \-- a year faster than the projtection this time last year. We need to protect it, not push it towards bankruptcy through the asinine and destructive policies of a madman. **Congress has the power to reject these crazed tariffs, and reduce the threat to Social Security. It should do so NOW.** [**Add your name: Don't let Trump's moronic tariffs bankrupt Social Security**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te275ed1b-4fd4-4487-8506-27dc5404cd66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4399ceb2-bd13-4e69-8957-cef3be855e70/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2357640e-3622-4c73-b86b-6350d9781db1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: POLL ALERT [Team Bohannan]
subject: Miller-Meeks is SO unpopular
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Christina is the one to beat Miller-Meeks.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110098259/553261557/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzc2NjhhMy00ZDUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V_j8z9O5z_0tSLFVpuZrH-UzwVqrBudofo-gHs4ykXI=)

**BREAKING NEWS: FIRST NATIONAL POLL OF RACE FOR IA-01 PUTS CHRISTINA BOHANNAN IN THE LEAD**
**[CHIP IN TO FLIP IA-01 BLUE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110098260/553261559/-1606373703?refcode=em25_250623_RRMPHP_fnd_gq_act___PATB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250623_RRMPHP_fnd_gq_act___PATB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=077668a3-4d50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzc2NjhhMy00ZDUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V_j8z9O5z_0tSLFVpuZrH-UzwVqrBudofo-gHs4ykXI=)**
---

Peter,

House Majority PAC just released its first poll for our race, and the results blew us away. Here are the highlights
**When put head-to-head in a race, Christina Bohannan is ahead of Mariannette Miller-Meeks!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110098262/553261560/-1606373703?refcode=em25_250623_RRMPHP_fnd_gq_act___PATB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250623_RRMPHP_fnd_gq_act___PATB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=077668a3-4d50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzc2NjhhMy00ZDUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V_j8z9O5z_0tSLFVpuZrH-UzwVqrBudofo-gHs4ykXI=)
---

Make no mistake: _These results prove that Christina is the only one who has what it takes to flip IA-01 blue._

We’ve put in the hard work before, and it’s the support of this grassroots team that has put us in incredible shape at the start of this campaign.

But that’s not all: **Mariannette Miller-Meeks’ approval rating is TANKING.** She has just a 32% approval rating – 14% LOWER than her unfavorable rating.

Our leaders think they can do whatever benefits themselves without any consequences, but these results prove that people are watching. They don’t agree with Miller-Meeks’ votes to strip away our healthcare, support reckless tariffs that hurt our farmers and hand out tax breaks to billionaires.

name: Byron Donalds
subject: I accepted Christ into my life in the parking lot of a Cracker Barrel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
[](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/vcdv0bA8s3hjH59Lm4DsV9dGRM_Hp6EZq9ujr9_hA_XXOatNgZYOeRtWbanXuTLG7KIkNAllEkli4dvUwdLlECXBWpLJIWlGpK-T_no-ctDXl4F6TESuD9lwKu-r3cIJwalGMVTbo6tk_j9E70kxHKzB0vu1ukojX7rkRUuXI_Wk8HZsFiNV-rwIir5Bz1EkV2SizXUrv6og_3OfdG4tkJEh0y8363IJez4LiRo70Th5sgHc76dWuekzkBuReWyB2DUIWQb7Pxvo5HmyDdnKztsz3llYEQ3dIYt3FklHfdI7gOdGwlFEqvtuZlzXi6u5nwilKi7ZBYoZcCKy6oAqjeBjCxDE65GOSOp9ILq0tQds7KKrUGSvkVp58qxWDyhy0MeJoniLlFLt_Xc9sWNqVuP_15sSP57qKxZCega3yAzhizRaJ0ctrKYJ3qDEWP6Bcv-AR0Ob5cIaY7gpQRV_67egiI4vnHKZbGu8bDLM0YCJAfve0yDzBV_4x8eWRSUJRlExHHN4SHTnDT5VZwADr7shJ1gGoVDOr6DIBH3lFX_SOea0XKCiciqYS4otUu8M3dIdga2GXmu_EO7gxHlBBvnMbtvvw9KpJhKLfYvORFF1kzmLsa-_4SeizygKrYvOIbp4icBa54XMFxWpc0Wa7Xm5jGCmqiXemB6ehSheN-4UhKeN6B_JFvc6Y1czgjJBaD4PLI7ziaI9dbXMFM0vorKLJKtxbD8lXI1TQG7oYtyvNR4U0NnGok54rhgDkOlM07gtpSUvhk5VZNfAvO_mea4i10VSHsUXXC9sUxmQuoK3kcezS7P8hTqAhD5by2m8z4GExHes3xomblUbk5s4ZENpVg/vwtUskYh3uf20dXSVWXhbCadsVPXiWF7/10)I wasn't exactly on the straight and narrow.
I was broke. I had been arrested twice by the age of 20. And I was working double shifts outside Tallahassee waiting tables to barely scrape by.
I was a lost man.
That is, until I was serving a bunch of folks from a revival and I built up the courage to ask them to pray for me. My name is Byron Donalds. My whole life turned around when I gave my life to Christ in the parking lot of a Cracker Barrel.
I'm not afraid or ashamed to tell this story. Quite the opposite. I'm proud to say prayer changed my life and God found me as I was.
Now, years later, I find myself fighting the good fight in politics.
The country we know and love is under direct threat by a Liberal movement designed to pit Americans against each other, divide folks based on religion and the color of their skin, and drive faith underground. I believe God has prepared me to meet this moment.
[Even as I campaign to ensure that my home state of Florida continues to advance President Trump’s agenda , I’m still doing my part to save President Trump’s Majority in the House. Our entire agenda of depends on stopping the Democrats from taking control. ](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/P86ZAlhxITcCtGDyTkKlk8eKBjKIuFmsEq5dQBrxWUmMT_pbqP-neFojGmFMOZq1pp7BfC-1Lmny8eudROUBhpZZD9TnjSRui957qc4fGVLEo8Oji5OMvLj9fHzjUcOfjG7Q-xJzN_Xz7msT7NgQ3jtmH9YpFcrAOpr_T-MHn981vyd3bzOyVNxFeQvIVoFDkLPiYj6r2x0mR7y7dsZwmvXZ46htDlt1S0Tn5f5_eLtZmZJC1LU76LLedmjU3fDqpA7L4LiuyeEEyp1NQpBLvV7Aqs7lzgm4UtfFIG51RBo1WRhVIw9dd38AeYBr-7fkQ1SLrc4PsdJ6O61xy4mLyrva704Q09BX9qGqpKQjn8fnNtCBwcEcWBd4KLz3aeI2a1TDhCO4oBY0j-p5lLxtHO_u80xgnhvLsSFogTI_M9OCGDdO8l0zMqybOB80o1TVNhnrrcvP_p4A5-XBSUR0nD8N-KAIh28jUPWhEKws5ENblJ-xRvt9WSt_0HCSFTwSeL_rI4oPp3y1Crb_mqUOxpJ3SWRW_8oMirfzeQbN8EOvHuTlmV1TzGxyhISBMNEK8MOdb3BRE8Y4HymXxLLIcKklL1DFdkKUh3pVpSIARYNhIeA85G0eoBr06zdgxWYay-J7gGulciLanJIKkcSPU8mWVz6-KBD40Ra7hWmrQ_vvk4UTdLAKuJgbTLN1eerLhXRk1tkcp86sJh4BfbFhsMPpvesD-7IFecJ7ZunOTqr_oOYMtSU9o9Jk7b-l2WcpxWVLxPCw7cbVZsg_cLYJ72ameF1nz_9YfgoNm4ULQc-44gm821QAQ_33KwbOiHfnPw7EjTtw8sUYPbm_266iDAqMdw/qfviKZO6EpHvRRFnokPeI7qbuBHRscoR/10)

clean_body: wasn't exactly on the straight and narrow. I was broke. I had been arrested twice by the age of 20. And I was working double shifts outside Tallahassee waiting tables to barely scrape by. I was a lost man. That is, until I was serving a bunch of folks from a revival and I built up the courage to ask them to pray for me. My name is Byron Donalds. My whole life turned around when I gave my life to Christ in the parking lot of a Cracker Barrel. I'm not afraid or ashamed to tell this story. Quite the opposite. I'm proud to say prayer changed my life and God found me as I was. Now, years later, I find myself fighting the good fight in politics. The country we know and love is under direct threat by a Liberal movement designed to pit Americans against each other, divide folks based on religion and the color of their skin, and drive faith underground. I believe God has prepared me to meet this moment. That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Scalise to stop them. He and I set a goal of raising a few thousand bucks from this email blast. If every God-fearing American Patriot reading this kicks in a few bucks, that should do the trick! This fundraising jolt would provide much-needed resources in a few of our most vulnerable districts. Think you could help us out? cherished my time in the People's House. It was the honor of a lifetime to be a partner with Leader Scalise, President Trump, and all my colleagues. Just because I'm fighting to lead the great state of Florida doesn't mean the work isn't important. In fact, it's never been more critical for Republicans to keep control of Congress. We've accomplished so much already but if the Democrats win, all that momentum comes to a screeching halt! President Trump needs a Republican Congress for ALL FOUR YEARS! name: America First Alerts
subject: Marco Rubio left no doubt
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NATHANIEL MORAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
The Safety and Security of the United States come first

| | | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zq6kntvev5565e6pidkemvmaafs07ontqhtrhqbo_)
---

The safety of the United States is what’s most important.
Secretary of State Marco Rubio’s midnight warning regarding Iran:
**“If they’re being rational, I think they realize—you know if what they want is a country that has a nuclear energy program, they can have that many centers around the world.** **I don’t like the regime, but we’re not into the regime change business here, we’re into the safety and security of the United States business.** **They have been playing the world for 40 something years, they’re not going to play President Trump, and they found when he said he’s going to do something, he’ll do it.”**
Take a second to read his statement. Thank you.
Because this is not just any statement, it’s a reassurance that our nation’s safety is the top priority, and President Trump will not take threats lightly.
This fight stretches larger than Israel and Iran; it hits home, and Marco Rubio has made it clear that the United States of America will not be a victim of Iran.
So please, when our country and its leaders need it the most, will you step up and say **I STAND WITH MARCO RUBIO AND PRESIDENT TRUMP?**

Awesomely
Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Atlantic Ave., Suite 200 Delray Beach, FL 33444 | | | 🚨 What Everyone’s Talking About This Week | (Sponsored) ---|--- Weiss Ratings Behind The Markets Boardwalk Flock Awesomely Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Peter,

TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents...

_No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL..._

_**This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester.**_ I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana.

Winning this race wasn’t a “gimme.” We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. _**That’s because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000**_. He threw money at anybody and everybody who’d smear my good name.

It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life.

_Despite all the obstacles_ , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of _one man_ :

**Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana.**

As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, _**but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority.**_

clean_body: This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester | Peter, TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents... No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL... This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester. I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana. Winning this race wasn’t a “gimme.” We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. That’s because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000. He threw money at anybody and everybody who’d smear my good name. It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life. Despite all the obstacles , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of one man : Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana. As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority. Steve is up for re-election in 2026. Chuck Schumer and every Democrat in the nation would love nothing more than to see Steve Daines – the Republican Senate Majority Maker! – booted from Congress. 2026 is right around the corner. Steve’s radical opponent has already told the media that every minute since 2024, she’s been building a plan to win in 2026. That means Democrats are already funneling money and resources into this race. The fight to keep this Senate seat in Republican hands will be another knock-down, drag-out fight. For America's Future, Senator Tim Sheehy (R-MT) Former Navy SEAL Purple Heart Recipient P.S. We all have Steve to thank for booting Chuck Schumer out of the Majority Leader’s chair! The radicals in the Democrat party are FUMING. They’d love nothing more than to send Steve packing for his role in producing the 2024 Republican Trifecta. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

Friends,
I’m so encouraged by the strength of our campaign in these first few days of the general election.
Together, we can take on – and defeat – MAGA Attorney General Jason Miyares. If you're fired up too, will you please become a Founding Donor of my General Election Launch Fund? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-launch_em_q22025?]

My grandfather and father were civil rights lawyers who laid the foundation for a more equitable Commonwealth. They fought for everyone to have a fair shot at the American Dream. Together we’ll build a Virginia that would’ve made them proud.
My two boys are growing up in a tense and tumultuous nation. They deserve a safer and more just future. Together we’ll build a Virginia that works for the next generation.
I hope to continue the legacy of my family by serving as Virginia’s next Attorney General.
We need to gear up NOW to defeat Jason Miyares and his MAGA billionaire buddies. They're ready to spend millions to keep this seat for their own self-interests.

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: Regarding my Trump lawsuit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
We must show Trump that we will never bend the knee to those who want to destroy our democracy and take away our freedom

Peter,

When the Defense Secretary floated the idea of deploying federal troops into states like Pennsylvania, we didn’t hesitate. We mobilized. We protested. **_We made ourselves loud enough to be impossible to ignore._**

But power doesn’t back down because you made the news, it backs down when you out-organize it.

The truth is, this moment we’re in — it’s not new. Our communities have been weathering different shades of repression for decades. What’s changed is how bold and shameless the attacks have become. We’re not going to wait for tanks to roll in or freedoms to be stripped away in silence. We’re already building. On the phones, in the courts, at the ballot box.

**But none of it — none of it — happens without you.[And this is where you come in, Peter, if you’ve been waiting for the moment to step up — this is it. clean_body: | | Peter, When the Defense Secretary floated the idea of deploying federal troops into states like Pennsylvania, we didn’t hesitate. We mobilized. We protested. We made ourselves loud enough to be impossible to ignore. But power doesn’t back down because you made the news, it backs down when you out-organize it. The truth is, this moment we’re in — it’s not new. Our communities have been weathering different shades of repression for decades. What’s changed is how bold and shameless the attacks have become. We’re not going to wait for tanks to roll in or freedoms to be stripped away in silence. We’re already building. On the phones, in the courts, at the ballot box. But none of it — none of it — happens without you.= | = Authoritarianism doesn’t arrive all at once. It builds quietly, while people get tired. Numb. subject: Improving your travel experience:

body:
Building resiliency and avoiding travel disruptions
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110100238/553268367/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTkyNjM2OC01MTUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kSnvzMZOeDmWN018Oyc4XUx9OrCoNYYA_RudiDioFhw=&emci=fb08e4a5-a54b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=5a926368-5150-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Earlier this month, the T &I Committee again came together on a bipartisan basis to advance a slate of bills that will improve aviation safety and airline preparedness and modernize mariner credentialing. **I reintroduced my legislation, the Ensuring Airline Resiliency to Reduce Delays and Cancellations Act, which requires airlines to have resiliency in their operations plans, so that they have a plan when travel disruptions arise for you. **The Ensuring Airline Resiliency to Reduce Delays and Cancellations Act will help limit flight disruptions that impact you when you travel.** Washington state is home to a thriving aviation industry, and taking these steps will mean a smoother experience for every traveller. The Committee also advanced legislation to direct the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) to update its guidelines and guidance on mental health policies for pilots, air traffic controllers, and other employees that would otherwise require an FAA Medical Certificate. As the top Democrat on the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, I will continue to work hard to bring home federal money for critical infrastructure projects such as aviation. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

But first, I want to share more about my background and why I'm so invested in retaking the U.S. House – for all of us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110100276/553268409/-1812448514?refcode=em-6.23.25-all-d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MThiNmM2ZS01MTUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VpH1y28QeDRVIazNUrCJRWiYMVFk6bv59yT5V1EPEc0=) | | **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110100279/553268412/-1812448514?refcode=em-6.23.25-all-d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MThiNmM2ZS01MTUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VpH1y28QeDRVIazNUrCJRWiYMVFk6bv59yT5V1EPEc0=)**

I'll never forget my first campaign for Dane County Board of Supervisors.
I remember because I had news articles about me mailed back to me with ‘dead fa***ot’ scrawled over my face. That wasn't my first run in with homophobia, nor would it be my last.
I'm not the only Member who faced bigotry on their path to Washington.
Before Eric made history as the first openly-LGBTQ representative from Illinois, he was pushed out of his first job as a weatherman in East Texas -- just for being gay. Management was clear:
“We can’t have a gay meteorologist at channel 7, Eric.”
We’ve made massive strides for LGBTQ rights since, but the fact is Donald Trump and his ally, Speaker Mike Johnson, are trying to reverse our progress by decades.
Our trans friends are being scapegoated on a daily basis. And Johnson is even on record supporting the criminalization of sexual acts between consenting LGBTQ adults. He thinks the ‘homosexual agenda’ will destroy society and likened being gay to pedophilia and bestiality.
I can’t think of a stronger rebuke of their hate than re-electing a strong Democrat like Eric Sorensen -- an openly gay meteorologist who has done nothing but care deeply for his IL-17 community.
[**So I'm asking: can you please send in a $3 contribution to support Eric's campaign? With his FEC fundraising deadline fast-approaching, he can use all the help he can get.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110100282/553268415/-1812448514?refcode=em-6.23.25-all-d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MThiNmM2ZS01MTUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VpH1y28QeDRVIazNUrCJRWiYMVFk6bv59yT5V1EPEc0=)

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_june25?refcode=0622_e [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_june25?refcode=0622_e]
Friend,
I recently had the honor of attending the Greater Houston LULAC Council 4967’s Chorizo & Menudo Breakfast, an event that brought our community together to celebrate culture, connection, and our shared vision for a brighter future for CD-18.
It was inspiring to stand alongside passionate leaders and neighbors, and to hear directly from the community about the impact of the work I have done as well as the hopes and challenges we’re working to address together.
Watch what they had to say here:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BeX89lLLyGg [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BeX89lLLyGg]
Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is coming up fast, and I need your help now more than ever. If you believe in this fight as much as I do, please chip in today to help us keep pushing forward. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_june25?refcode=0622_e]
Thank you for standing with us.
- Amanda K. Edwards

---
**Option 1:** Stay silent while Donald Trump spreads lies, dodges justice, undermines democracy – leaving champions like Jamie Raskin to fight alone. [No Action Required]

**Option 2:** Stand with Jamie Raskin. Speak out, demand Donald Trump’s impeachment, and show that no one is above the law. **[[CLICK HERE TO SIGN THE PETITION AND CHOOSE OPTION 2>>] ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110100422/553268738/784203583?refcode=DOTL_20250623_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzOTI2MzY4LTUxNTAtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WJ1D3kwKJlId7V4ZTZorbJU6Fvs54B-ZS5wWx4yOm5g=&emci=230df96e-3c50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=63926368-5150-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=14887570)**
**Jamie Raskin is leading the fight in Congress to ensure Trump’s crimes do not go unanswered, but he needs the strength of the people behind him.**

**[That’s why we’re launching an urgent petition calling for full accountability for Donald Trump, no expectations, no delays. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Never thought I would send you this email
body:
You will never guess what’s happening with young people
I just did a final check of our records before mailing our top supporters, and I don’t think I have your address.
| [ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bfc78f5971234902b0844ea42247ddd7&_e=CppXk3IUuKyuMZfnWkq7vxSjt04CvnJ6fpE5JqDYtsFDRJQ6viR73f97I-1osMZrtySEjuIB-Dtcu5doi6wB3PWANMUli3wOrcXo6KPj4Ll-juNZMXkg2fU-6EP3PX6TCNjwdsN1X9ne_6CK_B0aLimAbLbAkyt_gC1hfV0XEbmwB-51VoUhZhPUeIaEJ-L92kDnwAYd-eB00YHQIfDHGzOPC2KcDSLEg3y4_Ja5vJMeQKsWBYMSrBV9HqqH2qUdi6av-r-jupk2ebSAaX_6ODb-tpcxng2AmeYfvb8j6cBluBeW0viiQActWjrZZPW5XYdrpYAjLug6m353ZYCTjJa6bfLnccAy_B2J8r-N1W56p5MGcPv6icU2yXx6rVHon9j6GIWsOlIxxL3izRcu2bAlqE19hp-DBSPw8lngjX7JnoP9Mip5YN-lJLQH5lDtWZ6KSwtEEqGNANGOhCwF4GsDuZq1P9I69q4uLV6iJTQOBePSjY0qDsr4S24LZepsJ-ggLTwCsFycf2xkeK1kyJllrL8eGXuyIdG33ux-SdE%3D)
---
Peter, I don’t get this excited often, but something BIG is happening on college campuses across the United States. Believe it or not, the younger generation is finally rejecting woke and radical leftism. You saw this during Trump’s election - a major shift in the 18-29 year old voters. And the media hates it!
* “America’s Youngest Voters Turn Right” – Axios;
* “The Not-So-Woke Generation Z” – The Atlantic;
* “Are Zoomers Shifting Right?” – Newsweek; and
* “Analysis: Young and Non-White Voters Have Shifted Right Since 2020” – Washington Post.

Here’s a major reason why this is happening. An organization called Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is identifying, recruiting, and training college students to Make Liberty Win. YAL is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campus. In a moment, I will humbly ask you to send an urgent donation to Young Americans for Liberty, but before I do that, let me explain why your support is critical, especially today. A generous donor is MATCHING all funds raised up to $50,000 until the end of the month. That means your contribution today will be DOUBLED. [I am personally asking all my supporters to chip in $10, $35, $100, $250, or even $500 today to Young Americans for Liberty. Please click here to select any amount below to make a gift.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bfc78f5971234902b0844ea42247ddd7&_e=CppXk3IUuKyuMZfnWkq7vxSjt04CvnJ6fpE5JqDYtsFDRJQ6viR73f97I-1osMZrtySEjuIB-Dtcu5doi6wB3PWANMUli3wOrcXo6KPj4Ll-juNZMXkg2fU-6EP3PX6TCNjwdsN1X9ne_6CK_B0aLimAbLbAkyt_gC1hfV0XEbmGEDC1U_R0r28HAvziS6RL-xNdQYKt_s6zFc4_fgtn8W7JY6sKCN8NV-uIREUSziT92T9_XoClJTAQVMlrQpKmvBDsU192Nbg3GcrQnlqLY5ST2wgpR1EpokpKeqvZ0pXUr0u-BNqLufyL7O7ixEV_y5QJMel0J4LzZsJIymw37YuAd2bFgQoonLd9g355GKOHOCqDiHmeO8BdPVZSAqpV9WjrN7jFmfJ_kmDMFf3DKfXAuPROhZb9I_xoXFtcE5vGHybxc-X1-cMX0TvmtBWuStgh2fDTrbce0ZO8NleIILVItnIqgB0t06TAT4c1cHwptYz_jiTkvXncZK0njEZomGpsFF-1vmedxn0uHrTUnw-mjNI_OYMSNpHPvpStK8g%3D)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Add your name: protect housing assistance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
No child should grow up homeless in the richest country in the world.
No child should go without a home, especially in the wealthiest country in the world. But instead of working to address homelessness in America, Donald Trump’s budget cuts the Department of Housing and Urban Development homelessness assistance programs – programs that thousands of people rely on every single day. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110101638/553272663/-1705293015?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.06.23_Trump-Budget-Cuts_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjdiNmY4MC01MzUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nxan1iazsdbrl49071ERV15IWiZE-btEaykfqodxNKo=&emci=69134a11-e74d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7b7b6f80-5350-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029) _City Limits_ These cuts would make the homelessness crisis even worse, putting more children, veterans and seniors at risk of losing safe places to call home. Our kids and our communities deserve better. That’s why I’m asking you to stand with me and send a powerful message that these budget cuts must be stopped. Our communities deserve real solutions that keep families safe and secure in their homes. [**_Add your name now to oppose these cuts and fight for the housing justice every American deserves._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110101639/553272664/-1705293015?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.06.23_Trump-Budget-Cuts_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjdiNmY4MC01MzUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nxan1iazsdbrl49071ERV15IWiZE-btEaykfqodxNKo=&emci=69134a11-e74d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7b7b6f80-5350-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029) | | [ADD YOUR NAME ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110101640/553272665/-1705293015?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.06.23_Trump-Budget-Cuts_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjdiNmY4MC01MzUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nxan1iazsdbrl49071ERV15IWiZE-btEaykfqodxNKo=&emci=69134a11-e74d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7b7b6f80-5350-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029)

I’ve spent my career fighting to protect vulnerable families and expand access to affordable housing. But this fight isn’t one I can win alone.
With your support, we can push back against these devastating cuts and build a future where no American has to worry about where they’ll sleep at night.
Thank you for standing with me — and with families who deserve dignity and a place to call home.
Together,
Kirsten Gillibrand

body:
We wish we had better news, Peter. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110102328/553275184/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2FjZWY1Ny01NDUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mVsroAJbDTT9OcxmdTtLPGYJK2k_g85Y_vesMk6-6aQ=&emci=a687a731-f24d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e3acef57-5450-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15820338)

We wish we had better news, Peter.

Senate Republicans just released their version of Trump's "big beautiful" tax bill, _and it’s even worse than we feared._

Here’s what’s in it:

**→ Deeper cuts to Medicaid than what the House passed, threatening care for millions and putting rural hospitals—including many in Washington state—on the brink of closure.

→ Slashes to climate protections, while proposing to sell off national park land for profit.

→ A tax plan that still prioritizes the wealthy and big corporations at the expense of working families.**

This isn't just reckless, _it's beyond unacceptable and ridiculous._

When the House GOP passed their Medicaid cuts, Kim heard from so many of you who were outraged, scared, and ready to fight back.

Now, the Senate is doubling down, even though they know their constituents oppose these cuts. This isn’t fiscal responsibility, it’s cruelty, and it’s happening because extremists have too much power in Congress.

[**To stop these attacks on our health, climate, and public lands, we must win back the House in 2026, which means protecting frontline seats like WA-08. clean_body: We wish we had better news, Peter. We wish we had better news, Peter. Senate Republicans just released their version of Trump's "big beautiful" tax bill, and it’s even worse than we feared. Here’s what’s in it: → Deeper cuts to Medicaid than what the House passed, threatening care for millions and putting rural hospitals—including many in Washington state—on the brink of closure. → Slashes to climate protections, while proposing to sell off national park land for profit. → A tax plan that still prioritizes the wealthy and big corporations at the expense of working families. This isn't just reckless, it's beyond unacceptable and ridiculous. When the House GOP passed their Medicaid cuts, Kim heard from so many of you who were outraged, scared, and ready to fight back. Now, the Senate is doubling down, even though they know their constituents oppose these cuts. This isn’t fiscal responsibility, it’s cruelty, and it’s happening because extremists have too much power in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. Dear Peter,
---
Earlier this year, God opened a massive door—the White House! Dozens of White House staffers, congressional leaders, and government officials gathered to praise and worship _IN_ the White House. What a difference four years makes! We knew God had something powerful in store for us, so we recorded the worship session as our latest album, appropriately titled _Worship From The White House._ How encouraging is it that, despite turbulent and trying times, we still have an administration that not only encourages worship, but opens the halls of power for this kind of gathering? _Worship From The White House_ is available for pre-order on iTunes and pre-save on Spotify. **The full album releases on the 4th of July, and the links below give you access to some tracks _TODAY_ and early access to the full album!** Listen below!

name: Breaking News via RTP
subject: URGENT: Trump unleashes military — and targets Gavin Newsom
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=061125_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=061125_2]
Peter, if you've been waiting for the moment to act - this is it.
Because Donald Trump just crossed another line.
🚨 He sent 700 Marines into Los Angeles to help the National Guard suppress peaceful protests against his inhumane ICE raids.
🚨 He’s using the military to intimidate civilians - on American soil.
🚨 And now, he’s calling for the ARREST of California Governor Gavin Newsom... simply for daring to stand up to him.
This is what fascism looks like in real time.
We cannot be passive. We cannot wait. We must respond with overwhelming resistance — right now.
We’re mobilizing emergency resources to support Democrats who are bravely fighting back against Trump’s authoritarian power grabs. But we’re falling short of what we need to scale up fast. clean_body: [] Peter, if you've been waiting for the moment to act - this is it. Because Donald Trump just crossed another line. 🚨 He sent 700 Marines into Los Angeles to help the National Guard suppress peaceful protests against his inhumane ICE raids. 🚨 He’s using the military to intimidate civilians - on American soil. 🚨 And now, he’s calling for the ARREST of California Governor Gavin Newsom... simply for daring to stand up to him. This is what fascism looks like in real time. We cannot be passive. We cannot wait. We must respond with overwhelming resistance — right now. We’re mobilizing emergency resources to support Democrats who are bravely fighting back against Trump’s authoritarian power grabs. But we’re falling short of what we need to scale up fast. **We’ve been in awe of how organizers and supporters like you have rallied behind our democratic values, our collective goals, and our shared future.** We want to thank you for powering our end-of-quarter goal to elect state Democrats who will stand up in the face of division, fear, and authoritarianism. You’ve shown up for our party, so we want to do a little something to stand with you: **A coalition of donors has agreed to match all gifts to the DLCC Victory Fund FIVE times.** That means by working together, every grassroots contribution will be 5X as impactful through our end-of-quarter deadline. **[Make a 5X-matched contribution today →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDrlfwLFRup_C-Uxypt_ZFiEPTcIAJ8rEMRky3UH2h_RIu5irChMUOOo02bYlDbyFjP9aipnbM5xR93pX2bCPCSZZC1ZdobAl7o9sOiNLlvD7eP15gAB2ZG4UzeCQNB3TrLfpHiaJJVP1tuT2lN8YBQyeOZ61wX9AmNkXAH2y6JdmHIhPX-km5H8kCC7iC0xUcVzhS-IcAPDaE5oMeFEENY_mBI06sXOyPjjGQxb8KZPuSKGifvgo1DJuAhcReM4k1mRlVNPTpLRIWWBRtx9LGdCsAz6baSEyvdadyc5ebQG341qFnVH2jHNv1Abx_CaLt2TuVFAOQBgdsLD8HO_WWCY8l-osqCGdr9fIdqrOegrKr78O01L5I8zj7sEgUanU2/4hl/aqDbo4BmSViTg1THyhe3XQ/h0/h001.MThncfAMWvoRHLdIeYfLVWQY-M65hwdRwcUkuoSP_sw)** The stakes in the states are high, and they’ll continue to rise ahead of this fall’s consequential elections in Virginia. name: Major General Paul Eaton, US Army (Ret)
subject: Stop this war
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Now, we stand on the precipice of another war, at the orders of that so-called “dove,” Donald Trump. He has not justified it. He has not put forth any evidence detailing the urgency of this moment. He has not come to Congress for permission - a Constitutional requirement.
#
Ladies and Gentlemen, this is Major General Paul Eaton, U.S. Army, retired.
My father was shot down over Laos during the Vietnam War. He was one of nearly 60,000 Americans and more than 1.5 million Vietnamese killed in that conflict. It directly contributed to Pol Pot’s genocide in Cambodia, leading to the deaths of as many as three million. That war left the world less stable, and our nation painfully divided.
I served during the Global War on Terror. The world rallied around us in the wake of September 11th, and over the succeeding years we squandered that support and destabilized the entire region. 7,000 Americans were killed, more than 50,000 wounded. Globally, at least one million people were killed from conflict related to that war. Indirectly, the number goes several million higher.
It again left our nation divided, and our reputation tarnished. Anger about that war directly contributed to the election of Donald Trump, a so-called “dove” who would stop future wars.
Now, we stand on the precipice of another war, at the orders of that so-called “dove,” Donald Trump. He has not justified it. He has not put forth any evidence detailing the urgency of this moment. He has not come to Congress for permission — a Constitutional requirement. Wherever this leads, Trump owns the consequences.
But it is not too late for diplomacy. It is not too late to stop another war that will leave the world further destabilized, our reputation further damaged, and thousands more of our best dead.
[**VoteVets is urging Congress to pass a War Powers Resolution to stop this war before it starts. We need to be loud. We need to be firm. We cannot let up. And I am asking you to add your voice to help us get the job done. Please, sign on right away.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250622_vv_em_iran3/?source=em250623-1-120&akid=34457%2E3013755%2EwL8QjA)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250622_vv_em_iran3/?source=em250623-1-120&akid=34457%2E3013755%2EwL8QjA)
---
We need your help.
Please, sign on.
Major General Paul Eaton
U.S. Army, Retired
Senior Advisor, VoteVets

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This is sickening
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I have an urgent update you need to hear.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june2025-warren.EX_suj&refcode=em250623-1-b&t=1&akid=10604%2E3935704%2EiGrr8p)
---
Hi team -- Elizabeth Warren here, reaching out on behalf of my friend Gabby Giffords. I have an urgent Senate update you need to hear.
Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans just included a provision in their “big beautiful bill” that would make it easier to buy dangerous gun silencers. Victims of mass shootings wouldn’t even hear their attacker.
This is sickening. And it’s a massive gift to the gun lobby at the expense of public safety. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today.
[**GIFFORDS is fighting on the front lines to stop this provision, and they could use more grassroots donations to stand up against the Trump administration. Will you join me in supporting GIFFORDS right now?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june2025-warren.EX_suj&refcode=em250623-1-b&t=2&akid=10604%2E3935704%2EiGrr8p)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june2025-warren.EX_suj&refcode=em250623-1-b&t=3&akid=10604%2E3935704%2EiGrr8p)**
Gun silencers make it harder for police to track shootings because they can’t figure out where the shots are coming from. Having even more silencers flood into our communities will only make us less safe. It’s common sense.
**But it’s clear Donald Trump and Republicans do not care. The only thing they want is to give tax breaks to their gun CEO buddies and help them profit even more.**
We are still debating this bill in the Senate right now, so you can bet that I will continue raising hell to remove this section from the bill. But I cannot take on this fight alone.
[**Will you make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS before midnight? We cannot sit back while Donald Trump and Republicans try to turn back the clock on our progress.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june2025-warren.EX_suj&refcode=em250623-1-b&t=4&akid=10604%2E3935704%2EiGrr8p)

-- Elizabeth Warren

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: I have an urgent update you need to hear. Hi team -- Elizabeth Warren here, reaching out on behalf of my friend Gabby Giffords. I have an urgent Senate update you need to hear. Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans just included a provision in their “big beautiful bill” that would make it easier to buy dangerous gun silencers. Victims of mass shootings wouldn’t even hear their attacker. This is sickening. And it’s a massive gift to the gun lobby at the expense of public safety. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. Gun silencers make it harder for police to track shootings because they can’t figure out where the shots are coming from. Having even more silencers flood into our communities will only make us less safe. It’s common sense. But it’s clear Donald Trump and Republicans do not care. The only thing they want is to give tax breaks to their gun CEO buddies and help them profit even more. We are still debating this bill in the Senate right now, so you can bet that I will continue raising hell to remove this section from the bill. But I cannot take on this fight alone. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** We can -- and must -- win this battle against the gun lobby. Thank you for anything you can give to help GIFFORDS. -- Elizabeth Warren Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

Friend,
We’re staring down the end of June and the attacks are only ramping up.
Liberal Democrat groups are coming after me again, this time trying to change the congressional map to destroy the 5th Congressional district. They know they can’t beat us at the ballot box, so they’re trying to draw us out of existence. It’s a blatant political power grab — and it’s exactly why I need your help.
I’ve never backed down from a fight, whether it’s securing our border, cutting wasteful spending, or standing up for Wisconsin values in Madison or Washington. But I can’t do it alone.
This is a critical moment. Every dollar raised before the end of the quarter will go straight to fighting back against the Left’s redistricting and partisan attacks and preparing for whatever they throw at us next.
Can I count on you to [chip in $10, $20, $50, $100](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=5ac9072ade&e=561a28864e) or anything you can do today?
Time is short, the stakes are high, and the other side is already on the move. Let’s show them that Team Fitzgerald won’t go down without a fight.
Thank you for standing with me.

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I’m sick and tired of this
body:
| | | | |
---
Peter,
If you’re sick and tired of** _do-nothing Republicans who talk a big game before every election and then lose all their courage when it’s time to pass laws_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of **_RINO’s begging for your money everyday only to disappear the instant a tough fight begins_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of spending your time and money to help **_politicians who turn their backs on you the moment their plane lands in DC_** ...
**Then you feel exactly the way I do.**
[STAND WITH MTG](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/MK1RZshfEKsgZA16yhENqHwALlajbDBdQspRaPNea6keOUhh882ijwVWrEJYzmlLkBbgGYqOxF1yFAVd-lrxCcvjMjdvZ_sx5eh7YNEnTOVzZDXg2--ToXmjgjpDzhTP7jhYhLls8wXW0gpWR7uHWgEKEIKAqyuID3PxsegbGZlN0ZWRqA9aNOb7botE5tih9PJKiGj-n8u5cJFckqKj74nHtapqgYzmPU7VnYM62OpjAyuGhBfsYU_8z8WFo1OxLYw-PINnlsexFFwPcmeYopkANmUhxQt5uhF9CHioCk1-Q5TQSY0RYUUlquOIKTMKPhr6mdVH9LbzPvr0BQ6HIUeaxryiCprJHAlcOTXcHZlbKaYJdMHPRNUYq0QbTQtZ_5apqnOMfmA3doPlvF43KKd0_0fEb3XTI5SYLD_wi-472llMkm71uR-x_S8eWsNc33hzlr6AfHWFWO6Ab_G7GS7NcCMFzmowHeO191zhjJukQe5CUg1FP-beeP7T7qijWgFoip2vMRKvj3o25odCAQWnmskHxruWeG8AOHI82Q-l_zi7MwZnxWodawaBX18UKdbgD6j4vtjRnyerJo2pGlFA8FK1DoDL1DNZ8Mq1jNuZ1lj8UoC7gJRdDntVCIuvPI0BlNyAI0N13yNtkUo2G8tTuOiYf3OcdbQPLXzKraL6lQGVTPn3IlY5Dcl1PEsQ2JH4H4TZfXTns6nmptdpcDbnrXkO5kMQq7jcB7PvkfO_ldpoDjD80xaXu12aCGy_1GJi5bM/sjQFnOqz55B5pU4SF5br7vgFNU0X9DLG/10)
It’s time for Republicans in Congress to get it through their heads that we won an historic landslide election in November on the coattails of President Trump and his America First agenda, and that the Republican base, and the American people, expect swift action.
**Republicans need to get serious about:**
* Making the DOGE cuts permanent.
* Making it a felony to do sex change operations on children.
* Investigating and prosecuting those responsible for the Republic-ending lawfare waged against President Trump and his allies.
* Stopping the blank checks to Ukraine.
* Holding the COVID tyrants at the CDC accountable.
* Passing NO tax on tips, overtime, and social security.
* Reigning in the rogue federal judiciary.

If we don’t take bold action on these priorities, voters will justifiably lose faith in Congressional Republicans and they will punish us at the ballot box in the midterm elections.
**I’m sending a wake up call to Republicans in DC: **
**When MTG is upset, the base is upset.**
We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to save our country and if we blow it we deserve to lose the next election.

## **On Episode 176 of The Qasim Rashid Show:**

* Mamdani was polling at just 1% three months ago, and now he is in a viable position to win--how did this happen?
* Today is election day so if you're reading this before 7pm and live in NYC, go vote for Mamdani!

body:
A major shift
I just did a final check of our records before mailing our top supporters, and I don’t think I have your address.

Friend, I don’t get this excited often, but something BIG is happening on college campuses across the United States. Believe it or not, the younger generation is finally rejecting woke and radical leftism. You saw this during Trump’s election - a major shift in the 18-29 year old voters. And the media hates it!
* “America’s Youngest Voters Turn Right” – Axios;
* “The Not-So-Woke Generation Z” – The Atlantic;
* “Are Zoomers Shifting Right?” – Newsweek; and
* “Analysis: Young and Non-White Voters Have Shifted Right Since 2020” – Washington Post.

Here’s a major reason why this is happening. An organization called Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is identifying, recruiting, and training college students to Make Liberty Win. YAL is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campus. In a moment, I will humbly ask you to send an urgent donation to Young Americans for Liberty, but before I do that, let me explain why your support is critical, especially today. A generous donor is MATCHING all funds raised up to $50,000 until the end of the month. That means your contribution today will be DOUBLED. [I am personally asking all my supporters to chip in $10, $35, $100, $250, or even $500 today to Young Americans for Liberty. YAL is doing this, first and foremost, by reaching students where they’re at. By focusing on the issues important to twenty-year-olds – affordable groceries and gas, healthcare, and guns, YAL is able to show young people that socialism is not the answer to all of their life’s problems. I do not want to take your support for granted – That’s why below I lay out step-by-step how Young Americans for Liberty is advancing the ideas of freedom with college students. _Step 4 is my favorite..._ STEP 1: Expand the number of YAL chapters across the country to over 500 nationwide. America’s college campuses are covered with YAL chapters actively recruiting and educating hundreds of thousands of students. STEP 2: Recruit 10,000 NEW YAL members and collect more than 150,000 student sign-ups. YAL is building a massive network and a strong foundation to reach the next generation for years to come. STEP 3: Train an ELITE group of top 1,7000 student leaders on how to WIN ON PRINCIPLE. YAL’s top student leaders receive exclusive training on the strategies and tactics to win and advance the ideas of liberty. STEP 4: Mobilize YAL-trained activists who have knocked on more than 6,000,000 doors to promote liberty causes and candidates. It’s called OPERATION WIN AT THE DOOR, and through it, YAL-trained students have knocked doors to help nearly 400 of pro-liberty legislators win crucial races and push for important pro-liberty legislation. STEP 5: Fight tyrannical campus policies and college administrators through YAL’s Student Rights Campaign. YAL chapters and members have made major policy changes on free speech, self-defense, and defunding woke campus programs, which now impact more than 3,100,000 students every year. Friend, the youth are our future, and I have to say, the future is bright in America once again. These YAL-trained and YAL-inspired students will become our future leaders. It starts by equipping them with the resources they need. Here’s how you can help: [Please join me in supporting Young Americans for Liberty and help us reach this important goal of $50,000 this month. body:
We need your voice now

| Hi team,

**We wanted to follow up because the GOP's efforts to weaken Social Security are not slowing down, and we can’t afford to stay silent.**

Donald Trump promised not to touch Social Security.

But once in office, he launched one of the most aggressive rollbacks in the program’s history — **slashing staff, closing offices, and making it harder for seniors and people with disabilities to access the benefits they’ve earned.**

This is a direct attack on some of the most vulnerable members of our communities. _That’s why we need your voice now._

**[Will you stand with us and sign the petition to defend Social Security before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110104985/553284618/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250623_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzAyMDNlNC01YjUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSue1BDtpwGW071g6oqwv1v7V2QrLxH_nPTZSCE3arE=&emci=8d135d24-3e50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=830203e4-5b50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME TO DEFEND SOCIAL SECURITY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110104987/553284620/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250623_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzAyMDNlNC01YjUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSue1BDtpwGW071g6oqwv1v7V2QrLxH_nPTZSCE3arE=&emci=8d135d24-3e50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=830203e4-5b50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)

**Since elected, Trump’s administration has:**

\- Cut the Social Security Administration’s staffing by 7,000 jobs – 12% of the workforce
\- Closed regional offices, cutting off access to rural and disabled Seniors
\- Created longer wait times for recipients to receive their benefits

**This is a de facto cut to a program millions of Americans rely on for financial security.**

_We need to fight back now_ – when it’s still possible for us to reverse course and prevent further harm to Social Security and Americans who rely on it for financial security.

name: Cynthia Lummis
subject: The majority is on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lummis for Wyoming
body:
Democrats have made it clear: flipping the Senate is their top priority in 2026. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=068e4890cb17433fa9936ea1c254c1e9&_e=_wq1npbjaaPNGHowHItT_yIPUoiUiro1Rex3Q_uVLso0r6iC4LJxELv-ZNsFf2f2oyXnzyigEsjIuzhOYM7HrDY95U1jrJgNaesO9q3TwS8ppU5b9ezQf7CPMXLUroAO2vtQjzZ9GrQDf-MfVQzjLkY_AtawScnQJAoReVQxHFlMHLhGoI0TIjnADmuNCVOogTcIeXCu2jwOaJCWPC_4Z3pKjtJfxNKKMXU7Do8fu4O7ibuLcaU4Igcf0EwmKts9IPS9NqCDRCAKwe5aDKcAn7zhkga7t_8wGSy_juH-UjnZCtPTXJSxGe46VJtgQPmwxkBa8bXNcOF9mOt48DMFMZyl0OPOeNWnu6q49V87NINFGfiUA8Qowlk0T-WppUR-5NA9OtUbYTnAuX_N0WSkXMu3p1Yer85XJDHThCxp_nVyVi7YTo1l-WByDiCk-XRcWi-iv7-3WfGrad1fHgl7pi91XYKfzGtPTACGrkxMvmbLoTvtWOm79JkqZjT_mCpHRPBO29Ot7Z0fv0CY_FPtxbrjrvtMyvisL-PMq_J1GFj3LZjbFwxft1cAg_4a2MovI7_nbSvMwKCkmiB73QPew3aWvxWdOqTsY8F1mtVUBG1HUBzi0XG14wTZCtI2VKsbCJtxhj61IynB1SLkLMf2K7ZXnAmD_FINjfqXYmaH6GU%3D)
---
Dear fellow American,

I’ve spent my life fighting for Wyoming — because this is my home. I was born and raised on a cattle ranch in Laramie County, and my roots here run deep.

I know what it means to work hard, live free, and take pride in where you come from. That’s the Wyoming way — and it’s exactly what I’ve taken with me to Washington.

From my years in the State Legislature to serving as your U.S. Senator, I’ve never stopped fighting to protect the values that make Wyoming strong and America great.

**Whether it’s securing our borders, defending the Second Amendment, or creating good-paying jobs, I’ve always put Wyoming and America first.**

As Chair of the Senate Western Caucus and a member of the conservative Senate Steering Committee, I pushed back against the Biden administration’s extreme agenda — especially when it came to reckless spending, anti-energy mandates, and efforts to lock up our lands.

I’ve fought to protect our coal, oil, gas, and uranium industries, because I know how vital they are — not just to Wyoming’s economy, but to America’s future.

This year, I’ve also been fighting to cut red tape, secure our border, and lead on crypto policy that protects innovation and freedom. **I’m in the Senate to make Washington work for Wyoming — _not the other way around._**

_But now, our work is under serious threat._

**Democrats have made it clear: flipping the Senate is their top priority in 2026.** They know that without the Senate, they can’t ram through their radical agenda.

That’s why they’re pouring money into races across the country — including right here in the West — trying to tip the balance of power in their favor.

**_We can’t let that happen._**

If we lose our Senate majority, we lose the ability to block dangerous policies and stand up for the freedoms we hold dear. [**That’s why I’m asking for your help today.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=068e4890cb17433fa9936ea1c254c1e9&_e=_wq1npbjaaPNGHowHItT_yIPUoiUiro1Rex3Q_uVLso0r6iC4LJxELv-ZNsFf2f2oyXnzyigEsjIuzhOYM7HrDY95U1jrJgNaesO9q3TwS8ppU5b9ezQf7CPMXLUroAO2vtQjzZ9GrQDf-MfVQzjLkY_AtawScnQJAoReVQxHFlMHLhGoI0TIjnADmuNCVOogTcIeXCu2jwOaJCWPC_4Z3pKjtJfxNKKMXU7Do8fu4OpVZK3EAX97HSbdct2eyB5v-tSpChmAFX_hagihLREO88tCYzlsIiejzoC0J-QBJBW0u-kLduCrjSUYz24s38Y8xloQvzUIlqIdGeILA9CvHSbWI1LWgZrxvg6pA8wJ4-CLZRu4YDHEy7CGXHntfKXBaClNrS2bZ9lA5NVbn5F_wLX00GfSeL9orkVn7KH15cVaOmUXmD60-823vb-O-wuGhDatAuUapAsDdYV79cdDY7NTWefPisWXXH0uFUFfPeRvuMwzVTeS11YvlZ_z-ebJmeIYLy07DqKeMFCo394EOLf_J2H4hSrf175IoM7FXWAX2mjM4bng3VIdRhWZbBFp-2QGKmIemq35V8uB5I1j6ayhmzmhGlOVNHawP8v8SEyNq2yI_RoW59AyWy9pK1cTld5WTs_qHFt46fcekrt9xRjAIsIwzhfuIsVWC_AkS0%3D)

**Will you chip in to help us hold the line and defend our Senate majority?** [**Every dollar you give will go directly toward fighting back against the Left’s assault on our values and helping me continue to be a voice for America First priorities in Washington.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=068e4890cb17433fa9936ea1c254c1e9&_e=_wq1npbjaaPNGHowHItT_yIPUoiUiro1Rex3Q_uVLso0r6iC4LJxELv-ZNsFf2f2oyXnzyigEsjIuzhOYM7HrDY95U1jrJgNaesO9q3TwS8ppU5b9ezQf7CPMXLUroAO2vtQjzZ9GrQDf-MfVQzjLkY_AtawScnQJAoReVQxHFlMHLhGoI0TIjnADmuNCVOogTcIeXCu2jwOaJCWPC_4Z3pKjtJfxNKKMXU7Do8fu4OfKVQpp6qwC84J-BDGYV-Y7rk9OfJa7icUcHb3su5rpxsq6g9id_Ruz9YUoJaAgnOQnLPGVXfmt8o-vJejxXhplhfWYn4T3S12o2OIBz3Tkkc8fRcE_whM-3FhO4OwUIyCCQ0Jk6zaEopr7hfc-mXjC2jiPsa58VBDjkajs6mmtsghtm9fXz6ekYkNJwiAgTIPn7ZWM23h0fzU6yZm5nzV4Q0qEHie6poJeZXkxjjSCWIaAI3YqV7vHrPoYBNSmGgzFKYDsCBy4_PN6l6QEIhkSVB-Fhdigz3UF2FOFDL3BNXke4PwFNbQVcfZmYaXKoJSu_bWrqQBn4_sGm7ngBY50TUyhhfRHAvd2yT3Wupir_KvWv-JvH2WgfB9QpGO40GtwaQVqRuJl014my7uaDWGH4Xj9L4Qi4RTJ4tmCd0qzXEKJ4KR4liD1qJkRldoXdo%3D)

clean_body: Democrats have made it clear: flipping the Senate is their top priority in 2026. | Dear fellow American, I’ve spent my life fighting for Wyoming — because this is my home. I was born and raised on a cattle ranch in Laramie County, and my roots here run deep. I know what it means to work hard, live free, and take pride in where you come from. That’s the Wyoming way — and it’s exactly what I’ve taken with me to Washington. From my years in the State Legislature to serving as your U.S. Senator, I’ve never stopped fighting to protect the values that make Wyoming strong and America great. Whether it’s securing our borders, defending the Second Amendment, or creating good-paying jobs, I’ve always put Wyoming and America first. As Chair of the Senate Western Caucus and a member of the conservative Senate Steering Committee, I pushed back against the Biden administration’s extreme agenda — especially when it came to reckless spending, anti-energy mandates, and efforts to lock up our lands. I’ve fought to protect our coal, oil, gas, and uranium industries, because I know how vital they are — not just to Wyoming’s economy, but to America’s future. This year, I’ve also been fighting to cut red tape, secure our border, and lead on crypto policy that protects innovation and freedom. I’m in the Senate to make Washington work for Wyoming — not the other way around. But now, our work is under serious threat. Democrats have made it clear: flipping the Senate is their top priority in 2026. They know that without the Senate, they can’t ram through their radical agenda. That’s why they’re pouring money into races across the country — including right here in the West — trying to tip the balance of power in their favor. We can’t let that happen. If we lose our Senate majority, we lose the ability to block dangerous policies and stand up for the freedoms we hold dear. Will you chip in to help us hold the line and defend our Senate majority? | I’m not in this fight for headlines or personal gain. I’m in it because I love Wyoming and America — and because I believe that with the right leadership, our best days are still ahead. Thank you for standing with me. With gratitude, Cynthia Lummis U.S. Senator – Wyoming Follow Cynthia Lummis | Paid for by Lummis for Wyoming Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

If Washington, D.C. was a state, the U.S. Senate would look different and the landscape for critical legislation would definitely be altered. While it doesn't have the square mileage of other states, D.C. would actually be ahead of Wyoming and Vermont in terms of population ( according to the 2020 census ).

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Please. Let me explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1677%2E791427%2ETr7ts-)

Friend —
At the end of this email, I'm going to ask you to **[make your first contribution — of $5 or any amount you can — to stand with my campaign for Congress.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june25.Nm0oDJ&refcode=em250623-1-210&t=2&akid=1677%2E791427%2ETr7ts-) But before I do that, please give me a chance to explain why your support is so important to our success.
Here's the situation:
This is a critical week for our campaign. At the end of it — just seven days from today — we're facing an official Federal Election Commission fundraising deadline.
I know my team and I have written to you about these quarterly deadlines before, but I mean it when I say that this is a big one. One that could very well set the tone for the next two years as we fight Trump and work to win reelection in the midterms.
Shortly after the deadline, our campaign has to file a report publicly disclosing our fundraising numbers. That means how much money we've raised, and how many individual contributions make up that amount.
Believe it or not, a LOT of people — from AIPAC and their billionaire donors, to far-right activists, to our establishment challengers and the media — will be combing through the receipts to see how we're doing.
They're going to use our fundraising numbers as an indicator of our campaign's grassroots strength. They want to see if there are any signs of weakness in our movement, and check if it's worth it to pour obscene amounts of dark money into Minnesota to try and exploit it.
Reporting the strongest numbers possible will tell them there is nothing they can do to stop this team's momentum, and show that our collective grassroots power is greater than anything they can throw our way.
**That's why your support — alongside thousands of progressives across the country — is so important. Especially today.**
So please:
**[Can you make your first online donation — of $5 or any amount that feels right to you — to support our movement today? No matter the size of your contribution, it'll help send an unmistakable message that this campaign stands united.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june25.Nm0oDJ&refcode=em250623-1-210&t=3&akid=1677%2E791427%2ETr7ts-)

When I think of the many, many reasons I'm so proud of this incredible team, one of them is the fact that we fund our campaigns the right way. I hope you feel the same way.
Thanks for being a part of it.
In solidarity,
Ilhan
