Washington D.C., 20033
clean_body: - Friend — At the end of this email, I'm going to ask you to - But before I do that, please give me a chance to explain why your support is so important to our success. Here's the situation: This is a critical week for our campaign. At the end of it — just seven days from today — we're facing an official Federal Election Commission fundraising deadline. I know my team and I have written to you about these quarterly deadlines before, but I mean it when I say that this is a big one. One that could very well set the tone for the next two years as we fight Trump and work to win reelection in the midterms. Shortly after the deadline, our campaign has to file a report publicly disclosing our fundraising numbers. That means how much money we've raised, and how many individual contributions make up that amount. Believe it or not, a LOT of people — from AIPAC and their billionaire donors, to far-right activists, to our establishment challengers and the media — will be combing through the receipts to see how we're doing. They're going to use our fundraising numbers as an indicator of our campaign's grassroots strength. They want to see if there are any signs of weakness in our movement, and check if it's worth it to pour obscene amounts of dark money into Minnesota to try and exploit it. Reporting the strongest numbers possible will tell them there is nothing they can do to stop this team's momentum, and show that our collective grassroots power is greater than anything they can throw our way. That's why your support — alongside thousands of progressives across the country — is so important. Especially today. So please: - If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | | - ** | - | | - | - | | - | - When I think of the many, many reasons I'm so proud of this incredible team, one of them is the fact that we fund our campaigns the right way. I hope you feel the same way. Thanks for being a part of it. In solidarity, Ilhan - PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Democrats should be the anti-war party
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Major update, Peter:

Donald Trump illegally bombed Iran over the weekend on Israel’s behalf,
pushing us to the brink of another endless war — and Democratic leadership
responded with... AIPAC talking points.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-signup-20250623-stop-war-on-iran/?source=em20250623-36783&akid=36783%2E1203867%2EURKnUU ]Sludge: NEW: Schumer and Jeffries are defending Israel’s attack on Iran
and have refrained from backing resolutions to prevent Trump from getting
the U.S. military more involved. It comes after AIPAC became the largest
PAC contributor to Congress, favoring Dems.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-signup-20250623-stop-war-on-iran/?source=em20250623-36783&akid=36783%2E1203867%2EURKnUU ]This horrific, unconstitutional attack puts countless lives at risk and
funnels billions of dollars into war profiteers instead of investing that
into our healthcare, schools, and communities. Sign on to demand your
Congressmember stop this war NOW →

The Democratic Party should be the anti-war party. But even though the
majority of Americans oppose another endless war abroad, lobby groups like
AIPAC and military-industrial complex super PACs are dumping millions into
political campaigns to buy support on both sides of the aisle.

In the 24+ hours since Trump bombed Iran, 60 Democratic representatives
and senators have signed onto legislation to stop this war. House Minority
Leader Hakeem Jeffries and Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer are NOT on
that list.

Jeffries’ and Schumer’s cowardice is not only pitiful: it’s deadly. Who
knows how many human lives will be lost if Democrats let Trump plunge us
into another war in the Middle East based on the same lies and spin used
to justify the war in Iraq? How many more taxpayer dollars will go to
bombs and weapons to support Israel’s reckless actions while Medicaid,
Social Security, and SNAP benefits are being threatened with defunding at
home?

Meanwhile, every single Justice Democrat is an original cosponsor of the
bipartisan war powers resolution introduced by Rep. Ro Khanna and
Republican Rep. Thomas Massie.

Any member of Congress worth keeping should be trying to stop this war and
demanding a war powers vote. It’s time for Schumer, Jeffries, and other
do-nothing Democrats to prioritize the American people over the interests
of a foreign government lobby group and defense contractor donors.

Anything less deserves a primary challenge.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-signup-20250623-stop-war-on-iran/?source=em20250623-36783&akid=36783%2E1203867%2EURKnUU ]Sign our petition to demand that EVERY Democrat in the House and Senate
vote in favor of a war powers resolution to stop Trump’s war with Iran
NOW!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-signup-20250623-stop-war-on-iran/?source=em20250623-36783&akid=36783%2E1203867%2EURKnUU ]Sign On

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250623-36783-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36783_1203867_URKnUU&akid=36783%2E1203867%2EURKnUU

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36783%2E1203867%2EURKnUU

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

_No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL..._

_**This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester.**_ I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana.

It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life.

clean_body: This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester | Fellow American, TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents... No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL... This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester. I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana. Winning this race wasn’t a “gimme.” We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. That’s because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000. He threw money at anybody and everybody who’d smear my good name. It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life. Despite all the obstacles , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of one man : Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana. As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority. Steve is up for re-election in 2026. Chuck Schumer and every Democrat in the nation would love nothing more than to see Steve Daines – the Republican Senate Majority Maker! – booted from Congress. 2026 is right around the corner. Steve’s radical opponent has already told the media that every minute since 2024, she’s been building a plan to win in 2026. That means Democrats are already funneling money and resources into this race. The fight to keep this Senate seat in Republican hands will be another knock-down, drag-out fight. For America's Future, Senator Tim Sheehy (R-MT) Former Navy SEAL Purple Heart Recipient P.S. We all have Steve to thank for booting Chuck Schumer out of the Majority Leader’s chair! The radicals in the Democrat party are FUMING. They’d love nothing more than to send Steve packing for his role in producing the 2024 Republican Trifecta. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

Friend — When conflict broke out between Israel and the regime that rules Iran, and hundreds of Americans were left stranded in Israel, Governor Ron DeSantis didn’t hesitate. Working closely with the Florida Department of Emergency Management, he launched a mission to bring them home—no politics, no delay, just action. This past week, over 1,500 Americans were rescued, and Governor DeSantis was right there to welcome them home as they landed safely in Tampa. This mission wasn’t about headlines or politics. It was about doing the right thing and putting American lives first. And the work isn’t over—Governor DeSantis continues working around the clock to evacuate Americans in warzones abroad and bring them home. This is what leadership looks like when it matters most. — Florida Freedom Fund

clean_body: | | | Delegate Ian Lovejoy voted to allow Virginia to extradite women and doctors who have abortions. This year, Louisiana prosecutors indicted an out of state doctor for mailing safe, legal abortion polls, attempting to extradite them from New York. This threat is real - while New York’s laws prevented extradition, states with abortion bans are aggressively pursuing women and doctors who seek care out of state. VA MAGA Republican Del. Ian Lovejoy voted to allow doctors and nurses who perform legal abortions in Virginia to be extradited for prosecution to anti-abortion states like Louisiana, Texas, and Idaho. He voted NO on protecting access to abortion and contraception. And, as a city councilman, Lovejoy voted to use zoning regulations to block abortion clinics from opening. to narrow Democratic majorities, Virginia is the last state in the South where abortion wasn’t banned or restricted after the fall of Roe v. Wade. If Virginia Republicans end the 51-49 Democratic majority in the VA House of Delegates, women and doctors NATIONWIDE aren’t safe. Elizabeth’s race could decide chamber control - and it’s a TOP pickup opportunity in a district Trump lost. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. | | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m livid. I’m frustrated. I’m appalled. [**And if you feel the same way about what’s happening in California right now, then I need you to join my campaign.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=fd25dc490d9240c5bc931c73e43c3c23&_e=jY7rquBgDmjicTUScDoSxjsorqwL-T6OdeEBN-pEUDa0ADzblmMwiBYhlw3uxi15xkcCsPcCKGDRLKtte6RwuQ_TThSHTLk6qvOPT54ttionFODXAvIR1Omf4DLpZ4p6Krhc1eX1BOJqY53hTXNnpkuYPLpxk8164sVevnfedZZkHbJdRjuPatbT3j6LdOckQfuVZvJt2AGmYgHUn2pBVwryNRry-lg7kcHykC2OJm6e0VIOxlvoOQ4LsDoINflJ60K_NsFmsDeRbizmd__efaR_PT2QgJJdNMGi5yr2POQ2KPe_aBr01Syp6WqB36a-YJ-DrI8q4doZDir14uIUmHcieKQGnKnQMGk3LrwK7Rv9fVQkDIrQcq0lx8aMlKkNy6xzr5CBg40TaulZ3EoFIgwXKbDMHv4NlhfIILRsx6HJY_lWOF9_H6D_f88ejwai1yaoJ-5Fr3qq1a1QGwopjkW6uOfTZphi-K_qewCmais2Zq7rip7M-C2JWiWmKYWC0n444ImmiEVSWpRb5yPkCqaksmcnXCcadKMU4kde05sPRe_t3lfQHRghbk5g-GqsqOA6fYdkh-Uhhm17rtJueJWQNxvvG7eIW3Dph2WtGdcTnLtroVdCB2NeBLs4kaxUOHDmQdIvOKXLOV4lQGBdjrh1WhHczIlMXFj8FYUjwl-wSMURB4kViV1I97XS3mo-ZiFcmR2VTcoPK91bYEtbtr5hFnVoj9jU2vFVDkSEQli-cfEsWXapT4ILyfu-WFw8) Because after days of rioting, looting, chaos, and violence in Los Angeles, Governor Gavin Newsom finally addressed California and the nation in primetime. In a broadcast that—just like his term as Governor—was rife with technical difficulties, Newsom failed to explain anything and took no responsibility... **While Angelenos, Californians, and the nation watched, Newsom went on a deranged 8-minute rant, making excuses for violent rioters and looters, railing about saving our democracy, and calling Trump a tyrant.** You and I know the Truth: calling in the National Guard, restoring law and order, and protecting Los Angeles doesn’t make Trump a tyrant; it makes him the leader that California needs in this moment. The real tyrant is the man who has all but explicitly endorsed these riots for political gain...the man who shut down schools, small businesses, and churches for years...the most authoritarian governor in our nation. Yes, Gavin Newsom is the TYRANT. And this is all his fault. And if you and I don’t stand up and demand an end to 15 years of unchecked Democrat rule, then the tyranny will NOT end with Gavin Newsom leaving office in 2027. The insanity, the riots, the radicalism won’t stop until it IS stopped.** ** **[That’s why I’m asking you to join my campaign today.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=fd25dc490d9240c5bc931c73e43c3c23&_e=jY7rquBgDmjicTUScDoSxjsorqwL-T6OdeEBN-pEUDa0ADzblmMwiBYhlw3uxi15xkcCsPcCKGDRLKtte6RwuQ_TThSHTLk6qvOPT54ttionFODXAvIR1Omf4DLpZ4p6Krhc1eX1BOJqY53hTXNnpkuYPLpxk8164sVevnfedZZkHbJdRjuPatbT3j6LdOckQfuVZvJt2AGmYgHUn2pBVwryNRry-lg7kcHykC2OJm6e0VIOxlvoOQ4LsDoINflJ60K_NsFmsDeRbizmd__efR2lTMoFpE-PZs8xiIriqe7YtXaHcFF1MgwX1MakEjQ10HDbf7Yqu6iiGv_f9Wp98J-IE1R-8XrZAWGgNwqoZoegcmJ1EPPERiGiSoxkkluKNLM7Lj1UiwhIZ_lWTvCPRCUGn2irQBBlbyvc8vLQYYjhdk-wSfePdrVFQhUJPeft6RMrbxFXxEPAS8_iRwRngzViEJJMD_7nqyjYbhNVY6A1vV9UzXJDtVXNchvTiKvIn_OtVAy0w0ecPFmcR2jCryBRuIY5XF4KH8EYG0B4fhRYm69xmJit9g6wQDDHh51fGHuY9vOepTYBA3UcinYq_sWHsm26cM9QEYIaanGfVmWt8A0Xn3HKiBXINqb2vfi0rE3o93QB90UXbf_Dp1EnZnLkceMbRXdQXLZhwGw_nvvTvK4KxxxVcZiD3I_93cdqeG9x_VSAnnUpvy2tkFGtTe3NbEKe2q01ZMbYCcGIoWR-y4UwOKz448Cjqlv6ibKc)** These L.A. riots were avoidable, and if I were Governor right now it would have been avoided. If we had proper leadership in this state, we would work WITH ICE and the Federal government to enforce immigration policy. We would have clamped down on the agitators IMMEDIATELY. Once you let a situation like this get out of control, it feeds on itself. Gavin Newsom knows this; but he let it happen anyway. clean_body: It’s not just the riots.| | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m livid. I’m frustrated. I’m appalled. Because after days of rioting, looting, chaos, and violence in Los Angeles, Governor Gavin Newsom finally addressed California and the nation in primetime. In a broadcast that—just like his term as Governor—was rife with technical difficulties, Newsom failed to explain anything and took no responsibility... While Angelenos, Californians, and the nation watched, Newsom went on a deranged 8-minute rant, making excuses for violent rioters and looters, railing about saving our democracy, and calling Trump a tyrant. You and I know the Truth: calling in the National Guard, restoring law and order, and protecting Los Angeles doesn’t make Trump a tyrant; it makes him the leader that California needs in this moment. The real tyrant is the man who has all but explicitly endorsed these riots for political gain...the man who shut down schools, small businesses, and churches for years...the most authoritarian governor in our nation. Yes, Gavin Newsom is the TYRANT. And this is all his fault. And if you and I don’t stand up and demand an end to 15 years of unchecked Democrat rule, then the tyranny will NOT end with Gavin Newsom leaving office in 2027. The insanity, the riots, the radicalism won’t stop until it IS stopped. These L.A. riots were avoidable, and if I were Governor right now it would have been avoided. If we had proper leadership in this state, we would work WITH ICE and the Federal government to enforce immigration policy. We would have clamped down on the agitators IMMEDIATELY. Once you let a situation like this get out of control, it feeds on itself. Gavin Newsom knows this; but he let it happen anyway. He’s more focused on collecting sound bites for his foolish Presidential campaign than he is on keeping Californians safe. And as I said, the tyranny won’t end when he leaves office if we don’t demand real change. Would Kamala Harris handle this any better? Of course not! We need real leadership in California. That’s why I’m running for Governor. Friend, it’s not just the riots; EVERYTHING is falling apart all around us in this once great state. Crime is up. Homelessness is exploding. Public schools are failing. Housing is unaffordable. Businesses and families are fleeing. This election is our last best hope to save California. We can create a new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California Golden Again. So I'm calling on every proud patriot who wants to turn things around: Join me—and let's get to work. Steve Hilton Republican Candidate for Governor of California DONATE P.S. Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is right around the corner. We need to put out a strong report to show the radical Democrats how powerful our movement to Make California Golden Again is. . **Even a small donation of $5 adds up if everyone chips in. | | | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC ID#1480425 Please add mailto:info@stevehiltonforgovernor.com "info@stevegarvey.com" to your email contacts to make sure our updates are making it into your inbox. clean_body: Tonight at 6:30 pm Central | | | | | Fellow Conservative, I will be hosting an exclusive telephone town hall TONIGHT, that will be starting shortly, at 6:30 pm Central.During our conversation, I will be discussing everything we MUST do to STOP the Blue Wave by defending our Republican Senate Majority, to ensure the Democrats don 't effectively cut President Trump's term in half! To join the event, call toll-free 833-380-0731 at 6:30 pm Central. That's 833-380-0731. This briefing is for conservative, America First Patriots only, so do not share this message with anyone who is not like-minded . During our time together, we will have the opportunity to discuss many topics, and you will have a chance to ask me your questions directly. I look forward to answering them. Your participation in the fight to put America First and defend our Senate Majority is critical to the future of our great nation. Thanks in advance for joining the call that will be starting shortly tonight, June 23rdat 6:30 pm Central. I look forward to speaking with you. For liberty, Ted Cruz PS:Space is limited for this private, grassroots briefing starting shortly at 6:30 pm CT. If I can count on you, please dial-in using this CONFIDENTIAL toll-free number: 833-380-0731. | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. |

name: Team Crow
subject: 7 days to show our power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

In just one week, we’ll hit our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. That means we’ll have to report our numbers to the FEC, and they’ll become public for all to see. And to tell you the truth, the strength of Jason’s campaign will be judged by what we raise between now and then.

Here’s the good news:

We’ve had a strong first half of the year. Jason was just named Colorado Democrats’ Democrat of the Year . He took on a new leadership role with the DCCC, helping bring the next generation of public servants to Congress. And through it all, he’s kept fighting for democracy, defending working families, and standing up to extremism.

The momentum is on our side, but we can’t stop now. We need to show potential opponents, pundits, and national Republicans that Jason Crow has the people behind him.

So we’re asking: will you help us out and chip in a few dollars before our major end-of-quarter fundraising deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-june2025]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

# [For 22 Years, I've been saying NO to war with Iran](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=158217717&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4MjE3NzE3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTA3MDU0ODgsImV4cCI6MTc1MzI5NzQ4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.JKg2PRh2YuvH0xIN2B9jVCumFlvI3G9aSTIqAnXwWqI)

| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Jun 23
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/for-22-years-ive-been-saying-no-to?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

This is such a crazy time.
Do you really imagine that you can bully a _Shi 'a Muslim_ country into submission? "[Bomb Iran to the negotiating table](https://substack.com/redirect/6255c744-3224-43e5-868f-accd753623d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?" Do you even KNOW what they believe, and how deeply they believe it?
Do you know that their deepest and most cherished spiritual ritual involves beating their chests _hard, for hours, in the dark, in a near-frenzy of communal feeling_ \- words don't do justice to the intimate, sweaty, packed crowd of black-clad men shouting their dedicated fervor, the women keening their grief - over a martyrdom that happened centuries ago?
Do you know the _details_ of that martyrdom? Do you know how Hassan and Hussein, the grandsons of the Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him), refused to accept the false leadership of the greedy general? Refused, though they were few and his army was many -- refused, even as he threatened them _and their children_ with death -- refused, even as their party was trapped on the riverbank, shot at whenever they tried to reach water, starved of food, dying of thirst -- _refused to give in,_ even when those enemies laughed in their face and denied water for the babies, the helpless babies wailing weakly for days on end with nothing to drink until the little ones died... until, eventually, every last one of them died... for the "crime" of courage - of **standing for the truth, for principle, for justice?**
**Do you know what kind of people you are dealing with?**
I do. I have been privileged to witness that ritual, the keening grief, the fierce shouts, the fiery dedication to justice, to vengeance, to upholding **truth** and **principle** and **justice** even when the entirety of the world stands against them - or has abandoned them. Even when death is certain. Even when their own children will die first.
We have nothing in Western culture to compare it with.
Has Iran been secularized? Yes, certainly.
Is this fervor present in all its people? No, I'm sure it's not - not even in all the Shi'a Muslims (let alone the Baha'i, Christians, Jews, or Buddhists who are also Iranians).
Is it a strong enough cultural presence to make _bullying Iran into submission_ a completely unlikely, even ludicrous and dangerously misleading, prospect?
**YES.**
Even leaving aside the geostrategic implications - the United States has _**[nineteen](https://substack.com/redirect/c5563009-a4ed-437d-aadf-99b04b375d23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_[ bases](https://substack.com/redirect/c5563009-a4ed-437d-aadf-99b04b375d23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) within Iran's striking distance. Even leaving aside the complete illegality of these attacks [under international law](https://substack.com/redirect/2f679a77-ceaa-400d-99eb-f82985894dde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Even leaving aside their illegality under [our OWN laws](https://substack.com/redirect/57071976-57ca-439e-a4fc-cd1ce71c07ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
It is a **very bad idea** for the United States to go to war with Iran.
Israel has been claiming Iran was "weeks away from nuclear weapons" for _**[decades](https://substack.com/redirect/5863c242-f939-44ed-af9e-32e57107f9a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_.
You know who has nuclear weapons? _**[Israel](https://substack.com/redirect/aa4980a2-1cc3-4428-9e19-0a230f4b2aaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**_
And no one else in the Middle East does. Not Iran, though they're closest. Pakistan and India do, though, and there's already hints in the media cycle that this war might "spill" over into Pakistan ... perhaps fulfilling the long-held imperial dream of [dismantling](https://substack.com/redirect/9058d568-af0d-4668-bc1f-39b0c6df4c23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that country - which has every reason to be strong and vibrant, yet is crippled by interference, internal decay, corruption, and economic malaise - into easier-to-control substates _(and just who *has* been funding the Balochistan rebels, hmm?)_.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tZWxpc3NhNGNvbmdyZXNzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.M3RG0zU2JGRNfPmVCMklRp0X45KzpAv-w8RawF4IdRQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=158217717)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=158217717&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4MjE3NzE3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTA3MDU0ODgsImV4cCI6MTc1MzI5NzQ4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.JKg2PRh2YuvH0xIN2B9jVCumFlvI3G9aSTIqAnXwWqI)
Israel has nukes. The United States has nukes. Iran does not, and never has. What Iran DOES have is a visceral, centuries-old obsession with martyrdom for the cause of justice. And US bases in range. And Israel, in range.
Pardon the... rant, but this is **utter insanity**.
> "Right now, the United States is trying to defend a double standard, in which Israel can have all the nuclear weapons it wants--and talk threateningly about using __ them--but nobody else in the Middle East is allowed to make even tentative steps toward acquiring any. We're now on the brink of a catastrophic war with Iran, all from trying to enforce that double standard. It's not a sustainable situation. There are only two coherent stances: either Iran has just as much right to a nuclear weapon as Israel does, or neither country should have one."
> _['Wait, why is Israel allowed to have nukes?'](https://substack.com/redirect/aa4980a2-1cc3-4428-9e19-0a230f4b2aaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- Current Affairs_
Americans - and people of conscience and good sense everywhere - need to see this for what it is -- warmongering for profit and private gain -- and move to stop it, with _much more_ fervor, clarity, and effectiveness than we brought to bear against the Iraq War, and that saw millions of us in the streets.
Including me, at the age of 10, and my little sister, and our mother, even as my Navy father had already been deployed to help plan the war. (True fact: he was part of building the "no-strike list," including schools and hospitals and all the places Israel has taught us it's now ok to bomb to rubble. But Israel didn't start it, actually! After the no-strike list was completed, the US government completely ignored it. Went to war without using it. What a waste. The unnecessary death and destruction of civilian infrastructure boggles the mind, shocks the conscience, killed hundreds of thousands of people, and sure didn't help our national pocketbook...)
During that protest, I distinctly remember a sign that had the letters IRA- followed by a Q rotating into an N. It has been obvious for decades that this was the direction things were being steered.
(Why? By whom? Who profits? And who pays?)
Here's what we can do:
Join, follow, amplify on social media, and donate to [NIAC Action](https://substack.com/redirect/e55cf21b-ad0e-4511-8757-087dacca5979?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Join, follow, amplify, and donate to [Veterans for Peace](https://substack.com/redirect/67397c04-46e6-4218-804a-c375fb4cbd13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
And if you aren't already, **get in the streets** \- without your phone or Oura ring, with the lawyer's guild phone number written on your arm, and wearing _anonymous clothing and heavy asymmetrical makeup_ to confuse facial recognition cameras and screw up [Palantir's database on all of us](https://substack.com/redirect/5100e5c4-b7ef-407d-a6a1-a0a7bd67bd5c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- because yes, the surveillance state is very real.
After 22 years, I can't believe I'm still saying the same thing.
_**No War With Iran.**_
(Can't we move on to better problems, soon? Say, let's [tax the billionaires](https://substack.com/redirect/c20d7e93-5d0c-41ee-9042-db0ebc06bc4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) enough to save our ecosphere and house and feed and clothe and educate and care for every human being on the planet, now there's an interesting thought!)
Stay safe out there, everyone. God help us **help ourselves**.

clean_body: I can't believe that we even have to have this conversation. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? I can't believe that we even have to have this conversation. | | | Jun 23 | | | | | | | | | | | | This is such a crazy time. Do you really imagine that you can bully a Shi 'a Muslim country into submission? "?" Do you even KNOW what they believe, and how deeply they believe it? Do you know that their deepest and most cherished spiritual ritual involves beating their chests hard, for hours, in the dark, in a near-frenzy of communal feeling \- words don't do justice to the intimate, sweaty, packed crowd of black-clad men shouting their dedicated fervor, the women keening their grief - over a martyrdom that happened centuries ago? Do you know the details of that martyrdom? Do you know how Hassan and Hussein, the grandsons of the Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him), refused to accept the false leadership of the greedy general? Refused, though they were few and his army was many -- refused, even as he threatened them and their children with death -- refused, even as their party was trapped on the riverbank, shot at whenever they tried to reach water, starved of food, dying of thirst -- refused to give in, even when those enemies laughed in their face and denied water for the babies, the helpless babies wailing weakly for days on end with nothing to drink until the little ones died... until, eventually, every last one of them died... for the "crime" of courage - of standing for the truth, for principle, for justice? Do you know what kind of people you are dealing with? I do. I have been privileged to witness that ritual, the keening grief, the fierce shouts, the fiery dedication to justice, to vengeance, to upholding truth and principle and justice even when the entirety of the world stands against them - or has abandoned them. Even when death is certain. Even when their own children will die first. We have nothing in Western culture to compare it with. Has Iran been secularized? Yes, certainly. Is this fervor present in all its people? No, I'm sure it's not - not even in all the Shi'a Muslims (let alone the Baha'i, Christians, Jews, or Buddhists who are also Iranians). Is it a strong enough cultural presence to make bullying Iran into submission a completely unlikely, even ludicrous and dangerously misleading, prospect? YES. Even leaving aside the geostrategic implications - the United States has within Iran's striking distance. Even leaving aside the complete illegality of these attacks . Even leaving aside their illegality under . It is a very bad idea for the United States to go to war with Iran. Israel has been claiming Iran was "weeks away from nuclear weapons" for . You know who has nuclear weapons? . And no one else in the Middle East does. Not Iran, though they're closest. Pakistan and India do, though, and there's already hints in the media cycle that this war might "spill" over into Pakistan ... perhaps fulfilling the long-held imperial dream of that country - which has every reason to be strong and vibrant, yet is crippled by interference, internal decay, corruption, and economic malaise - into easier-to-control substates (and just who has been funding the Balochistan rebels, hmm?). Israel has nukes. The United States has nukes. Iran does not, and never has. What Iran DOES have is a visceral, centuries-old obsession with martyrdom for the cause of justice. And US bases in range. And Israel, in range. Pardon the... rant, but this is utter insanity. "Right now, the United States is trying to defend a double standard, in which Israel can have all the nuclear weapons it wants--and talk threateningly about using them--but nobody else in the Middle East is allowed to make even tentative steps toward acquiring any. We're now on the brink of a catastrophic war with Iran, all from trying to enforce that double standard. It's not a sustainable situation. There are only two coherent stances: either Iran has just as much right to a nuclear weapon as Israel does, or neither country should have one." \- Current Affairs Americans - and people of conscience and good sense everywhere - need to see this for what it is -- warmongering for profit and private gain -- and move to stop it, with much more fervor, clarity, and effectiveness than we brought to bear against the Iraq War, and that saw millions of us in the streets. Including me, at the age of 10, and my little sister, and our mother, even as my Navy father had already been deployed to help plan the war. (True fact: he was part of building the "no-strike list," including schools and hospitals and all the places Israel has taught us it's now ok to bomb to rubble. But Israel didn't start it, actually! After the no-strike list was completed, the US government completely ignored it. Went to war without using it. What a waste. The unnecessary death and destruction of civilian infrastructure boggles the mind, shocks the conscience, killed hundreds of thousands of people, and sure didn't help our national pocketbook...) During that protest, I distinctly remember a sign that had the letters IRA- followed by a Q rotating into an N. It has been obvious for decades that this was the direction things were being steered. (Why? By whom? Who profits? And who pays?) Here's what we can do: Join, follow, amplify on social media, and donate to . Join, follow, amplify, and donate to . And if you aren't already, get in the streets \- without your phone or Oura ring, with the lawyer's guild phone number written on your arm, and wearing anonymous clothing and heavy asymmetrical makeup to confuse facial recognition cameras and screw up -- because yes, the surveillance state is very real. After 22 years, I can't believe I'm still saying the same thing. No War With Iran. (Can't we move on to better problems, soon? Say, let's enough to save our ecosphere and house and feed and clothe and educate and care for every human being on the planet, now there's an interesting thought!) Stay safe out there, everyone. God help us help ourselves. You 're currently a free subscriber to "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry. name: Jim Jordan
subject: We’re at the inflection point
body:
It’s gametime. What happens now decides it all.

It’s gametime. What happens now decides it all.
| [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aGCJ/?__vbtrk=Mjk4MDU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk4MDU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend,
---
I recently shared a major update with you: The battle for the House Majority has fallen within the **_margin of error_**.
---
_Right now, we’re at the inflection point that will decide which way the toss-up falls._
---
**_Democrats are convinced that their showdown with President Trump over illegal immigration raids in blue states across America will be the key to flipping the House..._**
---
**_...And they’re BETTING IT ALL on the belief that they’re right._**
---
But just like you, I know in my heart that they’re dead WRONG.
---
Every voter I talk to absolutely stands by the President’s actions on illegal immigration.
---
_But, at the end of the day, we can cite every focus group saying we’re right until we’re blue in the face – the _ONLY_ thing that matters is the final vote tally at the ballot box._
---
**And to win at the ballot box, we need a 100% verified, up-to-date voter file. No ands, ifs, or buts about it.**
---
Friend, we’ve crunched the numbers and with our razor-thin majority now within the margin of error, YOUR voter profile is the difference maker.
---
**That’s why I’m reaching out today to simply ask that you VERIFY your GOP voter profile to give me and President Trump the most accurate polling possible as we CLOSE THE GAP on the Democrats.**
---
[**Please complete the questionnaire before the deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. to verify your voter profile. >>**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aGCJ/?__vbtrk=Mjk4MDU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk4MDU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aGCJ/?__vbtrk=Mjk4MDU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk4MDU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[VERIFY NOW ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aGCK/?__vbtrk=Mjk4MDU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk4MDU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---

Thank you,
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aGCJ/?__vbtrk=Mjk4MDU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk4MDU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

Jim Jordan

They are backing him because they know that he will rhetorically attack Trump but in practice he will offer no substantive action to crack down against the President. | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsz2jPBJVwSLg-vlK2nW3KPdyQNOEdBeU6akUo93Q8SljELe3_xnOn5jUp-eQ7N5-OW4NlzIbvGhJtSzjR7-pUP5jr5yAcnhnh60dXMMALijUPMNBuee0g8MzmAezD9t7cLTwL9uvmafv3RQEU_QLlp4rPazSI1srt6gn7nQQQ84H8Q2-pmIz0VTt1GpWJkOTYSDweNy8wtCv1shmI4KJSRy9qW-x0A8yO1AJmp40mw4pv2BJTC9YyiDyYGR0AP0i5vqsg_1fpoFohb7y1XKqDMz14BBZjWrreqQN8opKxIXSV0Nv8sGyZgBZnoiPdQmB9ricdzqRtM1FwCwaQhgSfonEVsPEIimWLWIiag1UM9Pg/4hl/SHUEUXqbStuGW_HNOyLLbA/h0/h001.5CPK2YjRzVwxM8pAXiAPubYlgmEWBvtPJkaycRLRyCg)
---
Friend, As someone who likely does not live in NYC, why should you care about the NYC mayoral election? The mayoral race in NYC, the biggest city in America, has turned into a referendum against how we fight back against Trump. On one side, is former Governor Andrew Cuomo, who up until this morning was the frontrunner in this race. And on the other is Zohran Mamdani. Both claim to want to take on and resist Trump however we have serious reasons to doubt the sincerity of one of the candidates:
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsz2jPBJVwSLg-vlK2nW3KPdyQNOEdBeU6akUo93Q8SlseLvlASdS527GCG7WUFNRYoERpS2QLXJ1qlfPALShD4Myc-rrf15rBmY5QHovhwiXUuZN1KQwlcaWR1WXCkeFW1YKk6YsCz7r1gepz89X6pB_8iUnVERgHMR_nqQ5jo3VrnZgDAWgZmA3BTgrffXXsXpsAQdf0L83lb3JJEyXxyAQrEE09xRjtGrA7gsS3gWlRex6Y4AIj4YNu5vRr97_GoF25faP_l5uyrqBFDfLlulQQHQDf-n01SpD4hOFSuhiiXFaYfC-sEMw2ZOrxIEDTq06rF39TKFELZ6T4FlXxQLqlwSuq-Asmzmk1mXNZJbw/4hl/SHUEUXqbStuGW_HNOyLLbA/h1/h001.pRpQqwbwUIorv4zZIvBKoPkbmmtm-CjDbAqGFtjnsbQ)
---
Andrew Cuomo has accepted hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of contributions from the same billionaires who funded President Trump. They are backing him because they know that he will rhetorically attack Trump but in practice he will offer no substantive action to crack down against the President. **Accepting money from MAGA backers makes you a traitor to our cause.** No Dem Left Behind is on the front lines of the fight to ensure that the real democrat in this race Zohran Mamdani, who is running on an unapologetically anti-Trump agenda and has accepted no MAGA money, has a fighting chance. Because of NYC campaign finance laws, Zohran's campaign is no longer able to accept donations which is why No Dem Left Behind made a $10,000 dollar contribution to the official Mamdani support PAC. Now thanks to support from groups like us and that of Democrats from across the nation, **Zohran has taken the lead in this critical race as of this morning. ** **[Election day is tomorrow. A victory in this race for Zohran would deal a major blow to the MAGA billionaires who think their Trojan horse candidates will go unnoticed. Can we count on you to split a donation between the Zohran support PAC (New Yorkers for Lower Costs) and No Dem Left Behind to help defeat MAGA's chosen candidate and elect a Democrat who will ensure NYC stands up to Trump?](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsz2jPBJVwSLg-vlK2nW3KPdyQNOEdBeU6akUo93Q8SlkV8vXXd9AdYzxc-wvpU3PWQv_gu5rE6B131VDmxtIDRwkvJ-KWUux0KQykobK2wVvCLc1cA-Td32AwsHi2ZFwRlIJubqbDsMQsX6m4R6RxIFPhOVyT-LMRtyRbSZ4Q2zobQTXRXl3GxXGuxGSjntt9Fe2oL2s_8qOTSvb8SVj8DLALprXt3biDMUsUWH-OxNVcat-OFAhsFHw1_4xABlub4NwVIrWzDOYwOKI5qGVIURs4x7IvE-Es3p04DWkX2_rcopRg3Id90gT6bAoCQv0zeCLnPmO7QGDmhCq5ij8DdkAS8uhVoRDK1EtpJKug8Zg/4hl/SHUEUXqbStuGW_HNOyLLbA/h2/h001.uTGeGZsk5cJ2lNuJtL-wCLZEHTYRQAJJ2x-LIDqd2uo)**
---
[ Rush a Donation ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsz2jPBJVwSLg-vlK2nW3KPdyQNOEdBeU6akUo93Q8SlnkUhtIromorVHzoTPKe2ZLNkqyV63QOPYAe0n58-uhDv19MIbKLpcTkhv6B1eB6QvAk1gEa5Icx05ON3l3kRpwBNQp2xscO4R5h8LfSb67qpX9llCd4b-mEO9MzH8jrliwrVmITIrTzk-74dDGllF0ntYXu3YrX1W6N7ssEo9QKLkiY1JVNX49lBBxQOh65_RN3zIn4HG8goWB7nhEe8yEDy0tquVELYa100elNtUdEIx5FlrDm_c91q3SM4KU-wcNaQuGt0beMt1_4-cM8qi3_F6PtJXS-x19LT5Ur8ZCobSkxjxobWUVRpAEGcU1ilQ/4hl/SHUEUXqbStuGW_HNOyLLbA/h3/h001.JBDbpFAJ5i0DiwSAfg6V5ZQUMhId_bJgHfhmzXDfBHw)

clean_body: Andrew Cuomo has accepted hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of contributions from the same billionaires who funded President Trump. They are backing him because they know that he will rhetorically attack Trump but in practice he will offer no substantive action to crack down against the President. | | Friend, As someone who likely does not live in NYC, why should you care about the NYC mayoral election? The mayoral race in NYC, the biggest city in America, has turned into a referendum against how we fight back against Trump. On one side, is former Governor Andrew Cuomo, who up until this morning was the frontrunner in this race. And on the other is Zohran Mamdani. Both claim to want to take on and resist Trump however we have serious reasons to doubt the sincerity of one of the candidates: | Andrew Cuomo has accepted hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of contributions from the same billionaires who funded President Trump. They are backing him because they know that he will rhetorically attack Trump but in practice he will offer no substantive action to crack down against the President. Accepting money from MAGA backers makes you a traitor to our cause. No Dem Left Behind is on the front lines of the fight to ensure that the real democrat in this race Zohran Mamdani, who is running on an unapologetically anti-Trump agenda and has accepted no MAGA money, has a fighting chance. Because of NYC campaign finance laws, Zohran's campaign is no longer able to accept donations which is why No Dem Left Behind made a $10,000 dollar contribution to the official Mamdani support PAC. Now thanks to support from groups like us and that of Democrats from across the nation, Zohran has taken the lead in this critical race as of this morning. Let's leave everything on the table. Team No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . subject: Join us to defend NC Waters against MVP Southgate!
body:
Register for Mon June 30 Virtual Comment Party | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.jTd4CJP2oHMhBHdrjS9uukzPjE5gIqDOxviaZ-KBGWjrYVu3LcNu8TZ61N04l8NrcZf5GLKtS_aLncDJn17_euzvB7xlAIRuxmePe4bOIac4elGWtus6rlOeiqgfCPQeKqoDBOy4kuKyqpp4pn1adGLcpWsmSJZ0hEQ0-F4oPteur0Gs2Xskkbt9v80ux1YCi5ulwSnrEDPXxmPB3gOo1vbviZ9te1Q0NiRwTTvDcGMEsGAMLXMX1TfQ9ZrH1YTyfQM6YvoUnxJoW1NQOWO1bkqJNsalhu46cPrKT2paa3BTmmoHlyBf4fhPgL8xqWda/4hl/NGIpvjbeTeus1LfLlnCx2g/h0/h001.p4VCoLTA004QwDsnOolK_UZV1b9as6fATIHCrZ3s9m4)
---
#### **Join us Mon June 30th for a Virtual Comment Party!**
---
The Mountain Valley Pipeline wants to build a 30-mile high-pressure methane gas pipeline, called MVP Southgate, which will pollute water bodies in Rockingham County and lock our state into decades of harmful methane gas infrastructure. This project would connect to the controversial 300-mile Mountain Valley Pipeline in Pittsylvania County, Virginia. _MVP is seeking a state 401 water permit from the N.C. Department of Environmental Quality to cross bodies of water in Rockingham County._ NCDEQ is seeking feedback from the public before it decides on the permit. **Join us on Monday, June 30, for a[virtual comment party](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.jTd4CJP2oHMhBHdrjS9uukzPjE5gIqDOxviaZ-KBGWivOZ28oFy-Lf1dYaYTZCwffHDKvcwmrjZrVIXqPyD7nIS3gJHRpH0vfhYxST_rQwvR-KLbo_WFYnk6pyZlLxA_l8qh2bEJX_eQpSKXaAgb580bOGX-pSX5fhJI5W12lSTC_VQHznC_A4cd4EOKT4TPf7E0Zq7n4MfQjiouM5ZIRartwk6j78T0z04W9M9xt8H8yy1xCOMP5NH5syBTjNmYZ3Gb89dF6YnI1q6aeu9wCigyr3-DVSKcV5h3Plo2-2k9Z8w3oFPH4lJyj90079KP/4hl/NGIpvjbeTeus1LfLlnCx2g/h1/h001.m2IAhdG8g23hKz6eLd2M9-M4ASbiM32BDOMlKJeM2hE)**, to learn how to share your concerns and tell NCDEQ to deny the permit. In 2020, public engagement helped lead to NCDEQ's denial of MVP's request for the same permit, which delayed the project for years. Now that MVP has revived the Southgate project, speaking out is an important way to help oppose this dangerous pipeline.
---

_From the[article](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMSxcRfTSZ3_SbRP8YIM-v65RUmz-LmGeq53p7q-4ZAd9pEBARJqUzEoSOysB0Rm5Iir1n36i6KDjlDeTZ_8H6iYmu9qcrxllaWa82pGi-6VMqfW5PBvI0QPTKC5h-yuUijlM294NwOfMD_gJS_SSMic-tDNkGWv8jWSMxEAVx3l03GG8vKbb79CXHs1SKjKpjyXd6MgB5W8l8_1IgryQw9oZp7cIDSybDvqydlMaVbJXhl1oCub3P5iea8-8bECxgFzmVlf4N20Cp7Z1vwCD5LI2Ngi8_P274r3A23DOrDQgXyRg0mrM8mCMDFmITF7KT_3u0t3x6ehowt9kJi2YR4LkXRXskstKoXIs3pm2NxiqhzEiF4irzLG7yyQi4Eofjocjo__OZB7o23o1SLNBV0DL9WbwYgEt-NhQtXc3dbwCNYKkgB69dqqfVgHeehtpj9rTLoB1OmvvwlC_SurcLx705wal5R8GkrE7LkzkAtd_-cNd1ET_s-bilXs4115KNQ/4hl/NGIpvjbeTeus1LfLlnCx2g/h7/h001.4POV0hf7P8BlwEupmkrGFHGU9CW3ENbiPr2cfzQVm08):_ "In his complaint, Barnhill says he discovered corrosion in three separate sections of pipeline joints on Nov. 15, 2023, that was significant enough to make them noncompliant with construction specications and federal regulations. Barnhill alleges his supervisor, David Mitchell, lead welding inspector for Mountain Valley Pipeline, agreed with him the corroded joints were out of compliance during a phone call that day but said that Damon Bowers, the pipeline's chief inspector, directed the joints to be installed. Mitchell quoted Bowers as saying, _**" If you **__**want to keep your job, just install [the**_ _**joints], " **_according to the complaint."

clean_body: Register for Mon June 30 Virtual Comment Party | | Join us Mon June 30th for a Virtual Comment Party! The Mountain Valley Pipeline wants to build a 30-mile high-pressure methane gas pipeline, called MVP Southgate, which will pollute water bodies in Rockingham County and lock our state into decades of harmful methane gas infrastructure. This project would connect to the controversial 300-mile Mountain Valley Pipeline in Pittsylvania County, Virginia. MVP is seeking a state 401 water permit from the N.C. Department of Environmental Quality to cross bodies of water in Rockingham County. NCDEQ is seeking feedback from the public before it decides on the permit. Join us on Monday, June 30, for a, to learn how to share your concerns and tell NCDEQ to deny the permit. In 2020, public engagement helped lead to NCDEQ's denial of MVP's request for the same permit, which delayed the project for years. Now that MVP has revived the Southgate project, speaking out is an important way to help oppose this dangerous pipeline. | Share the Organizational Sign-On Letter! Can your organization, faith group, small biz sign onto (not for individuals!) urging NC DEQ to deny MVP Southgate's permit? | | | From the: "In his complaint, Barnhill says he discovered corrosion in three separate sections of pipeline joints on Nov. 15, 2023, that was significant enough to make them noncompliant with construction specications and federal regulations. Barnhill alleges his supervisor, David Mitchell, lead welding inspector for Mountain Valley Pipeline, agreed with him the corroded joints were out of compliance during a phone call that day but said that Damon Bowers, the pipeline's chief inspector, directed the joints to be installed. Mitchell quoted Bowers as saying, " If you want to keep your job, just install [the joints], " according to the complaint." | WED June 25 - Summer Movie Night at YESA Farm - MON June 30 - MVP Southgate Comment Party - WED July 16 - Summer Movie Night at YESA Farm - THURS July 17 - Raleigh Rights of Nature Info Session - Bila:huk 7 Directions of Service | | | | Sent via . name: Unconstitutional
subject: Our founding fathers are rolling in their graves
body:
To prevent our nation from collapsing into the type of monarchy that our founding fathers rebelled against, our founding fathers vested the power to declare war to Congress. | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-zzZSYfDnkuOskAvU04BV0j9B2JSdQ689sa6nISaTVe0FlLY01BXZurW_zY5rDwH5U3L_HSYZ6LPLmDi8P3DqUXcTACl0HnPgvcYQUi76-QHqCtsXWO6Itk-Oi9K1hnKnVItGTTHPY4YvURtn-iW58ZbEPmvESwAqOsxXlAt5ZYLlI-MRw7Sf9mSaT6EYxuPxX-GYvkbV_3oAez_41PWPg6toj5H8yQ3HF3JfI9XzKz9jP9FxO_CxfadrDlKuF4m8YFSY_E7Z_yvajYRN82FfC5zgD90ccB9zsL30kOihHTfg3j6hWErI-JRVgh4BSKWjA/4hl/QsqHT0iaSA22eCGMqXrfXQ/h0/h001.w1UFRr-PQk7vkIMy3gv0gcOLrmT0fVV-4tfkWy4VkVc)
---
Peter, On Saturday, Trump made the unilateral decision to bomb Iran -- **an act of war that is blatantly illegal and unconstitutional.** To prevent our nation from collapsing into the type of monarchy that our founding fathers rebelled against, our founding fathers vested the power to declare war to Congress, so that a President could not singlehandedly make the decision to drag America into an unjust and unpopular war:
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-zzZSYfDnkuOskAvU04BV0j9B2JSdQ689sa6nISaTVe0cl6Q5vQM1GD3uY1UBJI9jK9cZgiSkQrW9i4_wfHDyxxBbnmTnx4aM_KB9o9zuEq7yq8c5sUHOgz8wpd0s1OlkHQz3t2XLjnbRktDSh5ZXiCIpegaHh0T6mXYb1ZRnfByErDA8T7K0cfS_J5b5fDnD3OyAVIj9aV4N3PA_ajZE9DAIhpuyShW9XbR8E_t7igGKQ3HDuwIlk5whIP0HSbgpdHf7Ruc3r2kqYt0YeIYRIabME17-MaOIW9443P0HIRZIMM0ECYMIp0jx_ojLLFYXQ/4hl/QsqHT0iaSA22eCGMqXrfXQ/h1/h001.wdxF-o2JWk_PgrLSdc9l9FHHEjgmKO2cRmaqUpY0JdA)
---
**_Trump 's decision to bomb Iran without Congressional authorization is by far the most egregious and un-American action he or any modern President has ever taken._** **This is clear grounds for impeachment and removal from office.** _Unfortunately, there are still many MAGA members of Congress who are willing to cede their authority to the President and are comfortable giving Trump unlimited power like the kings that the founding of our nation was a declaration against._ Members of Congress have a constitutional and moral responsibility to reclaim their authority to declare war -- to restore checks & balances and to prevent Trump from entangling our nation into a war that the majority of Americans are against. **While we wait for Congress to grow a spine, Defend Our Courts is fighting to protect the last line of defense for Democracy -- our courts. **That's why we are working non-stop to help Dem supreme court justices in key swing states. Trump is attempting to replace them with MAGA loyalists who will let him act as a king and rig elections in his favor **--** like in Pennsylvania's upcoming 2025 supreme court retention election. **[Will you help us fight back and defend our courts from Trump 's attempts to become a king?](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-zzZSYfDnkuOskAvU04BV0j9B2JSdQ689sa6nISaTVe0UzdCbu29X49sGSRVqor5NUKlmnLuuyzusUqTWLMdKRhuvho3EKVfHZVhVUHOFNObQM81rs9sPwuPKGkVN4zvhD8gE3VL_n0io4inCValbqJwruVhdmHbqhvZDXx0zxHJy7XYr1rAiLRrNk9rv550cETaQ8_3iNX0rLQ-HDlZjmmGPscpKLKAxcX8TvyhmdaW-_PfRgskglN3beNsIb8PxDKxnmqJEVHOhoJh6bl09T9F7OYfT9_RpZOIPFdAi-Of8nDtamMg2UGeiFpwei072w/4hl/QsqHT0iaSA22eCGMqXrfXQ/h2/h001.aCMEq3ToCKlx4AhKMD3OexqlHi7JrfGnMeeAEJkgaCY)**

clean_body: To prevent our nation from collapsing into the type of monarchy that our founding fathers rebelled against, our founding fathers vested the power to declare war to Congress. | | Peter, On Saturday, Trump made the unilateral decision to bomb Iran -- an act of war that is blatantly illegal and unconstitutional. To prevent our nation from collapsing into the type of monarchy that our founding fathers rebelled against, our founding fathers vested the power to declare war to Congress, so that a President could not singlehandedly make the decision to drag America into an unjust and unpopular war: | Trump 's decision to bomb Iran without Congressional authorization is by far the most egregious and un-American action he or any modern President has ever taken. This is clear grounds for impeachment and removal from office. Unfortunately, there are still many MAGA members of Congress who are willing to cede their authority to the President and are comfortable giving Trump unlimited power like the kings that the founding of our nation was a declaration against. Members of Congress have a constitutional and moral responsibility to reclaim their authority to declare war -- to restore checks & balances and to prevent Trump from entangling our nation into a war that the majority of Americans are against. While we wait for Congress to grow a spine, Defend Our Courts is fighting to protect the last line of defense for Democracy -- our courts. That's why we are working non-stop to help Dem supreme court justices in key swing states. Trump is attempting to replace them with MAGA loyalists who will let him act as a king and rig elections in his favor -- like in Pennsylvania's upcoming 2025 supreme court retention election. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: In defense of Democracy, Defend Our Courts Fighting for Justice. Powered by You. | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | | Sent via . Peter, This is something I’ve needed to say to you for a long time. There’s a reason I wanted to reach out to you before anyone else. clean_body: | | | Peter, This is something I’ve needed to say to you for a long time. There’s a reason I wanted to reach out to you before anyone else. I know that when I send you a message, it never falls on deaf ears. You’ve been a dedicated listener, Peter, and if this message is only read by one person like yourself, I’ll feel like I’ve done my duty. – Speaker Mike Johnson | | Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana | |

name: Team Moore
subject: Only a small percentage of people who get this email will donate — but it’s important.
body:
If everyone digs deep, we can deliver our strongest end-of-quarter fundraising to date.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=212%2E1086043%2E-_4jqC)
Our first end-of-quarter deadline since the fundraising freeze is here, Peter.
We were unable to fundraise during the legislative session, so now, we have to make up the gap and deliver our strongest fundraising quarter to date. **[Can you chip in $5 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250623-1?refcode=em-20250623&refcode2=212_1086043_-_4jqC&akid=212%2E1086043%2E-_4jqC)**
Now is a crucial moment for our campaign. After the end of the quarter, our fundraising numbers will become public for everyone, including our opponents, to see.
We’re asking you to step up, if you can, right away. Make your first donation. **[Please do whatever you can to help us reach our fundraising goal and re-elect Wes as Governor of Maryland.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250623-1?refcode=em-20250623&refcode2=212_1086043_-_4jqC&akid=212%2E1086043%2E-_4jqC)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250623-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250623&refcode2=212_1086043_-_4jqC&akid=212%2E1086043%2E-_4jqC)**
If everyone digs deep, if everyone gives a little bit, if everyone joins together — we can deliver our strongest end-of-quarter fundraising number to date.
Wes is working relentlessly to make Maryland a place where everyone can prosper. It’s about work, wages, and wealth for everyone. He is fighting for systemic change, uniting communities, and making sure that we leave no one behind.
**But Wes can’t do this work alone. He needs a movement alongside him — and you’re a critical part of that, Peter.**
**[If you’re able to, please chip in before our deadline on June 30.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250623-1?refcode=em-20250623&refcode2=212_1086043_-_4jqC&akid=212%2E1086043%2E-_4jqC)**
With gratitude,
Team Moore
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250623&t=2&refcode2=212_1086043_-_4jqC&akid=212%2E1086043%2E-_4jqC)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=212%2E1086043%2E-_4jqC)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=212%2E1086043%2E-_4jqC)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Robert Garcia
subject: STAGGERING corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
I will hold Trump accountable
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110110046/553303060/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGQ4ZTc4ZS02YTUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xKx29E3qpyVm2t3_zFBOzLPSFWrSoi7V3zrcER5wzS4=)
Hi folks, it’s Robert Garcia, the Congressman representing California’s 42nd District.
I’ll be blunt: The corruption coming from the Trump administration is STAGGERING.
**FIRST:** Trump’s national security team was revealed to have discussed sensitive, confidential topics on a Signal group chat.
**THEN:** Trump accepted a $400 million mega-jet from a foreign government.
**NOW:** He and his family are making billions off wealthy donors with no transparency.
You might think that all of this calls for... oversight. That’s what the Oversight Committee is supposed to do, after all.
But Republicans refuse to do their jobs and are all too happy to let Donald Trump get away with his outrageous corruption.
**That’s why I’m fighting hard on the Oversight Committee to hold Trump accountable. This moment calls for fearless leadership that will bring the fight to Donald Trump each and every day.**
[**But I need you with me. So today I’m asking you to pitch in $20 or more as a sign of support for my efforts to be Donald Trump’s kryptonite.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110110047/553303061/789508428?refcode=250623_RG_Corruption&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGQ4ZTc4ZS02YTUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xKx29E3qpyVm2t3_zFBOzLPSFWrSoi7V3zrcER5wzS4=)

Thank you,
Robert

I have to let you know what’s happening in the House:
[**FIRST,**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110110088/553303137/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250623_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzBjMDc4Yi00NTUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZXYdFc05gLwg3erM0NgNJJR_B55tR8VbP9c9fub-hDE=) Donald Trump’s MAGA puppets in the House passed their dream budget that will [**GUT**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110110089/553303138/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250623_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzBjMDc4Yi00NTUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZXYdFc05gLwg3erM0NgNJJR_B55tR8VbP9c9fub-hDE=) Medicaid and other critical initiatives.
[**THEN,**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110110090/553303139/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250623_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzBjMDc4Yi00NTUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZXYdFc05gLwg3erM0NgNJJR_B55tR8VbP9c9fub-hDE=) Leader Hakeem Jeffries unveiled House Democrats’ [**10-POINT PLAN**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110110091/553303140/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250623_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzBjMDc4Yi00NTUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZXYdFc05gLwg3erM0NgNJJR_B55tR8VbP9c9fub-hDE=) to block Republicans’ Project 2025 Agenda and deliver a humiliating defeat to Mike Johnson.

This country has an obligation to care for those who served, and we have to keep the promise to our nation's veterans. It's that simple. [**If you agree this is unacceptable, join me in this fight. Derek, this opens the door for discrimination for anything that is not legally protected—and it could hit women veterans and LGBTQ+ veterans especially hard.
**By changing the rules at the VA, Donald Trump is once again using my fellow veterans as pawns in his political game.**
My fellow veterans and I wrote a blank check to this country when we stepped up to serve. We earned this care. _We deserve better than these toxic attacks._

I’m fighting to deliver for my fellow veterans and ensure they have access to the care and benefits they earned—regardless of who they are or who they voted for. clean_body: Derek, Under Trump’s new executive order, hospitals across the country could now refuse to treat unmarried veterans and Democrats. If this is true, it’s insane, unacceptable, and shameful. And you better bet I’ll be digging into this. Veterans have earned our care through service—regardless of marital status or political affiliation. This country has an obligation to care for those who served, and we have to keep the promise to our nation's veterans. It's that simple. = | | = Derek, this opens the door for discrimination for anything that is not legally protected—and it could hit women veterans and LGBTQ+ veterans especially hard. By changing the rules at the VA, Donald Trump is once again using my fellow veterans as pawns in his political game. My fellow veterans and I wrote a blank check to this country when we stepped up to serve. We earned this care. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Monday News Digest: 6/23/2025
body:
Inside RMV’s biggest night yet—with Eric Trump, patriotism, and a packed house
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**June 23, 2025** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | Dear Readers,
What a night.
On Saturday, more than 400 conservatives from across Colorado gathered in Golden for the [sold-out Mountain Majesty Gala](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—and they didn’t just come for a fancy dinner. They came because they believe this state is worth fighting for.
**400 patriots. One powerful message.** The Mountain Majesty Gala wasn’t just a party—it was the start of a movement. We welcomed our keynote speaker Eric Trump, who lit up the room with personal stories, unfiltered truths, and a message we all needed to hear: **_[“Colorado is yearning to be red.”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
Eric reminded us of how the MAGA movement started—not in boardrooms, but in Pizza Ranches. Not with polished consultants, but with families who had conviction and no backup plan. And now, that same spirit lives on through Rocky Mountain Voice, and through all of you who refuse to back down.
He spoke candidly about loyalty, sacrifice, and the staggering cost his family has paid for standing up to the machine. But he also shared hope—and proof that we’re gaining ground. From flipping historically blue counties to building new media ecosystems, the conservative movement is alive and growing.
He said it best: “They want to be grainy. They want to be salty. And they want the truth.” **That’s what we do here at RMV.**
I was honored and humbled by Eric’s words—and reminded why we built this platform in the first place. After years of being silenced, sidelined, and shut out of the mainstream narrative, we said enough. RMV started with a handful of citizen journalists and a laptop. Now it’s a movement.
**Don't miss this special message from Eric Trump to our RMV community ❤️**
---
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
🙏 A huge thank you to our sponsors who are making this event possible: **[Adam Yormack](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), [CLE Cigar Company](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), [Exectras](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), [10th Mountain Whiskey](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**, Frieda Wallison, [ACC](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), [Smoker Friendly](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), [Elbert Appraisal Services](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), [Lipstick Tactical](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), [XX-XY Athletics](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), [Colorado Right to Life (CRTL)](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), [Gregory Carlson](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), [Truth and Liberty](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), [Telephone Town Hall Meeting](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), [Purple Label](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), [Arena Mail & Digital](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), [Jeff Hurd](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and [Hermes Worldwide](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
To every person who showed up, donated, or shared a word of encouragement—thank you. The gala wasn’t just a celebration. It was a declaration: **_We’re not giving up on Colorado._**
**_👉[Read the full recap here.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
Stay salty. Stay bold. And stay in the fight.
In liberty and truth,
Heidi Ganahl
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[“Too many wolves”: Congress and DOI signal shift on gray wolf policy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) At a House Natural Resources Committee hearing last week, frustration among ranchers, landowners and state officials across the West boiled over. What followed wasn’t just venting—it was a coordinated push by lawmakers and the Interior Department to delist the gray wolf and rein in the Endangered Species Act’s long hold on predator policy.

**[SCOTUS backs states protecting minors from transgender treatment—Colorado lawmakers say HB25-1312 defies it](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A landmark U.S. Supreme Court decision upholding Tennessee’s restrictions on gender-related medical interventions for minors has reignited scrutiny over Colorado’s HB25-1312, with several Republican lawmakers calling the ruling a clear rebuke to the law’s premise—and a warning to parents.
__
**[Ganahl: Local voices, local values, local control–Home Rule for Douglas County](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) By now, you’ve probably received your ballot—and with it, an opportunity that could redefine how we govern ourselves. This vote will decide who sits on the commission responsible for drafting our Home Rule Charter. That document will set the tone for the future of Douglas County, and I believe it’s time we step up and take control of that future ourselves.

|
---
**STATE**
**[“Colorado is yearning to be red”: Eric Trump fires up sold-out RMV Gala](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Eric Trump had no intention of returning to politics. After years on the front lines of the MAGA movement, he told his father he was done. Ten years of lawsuits, media smears and raising a young family had him ready to step back. Then Heidi Ganahl called.

**[Justice on hold: Lawmakers race to fix Colorado’s rape kit backlog](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A backlog of 1,369 untested sexual assault kits at the Colorado Bureau of Investigation delays justice and drives significant costs, per a June 2025 report from the Common Sense Institute.
**[Free Speech on Trial: Colorado Pushes Ideology, CEO Pushes Back](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE WASHINGTON TIMES](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Jennifer Sey hasn’t run afoul of Colorado’s newly passed ban on “misgendering,” but it’s only a matter of time. Last year, Ms. Sey founded XX-XY Athletics, a sportswear company that bills itself as “the only brand standing up for female athletes and the protection of women’s sports” in reaction to the influx of male-born competitors in female athletics.
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Trump’s Midnight Hammer: Precision, power and secrecy strike Iran](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The U.S. military and Trump administration leveraged strategic deception and decoys to carry out the surprise and successful strikes on Iranian nuclear facilities Saturday evening that took the world by surprise after President Donald Trump indicated such an operation could unfold in the coming weeks, not necessarily days.
**[Making America Safe Again: The vital role of immigration enforcement](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Legal immigration has long shaped America’s identity, while unauthorized migration threatens public safety, stability, and fairness. Tom Homan, the Trump administration’s “border czar,” has led the development of a comprehensive deportation strategy to address these threats.
**[Fake IDs, Mail-In Ballots and the CCP: New FBI Files Spark Questions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[JUST THE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) FBI Director Kash Patel on Monday evening turned over to Congress an intelligence report raising concerns that China had mass-produced fake U.S. driver’s licenses to carry out a scheme to hijack the 2020 election with fake mail-in ballots for Democrat Joe Biden.

**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Montrose Commissioner Pond: GORP Is a Land Grab. Period.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _The Gunnison Outdoor Resources Protection Act GORP is being advertised as a community driven conservation success story. It’s not. It’s a federal land grab wrapped in pretty paper, designed to sell the illusion of balance while slowly destroying everything that makes Western Colorado worth living in._

**[Boll: Ideological divides remain in Douglas County—but Home Rule offers a path forward](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _As a 30-year resident of Douglas County, I’ve witnessed our community’s strength, resilience, and commitment to individual liberty. Yet, I was stunned in 2020 and 2021 when some community members surrendered their parental rights to government bureaucrats during the COVID-19 response, advocating for government-backed mandates on virtual learning, masking, and vaccinations._

**[‘No Kings’ Rally Turns Violent: 35 Arrested After Attacking Police](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) In a series of confrontations, “No Kings” protesters threw rocks and other objects at officers and tried to enter a major thoroughfare in Denver on Saturday night, prompting the police to deploy pepper balls and smoke to disperse the crowd, authorities said.

**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[DiGirolamo: Undercover as a 13-year-old, an officer finds what parents fear most](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _You wouldn’t let your middle schooler wander the mall by herself, so why would you let her wander the Internet alone? If your child has online access, then every predator all over the world potentially can contact your kid._
__
**[Rep. Suckla: The Dolores NCA and GORP aren’t collaborative acts—they’re a legislative ambush](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _I’ve spent most of my life in the saddle. I was born and raised in Southwest Colorado. I’ve worked the land, ranched cattle, and served my neighbors as both a County Commissioner and now your elected representative in the Colorado State House. My family owns one of the largest ranches in the region, tens of thousands of acres built by my grandfather and worked by my father before me._ __
**[Garbo: If true, it’s the greatest violation of American sovereignty in modern history](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _According to new reports, the FBI has obtained intelligence confirming that China has produced and distributed fake U.S. driver’s licenses to facilitate fraudulent mail-in ballot voting. Let that sink in._
__
**[Devotional: Be a Twinkie in a Ding Dong world](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Let me take you back to the year 1988—my early days as a Christian, stationed in Germany with the United States Air Force. I was a brand-new convert, ready to charge hell with a squirt gun._
__
**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---

Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com)](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
