That document will set the tone for the future of Douglas County, and I believe it’s time we step up and take control of that future ourselves. | STATE Eric Trump had no intention of returning to politics. After years on the front lines of the MAGA movement, he told his father he was done. Ten years of lawsuits, media smears and raising a young family had him ready to step back. Then Heidi Ganahl called. A backlog of 1,369 untested sexual assault kits at the Colorado Bureau of Investigation delays justice and drives significant costs, per a June 2025 report from the Common Sense Institute. Jennifer Sey hasn’t run afoul of Colorado’s newly passed ban on “misgendering,” but it’s only a matter of time. Last year, Ms. Sey founded XX-XY Athletics, a sportswear company that bills itself as “the only brand standing up for female athletes and the protection of women’s sports” in reaction to the influx of male-born competitors in female athletics. | NATIONAL The U.S. military and Trump administration leveraged strategic deception and decoys to carry out the surprise and successful strikes on Iranian nuclear facilities Saturday evening that took the world by surprise after President Donald Trump indicated such an operation could unfold in the coming weeks, not necessarily days. Legal immigration has long shaped America’s identity, while unauthorized migration threatens public safety, stability, and fairness. Tom Homan, the Trump administration’s “border czar,” has led the development of a comprehensive deportation strategy to address these threats. FBI Director Kash Patel on Monday evening turned over to Congress an intelligence report raising concerns that China had mass-produced fake U.S. driver’s licenses to carry out a scheme to hijack the 2020 election with fake mail-in ballots for Democrat Joe Biden. | LOCAL The Gunnison Outdoor Resources Protection Act GORP is being advertised as a community driven conservation success story. It’s not. It’s a federal land grab wrapped in pretty paper, designed to sell the illusion of balance while slowly destroying everything that makes Western Colorado worth living in. As a 30-year resident of Douglas County, I’ve witnessed our community’s strength, resilience, and commitment to individual liberty. Yet, I was stunned in 2020 and 2021 when some community members surrendered their parental rights to government bureaucrats during the COVID-19 response, advocating for government-backed mandates on virtual learning, masking, and vaccinations. In a series of confrontations, “No Kings” protesters threw rocks and other objects at officers and tried to enter a major thoroughfare in Denver on Saturday night, prompting the police to deploy pepper balls and smoke to disperse the crowd, authorities said. | COMMENTARY You wouldn’t let your middle schooler wander the mall by herself, so why would you let her wander the Internet alone? If your child has online access, then every predator all over the world potentially can contact your kid. I’ve spent most of my life in the saddle. I was born and raised in Southwest Colorado. I’ve worked the land, ranched cattle, and served my neighbors as both a County Commissioner and now your elected representative in the Colorado State House. My family owns one of the largest ranches in the region, tens of thousands of acres built by my grandfather and worked by my father before me. According to new reports, the FBI has obtained intelligence confirming that China has produced and distributed fake U.S. driver’s licenses to facilitate fraudulent mail-in ballot voting. Let that sink in. Let me take you back to the year 1988—my early days as a Christian, stationed in Germany with the United States Air Force. I was a brand-new convert, ready to charge hell with a squirt gun. __ | Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\) or send us a message on social media to chat! | 🌎 DID YOU KNOW? According to Discover Magazine, about 99% of Earth’s gold is buried deep in the core —so much, in fact, that if it were brought to the surface, it could blanket the entire planet in a layer 1.5 feet thick. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | QUOTE OF THE DAY "Moderation in temper is always a virtue; but moderation in principle, is a species of vice." – Thomas Paine | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. If you ever stop receiving our emails, it might be because someone to whom you forwarded the email unintentionally removed you from the list. No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! Clicking the link will end the subscription of dpwillis67@gmail.com

body:
They were once roommates in Washington as freshmen congresswomen. Now, they're both running as their states' official Democratic nominees for governor. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110110996/553306539/-1903855149?refcode=WUEFC658_20250623_GovFund_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056430&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjJjNDYwNi02ZDUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BOfuvMvVFDScQMp8_5LSaFdTsPBf0UVZjyvYIVSAa94=) Peter,

Just a few years ago, Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill were roommates in Washington, D.C. as freshmen congresswomen. This year, they're both running as their states' official Democratic nominees for governor. They represent the next generation of Democratic leadership, and now that they've made it through their primaries, they need the full support of this community between now and Election Day in November. [_**So Peter, will you split a donation between their campaigns and help these pro-choice champions directly today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110110997/553306540/-1903855149?refcode=WUEFC658_20250623_GovFund_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056430&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjJjNDYwNi02ZDUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BOfuvMvVFDScQMp8_5LSaFdTsPBf0UVZjyvYIVSAa94=) | [SUPPORT WOMEN](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110110998/553306541/-1903855149?refcode=WUEFC658_20250623_GovFund_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056430&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjJjNDYwNi02ZDUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BOfuvMvVFDScQMp8_5LSaFdTsPBf0UVZjyvYIVSAa94=)

In 2018, after Donald Trump's first election made the stakes for our democracy crystal clear, Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill didn't wait to be asked. They came to EMILYs List for support, mapped out their path to leadership, ran for office — and won.

They flipped Republican seats, challenged entrenched power, and helped lead the Democratic wave that took back the U.S. House — not because it was easy, but because it mattered.

Now, they're blazing a new trail. Spanberger and Sherrill are running for governor in Virginia and New Jersey, two critical states where they'll be on the frontlines of the fight against Trump's extremist Republican Party.

These are two of the most closely watched races of the cycle. And they're not just running to win. They're running to make a difference.
[_**EMILYs List is here to help them do it. Will you split a donation between Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill today to help Democratic pro-choice women lead in 2025?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110111000/553306543/-1903855149?refcode=WUEFC658_20250623_GovFund_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056430&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjJjNDYwNi02ZDUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BOfuvMvVFDScQMp8_5LSaFdTsPBf0UVZjyvYIVSAa94=)

Now, they're both running as their states' official Democratic nominees for governor. | = Peter, Just a few years ago, Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill were roommates in Washington, D.C. as freshmen congresswomen. This year, they're both running as their states' official Democratic nominees for governor. They represent the next generation of Democratic leadership, and now that they've made it through their primaries, they need the full support of this community between now and Election Day in November. = | = = In 2018, after Donald Trump's first election made the stakes for our democracy crystal clear, Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill didn't wait to be asked. They came to EMILYs List for support, mapped out their path to leadership, ran for office — and won. They flipped Republican seats, challenged entrenched power, and helped lead the Democratic wave that took back the U.S. House — not because it was easy, but because it mattered. Now, they're blazing a new trail. Spanberger and Sherrill are running for governor in Virginia and New Jersey, two critical states where they'll be on the frontlines of the fight against Trump's extremist Republican Party. These are two of the most closely watched races of the cycle. And they're not just running to win. body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

BREAKING: U.S. forces stationed in Qatar have been attacked. We are on the
precipice of all-out war as a result of Trump's decision to bomb Iran.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32234?source=email-20250623&t=1011&akid=8915%2E5885482%2EmUJBOD ]Peter Willis, can you
urgently add your name to tell Congress to support Bernie Sanders’s and Ro
Khanna’s bills to stop Trump’s illegal war with Iran?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32234?source=email-20250623&t=1012&akid=8915%2E5885482%2EmUJBOD ]ADD YOUR NAME

Let's be clear: Trump’s decision to bomb Iran was illegal. Article 1 of
the Constitution makes it crystal clear that Congress has the SOLE
authority to declare war. Bernie Sander’s & Ro Khanna’s bills exercise
that authority to stop Trump’s war with Iran.

This is an extremely dangerous situation: U.S. service members are now
directly in harms way as a result of Trump's decision to bomb Iran, and we
are on the cusp of a catastrophic conflict that could cost countless
American and Iranian lives.

The Our Revolution Rapid Response Action Team is on Capitol Hill RIGHT NOW
pushing lawmakers to help pass Bernie’s bill to stop Trump’s illegal war
with Iran.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32234?source=email-20250623&t=1013&akid=8915%2E5885482%2EmUJBOD ]Peter Willis, can
you urgently add your name to tell Congress to support Bernie Sanders’s
and Ro Khanna’s bills to stop Trump’s illegal war with Iran?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32234?source=email-20250623&t=1014&akid=8915%2E5885482%2EmUJBOD ]ADD YOUR NAME

As Bernie said when he heard the news in the middle of his Oligarchy Tour
rally in Tulsa, Oklahoma this weekend:

“The American people do not want more war, more death. It’s a good idea if
we concentrate on the problems that exist in Oklahoma and Vermont, rather
than getting involved in another war that the American people do not
want!”

The stakes couldn't be higher. Over two decades of American military
entanglements have cost us more than $8 trillion, hundreds of thousands of
lives, and immeasurable suffering across the Middle East.

We cannot let it happen again. No. More. War.

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: A job well done.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
Congratulations to President Trump and our brave servicemembers

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | It’s time to congratulate President Trump and our brave servicemembers for a job well done.
There is no greater threat to the world than nuclear proliferation, let alone from a regime that has consistently used radical Islamic terrorists to attack and kill Americans for nearly four decades.
---
|
---
| I fully support President Trump’s decision to bomb Iran’s nuclear weapons program. Trump gave Iran a choice. The Ayatollah chose poorly.
While Presidents Obama and Biden tried to appease Iran with cash and cajole them with promises, President Trump has spoken in the language of the Middle East – they listen to force.
I served in the State Department in Iraq in 2007-2008 alongside Ambassador Ryan Crocker and visited the Middle East again a couple of months ago. During the Iraq War, and in Afghanistan, the clerics who run the Islamic Republic of Iran were responsible for the deaths of hundreds of Americans.
President Trump warned them that we would not allow them to have an atom bomb and urged them to take a deal, but they refused.
Now, the theocratic regime has a choice – it can come back to the negotiating table, scrap the nuke program, and live in peace with its neighbors. Or the regime can expect more of the pounding they got from the “Midnight Hammer” operation carried out in the early hours of Sunday morning.
We all pray for peace. No one wants this war to escalate or for more lives to be lost, but it would be suicidal to allow Iran to have a nuclear weapon.
The isolationists who want the United States to sit on the sidelines while the world passes them by are wrong, as are the old guard who want forever wars to remake the world in our image. But sometimes we must show strength when our vital interests are at stake, and not be afraid to act.
That’s what happened this week, and I’m proud of the job accomplished by President Trump and our service members.
---
|
---
|
---
| Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www.votebaumgartner.com

Our mailing address is: Vote Baumgartner for Congress, PO Box 8508, Spokane, WA 99203
---
| | | | | | | | You can [update your preferences](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=62bfedeea6&e=5a45b9550e&c=255477f145) or [unsubscribe](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=62bfedeea6&t=b&e=5a45b9550e&c=255477f145)
---
|
---
|

---

subject: Counting on your support from your area

body:
Our official Team Deb yard signs are here!
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2734%2E400544%2Eg8rTU_)
We made an exciting announcement last week.
**Our official Team Deb yard signs are here!**
Every yard sign is a mini-billboard for Deb. They help us build name recognition AND show our campaign has the momentum to win.
**But here’s the challenge: Each yard sign costs roughly $25.** That means getting thousands of signs printed and delivered to local supporters in a state as large as New Mexico costs _a lot_ of money.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250623_yardsigns_na?amount=25&refcode=em20250623-2734&refcode2=2734_400544_g8rTU_&akid=2734%2E400544%2Eg8rTU_)
**That’s why we launched our Early Bird Yard Sign Fund — a way for Deb’s top supporters in your area and across the country to make a tangible impact in this election.**
**[Will you make a special donation of $25, or whatever you can, to build up our Yard Sign Fund? Every donation helps us get our yard signs to local voters as early as possible.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250623_yardsigns_na?amount=25&refcode=em20250623-2734&refcode2=2734_400544_g8rTU_&akid=2734%2E400544%2Eg8rTU_)**

Thank you!
Team Deb

#### Welcome to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis!
Mike Nellis recently moved you from another platform to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis, hosted on [Substack](https://substack.com/redirect/38515847-429d-4206-87b2-37b69139c42d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). New posts will be automatically delivered to you via email or via [the Substack app](https://substack.com/redirect/5c6aafd4-6f4f-4ddd-840a-fef76291318f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
To set up your profile and find more to read, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/d84683e1-b3f5-43db-8f73-e89c969e0356?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). If you do not want to receive emails from Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis, you can unsubscribe [here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9lbmRsZXNzdXJnZW5jeS5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWN0aW9uL2Rpc2FibGVfZW1haWw_.KU_TTpGc9Dl9mWuNZVn_FPc7eiltEQGafzoClGT0bio?).
The situation with Iran continues to escalate. Iran responded to Donald Trump's strikes against its nuclear facility by launching missiles at American bases in Qatar and Iraq. At the time of writing this, I don't know the extent of the damage, but the expectation seems to be that these strikes were largely symbolic--for the government of Iran to save face. We'll see. Regardless, I pray that everyone who has been put in harm's way is safe.
More than anything, I'm sitting here scrolling through Twitter with cable news on in the background, watching the situation play out, and thinking about how all the people creating this mess are not going to be the ones dealing with the real-world consequences of it. Donald Trump is 79 years old. Bibi Netanyahu is 75. The Ayatollah is 86. Lindsey Graham, who is beating the drum for regime change, is 69. These are not men who are going to serve in this conflict, nor be around to see what happens in the long run. They don't have the same skin in the game as the rest of us. These are men playing a game of Risk with regular people's lives.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-ef3Pt_A09h01uK7omB3WISd_gHqSMTwAGiuLEoi0ig?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=166665415)
They care more about how they're perceived politically and maintaining their grasp on power. They care more about how the history books will write about them. They care more about looking tough than acting tough. They care more about enriching themselves through control of the Strait of Hormuz and Iran's natural resources. And what they're doing is creating a situation that's deeply destabilizing.
I believe regime change in Iran would require American troops on the ground and would likely spark a regional war in the Middle East. It's the last thing any of us need at a time when the U.S. is already fighting a two-front war--against Russia in Ukraine and against China over global trade and tech dominance. It doesn't make anyone safer--not Israel, not the United States, not the people who live in the Middle East, and certainly not the people of Iran. Nor does it put "America First."
This is a terrible, poorly conceived, self-instigated conflict, and Donald Trump has been dragged into this mess and has consciously chosen not to get himself out of it. Maybe from here, we'll get an opportunity to de-escalate. Nobody believes Iran should have nuclear weapons. Barack Obama already solved this problem with the deal he made with Iran before he left office--an agreement and eight years' worth of strong diplomacy that Trump immediately ripped apart upon taking office.
This is yet another example of a crisis purely created by Donald Trump's madness. He tore up the Iran deal not because it wasn't working--his own aides told him it was--but because of his pettiness. He couldn't find a way to take ownership of it without destroying it. Because all Trump cares about is destruction and enriching himself. Not creating. Not protecting. Not improving anyone's life other than his own.
And what we have, and what's playing out at nearly every level of society, is an urgent need for new leadership--for generational change all across the world. To give the rest of us a chance to move past the systems and narratives that are working against the interests of the vast majority of people and securing a peaceful future. They only work for the uber-wealthy and powerful. They work for themselves. Not us.
Because when Lindsey Graham says we should be willing to risk removing the regime in Iran, he knows it won't be him serving. It won't be his kids in action. It'll be your kids. And in ten years, if this crisis continues, it could be my kid. And I don't want that for him. I don't want that for anybody's kid.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-ef3Pt_A09h01uK7omB3WISd_gHqSMTwAGiuLEoi0ig?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=166665415)
I recognize that we live in a world where military action is sometimes necessary to keep people safe. That's why I've supported the people of Ukraine after Russia's invasion. I believe there are times when American might is needed on the global stage--to protect people and our interests. But this isn't that. This could be solved in other ways. I know it, because it already was--by Barack Obama.
So I'm sitting here, stewing, infuriated at a situation that I cannot change alone. Sitting here, safe in Chicago, frustrated because a generation of leaders--here and abroad--keeps dragging us in the wrong direction. Destabilizing nations. Provoking foreign adversaries, isolating the United States, and further eroding the possibility of a true diplomatic solution for lasting peace.
As an American, I've learned that you don't win a war when your reasons for entering in the first place are built on blatant lies and self interest. We see how that played out in Iraq. I've learned that destabilizing an entire region is detrimental to the safety of Americans--both abroad and at home.
And that's why my hope, as we move toward a real international changing of the guard--as these leaders retire, or die, or, God willing, get voted the f*ck out of office--is that we can break these patterns. That we can do better. If for nothing else, then for our children--because this generation of leadership is dangerous and needs to go.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-ef3Pt_A09h01uK7omB3WISd_gHqSMTwAGiuLEoi0ig?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=166665415)
_Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy._

When the clock strikes midnight on Monday June 30th, we’ll close the books and report our grassroots fundraising numbers to the FEC. **And here’s why that matters:**
* Blue Dogs represent districts that voted for Donald Trump but chose commonsense Democrats to serve them in Congress.
* These are some of the most competitive seats in the country and the GOP has already named them top targets in 2026.
* Republican Super PACs are watching closely. If we look vulnerable, they’ll pounce.

name: David Hogg
subject: I'm a proud Democrat, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
But let’s be honest: Our party is in TROUBLE.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250623-1&t=1&akid=2282%2E587540%2EiyS89s)
Peter, I want to say something clearly: **I’m a proud Democrat.**
I’m proud that Democrats:
✅ Passed the first gun safety law in 30 years.
✅ Invested billions in mental health, housing, and clean energy.
✅ Cut child poverty, capped insulin costs, and forgave student loan debt.
But let’s be honest: **Our party is in TROUBLE.**
Right now, Democrats are deeply unpopular — especially with young people. Many of our leaders have lost touch with the urgency this moment demands.
And in safe blue seats across the country, some of the Democrats holding on to power for years are the very same politicians standing in the way of our progress.
**We can’t fix that by pretending everything is fine.**
We fix it by stepping up. By speaking hard truths. And yes — by running primary challengers when the people in power aren’t doing their jobs.
We launched a **$20 million plan** to elect bold, progressive challengers in safe blue districts. It’s not because we hate the party. _It’s because we believe in it._
We’re not trying to burn the house down. We’re trying to rebuild it from the foundation up and make sure it finally works for _all of us._ **[If you’re with us, Peter, pitch in $5 now to build the future of the Democratic Party.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250623_1_dem?refcode=em20250623-2282&amount=5&refcode2=2282_587540_iyS89s&akid=2282%2E587540%2EiyS89s)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250623_1_dem?amount=5&refcode=em20250623-2282&refcode2=2282_587540_iyS89s&akid=2282%2E587540%2EiyS89s)**
This is what rebuilding looks like. Let’s get to it.
In solidarity,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250623-1&t=2&refcode2=2282_587540_iyS89s&akid=2282%2E587540%2EiyS89s)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

body:
#
Every single House Republican voted to cut Medicaid in this country.
These budgets are not just fights about numbers.
They are fights over **our values as a country**.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250623.p311wC&refcode=em20250623-9155-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9155%2E2526796%2E11KkNe)
Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security were promises that we as a people have made _to each other_ about the kind of society we want to live in.
Neighbor to neighbor. Friend to friend. Teacher to student.
That we want to live in a society that is not depraved, not every person for themselves, but **all of us standing together**.
The strength of our country is not only measured by the height of our best days.
**The strength of our nation is in who is there for you, and what happens, on your worst day**.
We will have to push harder than ever these next four years if we are to prevent the country from becoming a slush fund for Trump and the GOP.
[Help us continue the fight by making a grassroots donation today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250623.p311wC&refcode=em20250623-9155-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9155%2E2526796%2E11KkNe)

Alexandria

clean_body: Every single House Republican voted to cut Medicaid in this country. These budgets are not just fights about numbers. They are fights over our values as a country. Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security were promises that we as a people have made to each other about the kind of society we want to live in. Neighbor to neighbor. Friend to friend. Teacher to student. That we want to live in a society that is not depraved, not every person for themselves, but all of us standing together. The strength of our country is not only measured by the height of our best days. The strength of our nation is in who is there for you, and what happens, on your worst day. We will have to push harder than ever these next four years if we are to prevent the country from becoming a slush fund for Trump and the GOP. In solidarity, Alexandria | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

body:
BREAKING OUT OF GEORGIA:
Gov. Brian Kemp is making quiet moves to hand the GOP a Senate seat on a silver platter.
According to new reports, he’s planning a secret visit to the White House to coordinate with Trump’s inner circle — and their goal is clear:
Flip Georgia red.
This isn’t just about one race. It’s about control of the Senate, and whether Trump and his allies can bulldoze their way back to unchecked power.
Georgia has been one of the only things standing between Trump and total dominance. It’s a crucial swing state — and Republicans know that if they flip it, their path to a permanent Senate majority becomes a whole lot easier.
We set a goal to raise $60,000 by the end of this month to power organizing in Georgia and defend other vulnerable Senate seats. But we’re still $13,638 behind, and the deadline is in just TWO DAYS. name: General John King
subject: This saying changed my life
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
My 40 years in the Army National Guard taught me to run toward tough problems and solve them head-on. |
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7665b2dc119e4f4c8d1bc8809513d09d&_e=X9Q-dwOPXgAjX8yZu0OeKLNBlFc90EgeaH236Cr3JKxsodz-fFCLR0Ap6clz9VuxT_QgZ1sdyja5rkC0923lQiTU0KpEdF7nkHHCqhD3TOTukoBitA4vlvRYrU7UQPeURdArOX8khGsw0SauYQ06U-Y0Fs72xJH71xnS0ti4WQuZz_PDvZ6eZVdOZUgBaG8iu9VqeiHcqnw0axwb3DRot2lCPPiA1BQFETamhWj6XPyjhgS54utZWuipos5Y45nF6sBIiNuGMYzH89I8zViqmXl5BF_1WGYRZPHaqQ86LfjvUddNwTW_HYHgdwY1BBCV_z3jNRkWIz5s_BSZ9xi_abBDYLbueyJz0HsDgR_wAKwcwlNYhuvnyg0tT7F55RjXyf-0aIMhrPOAJkJ_BRTZJeCic2UGoVURuxP9PNRHRsnLbr8SoHzmPhKBfj9SYC4hFNWISmBjejdOBLTtO94lY3aLJezqD47FOl625FMa2ca5dNFx2S8jAlscOqe8YrHPOvlwFW3U_0ynhWzq6dSeGvDpBINM98FihpCkm0brQ7V_Xe3umFCO45_G2hRTVpvmReLsg7LWXk65ZIOC-Ti6s9LxSZ95mr9CwjbjTs5aHW5MYcW6Mu-JZ3zGUO0X5Ec1Kl2YmGSF2TTjA6Lpxt4I5-KYL7-Mq9rdXzFXCsB_lQvgiI15_UUUylUjLScJA1c4ZpuNrCoem6W6SotQKB9ct-jBa_kh2TKKEwH5xPIBZgA%3D)

---
_**"Shut up and color."**_

That’s what my drill sergeant used to say, Fellow Conservative. To get things done, you have to work hard and earn it. **In other words, you have to know when it’s time to shut up and color.**

I’ve carried that with me ever since, from spending four decades in the Army National Guard to serving as a police chief. I don’t owe my success to generational wealth or being well-connected. I owe it to hard work.

_**Only in America could a kid born and raised in Mexico come here at age 17, learn English, and enlist as a private and retire as a two-star major general.**_

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7665b2dc119e4f4c8d1bc8809513d09d&_e=X9Q-dwOPXgAjX8yZu0OeKLNBlFc90EgeaH236Cr3JKxsodz-fFCLR0Ap6clz9VuxT_QgZ1sdyja5rkC0923lQiTU0KpEdF7nkHHCqhD3TOTukoBitA4vlvRYrU7UQPeURdArOX8khGsw0SauYQ06U-Y0Fs72xJH71xnS0ti4WQuZz_PDvZ6eZVdOZUgBaG8iu9VqeiHcqnw0axwb3DRot2lCPPiA1BQFETamhWj6XPyjhgS54utZWuipos5Y45nFA4luKoi6GA8RE7RqAfaztAq8FhgVM8-XIp2mBYih9j6QDzwEsE35QlY0aMSM5EoqB_31H9ocaOG725l6ptCX24sF9krCXhPHw0MYuMW4a_i7HQ-Nf768jP6mPtvu4k7HEuu7KOd5xg9XZz3jbJnsxJbpNopypleHWVi6BNoMWZkpi2A-0EZavPUZdtCatIbWyfT7A8WHiJgeuV_wuVYvCIxfLlBtDeyHDKt_paDY5orNUlteOJWDnmAzS63f_Kv9KtICASIypvppIOGXAe9QpImAtGlOHR-Fc4B3Zc4XRW1eVUqBMHq58Y6vFQf-9Us2CgHKFIKz222OkJ1NNgOyycMUZgVD6cisq-IhCM0uJElittg2uZjMc6Y1p3mCUdnYidCDT4y3POIj5BxNBkTH6TZdDhnASRlYL-4hTKk24HwxgyYKU2plZ8pm2Ssb84t7E9S5ucgTgGWS6ftmLpYJcUHH72zsFsRphyke4YVgEj0%3D)
I can’t wait to put my resume up against Jon Ossoff. He’s a left-wing filmmaker and privileged elitist with no accomplishments to speak of.

_He's been an AWOL senator. All he does is vote however the liberals want, and that’s why he’s already raised $11 MILLION from far-left donors to defeat me._

Since I got into this Senate race, I’ve followed my drill sergeant’s advice, Fellow Conservative. We’re earning support and gaining in the polls. I’m already within the margin of error against Ossoff.

But truth is, Ossoff is the best Democrat fundraiser in the country. [**To keep it up, I need all the reinforcements I can get.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7665b2dc119e4f4c8d1bc8809513d09d&_e=X9Q-dwOPXgAjX8yZu0OeKLNBlFc90EgeaH236Cr3JKxsodz-fFCLR0Ap6clz9VuxT_QgZ1sdyja5rkC0923lQiTU0KpEdF7nkHHCqhD3TOTukoBitA4vlvRYrU7UQPeURdArOX8khGsw0SauYQ06U-Y0Fs72xJH71xnS0ti4WQuZz_PDvZ6eZVdOZUgBaG8iu9VqeiHcqnw0axwb3DRot2lCPPiA1BQFETamhWj6XPyjhgS54utZWuipos5Y45nFV9rRmGMtvWaJnQyVomgbSzX5tVBWeDpHQ9rgREoFsWJkaywUyck6-rGj9teaqMuVJxcxBFGQWuFphKrltolawti8DEyqIPi0hwdWhafMAf1OVHgT50vBhdUiU5L6AygVOBDKIVKgTogfQH9HoyumzLXqVpSmlqI5cXXY7B36d4KSrGIn_KCGQLbwgFHGDk7xmoSltvq_BvZeq3ra8duLwaKFaM4weEvaJb9Li4oouQ2Ar06n4pzoMdlgdx1qxUlyGHu5tLq3a40QnQJnrCVp__IKBzeZZea2z8EgA8q_Ts1g-aQ0V3qQ5xOTEVh-4qNYljYw8mZTUWoQjxE4-Xkvozr_qcorDlp48UDM4KFxcseK2BLvlhE8ukSEcHR_n2jMx4Sz5QONd5aq3GkwoSL85JIija3hlOu2F2PPiUkQ7NTSHNdKQVvH0C4TZPKSElfIUcHsaQdsQEN5g_R1-u3cov5oPTKYQ9jIIozXdYDIjc0%3D)

[**PITCH IN »**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7665b2dc119e4f4c8d1bc8809513d09d&_e=X9Q-dwOPXgAjX8yZu0OeKLNBlFc90EgeaH236Cr3JKxsodz-fFCLR0Ap6clz9VuxT_QgZ1sdyja5rkC0923lQiTU0KpEdF7nkHHCqhD3TOTukoBitA4vlvRYrU7UQPeURdArOX8khGsw0SauYQ06U-Y0Fs72xJH71xnS0ti4WQuZz_PDvZ6eZVdOZUgBaG8iu9VqeiHcqnw0axwb3DRot2lCPPiA1BQFETamhWj6XPyjhgS54utZWuipos5Y45nFo3oHM0wSc6PSswoy3Z4F17JNbQaHn0VB9xekJQPSLT0-NhT8-RS1eyYP9NXzivnZKvrS6rnd2oVLcNQMUgdVFRRgryLvvfpB4Xc70pqFOAGWu_UCl_gHRqw1sVkRQJJ3rv-44_Fg6vibzIf13O_-BzSO_m8uPa6XTvq9gBVt-xe7F7z-eKqkQfh5XuK93Y7trS2bxM3AAdUzyiIKqhgFw1JYRDvsmyED1_x0Shh9y9rjXpEPBW0EPm8xG-SHyncrIcIKMywQA61Q_OUKN30UyKx9qBZ-NWE5wJ9xNM2TjSc6NilbLOM6YK3rhFGOPF4fHasdt3lHSSID9jGHIrSTFx1y3OmRdmKlcfzIMVSfKcwOhSwWzQ4JjZP59G1wFEvl1I13AzRaB9j4wxqW72g_EAQdm6BamdZTQtMGUXX2PZCF8Jg8QgnElgSS4sflMkB2Us2WwjXeG_tK4cTjTxg5nytqSqHojUoMF3U93Uzg_pA%3D)
**I’ve been shot and stabbed in the line of duty, and I survived four IED explosions in Iraq.**

Running against Jon Ossoff doesn’t scare me. Giving him six more years in the Senate does.

The only way to stop that from happening is for us to raise as much as we can now, so we have the resources to expose just how AWOL Jon Ossoff has been.

[**Will you join the mission and help me win the #1 Senate race in the country?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7665b2dc119e4f4c8d1bc8809513d09d&_e=X9Q-dwOPXgAjX8yZu0OeKLNBlFc90EgeaH236Cr3JKxsodz-fFCLR0Ap6clz9VuxT_QgZ1sdyja5rkC0923lQiTU0KpEdF7nkHHCqhD3TOTukoBitA4vlvRYrU7UQPeURdArOX8khGsw0SauYQ06U-Y0Fs72xJH71xnS0ti4WQuZz_PDvZ6eZVdOZUgBaG8iu9VqeiHcqnw0axwb3DRot2lCPPiA1BQFETamhWj6XPyjhgS54utZWuipos5Y45nFWeuiDQn0SQOZP1RiYcasiIpfzufYXc_Ej7C9ZM2jUzUjTIG_8UeOVU04uQtyIUd1VlNt3rZaHEiqMaIMhg2kpiRt2acCRv3YUQ4HaD8lAO-zqDkkN-j9apsuZF7pDaJbHD9YJZHY2daCEQDgfARkmspvOT-uMT0nIYqaJWYrK2tWW7aSVsuLkVzvEfFJhTNV3n0aVoe04OLMi1ZSvpJHa0W94XWPnmORZryrE2FkCITXWIvM8WolSQreXCqc5OpRIdvs5LlL5YNaOzYN0k1l5jwu6sh9zSziAkfTndWIeFy-qj_afpQdD-pQoNbBIE7QU4VyLAnclNhfjXnlTeTlUmLLdOIjCTYAFxfh4uX06PQjV853CFjaf1RXEPV5YXyWqIh3XImUCZ2wliMZQVjGVbhWU0zl6xQ4vE-yArMUzKYQg-ryZjYJaETYxtrWrD6aTY2Cp2VU9VEC78bG8uDPT7U0xaRJ9cvLehNZTsUvvYM%3D)

That way we have a senator who knows when it’s time to shut up and color, and put America First.

Thank you,
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7665b2dc119e4f4c8d1bc8809513d09d&_e=X9Q-dwOPXgAjX8yZu0OeKLNBlFc90EgeaH236Cr3JKxsodz-fFCLR0Ap6clz9VuxT_QgZ1sdyja5rkC0923lQiTU0KpEdF7nkHHCqhD3TOTukoBitA4vlvRYrU7UQPeURdArOX8khGsw0SauYQ06U-Y0Fs72xJH71xnS0ti4WQuZz_PDvZ6eZVdOZUgBaG8iu9VqeiHcqnw0axwb3DRot2lCPPiA1BQFETamhWj6XPyjhgS54utZWuipos5Y45nFY07mL1RAnTYa7qbidR983Ny3Ksbjv_idi6jYgWiCbpCr8CTOGAxBlWVh6a8vt0zpFFVQtnJ4sv7r5sIyQyg0ES8i_etsrMf0wkcjFQaqrIBh7JD3s8NwyULiicWBjorXomyaWmCSiMA7gyXo6MdK17_kLWl9da0sMHTZONXIsPi2qiNkHSUdSxn1rIFaLLYmv05GsEuiwsy1vfZQLiOj7qtgw79FlbUVo7tcGnF97kcKGP_YzDWZmTBIhHmkfe-acRv9egvV5hZmbiXMSaapfEKA25WovcvGxWlORmgdmzPLPZ0cmgVMb_Ty7nLV8YY49W-b416THOEgWtCEdbwfcSNz9AZUVW5Hcg5uAv0KDz-HeAOzGyESQ9buaEDfAw9l-tZHf2m5Yv36a9v4JdxBtLrcnfsgE4RCmZ44RTw5QWB0ssxpYn2Vz1OjQp9mO6QLAMYYbstLaPLb45dxA0kayrxkuBdu95BspG6tiq-gzbs%3D)
Maj. Gen. John King (retd.)

[**PITCH IN »**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7665b2dc119e4f4c8d1bc8809513d09d&_e=X9Q-dwOPXgAjX8yZu0OeKLNBlFc90EgeaH236Cr3JKxsodz-fFCLR0Ap6clz9VuxT_QgZ1sdyja5rkC0923lQiTU0KpEdF7nkHHCqhD3TOTukoBitA4vlvRYrU7UQPeURdArOX8khGsw0SauYQ06U-Y0Fs72xJH71xnS0ti4WQuZz_PDvZ6eZVdOZUgBaG8iu9VqeiHcqnw0axwb3DRot2lCPPiA1BQFETamhWj6XPyjhgS54utZWuipos5Y45nF1A6gKwfaLBbU6_zVzWfWBlfT92lIDvimXu-GRv3VfNR64yl8QmNQYJgXoCKo1C1BpZw-SpEbZ9A9B-ATMQvEyQlliPv5VUFitsYq4PU-I-8THpkBrp178xYKZwX6Ig96ikpQhuCqrBAfPx9_LXD8_jhkmG42GO4Zcr-Jnr4tUarjmDayMda5iKxiXkGhI0-kbYxWMiItfCnZNrW31NCpOnYdcoaf0AfqnCLSd1LiVsHEkQOQYrEM8xvopLJv9po4GxG7OaArpD3LfAWDldAiykJVe0XZ6e74P22DLoz34glio_2oqwTYUbLh9ETA3TFrypVazOCraLfaLV-eoTHS44SeKD_eHThFnqVxHuIrCqYMP2UC8mD5Lo-8NA-cZj52i0Eusc0xxJt1_aAqj9KzK3HpgnsIGaBj9EXtCHx-v5QA6aONZUg3uLd2Uzi3wdCySrtFrYhhpxXkGAUw_HcfsdnJ_4H3-V9QAU-pxASEc0Q%3D)

clean_body: My 40 years in the Army National Guard taught me to run toward tough problems and solve them head-on. | "Shut up and color." That’s what my drill sergeant used to say, Fellow Conservative. To get things done, you have to work hard and earn it. In other words, you have to know when it’s time to shut up and color. I’ve carried that with me ever since, from spending four decades in the Army National Guard to serving as a police chief. I don’t owe my success to generational wealth or being well-connected. I owe it to hard work. Only in America could a kid born and raised in Mexico come here at age 17, learn English, and enlist as a private and retire as a two-star major general. I can’t wait to put my resume up against Jon Ossoff. He’s a left-wing filmmaker and privileged elitist with no accomplishments to speak of. He's been an AWOL senator. All he does is vote however the liberals want, and that’s why he’s already raised $11 MILLION from far-left donors to defeat me. Since I got into this Senate race, I’ve followed my drill sergeant’s advice, Fellow Conservative. We’re earning support and gaining in the polls. I’m already within the margin of error against Ossoff. But truth is, Ossoff is the best Democrat fundraiser in the country. I’ve been shot and stabbed in the line of duty, and I survived four IED explosions in Iraq. Running against Jon Ossoff doesn’t scare me. Giving him six more years in the Senate does. The only way to stop that from happening is for us to raise as much as we can now, so we have the resources to expose just how AWOL Jon Ossoff has been. That way we have a senator who knows when it’s time to shut up and color, and put America First. Thank you, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. clean_body: Let me explain why this is such a big deal. Every dollar we raise to keep this seat in Republican hands will be made public. | Fellow American, We’re less than one week away from our End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline on June 30th. Let me explain why this is such a big deal. Every dollar we raise to keep this seat in Republican hands will be made public. If we fail to hit our objective, it’ll send a major red flag to the mainstream media that we don’t have the grassroots support needed to defend this seat from the Left’s wave of attacks. Right now, we’re on track to fall short of next week’s End-of-Quarter deadline by just $1,450. This is our biggest deadline of the year. Earlier this month, Democrats launched a coordinated attack campaign against me online and across social media. If we fall short of our target, it will be the first sign that their attacks are working. Every media outlet and major dark money group is watching every move we make and every dollar we raise. We can’t afford to show any weakness this early in the fight. For America, Steve Daines P.S. I guarantee you, my Democrat opponent won’t have any issue hitting her fundraising target. Democrat megadonors will spend whatever it takes to defeat me. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Oregon GOP
subject: For Immediate Release: Oregon Democrats Ram Through $15.5B Tax Hike
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
Democrats bypassed process and silenced dissent to force through the largest tax hike in state history.

| |
---
| | [ ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/kEvXfkv2Nmhy/Z1dCNUpRcDdnWHNudHdPOTdnd09lTHFaRlZGMTBidC96K3JuTGluL0ppUG1nYnl2L2hhQjE2YSt5VjR6QjkwVHRCc0JKb2lyTjVrUC82Y0Q0dGwxWmN5emg2VjlqNEQ5RmxTMldxbzNWR009S0/)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE ** CONTACT: LaJuana Decker, Communications Chair communications.chair@oregon.gop Release Date: June 23, 2025 PRESS RELEASE: **Oregon Democrats Ram Through $15.5 Billion Tax Hike— Oregonians to Pay the Price ** In a stunning display of political manipulation, Oregon Democrats have pushed through committee what may be the largest tax hike in state history—House Bill 2025, a $15.5 billion boondoggle filled with over 35 new or increased taxes and fees. This tax package, known as the Transportation Reinvestment Infrastructure Partnership (TRIP), inflicts a heavy burden on Oregon families and small businesses. But the way Democrats shoved this bill through committee is just as disturbing as the bill itself. To ensure the Joint Committee on Transportation Reinvestment secured the seven votes needed to move the legislation forward, Democrat Senate President Rob Wagner removed fellow Democrat Senator Mark Meek from the committee after Meek, hearing clear opposition from his constituents, expressed deep concern about the bill’s affordability. In his place, Wagner appointed himself to the committee, tipping the scales in favor of passage. This unprecedented power grab reflects a blatant disregard for process, transparency, and representative democracy. “This is not how government should work,” said Connie Whelchel, Chair of the Oregon Republican Party. “Democrats in Salem are silencing voices from within their own ranks—and ignoring the will of the people—to force through an agenda that Oregonians can’t afford.” The Oregon Republican Party strongly opposes this egregious tax-and-spend package, which hits every corner of our state—and hardest on those who can least afford it—with:
* Vehicle registration and title fee hikes
* Gas tax increases
* Hidden tax mechanisms passed down to working families

Democrats are not listening to Oregonians. They are actively circumventing internal dissent and overriding legitimate public concerns to fund bloated bureaucracies and political pet projects. We urge all Oregonians to contact your legislators immediately to demand an end to this taxation overreach and procedural abuse. Voters can easily contact them through the web at _notaxor.com_. “Oregon families deserve better,” continued Chair Whelchel. “The ORP stands with working Oregonians, not political elites manipulating the rules to push an agenda the public can’t afford.” ####

name: Fair Fight
subject: 18 election deniers overseeing elections in 24 states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
Grassroots support makes it possible to fight back. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110112312/553311124/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250623_T1_ElectionDeniersUpdate_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTE2NzNlZS03MjUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RR2E4kclFMU-fsZ463B3FP8nko-2fILtJSK-iiEik2Y=&emci=24be8396-6a50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c91673ee-7250-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1037277)

| | Team, **Twenty-four election deniers now serve in statewide offices overseeing elections in 18 states — ten governors, four secretaries of state, two state elections board members, and eight attorneys general.** There’s no sugarcoating this: The foxes are guarding the henhouse of our democracy. _And that’s not even including the two election deniers who are President and Vice President of the United States._ Election deniers have used their positions of authority to weaken election administration, push dangerous, unfounded claims of voter fraud, and pull out of an effort to ensure accurate voter rolls. These anti-voter extremists have no place in elected office. **We’re fighting to elect pro-voter candidates in 2025, 2026, and beyond. And no matter how hard some politicians try to suppress the vote, we’ll work even harder to make sure eligible voters have the resources they need to cast their ballots.** But this work depends on grassroots support from activists like you. The amount of donations we receive from emails like this one informs how much we can invest in protecting the freedom to vote. clean_body: Grassroots support makes it possible to fight back. | | | Team, Twenty-four election deniers now serve in statewide offices overseeing elections in 18 states — ten governors, four secretaries of state, two state elections board members, and eight attorneys general. There’s no sugarcoating this: The foxes are guarding the henhouse of our democracy. And that’s not even including the two election deniers who are President and Vice President of the United States. Election deniers have used their positions of authority to weaken election administration, push dangerous, unfounded claims of voter fraud, and pull out of an effort to ensure accurate voter rolls. These anti-voter extremists have no place in elected office. We’re fighting to elect pro-voter candidates in 2025, 2026, and beyond. And no matter how hard some politicians try to suppress the vote, we’ll work even harder to make sure eligible voters have the resources they need to cast their ballots. But this work depends on grassroots support from activists like you. body:
Trump's attacks on Iran are unconstitutional. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWuv1e5YD54T0211xjgTHCPb5yt5iXBpSmCcY88dE6QKAq7pZ1Wb17-f0tWQsMR1afBYSYCOWxLohHIlLMQhZfH7cBAxwaAF51oAzakxGb6SyxXrfgOVhUa7rE0cyVi_dB/4hl/zdnR5DiqTF2ML3mjumOR-g/h0/h001.aHzjCohjUhWlzUsmwvD8-1yQY4ZuCm-6RG3jVSuONCI)

Friend, Over the weekend, Donald Trump illegally bombed Iranian nuclear facilities without the consent of Congress. A new poll confirms that most Americans do not want the U.S. to get involved in a war with Iran. However, even with bipartisan support for a War Powers Resolution to stop Trump from going to war, it is unclear whether we have the votes in Congress to pass it. **The Senate could vote this week on a War Powers Resolution and the House could follow next week.** We need to keep the pressure on Congress to act. [**Click here to urgently add your name to demand Congress stop Trump from going to war with Iran.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_xyfnNE61ovlrBNiyCaQeQObrCp1xjT3K9D6iOewMKEUvJnQ8dAvnZk66RSBCnTGZXy6QiJ87t12klQ7y8oPuB21kP60moEiLZ1MbMrJR9A10nKQaRoAQyat5iaTRGe9vye8teK-jPG6LO0xrKgcrNPJGnqlJ--BnpeCVDIE2OFX5vnJK71LmYKf-QXMDw2ap6wuguqj4LEk-23wEINSRdZbYMHB4xj0baWIHJqUzCvCEfMDHrHTg_BAQ9JxSsRlCcWgDCAS3Xj13wpJ2UB8MP/4hl/zdnR5DiqTF2ML3mjumOR-g/h1/h001.aH4piRI5deLSYFlNyqB3dJzVDfSbXWGem26A7gtfT0c) | [TAKE ACTION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_xyfnNE61ovlrBNiyCaQeQObrCp1xjT3K9D6iOewMKEUvJnQ8dAvnZk66RSBCnTGZXy6QiJ87t12klQ7y8oPuB9Tv8ytkY2LJe9mtmh2fD7a0poZaS_LDy393N0kqyCoBjCIFy8Cc-GubT7ivW-MbswdjuLcz5RD2_HBO9B8_a1AsptTYHcv8tB9ks94MIBhebMZhEXUqYosCmEq2KRR2ap-WtVIlnhw-FN0CiGT91nYFinPH3Mpxk17d7zBzmRK8XKgN0UaxK1L8MRBDpuvP4/4hl/zdnR5DiqTF2ML3mjumOR-g/h2/h001.tASuLkq8A1aLOWU5rAPf_1TfcCWoG_W_MYInMBLelvU)

**We must stop this unhinged president and the warmongers in Congress from dragging us into another forever war in the Middle East** that hands our tax dollars to war profiteers while leaving our communities here at home without healthcare, nutrition, housing, and the basic necessities we need to survive.
In solidarity,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sun, Jun 22, 2025
Subject: No more wars!
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Last night, Donald Trump illegally bombed Iranian nuclear facilities without the consent of Congress―a blatant violation of the U.S. Constitution.
**Americans do not want another forever war―spending our tax dollars on more death while families here at home struggle to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads.**
**Trump is misleading the American people and the world about weapons of mass destruction while supporting war criminal Netanyahu’s unprovoked attacks.** Both Trump and Netanyahu are attempting to distract from their unpopular agendas, including slaughtering Palestinians in Gaza and taking healthcare away from tens of millions of people here at home to pay for more tax breaks for billionaires.
**To stop another forever war in the Middle East, I have signed onto a bipartisan War Powers Resolution, H.Con.Res.38―introduced by Reps. Ro Khanna (D-CA) and Thomas Massie (R-KY).** A similar bipartisan resolution has been introduced in the Senate.
Because both are privileged resolutions, members can force a vote 15 days after introduction, which means the Senate could vote this week and the House the following week.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_xyfnNE61ovlrBNiyCaQeQObrCp1xjT3K9D6iOewMKEUvJnQ8dAvnZk66RSBCnTGZXy6QiJ87t12klQ7y8oPuB36knZouSRBUtHpVvYfeeA2OA-C5eTBij0LpuCof2MTEy6HODSgG2h519SG7MuZUDBZ8EGMbNSTJYbuXneCptwd3CkRJgpsLtAQjOzyTN09yPx48QN_Q8fIgg1F9E-sK9vVdFCf4OC-CS_WIU8gc1izklWHle5EVNn_7imo5nBNdVNNnPp9iB2RQuodu3Zn_V/4hl/zdnR5DiqTF2ML3mjumOR-g/h3/h001.8hC-UzaSmbV3c9ikZ6qJ-n1YVC4YMGxJpQ3XaLkPuRA)
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_xyfnNE61ovlrBNiyCaQeQObrCp1xjT3K9D6iOewMKEUvJnQ8dAvnZk66RSBCnTGZXy6QiJ87t12klQ7y8oPuBUcJ0kZS77TQ6grmEQhByXxGjTMCJ-wDmiLpSoC1ZRrU_moNLg-6Uz-lCD3ED4ehzwaaORLvrnK-ngryy1VBrY8FikHOi5az5hZOptgfiVNUoohyhWELcnTAldDAIiP9trrWlOlzIP8mw1L6fggYzqWvai3aFw3oEhh_IARysKKKUo0djRAPUxwHWmRnsMQXQ/4hl/zdnR5DiqTF2ML3mjumOR-g/h4/h001.xjXAMfGdf4puNxImdHkOubO4_xIFuCssXMIyNOXXvhU)
[**Add your name to demand the House and Senate each vote to stop Trump from going to war with Iran.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_xyfnNE61ovlrBNiyCaQeQObrCp1xjT3K9D6iOewMKEUvJnQ8dAvnZk66RSBCnTGZXy6QiJ87t12klQ7y8oPuBrpHszktpMsT6oJ3R1-el8bgVHc4zJXLnAnovigZ_JbH0nTNQY-pD32yK8EDKVirlE1eWz4alvZbDNKZ_bRElw2MEXUTGgjlPfZK9AwjeF7QRcZoPRv7pVPa_7DpH992ntrrzkBEsdSiThNtzn-t1YEEw_QrlnB-L8UmQu3i7Ab98udq_8HMH8_VTdVx6k8RT/4hl/zdnR5DiqTF2ML3mjumOR-g/h5/h001.8hVVLfFipcaZv3mvEpiYdkXey9wf7NKO3wRnzh97hF0)
[TAKE ACTION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_xyfnNE61ovlrBNiyCaQeQObrCp1xjT3K9D6iOewMKEUvJnQ8dAvnZk66RSBCnTGZXy6QiJ87t12klQ7y8oPuBOzMzgeTF_3ljiZaK9RoYu4F-hK6qcs6GVC0bvjt8IbFbM-tQU_ICDLPiJ8PKp0f__NAkxTvNvPYXLYAQLFBjaR_IJzHUseb-8F3d51_YjdtsY2TfhgBPGNfDRnM53HEumrhFAx2JgL77GazMFNHWhAX2USWXJq7lDxrIadTaA78tdIKtjOvV53tMXNNfH468/4hl/zdnR5DiqTF2ML3mjumOR-g/h6/h001.bv6Il6E_o3_wpvS6pwmfv6Je7RJOX9OeAKEM3rneneA)

Right now, the Pentagon budget is approaching $1 trillion with half of that going to military contractors. As of last year, more than 50 members of Congress―including members from both sides of the aisle―own stock in military contractors. It’s shameful that my colleagues continue to funnel hundreds of billions of U.S. tax dollars for more bombs and death. **Our elected officials should not be able to profit off of war**.
That’s why I have introduced the _Stop Politicians Profiting from War Act_ , which would ban members of Congress, their spouses, and their dependent children from having any financial interests in corporations that do business with the U.S. Department of Defense―including banning members from trading defense stocks.
**There are too many warmongers in Congress who profit from sending our children to war.** Many are drooling at the opportunity to start another forever war.
Trump and Netanyahu’s attacks are not based on national security. They are about distracting from their deeply unpopular agendas and staying in power.
[**Add your name now to demand Congress stop Donald Trump from entering the U.S. into another forever war in the Middle East.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_xyfnNE61ovlrBNiyCaQeQObrCp1xjT3K9D6iOewMKEUvJnQ8dAvnZk66RSBCnTGZXy6QiJ87t12klQ7y8oPuBsAFH37s3-zAaiLzunrmmC3aGkigdaDISpvgcoJihkNVsbOIKOxYLM9Pg6Jhahkh4xW0AoXnpgmr7554KQm6knmv6zGPEa7AWF5mPyiXWdoc214hnI4BdFiJKnqO7novAYO2R8mH0gfbBA5eixaITFJ2bSI0EP5HwFtD88kkPKnakwH5vT_9D6Niy3L_oMRi1/4hl/zdnR5DiqTF2ML3mjumOR-g/h7/h001.dm_uiA1qRKkVR6EpcZrRWV7PSNDLqFbIED5mPa6137k)
While Trump is listening to war criminal Netanyahu instead of the American people, Congress has the authority and obligation to stop this unconstitutional act of war.

clean_body: Trump's attacks on Iran are unconstitutional. | | | Friend, Over the weekend, Donald Trump illegally bombed Iranian nuclear facilities without the consent of Congress. A new poll confirms that most Americans do not want the U.S. to get involved in a war with Iran. However, even with bipartisan support for a War Powers Resolution to stop Trump from going to war, it is unclear whether we have the votes in Congress to pass it. The Senate could vote this week on a War Powers Resolution and the House could follow next week. We need to keep the pressure on Congress to act. | We must stop this unhinged president and the warmongers in Congress from dragging us into another forever war in the Middle East that hands our tax dollars to war profiteers while leaving our communities here at home without healthcare, nutrition, housing, and the basic necessities we need to survive. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sun, Jun 22, 2025 Subject: No more wars! To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Last night, Donald Trump illegally bombed Iranian nuclear facilities without the consent of Congress―a blatant violation of the U.S. Constitution. Americans do not want another forever war―spending our tax dollars on more death while families here at home struggle to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads. Trump is misleading the American people and the world about weapons of mass destruction while supporting war criminal Netanyahu’s unprovoked attacks. Both Trump and Netanyahu are attempting to distract from their unpopular agendas, including slaughtering Palestinians in Gaza and taking healthcare away from tens of millions of people here at home to pay for more tax breaks for billionaires. To stop another forever war in the Middle East, I have signed onto a bipartisan War Powers Resolution, H.Con.Res.38―introduced by Reps. Ro Khanna (D-CA) and Thomas Massie (R-KY). A similar bipartisan resolution has been introduced in the Senate. Because both are privileged resolutions, members can force a vote 15 days after introduction, which means the Senate could vote this week and the House the following week. Right now, the Pentagon budget is approaching $1 trillion with half of that going to military contractors. As of last year, more than 50 members of Congress―including members from both sides of the aisle―own stock in military contractors. It’s shameful that my colleagues continue to funnel hundreds of billions of U.S. tax dollars for more bombs and death. Our elected officials should not be able to profit off of war. That’s why I have introduced the Stop Politicians Profiting from War Act , which would ban members of Congress, their spouses, and their dependent children from having any financial interests in corporations that do business with the U.S. Department of Defense―including banning members from trading defense stocks. There are too many warmongers in Congress who profit from sending our children to war. Many are drooling at the opportunity to start another forever war. Trump and Netanyahu’s attacks are not based on national security. They are about distracting from their deeply unpopular agendas and staying in power. While Trump is listening to war criminal Netanyahu instead of the American people, Congress has the authority and obligation to stop this unconstitutional act of war. Always serving you, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . I recently shared a major update with you: The battle for the House Majority has fallen within the **_margin of error_**.

_Right now, we’re at the inflection point that will decide which way the toss-up falls._
---
**_Democrats are convinced that their showdown with President Trump over illegal immigration raids in blue states across America will be the key to flipping the House..._**
---
**_...And they’re BETTING IT ALL on the belief that they’re right._**
---
But just like you, I know in my heart that they’re dead WRONG.
---
Every voter I talk to absolutely stands by the President’s actions on illegal immigration.
---
_But, at the end of the day, we can cite every focus group saying we’re right until we’re blue in the face – the _ONLY_ thing that matters is the final vote tally at the ballot box._
---
**And to win at the ballot box, we need a 100% verified, up-to-date voter file. No ands, ifs, or buts about it.**
---
Patriot, we’ve crunched the numbers and with our razor-thin majority now within the margin of error, YOUR voter profile is the difference maker.

**That’s why I’m reaching out today to simply ask that you VERIFY your GOP voter profile to give me and President Trump the most accurate polling possible as we CLOSE THE GAP on the Democrats.**

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: The Hickenlooper Curve ⚾
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
When I was little, I was just about the worst baseball player Little League had ever seen. I was small, skinny, and younger than all of the other kids.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110112437/553311603/1435897075?refcode=email_062325_curve&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWNmMjhlZC03MzUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_sRMxU1JIN9BgA85xsnIJlLGOUvgYAEuuLGz3kmjLE=&emci=348fc981-0d4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=99cf28ed-7350-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7280715) Hi there, folks — When I was little, I was just about the worst hitter Little League had ever seen. I was small, skinny, and younger than most of the other kids. By the time I turned 12, I accepted the hard truth: that I would never be able to hit a curveball. But my dad loved baseball. And I was determined to keep playing in his memory. So every day, my teammate Henry and I would work on my pitches. For hours at a time, I’d throw and throw and throw. After two years of backyard throwing, my curveballs finally started to well... curve. **The Hickenlooper Curve, we called it.** Then, the guys who used to laugh at the small, skinny kid on the pitching mound started striking out — and I learned one of the greatest lessons about determination, hard work, and perseverance. **Here’s why I’m telling you this: this story is why I remain grounded amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government.** Because with all the chaos and dysfunction in Washington, you need somebody who will roll up their sleeves and get to work. You need someone who is willing to fight and work twice as hard for our communities. **But right now, National Republicans are hellbent on growing their Senate majority, and we know they won’t hesitate to spend millions to replace me with a rubber stamp for Trump’s extreme agenda.** Look, I’ve dealt with my fair share of obstacles, and I believe we can overcome them with you on our team. We did it once before, and I’m counting on it now. So, I’m asking: **[Will you make a donation right now to my campaign for re-election? Anything you can spare would mean the world to me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110112438/553311604/-502442094?refcode=email_062325_curve&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWNmMjhlZC03MzUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_sRMxU1JIN9BgA85xsnIJlLGOUvgYAEuuLGz3kmjLE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110112439/553311605/-502442094?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_062325_curve&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWNmMjhlZC03MzUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_sRMxU1JIN9BgA85xsnIJlLGOUvgYAEuuLGz3kmjLE=)

clean_body: When I was little, I was just about the worst baseball player Little League had ever seen. I was small, skinny, and younger than all of the other kids. Hi there, folks — When I was little, I was just about the worst hitter Little League had ever seen. I was small, skinny, and younger than most of the other kids. By the time I turned 12, I accepted the hard truth: that I would never be able to hit a curveball. But my dad loved baseball. And I was determined to keep playing in his memory. So every day, my teammate Henry and I would work on my pitches. For hours at a time, I’d throw and throw and throw. After two years of backyard throwing, my curveballs finally started to well... curve. The Hickenlooper Curve, we called it. Then, the guys who used to laugh at the small, skinny kid on the pitching mound started striking out — and I learned one of the greatest lessons about determination, hard work, and perseverance. Here’s why I’m telling you this: this story is why I remain grounded amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government. Because with all the chaos and dysfunction in Washington, you need somebody who will roll up their sleeves and get to work. You need someone who is willing to fight and work twice as hard for our communities. But right now, National Republicans are hellbent on growing their Senate majority, and we know they won’t hesitate to spend millions to replace me with a rubber stamp for Trump’s extreme agenda. Look, I’ve dealt with my fair share of obstacles, and I believe we can overcome them with you on our team. We did it once before, and I’m counting on it now. So, I’m asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Coloradans deserve a Senator who fights for them, not wealthy special interests. # Top Vet's "Kitchen Hack" Helps Cats Thrive
What if you could help your cat live a full, healthy life -- even as they age...*

By making [**1 simple kitchen hack**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/FT9pvLyUyy5Nu9QFcANgchiO_vpFvO1l-aiPVNfDKLqgMo__PNC7zmEDgSn1XlGMiDyJ7viozLVFzEcVvcWnvWqvXntaWttMJ4rb0zW_rOSWJ5Pke-v9RdiVEbVIK2KcZMnR5oiCvf_0QTK0V6FdcaUZ0oxyCjqbWXupij_9TF3Kl2jwZPdLn1BuwXNs_Iqruvvho-Q450_KN3tMu_pRYuDyRw_UbXrQjNIzwZNfTZIAr323HpDWGXzUvc2cPbXfEYry3JVPzDA4G9ZJecdxcyhxc8AYZvyM96blyVkozvW9Jd6xjgYmvxNkzrdkWNyH5gTVhan5PmvTd4fn5p82GM62NtLnkMtbRTD0HCVxzNGJJEznTu3RkcVBPHbqU-Y11hc9hZkNm6H0nQYF6ocxlP-_FliNIWci99kPRuWfmWzZhKbEPIipNz0sSk0LRTJDLQeW9h94zRi8xLUtQ0_gyKVGzLvZSRXBkQIirQXu1Q6Q3JDxKVw3qr2ND-QkbzP82vRVPX4UL6jfurOSOP0X1Zc5MekY2QYEUum-y9iSSmR6ffWxOn8wV6hogBrDCce22WJjPFRLwkFc_2iHoj7pMQxVJe9NQedQGFdx2ApgwFEYjNKql1zy0ni5t_pP8A/1g5ArgI_KGCVE7nCbHgV-rfzbsmBSdbJ/10) that mimics the natural diet cats are known to thrive on--

The kind that's been helping some cats thrive, even at older ages...*

**[I confronted protesters at the Supreme Court](https://substack.com/redirect/19445bd9-89e0-4850-999d-c9b38703bb0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Friday who were claiming to stand up for "transgender youth" after the court upheld Tennessee's right to ban gender surgeries on minors.
It went WORSE than expected...
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/19445bd9-89e0-4850-999d-c9b38703bb0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/19445bd9-89e0-4850-999d-c9b38703bb0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Don't you think minors should at least wait until they're 18 to make those permanent decisions about their body?" I asked one group of protesters.
"Why don't trans kids and parents of trans kids work with their doctors on a medical issue instead of brining outdated research and non-medical doctors into this issue?!" **[one protester responded.](https://substack.com/redirect/19445bd9-89e0-4850-999d-c9b38703bb0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Many christian conservatives see liberal parents coaxing their impressionable children into gender-changing procedures as akin to child abuse. I wanted to see if these protesters had any empathy for that point of view whatsoever.
I pushed back, "But do you think an 8-year-old or a 10-year-old is mature enough to make that permanent decision for themselves?"
"I do," the protester answered. "I knew when I was 13-years-old and it hasn't changed!"
**[Watch as I try to engage with the protesters](https://substack.com/redirect/19445bd9-89e0-4850-999d-c9b38703bb0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on their radical beliefs and see if there is even an ounce of self awareness as to why more than half the country views their position as insanity.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/19445bd9-89e0-4850-999d-c9b38703bb0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| | POLL
---

# Russian ambassador warns Trump he has opened "Pandora's Box" to global conflict
A Russian United Nations Ambassador **[warned the United States](https://substack.com/redirect/daf00449-1534-47a6-859d-3b3568b1a271?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of unknown consequences over the U.S. decision to strike Iran's nuclear facilities on Saturday.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/daf00449-1534-47a6-859d-3b3568b1a271?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Russia 's UN ambassador Vassily Nebenzia warns the U.S. has "opened Pandora's box."** Criticizing the U.S. strikes on Fordow, Natanz, and Esfahan nuclear sites, Nebenzia cautioned they risk "nuclear disaster" that could spark widespread conflict in an emergency Security Council meeting Sunday.
* **Deep concern over escalation and safety.** The UN ambassador strongly condemned the airstrikes as destabilizing, highlighting the chance of unpredictable consequences--including regional war, radiation fallout, and the lives of innocent women and children.
* **Russia offers mediation while avoiding military commitment.** Moscow expressed its hope of brokering de‐escalation diplomatic efforts as it in turn insisted that the rising potential dangers "falls squarely on the shoulders of the American leadership."
* **The statement comes after Trump 's Saturday address to the American people, **announcing that the U.S. successfully attacked three Iranian nuclear facilities after numerous threats of attack. In a statement, Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth stressed that "the United States does not seek war, but let me be clear: We will act swiftly and decisively when our people, our partners or our interests are threatened."

* * *
# Fmr Secret Service agent warns Americans to plan for heightened terror threat from Iran
Former Secret Service agent Robert McDonald **[urges Americans to have an escape plan from high traffic areas](https://substack.com/redirect/8be09c98-6010-4abd-8a02-98a32f717280?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** amid a now-heightened possibility of Iran retaliating to recent strikes via terror on American soil.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8be09c98-6010-4abd-8a02-98a32f717280?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **McDonald warns that airports, bus stations, and train stations are prime targets** because they're "transient" areas where "lots of people go every day" and "anything can happen at any time." He emphasizes Americans need escape plans and must stay "situationally aware" to quickly exit dangerous situations at crowded locations.

* **Suspicious Activity Reporting:** McDonald urges Americans to report anything "out of place" like unattended backpacks in malls or Times Square, or unfamiliar cars in neighborhoods, stressing that "authorities want to hear from you" even if threats turn out to be false alarms. He says citizens have a "responsibility to pass that information forward to authorities" since they may be the only ones noticing suspicious activity.
* **Heightened Security Response:** Major cities including New York, Los Angeles, Washington, and Miami have stepped up security protocols since Saturday's Iran bombings, with NYPD increasing patrols at Israeli-connected locations and Shia mosques while monitoring online chatter for terror threats. Former NYPD inspector Paul Mauro says police are conducting "special attention patrols" and using "very robust cyber counterterrorism programs" to track potential threats.

* * *
# LA Sheriff's Office SLAMMED for calling Iran strikes 'tragic'
The Los Angeles Sheriff's Departments faced extreme backlash for a now **[deleted X post sympathizing with Iran](https://substack.com/redirect/26130dc1-1021-418d-be9e-3c4abd4a5a27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after Trump's destruction of three of its nuclear facilities.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/26130dc1-1021-418d-be9e-3c4abd4a5a27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **LASD posted condolences for Iran victims** -- The Los Angeles County Sheriff's Department shared a message Sunday on X expressing sympathy for the "victims and families impacted by the recent bombings in Iran," calling the airstrikes "tragic."
* **Post sparked immediate backlash** -- Advocacy groups and social media users criticized the department for commenting on a U.S. military action, stating that no victims had been confirmed and accusing LASD of overstepping its role.
* **LASD deleted post and issued apology** -- The department removed the post, apologized--calling it "offensive and inappropriate"--and clarified it does not comment on foreign policy or military affairs, reiterating its public safety mission.
* **Internal review and new protocols promised** -- LASD released an apology statement and launched a review to understand how the post was published and pledged to tighten social media oversight to ensure future communications align with professional standards and accountability.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2c1db19e-f5c4-4262-ab58-8a683e904c63?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

Russian ambassador warns Trump he has opened "Pandora's Box" to global conflict A Russian United Nations Ambassador of unknown consequences over the U.S. decision to strike Iran's nuclear facilities on Saturday. | | ---|---|--- Russia 's UN ambassador Vassily Nebenzia warns the U.S. has "opened Pandora's box." Criticizing the U.S. strikes on Fordow, Natanz, and Esfahan nuclear sites, Nebenzia cautioned they risk "nuclear disaster" that could spark widespread conflict in an emergency Security Council meeting Sunday. Deep concern over escalation and safety. The UN ambassador strongly condemned the airstrikes as destabilizing, highlighting the chance of unpredictable consequences--including regional war, radiation fallout, and the lives of innocent women and children. Russia offers mediation while avoiding military commitment. Moscow expressed its hope of brokering de‐escalation diplomatic efforts as it in turn insisted that the rising potential dangers "falls squarely on the shoulders of the American leadership." The statement comes after Trump 's Saturday address to the American people, announcing that the U.S. successfully attacked three Iranian nuclear facilities after numerous threats of attack. In a statement, Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth stressed that "the United States does not seek war, but let me be clear: We will act swiftly and decisively when our people, our partners or our interests are threatened." Fmr Secret Service agent warns Americans to plan for heightened terror threat from Iran Former Secret Service agent Robert McDonald amid a now-heightened possibility of Iran retaliating to recent strikes via terror on American soil. | | ---|---|--- McDonald warns that airports, bus stations, and train stations are prime targets because they're "transient" areas where "lots of people go every day" and "anything can happen at any time." He emphasizes Americans need escape plans and must stay "situationally aware" to quickly exit dangerous situations at crowded locations. Suspicious Activity Reporting: McDonald urges Americans to report anything "out of place" like unattended backpacks in malls or Times Square, or unfamiliar cars in neighborhoods, stressing that "authorities want to hear from you" even if threats turn out to be false alarms. He says citizens have a "responsibility to pass that information forward to authorities" since they may be the only ones noticing suspicious activity. Heightened Security Response: Major cities including New York, Los Angeles, Washington, and Miami have stepped up security protocols since Saturday's Iran bombings, with NYPD increasing patrols at Israeli-connected locations and Shia mosques while monitoring online chatter for terror threats. Former NYPD inspector Paul Mauro says police are conducting "special attention patrols" and using "very robust cyber counterterrorism programs" to track potential threats. LA Sheriff's Office SLAMMED for calling Iran strikes 'tragic' The Los Angeles Sheriff's Departments faced extreme backlash for a now after Trump's destruction of three of its nuclear facilities. | | ---|---|--- LASD posted condolences for Iran victims -- The Los Angeles County Sheriff's Department shared a message Sunday on X expressing sympathy for the "victims and families impacted by the recent bombings in Iran," calling the airstrikes "tragic." Post sparked immediate backlash -- Advocacy groups and social media users criticized the department for commenting on a U.S. military action, stating that no victims had been confirmed and accusing LASD of overstepping its role. LASD deleted post and issued apology -- The department removed the post, apologized--calling it "offensive and inappropriate"--and clarified it does not comment on foreign policy or military affairs, reiterating its public safety mission. Internal review and new protocols promised -- LASD released an apology statement and launched a review to understand how the post was published and pledged to tighten social media oversight to ensure future communications align with professional standards and accountability. | | ---|---|--- PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication.
