[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.FPwxrTiwMSH6krnxG6e7PjhtJVZfgvgqu4RK_BvsvV8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=166598243)
### **Cliff 's Note: A Vampiric Man Who Fetishizes Violence Sees His Opportunity**
Donald Trump just bombed Iran. Illegally. Stupidly. Just for the shits and giggles.
Mike Johnson couldn't be reached for comment or a congressional role in this aerial declaration of war. Because Trump, when he allegedly stole all those classified documents to store in the Mar-a-Lago crapper, also took Johnson's testes.
Look, this was the inevitable result of giving a deeply insecure, bone-spurred, man-boy the keys to the most dangerous arsenal on Earth. Just like when America promoted him to the Presidency the first time, we knew if a pandemic, natural disaster, man-made horror or something of that ilk found its way home, hundreds of thousands would needlessly die. And they did with COVID-19, per scientific reports.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d2a209ad-4ebd-4097-a641-cfc627fe0db1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Because, Trump's combination of serial liar, gaudy greed-head and human chloroform for intellect was always going to greatly damage democracy. Yet, even worse, a man emotionally excited and physically elated by telling rally-goers to "knock the crap out of protesters"--I half expect him to start writhing and speaking in tongues--is _the worst kind of jabroni_ to put in charge of the most lethal military force ever created.
**Also:** a guy who obsesses over what a man Arnold Palmer was, including the size of his dick, in speeches. Nearly foams at the mouth, so overjoyed is he by the "strength" and control over country exhibited by dictators like Putin, Orban and Kim Jong-un. A dude who hid in a White House bunker while telling his general to shoot protesters.
This particular human with the homo-erotic attraction to men "who look the part" when picking aides was never going to restrain himself from flexing military might like he's in a late-night Twitter fight. Trump doesn't crave power and adulation. Oh, no no. For this hobgoblin, it is the very oxygen that gives breath to a desperate man.
Deep down, Trump knows that if wusses were mojitos, he'd be Cuba. From bone spurs to White House bunkers to whiny retorts about "media and Democrats mean," or "nasty" (mostly used for women), his pathetic, febrile, coddled ass craves desperately to be John Wayne. Or Rocky Balboa (though Ivan Drago would be more appropriate).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d5b0d156-0515-4d39-b158-899fb30ad744?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
##### _**LOLOLOL**_
So when the real world refuses to kneel to a weeble wobble, he bombs it instead, referring to himself a "tough guy,"and "wartime president." Yet, he's not even a wartime private. Trump may think he's Maximus from _Gladiator_. He is not. He's ever-so-perfectly _Commodus_.
A petty tyrant who inherits everything from daddy, but _needs_ to bathe in the glory of war. Yet, he's a coward, so he's left to spar with his own soldiers to show off--whom he knows can't touch him if they want to live. Commodus also had a weird, sick fascination with watching as others are sliced and gutted...from the safety of his Emperor's chair at the Colosseum. This is Trump.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b950c35d-acc7-40b0-9c62-7f9176d95b9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The only time Trump ever got close to combat was when he waddled past a recruiting center on his way to three Big Mac Meals. Yet, there he sits in the Situation Room, surrounded by the servile, senile, sickos of society. Whom he recruited _because_ they pose no threat to him--just America. So Trump is questioned as he authorizes violence and _other_ s _die_. And this silly, sadistic man in an ill-fitting suit can get off on meting out punishment and watching others suffer.
**So if I haven 't been clear--for Trump, bombing Iran doesn't have the least bit to do with strategy, peace or protecting American lives.**
Now, don't get me wrong, stopping Iran from getting a nuclear bomb--a country that is a theocratic nightmare that murders dissidents at home, destabilizes countries abroad and defends and funds mass murderers from Hamas to Hezbollah to the horrific Bashar al-Assad-- is necessary. But we did that. Or, I should say, President Obama did that.
It was called the Comprehensive Plan of Action, or JCPOA, which was successfully negotiated with Iran by Barack Obama back in 2015 to halt Iran's nuclear program (I guess this too was another "Black job"). And halt Iran's nuclear production it did.
Trump had to tear that up because he's feeble and knows he's but a shadow of Obama--if a shadow were able to tell endless, stupid stories about sharks and batteries, wear adult diapers and cheat at golf. So, Trump pulled out of this crucial agreement
Then, when he wanted to negotiate something that would've amounted to the exact same thing, Bibi Netanyahu--aka "Israel's Trump--knew he could play America's perfect idiot. With his longtime policy of "find any fucking way to attack Iran and make America join," as a guiding principle, Bibi knew he finally had a President that was such a dope, so in need so in lust for blood to prove his mettle, if he could bomb before Trump got near a deal he'd force Trump into a corner.
I imagine it went something like this:
**Trump:** I wanna negotiate with the mullers.
**Bibi:** Sorry, Donald, I was totally for that, but we just bombed Iran. You don't wanna be a girl and refuse to bomb them. Girl. God you'll look like such a girl at recess.
**Trump:** _[on an unsecured phone or via Signal]_ Get me Hegseth after he gets over his 23 Old E's hangover and tell him to knock the hell outta Iran with bombs!
Look, Trump's entire life, from business to politics to porn stars, is performative manhood. About Trump getting his little dopamine hit from pretending to be "the boss." When your resume is a series of bankruptcies, failed scams, lawsuits, Eric, crushed Adderall by the pound (allegedly) and knowing your dad never loved you, all ya got is "looking powerful" by hiding behind soldiers and humping a flag.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1b53c870-12d7-4669-a2bf-3283332d3d63?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And, sadly, Trump is only a slightly exaggerated version of the entire right-wing ecosystem. The one that cheers this on like he's at an MMA match.
These selfish nitwits don't give a crap about the troops. They fetishize soldiers like they fetishize coal miners and cops: from a safe distance, _with no interest in actually_ _supporting_ _them_ physically, psychologically or financially when the bill comes due. Oh, but they'll lap up Trump's bloodthirsty press conferences replete with fantasies of "obliterating" Iran and call it "strength."
Because this is what passes for masculinity in circles where people like Ben Shapiro and Benny Johnson are considered men's men. But, the rest of us? We're so fucking tired of this. Tired of watching our country dragged into conflict by a man who's never known an ounce bravery. Tired of war by photo op. Tired of cruelty being the point.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d6ba0774-e91e-495a-9b82-d9a97cd261a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
##### _Ben Shapiro, after a Gerber 's 5-pack_
Trump may think dropping bombs makes him a an American Caesar. But history won't remember the two-bit hustler with a disinformation machine, daddy complex and dysenteric personality as a conqueror.
We'll either defeat him, which I'm more sure of every day, in which case they'll have to place inanimate objects between the unbelievable coward and second-to-worst President. Or he'll hold onto power. In which case there will be no history.
So please call out this weak-ass jackwad now. His fetish for violence, because he can't stand the site of himself or thought of what he truly is. His war with other people's children, so he can feel manly in the wee hours of the morning when dread envelopes him, as he knows he's more manatee than man.
Or, we'll be trapped in the same doom loop of endless war and needless death for God knows how long. Because if Trump is safe, famous, rich and untouchable, that's all he needs. War, chaos and tyranny are his only kingdom. It is only there in which a frail, demented man like Donald Trump can feel strong by exacting pain on others, and rule.

### Trump's March to War: A Play-by-Play
* **June 18, 2025** - Trump publicly states "I may do it, I may not do it," when asked about strikes on Iranian nuclear sites amid Israel-Iran escalation
* **June 19, 2025** - Announces he'll decide on military action within _two weeks_ , simultaneously claiming a "substantial chance" of diplomacy
* **June 19-20, 2025** - Meets with national security advisers and top military leaders (Gen. Dan Caine, Gen. Kurilla, Gen. Hegseth) to refine strike options, including use of the Massive Ordnance Penetrator bunker‐buster bomb to hit deeply buried targets like Fordow
* **June 20, 2025** - Iran refuses U.S. talks until Israeli strikes cease; European-led diplomatic efforts proceed in Geneva
* **June 21-22, 2025** - U.S. stealth bombers, refuelers, and aircraft carriers deploy nearer to the region; Trump privately approves strike plans but delays public execution order
* **June 22, 2025** - U.S. conducts airstrikes on three Iranian nuclear/military sites; reported by Sky News as "spectacular military success" that "completely obliterated" them
* **June 22-23, 2025** - Congress voices alarm; AOC calls for impeachment over "grave violation" of war powers; public and GOP reactions split

Friends, In case you missed it, ICE just had the audacity to put words in my mouth, and I’m not letting it slide. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110113172/553314339/2005830277?refcode=250623_Seth_MFC_ICE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjlmYzQyYi03NTUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EhHGXDzC29HAv-bBxC7vqm8aF9T9TToj4m-e2De11qs=) When I heard that an ICE processing facility in my own district was being used to detain people in unacceptable conditions for days on end, I went to see it for myself. And what I saw was completely inappropriate – inhumane for long-term detention. I went on the record with my concerns, yet instead of simply acknowledging the truth, ICE got defensive. This administration needs aggressive oversight by Congress, but the Republican majority isn’t going to let that happen. **We need to win again, but I need your help.** My criticisms have made me a target. I need your support to keep fighting for accountability and transparency in Washington. [**Can you chip in $5—or whatever you can—to support this fight and help elevate my message?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110113173/553314340/2005830277?refcode=250623_Seth_MFC_ICE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjlmYzQyYi03NTUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EhHGXDzC29HAv-bBxC7vqm8aF9T9TToj4m-e2De11qs=) Thank you for standing with me today. We won’t let the Trump administration intimidate those who speak the truth. Thank you,

clean_body: | = Friends, In case you missed it, ICE just had the audacity to put words in my mouth, and I’m not letting it slide. = When I heard that an ICE processing facility in my own district was being used to detain people in unacceptable conditions for days on end, I went to see it for myself. And what I saw was completely inappropriate – inhumane for long-term detention. I went on the record with my concerns, yet instead of simply acknowledging the truth, ICE got defensive. This administration needs aggressive oversight by Congress, but the Republican majority isn’t going to let that happen. We need to win again, but I need your help. My criticisms have made me a target. I need your support to keep fighting for accountability and transparency in Washington. = Thank you for standing with me today. We won’t let the Trump administration intimidate those who speak the truth. Thank you, Seth = [content goes here] Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress

body:
| | | Hi, DSCC Vice Chair Mark Kelly here. I want to talk to you about a _key_ opportunity in front of us as we fight for the Senate majority: **special elections.**

I know a thing or two about these kinds of races, because I got to the Senate by _winning_ a special election back in 2020 — even as Republicans spent over $70 million to stop me. **And my victory proved mission-critical, because without it, Democrats wouldn't have had a Senate majority.**

[**Now, history could repeat itself. Two special elections coming up in Ohio and Florida are among a small handful of races that could decide the majority — again. So I'm coming to ask you, will you donate $5 to win races like those and take back the Senate? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250623-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250623-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20524%2E9716520%2ERqyY5z)

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250623-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250623-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20524%2E9716520%2ERqyY5z)
---

I want to be clear, team: **These special elections give us an opportunity we would have waited YEARS for without them, and they make a BIG difference.**

In fact, during Donald Trump's first term, Democrats flipped **_three_** Senate seats in special elections, including mine, my good friend Raphael Warnock's, and even a seat in dark-red Alabama. Each time, we defeated Trump-endorsed candidates who would have been guaranteed votes for his destructive agenda, and instead we elected Democrats who fought for hardworking Americans.

**Now, we're facing the same task again — but it won't be easy.** Trump is reportedly "obsessed" with the midterms, National Republicans will spend big-time to keep their majority, and just like when I first won, Democrats only need to flip a handful of seats to take back the Senate.

**Take it from someone who's been in this position before: We'll need your help to make the most of this opportunity, and that's why I'm reaching out.**

**[As a DSCC Vice Chair, I'm personally asking: Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help Democrats win in states like Ohio and Florida and take back the Senate? We have a real opportunity to topple Trump's majority, and we can't let it slip away >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250623-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250623-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20524%2E9716520%2ERqyY5z)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Our mission has to be purposeful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Without the approval or request of the Governor of California, President Trump deployed California’s own National Guard servicemembers to the streets of Los Angeles for law enforcement purposes in response to protests. And then he sent in U.S. Marines. These actions are an alarming disregard for the safety of Los Angeles residents and service members alike. Local authorities should be able to do their jobs without the chaos and escalation of federal interference and intimidation. This illegal deployment of service members and military resources to target civilians exercising their First Amendment right to protest is undemocratic. What you need to know:

Team — Michigan is home to some _incredibly_ close, _incredibly_ competitive elections. Including Jocelyn’s race for governor.
But there’s a curveball in our race heading our way, and as campaign manager, I need our team to be prepared.
[**Before I explain more, will you chip in to support Jocelyn’s movement to lead Michigan forward and make it the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/269?c0=jmb-em-q22025.A8dvHW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250623_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=439%2E181023%2EBkOEAB)

As things stand today, two of Jocelyn's opponents stand to rake in **a lot** of campaign cash.
John James’ campaign was infused with a $5 million bonus from the DeVos family’s political operation — and more is on the way.
Meanwhile, recent reports have stated that Mike Duggan is courting support from the No Labels Party, a third-party group that has _tens of millions of dollars_ to spend on candidates they support. They previously tried to recruit people like Sen. Joe Manchin to run on their party line.
**All of this means that we might not just be up against millions of dollars in attack ads from Republicans — we could also face attacks from a third party.**
That’s a lot of money coming after Jocelyn, and it will take a LOT of support from people like you to fight back.
**I’m confident that Jocelyn can win this race because the more people hear about her vision for the state, the more they support her. But we need to make sure our campaign can keep up with all the spending against Jocelyn.**
[**So please, will you chip in $10 or more to support Jocelyn as she runs to be the next governor of Michigan? It will take all of us stepping up to make the difference.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/269?c0=jmb-em-q22025.A8dvHW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250623_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=439%2E181023%2EBkOEAB)

How 2025 Iran War Propaganda Mirrors 2003 Iraq Deception--and how we can protect ourselves from violent disinformation

* * *
# [Same Lies, Different Country](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=166594246&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY2NTk0MjQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTA3MTQyNjYsImV4cCI6MTc1MzMwNjI2NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.85tFtCv6kWJma9E3J88igUEvbQupoNOUHYw32G_wFVY)
### How 2025 Iran War Propaganda Mirrors 2003 Iraq Deception--and how we can protect ourselves from violent disinformation
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jun 23
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=166594246&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY2NTk0MjQ2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MDcxNDI2NiwiZXhwIjoxNzUzMzA2MjY2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ueOBQCNqneKrBACZWIrQzgl3Oci7m3NGXY-scxeYZKU&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=166594246&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY2NTk0MjQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTA3MTQyNjYsImV4cCI6MTc1MzMwNjI2NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.85tFtCv6kWJma9E3J88igUEvbQupoNOUHYw32G_wFVY&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=166594246&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY2NTk0MjQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTA3MTQyNjYsImV4cCI6MTc1MzMwNjI2NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.85tFtCv6kWJma9E3J88igUEvbQupoNOUHYw32G_wFVY)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcWFzaW1yYXNoaWQvcC9zYW1lLWxpZXMtZGlmZmVyZW50LWNvdW50cnk_.WBoDZaaM-Hr3vTIioataZmuY0lUuib9OmE7iNFoEVfw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/same-lies-different-country?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Here we go again.
If you've been paying attention to the media's coverage of the Trump regime's recent illegal attack on Iran, you may have noticed something chillingly familiar. The language. The framing. The fear-mongering. It feels like it has all been done before.
That's because it _has_ all been done before.
In 2002 and 2003, Saddam Hussein allegedly had weapons of mass destruction.
Now in 2025, Iran allegedly has nuclear weapons of mass destruction. The former lie resulted in mass anti-Muslim hate and violence, and the latter lie threatens to do the same. As George Bush once said, "_There's an old saying in Tennessee -- I know it's in Texas, probably in Tennessee -- that says, fool me once, shame on -- shame on you. Fool me -- you can't get fooled again_." So how do we make sure we "can't get fooled again," and instead build a narrative of truth, justice, and safety? **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This is made possible by you, the thoughtful person reading this. Consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..MD5ZXAnUWDqXd_xDL9sXs2EZjdY2PmtKty7QEh4pQTU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=166594246)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6d3cc580-520e-42d5-92a7-bab55754c803?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Credit: Yay ınlanma:** 06 Ekim 2024 Pazar 22:36
A quick trip down memory lane. Back in 2004 right after the invasion, corporate media became a stenographer for the White House to repeat the propagandized claim that "Iraqi sleeper cells are already in the U.S., preparing for terror attacks."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e002c969-dcbe-4241-9943-66a513151980?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The above was, of course, propaganda. But that isn't stopping deja vu. Now in 2025 after attacking Iran, corporate media is again a stenographer for the White House and repeating the propagandized claim that "Iranian extremist sleeper cells are infiltrating America, preparing to strike."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4e9d3fc6-4ce6-4627-8d4e-3c771a3897c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Never mind that the real, documented threat to American safety--according to the DHS, FBI, and hundreds of police departments--is white supremacist violence. never mind that masked, anonymous ICE agents are already attacking and disappearing U.S. citizens without accountability. The "sleeper cell" propaganda isn't about safety--it's about power. It's designed to make you fear a fictional "scary brown, Persian, or Arab" enemy so that actual white supremacists with badges can strip all of us of our freedoms and due process. Don't fall for it.
Indeed, the propaganda machine hasn't changed a bit. They've just replaced "Iraq" with "Iran." They've recycled the same Islamophobic tropes, just swapped out the name on the front of the folder. And once again, the media--particularly corporate outlets who cheerlead for empire--are amplifying it with little scrutiny and even less regard for truth. NBC cited anonymous White House sources to make the "sleeper cell" claim, and several influencers and outlets ran with it, claiming that just because NBC said it, it must be true.
As the old saying goes, "_If someone says it 's raining and another person says it's dry, it's not your job to quote them both. It's your job to look out the window and find out which is true_." Journalists should not be stenographers for the White House, especially not this White House that is trying to sell us yet another war based on the lie of weapons of mass destruction.
When the fourth estate fails to hold government accountable, we all suffer.
For example, the New York Times helped enable the Iraq War, and they're running full speed ahead to advance further war and attacks against Iran. Compare their early 2000s headlines about Iraq with what just published this week about Iran.
In the early 2000s the New York Times published these icons of disinformation:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e9fcfdd7-81c3-427a-8020-978253f43196?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2034e07f-023e-4ff4-bb0a-68a605cd4eea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/08b8891c-6512-418b-a4f7-add65b1c524e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And now in 2025, the New York Times forgets all pretenses and proudly publishes propaganda celebrating Trump's violation of the United States constitution, and engaging in a potential global war:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8bf6b6b5-705a-4a90-b520-e2a6af7c469c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I marvel at the absurdity of printing the possible ignition of global war as an act of "courage." What an abject failure in corporate media. So, let me be absolutely clear: this isn't about keeping America safe. This is about white supremacy, war profiteering, and authoritarian control. It is about resurrecting a tired playbook that led to the deaths of over a million Iraqis, thousands of U.S. soldiers, and destabilized an entire region for decades.
And just as Bush falsely and arrogantly declared "Mission Accomplished" as Iraq collapsed in on itself, Trump falsely and arrogantly declares "Completely and totally obliterated" regarding Iran.
We must not fall for it again, because we cannot afford to pay the price for such disinformation. Instead, we must be sincere and consistent in holding legacy media corporations accountable. What does that look like?
**This research takes work and needs your support. If you find value in this scholarship, please join us as a paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..MD5ZXAnUWDqXd_xDL9sXs2EZjdY2PmtKty7QEh4pQTU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=166594246)
## **How Do We Address These Problems?**
### **1\. Support Independent Writing**
When I launched _Let 's Address This_, it wasn't to lazily echo headlines--it was to thoughtfully challenge them. This is critical especially now as that same machine that enabled the Iraq War is running again--this time to justify an illegal, unconstitutional war on Iran.
This platform has reached tens of millions readers--not because corporate media amplified or funded us, but because _you_ did. Because you chose facts over fear, justice over jingoism, and community over complicity.
If you're already a subscriber--thank you. If you're not yet--[now is an awesome time](https://substack.com/redirect/5623c1d5-610d-4571-9084-424af0d30b2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as we fight back against yet another war campaign. We'll never put this work behind a paywall, but every read, every share, and every subscription helps push back against the powerful institutions that profit off ignorance and war. (_And if you want something more specific to combatting anti-Muslim discrimination and Islamophobia, check out my new platform[Islam Today](https://substack.com/redirect/e9249ba8-85ac-4ceb-a080-e90c207b0e4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_).
Truth deserves a growing platform. Join us.
### **2\. Invest in Ground News --Right Now**
In 2003, media helped sell us a war on Iraq. In 2025, they're dusting off the same script to sell us a war on Iran. If you're relying on mainstream news alone, you're only getting one side of the story--usually the side that benefits billionaires and bombs.
That's why I use **[Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/fe1635f1-64a5-4613-b74f-58d083f547b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to write _Let 's Address This_. It's not just a news app--it's a necessary tool in the fight against disinformation.
Here's why it matters now more than ever:
✅ **Bias Detection** - Instantly see whether coverage is coming from the left, right, or center--so you know what angle is being pushed, and why.
✅ **Funding Transparency** - Want to know if an outlet is backed by a weapons manufacturer or a right-wing think tank? Ground News lays it bare.
✅ **Global Comparison** - View how the same event is reported in the U.S., Iran, Europe, and beyond--because understanding the full picture is the only way to stop another endless war.
You already know what's at stake. As I've demonstrated in this piece, legacy media is recycling Iraq War propaganda to justify attacking Iran. Ground News helps cut through the spin so we can stay focused on justice, not manufactured consent.
Subscribe, use it, and stay grounded in truth.
[Subscribe to Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/fe1635f1-64a5-4613-b74f-58d083f547b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As a bonus, right now Ground News is 40% off--just $5/month. The below link directly supports my work--and most importantly, it arms you with the ability to verify your sources in an era of relentless disinformation.
And unlike billionaire-run media, Ground News is reader-supported. It is built for people, not profits. It answers to you, not advertisers.
[Subscribe to Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/fe1635f1-64a5-4613-b74f-58d083f547b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## **Conclusion**
If history teaches us anything, it's this: when war crimes go unpunished, they escalate. When disinformation goes unchallenged, it metastasizes. And when minorities (in this case Muslims) are scapegoated, violence spreads.
This moment demands clarity.
Trump has violated the Constitution by launching war without authorization. That alone is an impeachable offense. The question is: will Congress act? Or will they, like in 2003, become complicit in another generation of war and bloodshed?
To those peddling this recycled "sleeper cell" nonsense--rooted in white supremacy and anti-Muslim hate--we see you. And to the corporate media outlets running with it, no questions asked, no evidence in sight--we're taking notes. Because we've been here before. We saw these same fear-mongering tactics used to justify the Iraq War. And now they're trying to run it back for Iran.
To everyone reading this who still believes in justice--this is your call. Speak up. Organize. Push back. Because stopping another illegal war begins with recognizing the last one for what it was--a tragedy built on lies.
We are not powerless. We have tools. We have truth. We have each other. That's why I write daily. That's why I use [Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/fe1635f1-64a5-4613-b74f-58d083f547b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--to cut through propaganda and arm people with clarity. Because freedom doesn't vanish overnight--it's lost piece by piece, every time we stay silent when it matters most.
Let's not be the generation that looked away.

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is working tirelessly to FLIP Minnesota Red and give President Trump the MAGA reinforcements he needs. Can you help him by clicking the button below?

clean_body: I'm getting a head start NOW | Peter, I have an important announcement, and you're the first person I'm reaching out to with it. I 'm running for Senate in Minnesota again to take down the Radical Left! Now that I have two political campaigns under my belt, I understand what it takes to win. It's not easy for a Free-Thinking Black Republican to win in Minnesota. The Democrats control the media, schools, election integrity, and the areas with the most voter turnout. They want me to be a slave and servant to their politics. But I 'll never abandon my America-First principles. For a Black Republican to win, it takes MULTIPLE runs at it, especially when you don't have help from the counter-MAGA RINO Republicans. First, you have to build a brand and get your name out there, then you have to endure the baseless attacks from the media and Left, and finally, you have to get your uncensored message out to voters. This takes time, but I 'm confident that in 2026, I'll defeat the crooked Left and become Minnesota's first Black Senator elected to represent Minnesotans. The 2022 and 2024 elections were like pre-game warmups. If you don 't stretch and put up some shots before the game, you're going in cold, and you're bound to lose. But I 'm warmed up now, and I'm ready to DUNK on the Radical Left once and for all. In the 2024 election, we gained 8 points of the 24 that we needed. No one outside of our movement expected my campaign to be competitive, yet I got 1.3 MILLION VOTES with ZERO HELP! I need your help by midnight to start amassing the resources to win. clean_body: | | | | | Friend , | | I wanted to take a moment to personally write to you—because sometimes a real note means more than just another campaign email. We have a big moment ahead, and I hope you will take a minute to read what I have to share. We are closing in on a critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.This report will be made public, and national Democrats will be watching closely —looking for any cracks or signs of vulnerability. With just days to go, we still have much ground to cover. Expectations are sky-high, and this is one of those benchmarks that will shape the road ahead. I do not ask this lightly, but if you are able, your support right now would make a real difference. | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, as always, for standing with me. I am so grateful to have you in my corner. Be safe,Tom Kean, Jr. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | America has given us a mandate. It’s time to SECURE our border, RESTORE our economy, and DELIVER results for New Jersey and the American people. Last year, incredible folks like you helped me win and hold the line for House Republicans, but I am going to need your help to do it again in 2026—especially now that the Extreme Democrats have labeled me a TOP target. | | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2025 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. clean_body: Peter, we know you're humble. But don 't be shy - this is your moment to brag on yourself. You 've OFFICIALLY been nominated for the REPUBLICAN LIVING LEGEND AWARD! Now, there 's one problem - your nomination EXPIRES in just 24 HOURS! We don't want you to have to forfeit your status, Peter. Trust me, we wouldn't give this award to just anyone. You've truly earned it with your strength and MAGA spirit. Very few patriots are as strong, brave, and beautiful inside and out as you are. I know we 've said it before, but YOU DESERVE THIS HONOR! _Above: It was my honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP to Turning Point USA’s AMERICAFEST, the BIGGEST conservative event in the movement..._ Turning Point USA is doing more than any other organization to stand strong against the Left and inspire young people to believe in FREEDOM and PATRIOTISM again. Our 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states are on the front lines at thousands of high schools and college campuses, as they help transform “Gen Z” into “GEN FREE”! In 2024, Turning Point USA reached an INCREDIBLE 4 BILLION views of our powerful, pro-America content. clean_body: They couldn’t cancel this... Your gift of any amount helps inspire the next generation to LOVE AMERICA again. | | | Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a limited-edition art print of America’s 47th President: Donald Trump. Whether you keep this for yourself or gift it to someone else, you’ll appreciate the BOLD and UNAPOLOGETIC memento of the PRO-AMERICA spirit that’s inspiring MILLIONS of young people to believe in AMERICAN GREATNESS again! Above: It was my honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP to Turning Point USA’s AMERICAFEST, the BIGGEST conservative event in the movement... Turning Point USA is doing more than any other organization to stand strong against the Left and inspire young people to believe in FREEDOM and PATRIOTISM again. Our 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states are on the front lines at thousands of high schools and college campuses, as they help transform “Gen Z” into “GEN FREE”! In 2024, Turning Point USA reached an INCREDIBLE 4 BILLION views of our powerful, pro-America content. Our RECORD-SMASHING campus tour brought THOUSANDS of students to each event. And we helped inspire MILLIONS of young people to register to VOTE! Now, in 2025, Turning Point USA will do EVEN MORE to make GEN Z the MOST PATRIOTIC and MOST CONSERVATIVE youth generation ever ... so we can WIN the American Culture War. Make no mistake, Fellow Patriot. The Left is in retreat. But they are still a well-funded and well-organized opposition, and they won’t give up their 50-year control of America’s young people without a fight. That’s why Turning Point USA is going ALL OUT to keep up our incredible momentum from 2024 — and do all we can to achieve permanent generational change and MAJOR VICTORIES over the “Woke” Left in 2025. Thank you for your patriotism and your support. Together, we can inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again this year! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

clean_body: What’s at stake in Nevada, and across this country. | | | Hi friend, Right now, we’re seeing what happens when leaders try to divide us, to gain power for themselves instead of serving the people. That’s not who we are — and we’ve got to stand together to prove it. | This is about more than party politics. It’s about freedom, fairness, and making sure every voice is heard. That takes strong campaigns, grassroots organizing, and the kind of infrastructure that’s built to last — not just for the next election, but for the future we want to leave our kids. We’ve seen what can happen when people come together — when folks choose progress, compassion, and steady leadership over chaos and division. That’s what’s at stake in Nevada, and across this country. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | — Andy The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. subject: Proud to be your Democratic nominee for governor
body:
The general election begins now.

| |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110114157/553317969/2114324201?amp;refcode=250623_ms_split_img&ms=250623_ms_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg5MDgyMDctN2I1MC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xu8dTJ2gKBh-efPIgpU43fvxByJHhkvYd6v8KCDMqfQ=) Team, I am so honored to be the official Democratic nominee for governor here in New Jersey. Thank you to everyone who played a part in this victory. I wouldn’t be here without this incredible grassroots team who chipped in, volunteered, and voted. And we can’t stop now. We know what we are up against. The general election has begun — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. **[Will you help us get off to a strong start against Trump’s handpicked Republican nominee by splitting $25 between my campaign and New Jersey Congresswoman Nellie Pou today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110114158/553317970/2114324201?amp;refcode=250623_ms_split_l1&ms=250623_ms_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg5MDgyMDctN2I1MC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xu8dTJ2gKBh-efPIgpU43fvxByJHhkvYd6v8KCDMqfQ=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110114159/553317971/2114324201?amp;refcode=250623_ms_split_b1&ms=250623_ms_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg5MDgyMDctN2I1MC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xu8dTJ2gKBh-efPIgpU43fvxByJHhkvYd6v8KCDMqfQ=) Friend, I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country. It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy. It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer. It’s why I went to law school and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor. It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time. And it’s why I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t. **But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is _already_ campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start.** **[Friend, if you’re with me in this fight, I would be incredibly grateful if you could become a Founding Donor to our general election campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Nellie's today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110114160/553317972/2114324201?amp;refcode=250623_ms_split_l2&ms=250623_ms_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg5MDgyMDctN2I1MC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xu8dTJ2gKBh-efPIgpU43fvxByJHhkvYd6v8KCDMqfQ=)** | [Give $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110114167/553317979/2114324201?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=250623_ms_split&ms=250623_ms_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg5MDgyMDctN2I1MC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xu8dTJ2gKBh-efPIgpU43fvxByJHhkvYd6v8KCDMqfQ=) | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110114168/553317980/2114324201?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250623_ms_split&ms=250623_ms_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg5MDgyMDctN2I1MC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xu8dTJ2gKBh-efPIgpU43fvxByJHhkvYd6v8KCDMqfQ=)

Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. We know what we are up against. The general election has begun — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. = = Friend, I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country. It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy. It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer. It’s why I went to law school and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor. It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time. And it’s why I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t. But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is already campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you so much for your support, Mikie | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Nellie Pou for Congress PO Box 2696 Paterson, NJ 07509 United States

Over the weekend, Donald Trump unilaterally ordered military strikes on Iran’s nuclear facilities without approval from Congress.
This is not how our democracy functions. Not even close.
Only Congress has the constitutional authority to declare war. Trump ignored that. And now he’s dragging us toward war, even though the overwhelming majority of Americans do not want this.
**This moment demands level-headed leadership, not reckless escalation. But that kind of leadership is nowhere to be found in Trump’s White House, and it’s why calls for his impeachment are growing louder by the hour.**
We’re polling our grassroots supporters all across the country, including in Cresco, to hear what you think should happen next.
**[Do you agree Donald Trump should be impeached?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110114352/553318657/751495883?refcode=ea.40ed2d07-7c50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.40ed2d07-7c50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwZWQyZDA3LTdjNTAtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RPgxf6Myx5OH9BvovKQBM61SjWzSRlL0jdiP1xGks4o=&emci=c4c9555f-4050-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=40ed2d07-7c50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)**
[**YES**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110114353/553318658/751495883?refcode=ea.40ed2d07-7c50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.40ed2d07-7c50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwZWQyZDA3LTdjNTAtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RPgxf6Myx5OH9BvovKQBM61SjWzSRlL0jdiP1xGks4o=&emci=c4c9555f-4050-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=40ed2d07-7c50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105) | [**NO**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110114354/553318659/751495883?refcode=ea.40ed2d07-7c50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.40ed2d07-7c50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwZWQyZDA3LTdjNTAtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RPgxf6Myx5OH9BvovKQBM61SjWzSRlL0jdiP1xGks4o=&emci=c4c9555f-4050-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=40ed2d07-7c50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---|---
We’ve seen this story before. During the Vietnam War, Jane Fonda was part of the vocal minority standing up for peace, empathy, and community — even when it wasn’t easy.
While we usually write to you about our work to take down the fossil fuel industry and elect the next generation of climate leaders, the truth is **we won’t have a livable planet if we edge closer to war.**
Thank you for sharing your thoughts with us. Your voice is a fundamental part of this grassroots movement.
— Jane Fonda Climate PAC

subject: regarding Trump as Commander-in-Chief →

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23161%2E4449941%2EvOck4k) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23161%2E4449941%2EvOck4k) [ Donald Trump thinks he’s a KING. He is abusing his power by issuing strikes on Iran without Congressional approval – and now Iran has just retalliated against Trump’s wreckless actions. ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62792?t=3&akid=23161%2E4449941%2EvOck4k)
**The Constitution is clear:** No president can go to war without a vote in Congress. Period.

[**We need to know, team, how would you grade Donald Trump as Commander-in-Chief?](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62792?t=4&akid=23161%2E4449941%2EvOck4k)** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62792?t=5&akid=23161%2E4449941%2EvOck4k)
| | [HORRIBLE >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62792?t=6&akid=23161%2E4449941%2EvOck4k)
---
| [BAD >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62792?t=7&akid=23161%2E4449941%2EvOck4k)
---
| [AVERAGE >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62792?t=8&akid=23161%2E4449941%2EvOck4k)
---
| [GOOD >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62792?t=9&akid=23161%2E4449941%2EvOck4k)
---
| [AMAZING >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62792?t=10&akid=23161%2E4449941%2EvOck4k)
---
Look, you know Trump is unhinged, but look at what exactly he's done as Commander-in-Chief
1. Threatened to invade THREE different countries.

2. Threatened to annex Canada and make it the 51st state.

3. Slapped 25% tariffs on Canada and Mexico.

4. Worked to dismantle USAID's critical work across the world.

5. Attacked the State Department's work on human rights around the world.

6. Paused crucial military aid to Ukraine after Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy spoke up against Trump and Vance lies and bully tactics at the White House

_Trump 's careless antics are absolutely destroying America's reputation, which could have material and economic impacts that would be devastating for everyday Americans!_

We think that Donald Trump is the **WORST** Commander-in-Chief we've seen in modern history.

But, we have no clue what Democrats in your area think?!
[**Confirm: How would you grade Donald Trump as Commander-in-Chief?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62792?t=11&akid=23161%2E4449941%2EvOck4k)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62792?t=12&akid=23161%2E4449941%2EvOck4k)

President Trump successfully completes Operation Midnight Hammer. The United States joint military forces conducted a highly complex and coordinated strike package against 3 nuclear sites in Iran. The largest B-2 strike in history delivered 12 GBU-57 30,000 lb bunker buster bombs. Simultaneously, the Navy sent over 30 tomahawk missiles from over 400 miles away. Rep. Derrick Van Orden is a former Navy SEAL and walks us through this incredibly complex and coordinated attack from joint military forces. This operation will go down in history as one of the most exquisitely performed military operations in history. Former Secretary of the Navy (SECNAV) Kenneth Braithwaite then joins me to discuss the Navy's role in the operation. CENTCOM led the USS Vinson and USS Nimitz with supporting aircraft, destroyers and submarines to perfectly coordinate with the Air Force. A crucial waterway is now in play with the Strait of Hormuz as Iran has threatened to shut it down. This very narrow passage is crucial to freedom of navigation for commerce and global trade. Kenneth walks us through potential scenarios should Iran decide to engage in the Strait of Hormuz or elsewhere.

**Rep. Derrick Van Orden**
U.S. Congressman | Wisconsin, District 3
Former Navy SEAL

Former Secretary of the Navy (SECNAV) https://www.defense.gov/About/Biographies/Biography/Article/2211644/kenneth-j-braithwaite/

West Michigan deserves a future where everyone can live authentically and without fear.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110114731/553320314/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-06-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWUzM2U5Ni03ZDUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hHBj0VqJwTHIEHkH1xRo99AQEjBE5gfKaw31RaWCv_o=)
---
| It’s Pride Month, team!

This month, we celebrate the LGBTQ+ community here in West Michigan and across the country – and recommit ourselves to the fight for equality, safety, and dignity for all.

As our LGBTQ+ friends, family, and neighbors face a rising tide of discrimination and legislative attacks, these celebrations are a powerful reminder of the fight still ahead of us.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110114733/553320317/-1807710558?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWUzM2U5Ni03ZDUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hHBj0VqJwTHIEHkH1xRo99AQEjBE5gfKaw31RaWCv_o=&emci=e8e4cd8e-7d50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=1ee33e96-7d50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=750857)
That’s why I’m proud to support the Equality Act to provide explicit federal protections for LGBTQ+ Americans. West Michigan deserves a future where everyone can live authentically and without fear.

[_**If you’re with me, will you add your name to our petition today to show that folks here in West Michigan and across the country support equal protection under the law for LGBTQ+ Americans?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110114734/553320320/-1807710558?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWUzM2U5Ni03ZDUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hHBj0VqJwTHIEHkH1xRo99AQEjBE5gfKaw31RaWCv_o=&emci=e8e4cd8e-7d50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=1ee33e96-7d50-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=750857)

Happy Pride Month!

Hillary

name: (5) Missed Messages
subject: So many Senators have reached out to you
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205zrtbtl2bxvjnamrkr8vhxcluyb3mthnfobfwopgyhkxoapg19m23zmghdhy50is7g89t5qqojuje7epc&__stmp=sybx7k&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sybx7k&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jj2501zwhufu0llltpt1ob17i3pf49lxgxmq0xtlc8rdvlq5gc0jw9ugn64qgj8x97zzfc5mrhhvpspk637chw9uiwhpcolknzs7cai783nxzq3a52xzmdamtuiecw15w17scfdhfmuk0a8nlmxv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sybx7k&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sybx7k&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sybx7k&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sybx7k&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jj2501zwhufu0llltpt1obw4bp6s94u66nzecntij0ilyvu86047jhfdlaa60rswujbykx4r72qwg10iy1p0idabx6a1mk4nv9034v87xjgrrbz0rg439x18gqprfgjo0nlkafbj338olgenfdtw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sybx7k&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sybx7k&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: [me, DOTL]
subject: Bernie Sanders just dropped the truth about our democracy!! 😳
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
“We now have an oligarchy, not a democracy.” That’s why we MUST flip the House >>

|
---
**WHOA. Bernie Sanders just EXPOSED Trump.** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110114854/553320563/1717332614?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250623_EMDF_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0NzU5ZDZjLTdkNTAtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EYBoQ_ZsnddR8N57BFQ3o4Zw8GnuDn26okR0O88vPR8=)** We’re SHAKING because he’s 100% right.

_This is no longer just about left vs. right. It’s about billionaires vs. the rest of us._

**And unless we FLIP the House this year, the MAGA-controlled GOP will keep handing power to the ultra-wealthy while gutting Social Security, banning abortion, and silencing working families.**

| Peter,

Our rights are on the line—and it’s happening in our courts.

Right now, the far right is banning abortion care, targeting LGBTQ+ families, and even trying to roll back basic citizenship rights, and they’re doing it through hand-picked, ideologically extreme judges.

[_**That’s why I’m asking: can you give $25 right now to help us fight back?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110114809/553320490/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-06-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmZTY2Y2IwLTdkNTAtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q0e3-kVc2nzwu6iL4C7lOcEo88a84cQ3Z3M_6YIkyUM=)

Let me explain how your $25 makes a difference:

Gavel In, Emerge’s award-winning judicial candidate training program, is how we build power where it matters: in our courts.

We train women to run successful, strategic campaigns for judgeships, helping ensure that the people interpreting the law actually understand the people they serve.

This year’s Gavel In class is one of the most diverse, justice-driven cohorts we’ve ever trained, with a whopping 90% of the cohort being New American Majority (NAM) from across the country. These are leaders with the lived experience and courage to stand up to extremism and defend our rights.

They are the antidote to a far-right movement that is deliberately weaponizing the courts against our communities.

[_**Your gift today helps us train more of them. More leaders who will say no to bans. No to bigotry. No to injustice and yes to fairness, equity, and truth. So please, give what you can to support our efforts today.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110114811/553320499/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-06-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmZTY2Y2IwLTdkNTAtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q0e3-kVc2nzwu6iL4C7lOcEo88a84cQ3Z3M_6YIkyUM=)

clean_body: Gavel In, Emerge’s award-winning judicial candidate training program, is how we build power where it matters: in our courts. | = | Peter, Our rights are on the line—and it’s happening in our courts. Right now, the far right is banning abortion care, targeting LGBTQ+ families, and even trying to roll back basic citizenship rights, and they’re doing it through hand-picked, ideologically extreme judges. = | = Let me explain how your $25 makes a difference: Gavel In, Emerge’s award-winning judicial candidate training program, is how we build power where it matters: in our courts. We train women to run successful, strategic campaigns for judgeships, helping ensure that the people interpreting the law actually understand the people they serve. This year’s Gavel In class is one of the most diverse, justice-driven cohorts we’ve ever trained, with a whopping 90% of the cohort being New American Majority (NAM) from across the country. These are leaders with the lived experience and courage to stand up to extremism and defend our rights. They are the antidote to a far-right movement that is deliberately weaponizing the courts against our communities. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for being in this fight with us, Jill Barkley Roy Director, Emerge Action Fund * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: I want to tell you about my decision to run for Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#

_Let me lay this out, clear as day:_
I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024.
And this Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.
If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight –– please rush $5 to my re-election campaign today.
**Here’s the link to donate:**[**https://act.electjon.com/go/donate**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250623-1&t=1&akid=497%2E5691347%2ESDnhtF)
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.
Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.
Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.
I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.
I also ran — years before the Dobbs decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.
**Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history. In his first 100 days:**
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists—and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.
* Handed sweeping, unaccountable power to the billionaire who spent $300 million to elect him.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.
**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history—and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**
Now we must win again. And we _will_ win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
[**Please make a contribution to my re-election campaign today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250623-1&t=2&akid=497%2E5691347%2ESDnhtF)
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250623-1&t=3&akid=497%2E5691347%2ESDnhtF)**
Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,
Jon Ossoff
[
---

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=497%2E5691347%2ESDnhtF) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Iran Bombed, Women’s Sports in the Spotlight 🎯🎙️
body:
Plus, the World’s Greatest Art Heist? This Episode of No Doubt About It Has It All

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=33f2fee6f4&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | Hey Friends,
Strap in—because this episode of the _**No Doubt About It Podcast**_ is absolutely packed from start to finish.
🎧 [**Watch the Full Episode Now on YouTube →**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b0d0ef17f5&e=567664f14c)
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=49dc5aa84b&e=567664f14c)
| **🇺🇸 U.S. Bombs Iran's Nuclear Facilities**
We kick off with the breaking news that’s dominating headlines around the world—President Trump’s decision to bomb Iran’s nuclear facilities.

**We cover:**

**→** How it went down and what intelligence led to the strike The bipartisan backlash—and why most Americans actually support the move

**→** What Iran might do next and why we’re betting they won’t escalate

Mark breaks it all down with insights from post-strike interviews with Senator JD Vance and Senator Marco Rubio—and why they believe this was a necessary step to protect the U.S. and the free world.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f8958c885d&e=567664f14c)
---
| **🏐 Payton McNabb: The Face of the Fight for Women’s Sports**
Next, we welcome a guest you won’t forget — Payton McNabb, the high school volleyball player who was struck in the face by a transgender athlete, suffering severe and lasting injuries. But her story doesn’t end there.

🔥 Payton tells us how she was kicked out of her sorority, Delta Zeta, for speaking up—and why she’s refusing to back down. This conversation is raw, emotional, and a must-listen for every parent, athlete, and voter.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3c7e732b3c&e=567664f14c)
---
| **🖼️ The Greatest Art Heist of All Time?**
We end on a lighter but fascinating note. Krysty and Ella recount their visit to a legendary museum that was the site of the largest unsolved art heist in history. What was taken? Who did it? And where’s the missing artwork? You’ll love this true crime twist at the end of a packed episode.
---
|
---
| 🧠 This episode is a perfect mix of personal connection, hard-hitting politics, and truth the mainstream media won’t touch.

**🎯 Help Us Grow the Podcast!**
📺 Watch on YouTube:
👉 Click [here](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ccc6e4de38&e=567664f14c) to watch the full episode

✅ Like, Rate & Subscribe Your support fuels this podcast!

Smash that [Subscribe button on YouTube](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6c1d4a49fd&e=567664f14c)
[Rate & Review](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=85ad41ac20&e=567664f14c) us on Apple Podcasts, Spotify, or your favorite platform
Leave a comment—we read and respond to every one!
💡 Support the Show We’re 100% listener-supported. If you believe in what we’re doing, please consider donating at:

🌐 [NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com ](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=21fe332a8e&e=567664f14c)

Thank you for standing with us—week after week—as we chase the truth, celebrate faith and family, and fight for common sense in an upside-down world.
Watch now and share it with a friend who needs to hear it.
**— Mark & Krysty Ronchetti **

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas governor vetoes bill that would ban all THC products,** " AP's **Nadia Lathan** - "Texas Gov. **Greg Abbott** vetoed a bill Sunday to [ban all THC consumables](https://substack.com/redirect/1eaf29e3-3f22-4f20-92a4-c25dcd8521b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), allowing the [booming market](https://substack.com/redirect/9d9735b1-61fe-46b8-8261-ee15d90791b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) flush with THC-infused vapes, gummies and other products to continue to be sold across the state.

Abbott, a Republican, waited until the final moment to veto the bill in what would have been one of the most restrictive THC bans in the country and a significant blow to the state's billion-dollar industry.

The law would have made it a misdemeanor to own, manufacture or sell consumable THC, or tetrahydrocannabinol, products and was the latest [push by states to regulate THC](https://substack.com/redirect/ad908610-4f57-43b7-9e8d-942f60ed0527?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after a 2018 federal law allowed states to regulate hemp, a similar plant to marijuana that can be synthetically processed to produce THC, the compound giving marijuana its psychoactive properties.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/4f23b181-c384-499b-9c53-8b74c8b6db36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Loopholes in existing law have allowed many THC-infused goods to enter the market across the country, including states with strict marijuana laws.

Texas has some of the strictest marijuana laws in the country, prohibiting all recreational use and providing a limited medical marijuana program. The consumables market has allowed residents to legally access goods giving a similar high to marijuana.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/4f23b181-c384-499b-9c53-8b74c8b6db36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Republican lawmakers have criticized the products as dangerous due to a lack of federal oversight in how the goods are manufactured. Texas' ban is one of the more far-reaching among states that have taken similar steps. Several states, including California, have imposed age limits and restrictions on the potency of THC products.

Critics of the Texas bill say it allows people who cannot access marijuana through the state's medical marijuana program to acquire goods that can provide a similar relief. Many retailers across the state also pointed to the thousands of jobs and millions in revenue the industry brings each year.

Last year, Florida Republican Gov. **Ron DeSantis** vetoed a bill that would have put age restrictions on THC consumables, claiming it would hurt small businesses." [AP](https://substack.com/redirect/d9e5f579-e90f-44f2-b0c0-b8e125ffc4e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
