* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas governor vetoes bill that would ban all THC products,** " AP's **Nadia Lathan** - "Texas Gov. **Greg Abbott** vetoed a bill Sunday to [ban all THC consumables](https://substack.com/redirect/d5e33cc7-ba07-40d8-8556-dd8d2536a698?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), allowing the [booming market](https://substack.com/redirect/85ac8392-d277-44c9-9111-ed6d31968a14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) flush with THC-infused vapes, gummies and other products to continue to be sold across the state.

Abbott, a Republican, waited until the final moment to veto the bill in what would have been one of the most restrictive THC bans in the country and a significant blow to the state's billion-dollar industry.

The law would have made it a misdemeanor to own, manufacture or sell consumable THC, or tetrahydrocannabinol, products and was the latest [push by states to regulate THC](https://substack.com/redirect/0c1048c0-b2b2-4e3e-ac26-f338967e08b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after a 2018 federal law allowed states to regulate hemp, a similar plant to marijuana that can be synthetically processed to produce THC, the compound giving marijuana its psychoactive properties.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/5de1a22a-68af-48cc-b8b4-816853c97d4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Loopholes in existing law have allowed many THC-infused goods to enter the market across the country, including states with strict marijuana laws.

Texas has some of the strictest marijuana laws in the country, prohibiting all recreational use and providing a limited medical marijuana program. The consumables market has allowed residents to legally access goods giving a similar high to marijuana.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/5de1a22a-68af-48cc-b8b4-816853c97d4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Republican lawmakers have criticized the products as dangerous due to a lack of federal oversight in how the goods are manufactured. Texas' ban is one of the more far-reaching among states that have taken similar steps. Several states, including California, have imposed age limits and restrictions on the potency of THC products.

Critics of the Texas bill say it allows people who cannot access marijuana through the state's medical marijuana program to acquire goods that can provide a similar relief. Many retailers across the state also pointed to the thousands of jobs and millions in revenue the industry brings each year.

Last year, Florida Republican Gov. **Ron DeSantis** vetoed a bill that would have put age restrictions on THC consumables, claiming it would hurt small businesses." [AP](https://substack.com/redirect/836fc505-7fac-4b45-8971-23c8f4590991?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Read the most recent FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr . TOP NEWS "Texas governor vetoes bill that would ban all THC products, " AP's Nadia Lathan - "Texas Gov. Greg Abbott vetoed a bill Sunday to , allowing the flush with THC-infused vapes, gummies and other products to continue to be sold across the state. Abbott, a Republican, waited until the final moment to veto the bill in what would have been one of the most restrictive THC bans in the country and a significant blow to the state's billion-dollar industry. The law would have made it a misdemeanor to own, manufacture or sell consumable THC, or tetrahydrocannabinol, products and was the latest after a 2018 federal law allowed states to regulate hemp, a similar plant to marijuana that can be synthetically processed to produce THC, the compound giving marijuana its psychoactive properties. Loopholes in existing law have allowed many THC-infused goods to enter the market across the country, including states with strict marijuana laws. Texas has some of the strictest marijuana laws in the country, prohibiting all recreational use and providing a limited medical marijuana program. The consumables market has allowed residents to legally access goods giving a similar high to marijuana. Republican lawmakers have criticized the products as dangerous due to a lack of federal oversight in how the goods are manufactured. Texas' ban is one of the more far-reaching among states that have taken similar steps. Several states, including California, have imposed age limits and restrictions on the potency of THC products. Critics of the Texas bill say it allows people who cannot access marijuana through the state's medical marijuana program to acquire goods that can provide a similar relief. Many retailers across the state also pointed to the thousands of jobs and millions in revenue the industry brings each year. Last year, Florida Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis vetoed a bill that would have put age restrictions on THC consumables, claiming it would hurt small businesses." The law would have made it a misdemeanor to own, manufacture or sell consumable THC, or tetrahydrocannabinol, products and was the latest [push by states to regulate THC](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r1DphNPz6werE58BZS8eNiGsRdQfojJue-02dGYiJ4EgnSPbVKR3pDuf7-MF92UXdtkt71Rq1B6VjMlnwJIdj23sObartO7zNEUMF2fbM1puXCMuhIPIRGhNq2JkqCiAiu-vw1PntMsOhnU46K_5vFaeRxpfS8mC5K4KltXLQB6axXVcg1vEwMc8-2zjFUhhiRDiLY_8yaPPoODAZVCGRs_OPtp64FbsAl9Fic512lgWzRTAOxZBwjBPqnRo2tAm9asn0JWuWRnHQaeC6rvCaLczGDAzJEYG4UVM5UloakwVkRpS3mbvNaurJ04ZhtMLbCByj1w1GgWhOu6Hts4MkQD8ggbdcoqyPPKZt2WvmuIJvVneDqm75Rn88Mye1nXBzCqw8rfSVGscOebt8LwVpy4Lvsdq7lmKD5TiofQTCoTXQAq_zQTvHLfUFqNPb-4mqg/4hl/pe1OLwvuTlmUSZkEYIRWwQ/h12/h001.HiKoOXF5KFXdtYjjHcg2yE6h6hKUSgD-V_UGqolcHa8) after a 2018 federal law allowed states to regulate hemp, a similar plant to marijuana that can be synthetically processed to produce THC, the compound giving marijuana its psychoactive properties.

Loopholes in existing law have allowed many THC-infused goods to enter the market across the country, including states with strict marijuana laws.

Texas has some of the strictest marijuana laws in the country, prohibiting all recreational use and providing a limited medical marijuana program. The consumables market has allowed residents to legally access goods giving a similar high to marijuana.

Republican lawmakers have criticized the products as dangerous due to a lack of federal oversight in how the goods are manufactured. Texas’ ban is one of the more far-reaching among states that have taken similar steps. Several states, including California, have imposed age limits and restrictions on the potency of THC products.

Critics of the Texas bill say it allows people who cannot access marijuana through the state’s medical marijuana program to acquire goods that can provide a similar relief. Many retailers across the state also pointed to the thousands of jobs and millions in revenue the industry brings each year.

Last year, Florida Republican Gov. **Ron DeSantis** vetoed a bill that would have put age restrictions on THC consumables, claiming it would hurt small businesses." Read the most recent FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr | TOP NEWS “Texas governor vetoes bill that would ban all THC products, ” AP's Nadia Lathan – “Texas Gov. Greg Abbott vetoed a bill Sunday to , allowing the flush with THC-infused vapes, gummies and other products to continue to be sold across the state. Abbott, a Republican, waited until the final moment to veto the bill in what would have been one of the most restrictive THC bans in the country and a significant blow to the state’s billion-dollar industry. The law would have made it a misdemeanor to own, manufacture or sell consumable THC, or tetrahydrocannabinol, products and was the latest after a 2018 federal law allowed states to regulate hemp, a similar plant to marijuana that can be synthetically processed to produce THC, the compound giving marijuana its psychoactive properties. » Loopholes in existing law have allowed many THC-infused goods to enter the market across the country, including states with strict marijuana laws. Texas has some of the strictest marijuana laws in the country, prohibiting all recreational use and providing a limited medical marijuana program. The consumables market has allowed residents to legally access goods giving a similar high to marijuana. » Republican lawmakers have criticized the products as dangerous due to a lack of federal oversight in how the goods are manufactured. Texas’ ban is one of the more far-reaching among states that have taken similar steps. Several states, including California, have imposed age limits and restrictions on the potency of THC products. Critics of the Texas bill say it allows people who cannot access marijuana through the state’s medical marijuana program to acquire goods that can provide a similar relief. Many retailers across the state also pointed to the thousands of jobs and millions in revenue the industry brings each year. Last year, Florida Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis vetoed a bill that would have put age restrictions on THC consumables, claiming it would hurt small businesses." | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Tomorrow is the anniversary of the _Dobbs vs. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_ Supreme Court decision — the one that overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and opened the floodgates for an onslaught of far-right attacks on abortion care. Now that Donald Trump’s back in power, MAGA Republicans are escalating their war on reproductive rights — and they’re not stopping at the state level. They’re pushing national bans, defunding clinics, and putting extremist judges in charge of our health care decisions. Martin isn’t backing down. He’s fighting to defend life-saving access to care, protect doctors and patients, and restore the freedom to make personal health care choices. name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Still no corporate $$$
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
We have our biggest fundraising deadline in just 7 days
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39826%2E3422442%2EX7sbvn)
Dear Derek,
In just 7 days, we’re going to have to report for the first time exactly how much money we’ve raised in this campaign so far. Pundits and opponents will be looking to these numbers to judge the strength of our campaign.
**It’d be easier for us to post an impressive number if we took money from corporations, but that’s not the promise Katie’s made to voters time and time again.**
Just like in Katie’s previous campaigns, our team rejects donations from corporations, lobbyists, and executives at Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Banks.
We rely on folks like you chipping in whatever you can spare to power our work.
This campaign is about fighting for the policies that families need: lowering costs, creating jobs, and protecting our fundamental freedoms.
**[If you believe in this vision for the future of California, will you please donate $5 to Katie’s campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250623_1_ak?refcode=em20250623-39826&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39826_3422442_X7sbvn&akid=39826%2E3422442%2EX7sbvn)**

name: Dane Levis, LCV
subject: Join LCV’s organizing team for a Juneteenth Celebration: Are We There Yet? A Post Juneteenth Panel Discussion
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI2NDAwMjkS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjI0MDk4ODgyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter, Last Thursday was Juneteenth, also known as Freedom Day, a federal holiday
marking the day that over 250,000 Black Americans were finally freed in Texas by
executive decree — over two years after the Emancipation Proclamation was
issued. Amid attacks on personal freedoms, DEI programs, and funding cuts to
environmental justice efforts, LCV invites you to honor this pivotal day in
history by attending a virtual panel conversation with climate organizers and
Black leaders across the country. Panelists will discuss what freedom looks like
and how we can work together to keep each other encouraged and politically
active in our communities during this hostile political landscape. Join us to
learn more about the racial justice challenges still being faced 160 years after
Juneteenth, and actions you can take to help dismantle racism in your community. Celebrate Juneteenth this year by listening in on this important discussion on June 25th from 5:30pm to 6:30pm ET. Sign up now! https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrBz2NvNCP/UTZmSm9VL1YwbzBkOXZJR3ZmaHcvSW84NHlwYnRpTzZSU0N3eEFadTJGNHVGQ1FQcitudDhTMXg0a3ltUVVtR0ZqVGx4UjFvaVpxV1UwN3hvM1JsN29iMzhmL2R0bVRBaEY4NkdSZm9ETTQ9S0/ https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/VXb6sXZa~aC0/UTZmSm9VL1YwbzBkOXZJR3ZmaHcvSW84NHlwYnRpTzZSU0N3eEFadTJGNHVGQ1FQcitudDhTMXg0a3ltUVVtR0ZqVGx4UjFvaVpxV1UwN3hvM1JsN29iMzhmL2R0bVRBaEY4NkdSZm9ETTQ9S0/ When: Wednesday, June 25th from 5:30-6:30pm ET
Where: Virtual Zoom Event (link will be provided after you RSVP)
Who:Climate Action, a program of LCV, featuring Campaign & Outreach Strategist at
Alabama Forward Khadidah Stone, Chief Officer for Racial Justice and Equity at
LCV Dr. Leslie Hinkson, and Teamsters President of Richmond Brain Peyton. You won’t want to miss this! RSVP now. And don’t forget to forward this email to three friends who’d enjoy this webinar too! https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/DzpWMVd6a6sz/UTZmSm9VL1YwbzBkOXZJR3ZmaHcvSW84NHlwYnRpTzZSU0N3eEFadTJGNHVGQ1FQcitudDhTMXg0a3ltUVVtR0ZqVGx4UjFvaVpxV1UwN3hvM1JsN29iMzhmL2R0bVRBaEY4NkdSZm9ETTQ9S0/ We appreciate your support and look forward to seeing you there, Dane Levis
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12640029&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI0MDk4ODgyNgS2&spReportId=MjI0MDk4ODgyNgS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12640029&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI0MDk4ODgyNgS2&spReportId=MjI0MDk4ODgyNgS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

name: Team Fetterman
subject: John GRILLED Trump’s FAA nominee ✈️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1&akid=10157%2E434096%2EwcP4Fm)
| | |
---
Derek, quick update for you:
**First:** Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s DOGE team recklessly laid off 400 FAA workers.
**Then:** The Trump administration threatened to withhold PA’s federal transportation funds.
**So earlier this month:** John GRILLED Trump’s nominee to lead the FAA – because we CANNOT mess around with air safety.
The FAA's been short-staffed for years. Trump and his guys keep pouring gasoline on this fire.
So from immediately following up with Trump’s transportation secretary to securing support for the good work happening in PA to bolster the air traffic control workforce (shoutout Community College of Beaver County!), John's working around the clock to stop the chaos.
But as he keeps working for safer skies, John needs to hear from this team. **[We need 1,000 responses for statistical significance before our midnight deadline, so please take a moment to answer this poll:](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51379?code=jtk131-su-fl&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=10157%2E434096%2EwcP4Fm)**

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: If you’ve got a minute, could you personally endorse Ruben?
body:
He’s holding Trump accountable every day, spreading the word about the damage Trump’s doing, and blocking Trump’s VA nominees as long as his Administration plans on firing 80,000 critical VA staff.
#

Peter:
In a tough year, Ruben Gallego managed to win his campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona, even as the state went to Donald Trump by 5.5%.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/personal_endorse_em_june25/?source=em250623-1-90&akid=3899%2E734936%2EQG5hvO)
Ruben ran a smart race. No doubt.
But he knows that he never would have had a chance if hundreds of thousands of people hadn’t chipped in and supported his campaign. **He is incredibly grateful, and he’ll never forget it.**
But now, we’re months into Trump’s second presidency. **Our institutions are under attack.** Trump’s trampling the Constitution, and he’s coming for Medicaid, Medicare, Social Security, and the VA.
In difficult times like these, we’re lucky to have leaders like Ruben in Washington. _He’s holding Trump accountable every day, spreading the word about the damage Trump’s doing, and blocking Trump’s VA nominees as long as his Administration plans on firing 80,000 critical VA staff._
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/personal_endorse_em_june25/?source=em250623-1-90&akid=3899%2E734936%2EQG5hvO)
We sent Ruben to the Senate to fight for us, and that’s exactly what he’s doing. **But as he takes this work on, it’s still important for him to know that he has a big team behind him.**
[**So, we’re asking if you could add your name to join the thousands of others on Team Gallego and personally endorse Ruben. It’s a small act, but it speaks volumes about the movement we are building.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/personal_endorse_em_june25/?source=em250623-1-90&akid=3899%2E734936%2EQG5hvO) Thanks so much for your support. It means a lot to us, and to Ruben. Team Gallego

clean_body: He’s holding Trump accountable every day, spreading the word about the damage Trump’s doing, and blocking Trump’s VA nominees as long as his Administration plans on firing 80,000 critical VA staff. Peter: In a tough year, Ruben Gallego managed to win his campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona, even as the state went to Donald Trump by 5.5%. Ruben ran a smart race. No doubt. But he knows that he never would have had a chance if hundreds of thousands of people hadn’t chipped in and supported his campaign. He is incredibly grateful, and he’ll never forget it. But now, we’re months into Trump’s second presidency. Our institutions are under attack. Trump’s trampling the Constitution, and he’s coming for Medicaid, Medicare, Social Security, and the VA. In difficult times like these, we’re lucky to have leaders like Ruben in Washington. He’s holding Trump accountable every day, spreading the word about the damage Trump’s doing, and blocking Trump’s VA nominees as long as his Administration plans on firing 80,000 critical VA staff. We sent Ruben to the Senate to fight for us, and that’s exactly what he’s doing. But as he takes this work on, it’s still important for him to know that he has a big team behind him. Thanks so much for your support. It means a lot to us, and to Ruben. name: Angie Craig
subject: I’d be the first lesbian mom elected to the U.S. Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
It wasn’t that long ago that being an out lesbian would make it almost impossible to run for office.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110116064/553324923/497534795?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-23_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODAxMDBmMmMtODI1MC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lyDqI8twR8nGwusnI7Xgn3NT_B5g8vuuTw0myFWAP2c=)
---
Peter, happy Pride Month! **🏳️🌈**

I’m Angie Craig. I’m a Minnesotan, a wife, a mom and Mimi (grandmother), a WNBA fan and a beer-lover.

**I’d also be the first lesbian mom elected to the U.S. Senate.**

It wasn’t that long ago that being an out lesbian would make it almost impossible to run for office. Growing up as a teenager in the 1980s, I never could have imagined that I’d be elected to Congress (let alone be a candidate for Senate!).

Donald Trump wants to take us back to those times. _**Like hell he will, if I have anything to say about it.**_

So Peter, I’m coming to you with an important request: [_**Will you celebrate Pride Month by splitting $25 between Abigail Spanberger and my historic campaign for U.S. Senate and defeat the GOP opposition that aims to strip away our rights?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110116065/553324924/497534795?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-23_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODAxMDBmMmMtODI1MC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lyDqI8twR8nGwusnI7Xgn3NT_B5g8vuuTw0myFWAP2c=)

Pride has always been a special time for me and my family, Peter.

My wife Cheryl and I love marching in our local Pride parade each year — but Pride is more than just a celebration. It’s a time to reflect on the strides we’ve made to be able to live freely and authentically — and to demand _more_ from our leaders.

The first Pride — following the Stonewall riots of 1969 — was a _**protest**_ in response to the government’s anti-LGBTQ+ policies. We should never lose sight of that.

The Trump administration is going after the LGBTQ+ community nonstop. Lord knows we need to stand up for our rights now more than ever.

I’m running for U.S. Senate to be a fierce defender of LGBTQ+ folks and to fight against the GOP’s harmful policies — from targeting marriage equality to passing bathroom bills and book bans.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Sign on: No crypto scams from the Oval Office

body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8710%2E5257348%2EJEhU7Q)
Derek,
Donald Trump is once again using the presidency for personal gain.
_Can anyone be surprised that the most corrupt president of our lifetime is once again using the Oval Office to cash in?_
The latest scheme? He’s promoting and profiting from a meme coin tied to his name. Not as a private citizen — but as the president.
And Trump’s family is launching a stablecoin through a company called World Liberty Financial, which directly benefits Trump as well. Gulf nations are investing billions in it to curry favor with the president so they can influence U.S. policy in the Middle East. With another war going on there right now, the American people shouldn’t have to wonder whether his decision-making is in our interests or his own.
This isn’t just inappropriate and corrupt. It’s a serious abuse of power. Public officials should be working for the people, not cashing in on digital assets from the White House.
Trump’s net worth has skyrocketed since he was sworn in for his second term. Meanwhile, our economy is in turmoil, and people are struggling to get by.
We can’t let these crypto and meme coin schemes continue.
That’s why I introduced the _**COIN Act**_ — to stop this kind of corruption. Here’s what it would do:
* Ban public officials, including the President, Vice President, Members of Congress, and special government employees, from promoting or profiting off cryptocurrencies while in office.
* Require full disclosure of crypto holdings in official financial reports.
* Give regulators the tools to hold violators accountable with real penalties.

**[If you believe no one should be allowed to use public office to boost their crypto portfolio, I hope you’ll add your name in support of the _COIN Act_ :](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20250623-coin-act.TN-VQw&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250623_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8710%2E5257348%2EJEhU7Q)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20250623-coin-act.TN-VQw&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250623_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8710%2E5257348%2EJEhU7Q)
---
We need serious ethics reform. The _COIN Act_ is an important step toward restoring public trust and protecting democracy from profiteers.
Thanks for standing with me.
— Adam

name: Stasha Rhodes, United for Democracy
subject: Defending trans youth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The MAGA Supreme Court’s anti-trans ruling will hurt hundreds of thousands of kids. Our coalition is coordinating direct aid. | |
---
Peter, When the MAGA Supreme Court ruled against trans kids last week, United for Democracy jumped into action. **We published rapid response materials, provided our allies across the country with talking points and social media, and took to the streets to tell the MAGA justices loud and clear—we won’t stand for your attacks on our most vulnerable communities.** The decision is horrible for our democracy. It sets up the Court’s ability to chip away at trans rights and allows discrimination on the basis of sex. But it will also impact hundreds of thousands of trans kids in the coming months and years, ripping away critical healthcare. **That’s why our coalition isn’t just working to fight back against the Court—we’re also organizing direct aid to trans youth in the wake of this devastating ruling.** Two organizations in our coalition in particular are doing incredible work: **The National Center for Transgender Equality** and **EqualityCA**. Both groups work directly with the trans community to ensure our trans friends and neighbors receive the resources, support, and healthcare they need to thrive. [**The time is now to stand up, fight back, and support trans youth. Can you rush a donation today to be split between us and our allies at The National Center for Transgender Equality and EqualityCA?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6UrltitYbCpdKJukdnw6DTztYcoEAHQ71SJF-wHaNEnHA0v9WSsI9MAONE29BZOUZyFwjBeBRAcjT4gCW107EHkphexCNgXDQqmm17wXfk4P2a0awgT7nbFjv2_wVfm1Z2girw-3bd-GFl2G0KxtULNxgj4fct5djXiogluJxS4HOyRlmVZtkwKiI9OUUmXVl-0w6lv9Om-4XTOqkwZBJd1OkHieZfqJ-m9pYCgJn4Mb26gIbUBf3MR57btqbjsYz4941xtsWup1R1ycnhPlpRQ/4hl/iUE1TJm9TMmWkUA32pmMtA/h0/h001.sF8HmjzHKZXd5F1CPS8vW5XUWX69GISagFTAtC4OG2k) [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6UrltitYbCpdKJukdnw6DT7xj6HKy_ZBTdZ_XKVgXgRwik45soNwUAy9vAPpjezgV9hNYpOC8CL14EpsGS2HtJZ6QtZKjbqut6jCSrDizRO5rWfQUaKdV7b3f8KNBEnWmMLX3olLG8T_ofVoEQb9jKld0zuZOKamwU0B9PtvC9_nmxrFOfCceD9XN14ywp-dFYgbiskoZgKi_1DATwyJwbjc_Gy3vqXsLko9dGJsQA0LZGAi3SOXw_6jrMxg6BTHzQvyb61hlkK1Fb7LBLprCjA/4hl/iUE1TJm9TMmWkUA32pmMtA/h1/h001.nyzJwe5wGPn7wdN1IWFDU2MrogftcI3tduBO9IBWzDU) **In an era in which our government and our Courts are rigging the system for the wealthy and powerful and against the rest of us, direct aid is one of the most important things we can do.** We’re proud to be a coalition of hundreds of organizations fighting for democracy. And in these moments, it’s extremely important to make sure our allies who provide direct aid to the trans community have the resources they need to help as many people as possible. **Your donation split between us and our allies at The National Center for Transgender Equality and EqualityCA will go to supporting trans youth affected by the MAGA Court’s hateful ruling, and will help fund the fight to stand up to the Court’s attack on our democracy.** [**Chip in $5 today to support direct aid to trans youth in the wake of the MAGA Supreme Court’s anti-trans healthcare ruling.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6UrltitYbCpdKJukdnw6DT0uhBj5aHLaI7T_XLeaX8e54kA603CvK3srJa79M--qjiEKyxBe4ygsatCdkV25IyLxiaxeXb1r9Ucp3ekcLVfz-oXAIFUGsuJZmJabLloc3ia5m7VFudCkK6By9Bx95WcO8omeuoBN0Al_5927gUPHEuSIOvWKzWag89xwFqE-fZWYOUbD-xUNW4VNNr2ht2LzGYfWwq8EXya_nqpxYXrppaJEFcl8I7gd5IijSj0qqdmcLUlrkv8AyhHseH1LwEg/4hl/iUE1TJm9TMmWkUA32pmMtA/h2/h001.-CYCPoThqRKu4EjJEyhmP4R90kxuMqfQYMIN1qqc9r4) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between The National Center for Transgender Equality, EqualityCA, and United for Democracy_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6KlPia50b3sDRT2Y1QWpa6GqeWFcu2DGGyU7za2r5XqzJ3xmc5tODF_6tvIBo6bNlFeddAIST1rXEeH1KQT4htBhHP67mxGyQwjRhvVV7ZfqqJnOi7zJ-egtGj2V1Yu73glfhieYAA7yzaDE4rPPpGo8wpZWkm2zfLS2BiPVP1-h6Haz6xLsX5Kr6bC1WhmSnI1M1_l_g1zsbg0nG06SskATeFK6KFUBkXoQhofDkyl_YYtUwAqbRBjYFzxVIuM89S7msTbvoy5HQAxSNdHkDXQm3TaupQ1OuoF7op4uSc6ZuA2cQB0XttwiYpCTtVQKt/4hl/iUE1TJm9TMmWkUA32pmMtA/h3/h001.n4MfrXPmnTr6ueP7IrQ2ZTWPFtXMjC3bA3HLTWcdYzw)

clean_body: The MAGA Supreme Court’s anti-trans ruling will hurt hundreds of thousands of kids. Our coalition is coordinating direct aid. | | Peter, When the MAGA Supreme Court ruled against trans kids last week, United for Democracy jumped into action. We published rapid response materials, provided our allies across the country with talking points and social media, and took to the streets to tell the MAGA justices loud and clear—we won’t stand for your attacks on our most vulnerable communities. The decision is horrible for our democracy. It sets up the Court’s ability to chip away at trans rights and allows discrimination on the basis of sex. But it will also impact hundreds of thousands of trans kids in the coming months and years, ripping away critical healthcare. That’s why our coalition isn’t just working to fight back against the Court—we’re also organizing direct aid to trans youth in the wake of this devastating ruling. Two organizations in our coalition in particular are doing incredible work: The National Center for Transgender Equality and EqualityCA. Both groups work directly with the trans community to ensure our trans friends and neighbors receive the resources, support, and healthcare they need to thrive. In an era in which our government and our Courts are rigging the system for the wealthy and powerful and against the rest of us, direct aid is one of the most important things we can do. We’re proud to be a coalition of hundreds of organizations fighting for democracy. And in these moments, it’s extremely important to make sure our allies who provide direct aid to the trans community have the resources they need to help as many people as possible. Your donation split between us and our allies at The National Center for Transgender Equality and EqualityCA will go to supporting trans youth affected by the MAGA Court’s hateful ruling, and will help fund the fight to stand up to the Court’s attack on our democracy. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between The National Center for Transgender Equality, EqualityCA, and United for Democracy | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for supporting your community, Stasha Rhodes United for Democracy Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . | **_Apartment Hunting Checklist:_**
Application Fee: $50-$150
Security Deposit: $2,000
Amenity Fee: $500
Rent budget: ???
Credit: 😅
---
$100 dollars on average.

**That’s how much it costs just to apply for an apartment in Orlando. In some other US cities, it’s _even more expensive._**

And I’m not just citing numbers – I’ve experienced this crisis firsthand.

I was priced out of my home while running for Congress, and was houseless for two months. When I finally made it to Congress and moved to D.C., I was denied from multiple apartment buildings because unfair housing policies tanked my credit. There was no way to win.

It doesn’t have to be like that. That’s why I ran for Congress in the first place – because I know better than the career politicians out there that our system is _broken._

That’s also why I need YOUR help to keep me in Congress and bring more people into this movement – because I can’t fix a broken system alone.

**I’m counting on your support to prove that there's strong grassroots energy behind a bold housing agenda.**

[**_So Peter, I have to ask: Will you donate $27 right now so I can stay in Congress and keep building the movement we need to deliver on housing reform nationwide?_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/cyZNjhC7PP3ZAPlAquM4uQ~~/AAPPABA~/UQf3-_zdOU-_wxOMENUNgG1wjwKmJ6m0V221PBuZV9OsgdqKpVd1rpfPqks94pijqdM08dT1Wk6140pQYDacwdshEsNAqJcLpxjoY9mNtkjs-mHZ8NjwGw-lABHY69Oeca8nksP2Wn4I6sDxJYmLFF0INfTqhcLj9BXqgBasN_7wXTXip7In_vtFgF01IK0lHibzxDbz-TQs0BS6IBSm-AONzkdMix8Tddpej0lWfK8iX4dhCmTzZGah9eRGMpGJHSlKran09QJUbusrybQlW90v_3C4jVPx-pQWklzTQ3O_gIg6Ih272cAqua1k4ZkI_Srhg4Zd8kRi0TM94rU1yW-xQw0hiD8qQ20cBg9eTd8~)

clean_body: | ~ | Apartment Hunting Checklist: Application Fee: $50-$150 Security Deposit: $2,000 Amenity Fee: $500 Rent budget: ??? Credit: 😅 $100 dollars on average. That’s how much it costs just to apply for an apartment in Orlando. In some other US cities, it’s even more expensive. And I’m not just citing numbers – I’ve experienced this crisis firsthand. I was priced out of my home while running for Congress, and was houseless for two months. When I finally made it to Congress and moved to D.C., I was denied from multiple apartment buildings because unfair housing policies tanked my credit. There was no way to win. It doesn’t have to be like that. That’s why I ran for Congress in the first place – because I know better than the career politicians out there that our system is broken. That’s also why I need YOUR help to keep me in Congress and bring more people into this movement – because I can’t fix a broken system alone. I’m counting on your support to prove that there's strong grassroots energy behind a bold housing agenda. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | - | | ~~ We’re in this together, Maxwell | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Our endorsement in the NYC Mayor’s race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We’re done with the status quo.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250623-2&t=1&akid=2291%2E587540%2EZLozeI)
Peter,
Hey, Peter — we have a major update:
**Leaders We Deserve is endorsing Zohran Mamdani for Mayor of New York City.**
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2017?t=2&akid=2291%2E587540%2EZLozeI)
Zohran is running to:
🚌 Make buses fast and free
🍎 Create city-owned grocery stores with lower prices
👮 Create a Department of Community Safety
🍼 Guarantee universal, free childcare
🏠 Freeze the rent for 2 million rent-stabilized tenants AND build more housing
He’s running on a platform that will actually make New York affordable for our generation, not just billionaires. We’re proud to support his campaign — **are you with us, Peter?**
**[Sign up to volunteer tomorrow, primary election day, to help Zohran win this race!](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2017?t=3&akid=2291%2E587540%2EZLozeI)**
**[Volunteer »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2017?t=4&akid=2291%2E587540%2EZLozeI)**
Zohran’s not just running to make housing, transit, and everyday life affordable for working-class New Yorkers — he’s running to save New York from Andrew Cuomo.
Yes, _that_ Cuomo.
The same Cuomo who resigned in disgrace after multiple sexual harassment allegations. The same Cuomo whose billionaire buddies are now attempting to bankroll his comeback.
**But our generation knows better.** We know this system has protected abusers and sold out everyday people for too damn long. We’re standing up and doing something about it.
We’re done with billionaires purchasing elections. We’re done with predators clinging to power. We’re done with politicians who always fail us. **We’re done with the status quo.**
And tomorrow, New Yorkers have a chance to prove it at the ballot box.
We’re doing everything we can to blanket NYC with ads and turn out voters for Zohran — but we need all hands on deck. We need this team to show up big and help Zohran win.
**[Can you sign up to volunteer with Zohran's campaign on election day? Even if you don’t live in New York, you can help phonebank and make sure we reach every voter!](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2017?t=5&akid=2291%2E587540%2EZLozeI)**
**[Volunteer »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2017?t=6&akid=2291%2E587540%2EZLozeI)**
Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250623-2&t=7&refcode2=2291_587540_ZLozeI&akid=2291%2E587540%2EZLozeI)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=2291%2E587540%2EZLozeI)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=2291%2E587540%2EZLozeI)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter,
While you weren't looking this weekend, Senate Republicans were busy cooking the books.
Late Saturday night, in the middle of Trump's air strike on Iran, Republicans took advantage of the moment to release a tax plan that looks like it only costs $441 billion... but is one big fat scam.
They used a brand-new, never-before-used accounting trick to hide the real cost of their mega bill: over $4 TRILLION in permanent tax breaks for the wealthy and big corporations.
Here's how it works:
They're pretending the Trump tax cuts — which are set to expire — are already permanent, so extending them doesn't "count." But it's fake math, Peter!
Meanwhile, Republicans are STILL proposing massive cuts to Social Security, Medicare, and education to "pay" for it.
We're blowing the whistle, but we need your help. Will you chip in $10 or more now to power our rapid-response GOTV campaign and fight back? This year, there are critical elections in Virginia and New Jersey, and we want to ensure Republicans know that Democrats are motivated and ready to hold them accountable. Meanwhile, Republicans are STILL proposing massive cuts to Social Security, Medicare, and education to "pay" for it. We're blowing the whistle, but we need your help. name: Team Pramila
subject: xenophobic and discriminatory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It’s back.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250623-5172-footer&t=1&akid=5172%2E420207%2EGIwRM0)
**Peter, Trump's xenophobic travel ban is back.**
Earlier this month, he reinstated this discriminatory policy, restricting legal immigration from more than a dozen countries. Now, he’s gearing up to expand it to _36 more countries._
This is a direct attack on legal immigration that will tear families apart, lock out students and workers, and block refugees from seeking safety. And it sends a shameful message about who is welcome in our country — and who isn’t.
Because let’s be clear: **Trump’s new travel ban isn’t about national security, Peter.** It’s about fear. It’s about continuing to scapegoat immigrants of color, while at the same time openly welcoming white South Africans under the false narrative that they’re the ones facing oppression.
**That’s why Pramila is fighting to pass the _No Ban Act_ in the House**, legislation to stop discriminatory travel bans — and she’s counting on this people-powered movement to help.
[**Peter, will you pitch in $3 to help Pramila fight against Trump’s Travel Ban 2.0 and continue organizing to build a just, humane immigration system?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250623-1?refcode=em20250623-5172&amount=3&refcode2=5172_420207_GIwRM0&akid=5172%2E420207%2EGIwRM0)

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: A little about me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
I grew up in a working-class family as the granddaughter of a police officer and the daughter of two teachers.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110117445/553329826/-629675555?refcode=email_062325_RS-011625&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODUzNjJmNTQtODc1MC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5vPxIdQOmYKtrEa5npB6ysgLfdkfn-oyg9ZepAT2wq8=) Friend, I grew up in a working-class family as the granddaughter of a police officer and the daughter of two teachers. When I was a child, my interest in engineering led to a college scholarship to study electrical engineering. After working for General Motors, I transitioned to running a small business with my husband, Mark, operating four restaurants in our community. I’ve continued to embody the ideals taught to me early in life, by providing new opportunities to our employees through scholarships and mentorship. Now, after serving my community in the Oregon State Legislature, I am honored to be serving my community in the Congress, as the first Black U.S. Representative from Oregon. In Congress, who I am and where I came from will always be top of mind and why **I'll fight to expand educational opportunities, create good-paying jobs, and lower everyday costs. ** We won a tight race by just a few thousand votes, thanks to the belief and strength of this grassroots team. But the work has just begun. 2024 was full of challenges and 2026 will be no different. In order to protect this seat, we will need resources early to fight against Republican extremism in Congress. clean_body: I grew up in a working-class family as the granddaughter of a police officer and the daughter of two teachers. = Friend, I grew up in a working-class family as the granddaughter of a police officer and the daughter of two teachers. When I was a child, my interest in engineering led to a college scholarship to study electrical engineering. After working for General Motors, I transitioned to running a small business with my husband, Mark, operating four restaurants in our community. I’ve continued to embody the ideals taught to me early in life, by providing new opportunities to our employees through scholarships and mentorship. Now, after serving my community in the Oregon State Legislature, I am honored to be serving my community in the Congress, as the first Black U.S. Representative from Oregon. In Congress, who I am and where I came from will always be top of mind and why I'll fight to expand educational opportunities, create good-paying jobs, and lower everyday costs. We won a tight race by just a few thousand votes, thanks to the belief and strength of this grassroots team. But the work has just begun. 2024 was full of challenges and 2026 will be no different. name: Jena Griswold
subject: weaponizing the DOJ… again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Peter –
Last month, Donald Trump’s Department of Justice made an unprecedented move: they requested that my office turn over years of election records, going all the way back to 2020. The request came just days after Trump called for the DOJ to help secure the release of Tina Peters, the Mesa County clerk who compromised her election equipment and was sentenced to nine years of incarceration.
Trump has weaponized the DOJ and tried to use the power of the federal government to undermine confidence in our democracy. But he will not succeed. Our elections are safe and secure. Pushing out conspiracies does not change that.
I’ve spent my entire career defending our elections, and as Attorney General, I will continue to stand up for our democracy. But I need your help to win this race.
Can you chip in a donation to my campaign today so I can continue protecting our Democracy as Attorney General? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250620-email]
Thank you for standing with me.
Jena Griswold
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

Dear Peter, ** ** ************ Across the country, Radical Leftists have taken to the streets to declare that America has no king. These violent protesters have the **audacity** to claim that President Donald Trump is a tyrant!
We know that the lawfully-elected President is not a king, but there is a group of despots who Americans should be worried about.
The real kings running America into the ground are the **CORRUPT LEFTIST AND RINO FEDERAL JUDGES** who twist and distort the Constitution to stop the will of the people and strip us of our sacred rights.
It's time we call it for what it is: **A FEDERAL JUDICIAL COUP**
The America-First agenda won in 2024, but every attempt by this administration to save our country is being thwarted by corrupt leftist federal judges. They are desperate to strip the executive of his constitutional powers!

No-Name Leftist Federal Judges are popping up out of nowhere with an evil agenda:
**🚨End deportations** ******🚨Resume funding to the Deep State** ******🚨Stop election security measures**
But when you've dedicated your life to suing Democrat traitors like Hillary Clinton, Barack Obama, George Soros - and even the leaders of the **Black Lives Matter** movement - you stop being afraid of the Marxists and learn to **FIGHT WITH PASSION**.
Allow me to introduce myself:
My name is **Larry Klayman**. I'm a lawyer who is proud to be the biggest pain the Clintons and Bidens have ever faced.
My nonprofit, **Freedom Watch USA** , exposes and prosecutes domestic and foreign corruption. These are just some of the traitors we are up against:
**Judge William Orrick** \- an Obama-worshipping Californian who issued a satanic injunction to protect sanctuary cities that harbor illegal alien murderers and rapists.
**Judges Paula Xinis & Stephanie Gallagher** - two open-border radicals who ordered illegal gang member Kilmar Abrego Garcia be brought back to America after being lawfully deported by the Trump administration,
**Judge Hannah Dugan** - a Milwaukee leftist who escorted an illegal alien out of her court room so that he could escape ICE arrest and deportation.

**It begs the question:** **Who are these federal judges working for?**

These crazed leftist and RINO federal judges **must** be impeached and prosecuted for repeatedly violating their oaths of office.
That's why we need **YOUR HELP!**
Freedom Watch is leading the peaceful and legal fight to prosecute them, just like we did with the Clintons, the Bidens, and Anthony Fauci.
We just cannot do it without the support of patriots like **YOU.**
With **YOUR** financial support behind us, Freedom Watch will embark on a **RELENTLESS CRUSADE** to expose these judicial traitors, their corrupt ties, and their **BRAZEN** political activism in the federal courts.
Will you rush back your **END THE FEDERAL JUDICIAL COUP** urgent reply with $35 or more to lead this fight with us?
Right now, we are fighting an uphill battle against the **DARKEST** , most powerful stronghold of the Deep State.
In fact, only EIGHT judges have been impeached in 247 YEARS!
The last to be impeached was Alcee Hastings for bribery, but the **SHAMELESS** Democrats made him a member of Congress instead!
It's clear that the Leftist plan to take over America was hatched in the dark corners of the judiciary.
Now, it's all coming to light as they fight tooth and nail to stop the America-First agenda.
There are hundreds of crooked leftist federal judges waiting in the wings for their turn to stop the will of the American people and destroy our constitutional republic.
That's why it's **CRUCIAL** that you don't leave this message unanswered.
My team and I are up against a **BILLIONAIRE-BACKED LEFTIST HORDE** , and our resources are being stretched to their breaking point. But your $35 donation in the next 48 hours can change that.

We just cannot do it without the support of patriots like YOU. With YOUR financial support behind us, Freedom Watch will embark on a RELENTLESS CRUSADE to expose these judicial traitors, their corrupt ties, and their BRAZEN political activism in the federal courts. Will you rush back your END THE FEDERAL JUDICIAL COUP urgent reply with $35 or more to lead this fight with us? Right now, we are fighting an uphill battle against the DARKEST , most powerful stronghold of the Deep State. In fact, only EIGHT judges have been impeached in 247 YEARS! The last to be impeached was Alcee Hastings for bribery, but the SHAMELESS Democrats made him a member of Congress instead! It's clear that the Leftist plan to take over America was hatched in the dark corners of the judiciary. Now, it's all coming to light as they fight tooth and nail to stop the America-First agenda. There are hundreds of crooked leftist federal judges waiting in the wings for their turn to stop the will of the American people and destroy our constitutional republic. That's why it's CRUCIAL that you don't leave this message unanswered. My team and I are up against a BILLIONAIRE-BACKED LEFTIST HORDE , and our resources are being stretched to their breaking point. But your $35 donation in the next 48 hours can change that. The quicker YOU respond, the quicker Freedom Watch can END THE FEDERAL JUDICIAL COUP being run on President Trump and the American people. DON 'T HESITATE. The crooked leftist and RINO federal judges are counting on patriots like you to ignore the FEDERAL JUDICIAL COUP that's destroying America. Thank you for your time and support. For Our Sacred Republic, Larry Klayman Founder, Judicial Watch & Freedom Watch P.S. # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110117674/553330685/2039042026?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmQ1ODAwOTItODg1MC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=thHM6eQw08TNop3yiinrluZ6YK1sUyTmX09BhBuIIBU=)
This is infuriating.

JD Vance was just in Los Angeles, where he defended sending Marines into our streets, then mocked Sen. Alex Padilla by calling him “José Padilla” -- the name of a convicted terrorist.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110117675/553330686/2039042026?refcode=em-6.23.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmQ1ODAwOTItODg1MC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=thHM6eQw08TNop3yiinrluZ6YK1sUyTmX09BhBuIIBU=)

After disrespecting our city and senator, he went on to headline a high-dollar fundraiser in Beverly Hills with Trump’s billionaire allies. **They’re planning to funnel that cash into flipping districts like mine.**

My parents risked everything for my freedom, and I won this seat by just 653 votes. I’m not backing down to Vance or anyone else trying to divide our community and buy this seat.

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I showed up for Californians when Young Kim didn’t.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Pitch in to help fuel my Town Hall Tour so we can keep holding Trump’s Republicans accountable. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110117706/553330725/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmUxM2M5OS04ODUwLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mhUtZqMvBj700Y7hmYRNjaJ8XCia2lQWQKu9btdSZ_8=&emci=5d67e73e-8550-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=dbe13c99-8850-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7878003)
You were promised lower prices on Day One. You were promised an end to all wars. You were promised your Social Security would remain untouched. **Trump made those promises on Day One, and after over 150 days in office, he’s officially 0 for 150, friend.** And what’s Young Kim doing about it? **Absolutely _nothing_.** She hasn’t held a town hall. In fact, she’s been ordered by Republican leadership _not to speak to you_. Apparently, the only way to talk to your member of Congress in CA-40 is to pay to attend a fundraiser. To that, I say: **_Hell no._** That’s why last week, I held a town hall in Young Kim’s district to listen, to answer questions, and to stand in the gap where she won’t — **and friend, there wasn’t an empty seat in the house.** Every day across the country, people are joining our movement to hold the MAGA Right accountable because they’re tired of getting screwed over by the people they voted for to keep their promise to lower costs and protect their Social Security. **[Friend, I won’t stop exposing Republicans who’d rather hide behind Trump than face their own voters, but I need your help to keep my Town Hall Tour going. clean_body: Pitch in to help fuel my Town Hall Tour so we can keep holding Trump’s Republicans accountable. | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. You were promised lower prices on Day One. You were promised an end to all wars. You were promised your Social Security would remain untouched. Trump made those promises on Day One, and after over 150 days in office, he’s officially 0 for 150, friend. And what’s Young Kim doing about it? Absolutely nothing. She hasn’t held a town hall. In fact, she’s been ordered by Republican leadership not to speak to you. Apparently, the only way to talk to your member of Congress in CA-40 is to pay to attend a fundraiser. To that, I say: Hell no. That’s why last week, I held a town hall in Young Kim’s district to listen, to answer questions, and to stand in the gap where she won’t — and friend, there wasn’t an empty seat in the house. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I’m getting primaried by RINOs
body:
RINOS, Neocons, and Never Trumpers are coming after me.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e304502/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvVnJwR1VBNFRIRA/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2MjM/LbmNsWWx2dTNNQQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNXR1F1N3d5Rnoza0tscw/gaFnhgw/sfk2dc3010e)
| | | | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
The RINOs, Neocons, and Never Trumpers in Washington, D.C. hate me because I have the courage to call for peace and refuse to take their dirty money. _They are fake people_ ,_they are liars_ ,_and they hate you and me_.
**_[Which is exactly why they are actively funding a primary opponent against me](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)_.**
They are trying to take over our America First MAGA movement and usher in a new era of warmongers in Congress. In their minds, President Trump is a speed bump in history, and the Republican Party will return to the party of Neocons and forever wars.
[DONATE NOW](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
I’ve been fighting against these evil people since the day I first announced for Congress, and I’m still fighting them today.
They are slandering me as an anti-Semite because I don’t want to go to war with Iran, and nothing could be farther from the truth.
**I support Israel.**
**_I don’t support the secular Israeli Government trying to drag America into another endless foreign war._**
Being America First isn’t anti-semitic, and I refuse to be branded as a hateful person for standing up for my country and my Christian faith which teaches me “thou shall not murder”.
**I have the courage to stand on my convictions, and the RINOs and Neocons are coming after me because I have the courage to stand up to them.**
you, I’m asking you to stand with me at this moment as I face the biggest political fight of my life.
**_[If you’re able, please consider making a donation of any amount to my primary campaign](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)_.**
[DONATE NOW](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
_In One Nation Under God,_
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

It’s time to get real
Peter — we’re heading into one of the biggest deadlines of the year.

At the end of this month, we’ll submit our official end-of-quarter report to the **_Federal Elections Committee_**. It lays out where our money came from and what kind of support we’ve built. That report is public — and Republicans will absolutely be looking at it.

And this isn’t just about keeping the lights on — this is about winning three open seats on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court. That’s the biggest thing on the ballot this year, period. We cannot afford to give the far right a majority on the court that controls abortion access, redistricting, and the future of our democracy in this state.

clean_body: | | | It’s time to get real Peter — we’re heading into one of the biggest deadlines of the year. At the end of this month, we’ll submit our official end-of-quarter report to the Federal Elections Committee. It lays out where our money came from and what kind of support we’ve built. That report is public — and Republicans will absolutely be looking at it. And this isn’t just about keeping the lights on — this is about winning three open seats on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court. That’s the biggest thing on the ballot this year, period. We cannot afford to give the far right a majority on the court that controls abortion access, redistricting, and the future of our democracy in this state. = = This is the part where we either double down on what’s working, or start making cuts. We’d rather keep scaling — but that depends on what happens right now. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, — Mitch Kates = | Follow us on , , and **! name: StateDemocrats.com
subject: Are YOU concerned about DOGE accessing your Social Security data?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
This includes addresses, phone numbers, health records, marital + parental status...
#

**_— LIVE POLL —_** **Are you concerned about Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) accessing your Social Security data?** **[YES — I'M CONCERNED](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-survey-20250623?t=1&akid=9041%2E614464%2Ez45860)** **[NO — IT'S OK WITH ME](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-survey-20250623?t=2&akid=9041%2E614464%2Ez45860)** **[I'M NOT REALLY SURE](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-survey-20250623?t=3&akid=9041%2E614464%2Ez45860)** **Earlier this month, the U.S. Supreme Court ruled that DOGE can access your _sensitive personal information._** **That includes birth certificates, addresses, phone numbers, health records, marital + parental status...** We think most Americans would agree on this... **DOGE shouldn’t be anywhere near our Social Security data.** But after this ruling, we need to confirm with you, Peter: **Are you concerned about Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) accessing your personal information?** **[YES — I'M CONCERNED](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-survey-20250623?t=4&akid=9041%2E614464%2Ez45860)** **[NO — IT'S OK WITH ME](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-survey-20250623?t=5&akid=9041%2E614464%2Ez45860)** **[I'M NOT REALLY SURE](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-survey-20250623?t=6&akid=9041%2E614464%2Ez45860)**
---

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=8&akid=9041%2E614464%2Ez45860).
clean_body: This includes addresses, phone numbers, health records, marital + parental status... — LIVE POLL — Are you concerned about Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) accessing your Social Security data? Earlier this month, the U.S. Supreme Court ruled that DOGE can access your sensitive personal information. That includes birth certificates, addresses, phone numbers, health records, marital + parental status... We think most Americans would agree on this... DOGE shouldn’t be anywhere near our Social Security data. But after this ruling, we need to confirm with you, Peter: Are you concerned about Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) accessing your personal information? Peter, let’s call it what it is: **the Republicans’ latest budget proposal is nothing short of a betrayal.** Their plan slashes essential services for working families, dismantles protections for women and parents, and prioritizes tax breaks for billionaires and giant corporations. This isn’t just a disagreement — it’s a full-scale assault on opportunity, equality, and economic fairness. Cuts to Medicaid. Attacks on reproductive rights. Rollbacks on programs for kids, veterans, and seniors. This is what's at stake. Fair Shot PAC is fighting back, but we need your help. name: DNC HQ
subject: Two things:
body:
---
Derek — This moment demands a Democratic Party that can do two things: 1\. Mobilize and organize against Trump and his congressional allies’ harmful policies. 2\. Build the infrastructure we need to elect Democrats at all levels of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. With your help, that’s exactly what we’re doing. The DNC is investing $1 million each month in every single state party. We’re already seeing that work pay off: Democrats have massively overperformed in election after election this year. Thanks to supporters like you, we helped stop Elon Musk from buying a Supreme Court seat in Wisconsin. We massively overperformed in two Florida Congressional races. We’ve won tough races in cities like Omaha, while flipping a district in Pennsylvania that went to Trump by 15 points in 2024. Now, we’re preparing for upcoming elections in Virginia and New Jersey, where it will take all hands on deck to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. There has never been a more important time to join the fight, and it’s going to take all of us stepping up to check Trump and his administration at every turn while working to elect Democrats who will do the same. [That’s why we’re coming to you today, Derek. Can we count on you to chip in $3 today to support the DNC’s work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-june-2025?refcode=em_20250623_3791_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3791_22930333_r5mtl0&akid=3791%2E22930333%2Er5mtl0) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-june-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250623_3791_fr&refcode2=3791_22930333_r5mtl0&akid=3791%2E22930333%2Er5mtl0)**
